technologies: Not Specified
keywords: Smart Marketplace, On-demand Services, Escrow Payments, Rule-based Recommendation, Technician Selection, Dispute Management, Anomaly Detection, Service Management.
abstract: This project presents the design and development of a smart service marketplace platform that connects customers in need of on-demand services with qualified technicians through a secure, structured, and intelligent workflow. The system aims to address common challenges in traditional service markets, such as lack of trust, inefficient technician selection, payment disputes, and service quality assurance. The proposed platform supports two primary user roles: customers and technicians. Customers can register, create detailed service requests, receive price offers, select suitable technicians, and securely complete payments through an escrow-based payment mechanism. Technicians can register, define their service category, update their location, view nearby service requests, submit fixed-price offers, and receive payments only after service completion is confirmed. An administrative role is included to manage account verification, resolve disputes, monitor system activity, and ensure platform integrity. A key feature of the system is a rule-based technician recommendation module that ranks technicians based on multiple factors, including historical ratings, geographic proximity, service completion history, responsiveness, and reliability metrics. Additionally, the platform integrates artificial intelligence models for rating calculation and anomaly detection to enhance fairness, prevent feedback manipulation, and maintain trust within the marketplace. The system incorporates a comprehensive booking and payment flow, where customer payments are securely held in escrow and released to technicians only after successful service completion or administrative confirmation. Dispute handling mechanisms are implemented to protect both parties and ensure transparent resolution processes. Overall, this project delivers a scalable, secure, and intelligent service management solution that improves service quality, enhances user trust, and optimizes technician selection through data-driven decision-making.
description: With the rapid advancement of information technology and the widespread use of smart devices, digital platforms have become essential tools for delivering services efficiently and reliably. Many everyday services such as maintenance, repairs, and technical support still rely on traditional methods that suffer from poor organization, lack of transparency, unreliable pricing, and limited trust between customers and service providers. These issues often result in wasted time, inconsistent service quality, and unresolved disputes. This graduation project addresses these challenges by designing and implementing an intelligent service marketplace system that connects customers with qualified technicians through a secure and structured digital platform. The proposed system enables customers to submit service requests, receive offers from nearby technicians, compare options, and complete payments in a safe and transparent manner. At the same time, technicians are provided with a platform to showcase their skills, respond to relevant service requests, and receive fair compensation after successful service completion. The system is designed with multiple user roles, including customers, technicians, and administrators, each with clearly defined responsibilities and access permissions. To enhance trust and service quality, the platform integrates a rating and feedback mechanism, an escrow-based payment process, and administrative dispute management. In addition, the system employs data-driven techniques to support technician recommendation and performance evaluation based on factors such as ratings, proximity, responsiveness, and service history. This project emphasizes system design, analysis, and implementation, following a structured software engineering methodology. Functional and non-functional requirements are carefully analyzed to ensure scalability, security, usability, and reliability. The proposed solution aims to improve the overall service experience, reduce operational inefficiencies, and establish a trustworthy digital environment for both customers and technicians.
problem_statement: Despite the widespread use of digital platforms, many service-based markets such as maintenance, repair, and technical services still suffer from inefficiency, lack of transparency, and poor trust management. Customers often struggle to find reliable technicians, while technicians face difficulties accessing suitable job opportunities in a fair and organized manner. 1. Difficulty in Finding Reliable Service Providers: Customers frequently rely on informal recommendations or unverified sources when searching for technicians. This approach often results in uncertainty regarding service quality, pricing, and reliability, leading to dissatisfaction and repeated service failures. 2. Inefficient Service Request and Communication Process: Traditional service booking methods lack structured workflows for submitting requests, comparing offers, and tracking service progress. Poor communication between customers and technicians can cause delays, misunderstandings, and incomplete service delivery. 3. Lack of Trust and Secure Payment Handling: One of the major challenges in service marketplaces is the absence of secure payment mechanisms. Customers fear paying before service completion, while technicians risk not receiving payment after delivering the service. The lack of escrow systems and dispute management increases financial risk for both parties. 4. Absence of Intelligent Technician Evaluation and Selection: Existing solutions rarely provide intelligent mechanisms for ranking or recommending technicians based on performance, ratings, proximity, and reliability. This makes it difficult for customers to choose the most suitable technician and limits fair competition among service providers. 5. Limited Administrative Control and Dispute Resolution: Many platforms lack effective administrative oversight to manage user verification, resolve disputes, and monitor system integrity. This reduces platform credibility and affects long-term sustainability. This project addresses these challenges by proposing an intelligent, secure, and scalable service marketplace system that streamlines service requests, enhances trust through escrow-based payments, supports data-driven technician recommendation, and provides administrative control to ensure fairness and reliability.
proposed_solution: This project is an innovative initiative aimed at improving the efficiency, reliability, and transparency of service-based marketplaces by leveraging modern software technologies. The proposed system provides a digital platform that connects customers with qualified technicians, enabling seamless service requests, intelligent technician selection, and secure service execution. The system utilizes structured workflows and data-driven mechanisms to streamline the service lifecycle, starting from request submission and offer comparison to service completion and payment processing. By incorporating intelligent recommendation techniques, the platform assists customers in selecting the most suitable technicians based on multiple factors such as ratings, service history, proximity, and responsiveness. To enhance trust and reliability, the system implements a secure escrow-based payment model that ensures fair transactions for both customers and technicians. Administrative controls are included to manage user verification, monitor system activity, and resolve disputes effectively. The proposed platform is designed to support both professional technicians and service seekers, fostering a transparent and efficient environment for service delivery.
objectives: The primary objective of this project is to design and develop an intelligent and secure service marketplace system that improves the efficiency, transparency, and reliability of service delivery. This objective is achieved through the following goals: Reducing operational inefficiencies by providing a structured, technology-driven platform that streamlines service requests, technician selection, and service execution. Facilitating informed decision making for customers by presenting clear, data driven information about technicians, including ratings, service history, pricing, and proximity. Leveraging intelligent techniques to support technician recommendation and performance evaluation based on multiple criteria such as reliability, responsiveness, and user feedback. Enhancing trust and payment security through an escrow-based payment mechanism that protects both customers and technicians until service completion is confirmed. Optimizing service management by providing user friendly interfaces for customers, technicians, and administrators, ensuring ease of use, scalability, and effective system control.

student_names: Mahmoud Abdelrhim Abdelrhim Saied, Hadeer Gamal Attia Mohamed, Hager Yousef Salah Yousef, Mona Mostafa Abdelaty Hasaneen, Karim Abdelhamid Mohamed, Neama Azazy Foad Kasim, Mostafa Ahmed Said Arafa, Ahmed Magdy Abdelgafar Ahmed
technologies: Google Maps API, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Chatbot
keywords: Medical Diagnosis Chatbot, Online Clinic Reservation, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Symptom Analysis, Healthcare Geolocation, Telemedicine, Electronic Medical Records, Secure Payments.
abstract: Project aim to create application that contain clinics for different Doctors from different specialists, online Reservation system, and Location that help patients to find the nearest clinic, and the patient can reserve an appointment across the online reservation and can pay online (credit card or fawry pay) and application can recommend some doctors to users. A Chatbot, user can use it to detect diseases, user ask bot about symptom and reply to bot with disease of this symptom, paragraph of disease, URL to read more about disease and symptom, user can also ask bot about disease and reply with paragraph of symptom, when to see a doctor, paragraph of Causes, paragraph of risk factors, paragraph of diagnosis, paragraph of treatment, URL of disease.
description: Many people find difficult to search for doctors' clinics that are not far away from them, also some people cannot determine which doctors specializes in their health conditions. So, in this Project, we offer an application for customers to book an appointment in a clinic with doctor easily and can ask chatbot about which doctor can treat him. Application contain a chatbot that has information about diseases and the specialist doctor for each disease. User of application can enter symptoms of the disease that he feels then chatbot take these symptoms and analyze based on dataset, then it displays disease and specialist of doctor which should user visit. After user had knowledge of which doctor should visit, he now wants to book an appointment with a good doctor. Our project contains a list of containing a group of specialities. Each specialty contains a group of most skilled doctors(clinic) in country. Each doctor has a profile user can visit and could book an appointment with any doctor he wants. Application contain location that user can book an appointment with doctor based on nearest location.
problem_statement: 1. overcrowding in medical clinics, which leads to the loss of a lot of time forwaiting for examination in medical clinic. 2. We found that the elderly face difficulty in going to medical clinics and analysis laboratories. 3. Moving of population to new areas leads to difficulty in reaching a medical clinic or doctor. • One of the problems we found that caused us to think seriously about this problem:
proposed_solution: 1. Search for Nearby Clinics and Specialists: • Feature: Users can search for doctors' clinics near their location. • Implementation: Utilize geolocation services (such as Google Maps API) to fetch nearby clinics based on the user's current location. 2. Determine Specialists for Specific Health Conditions: • Feature: Users can find doctors who specialize in specific health conditions. • Implementation: Implement a chatbot integrated with a medical dataset that analyzes symptoms entered by the user to recommend specialists for the detected health condition. Use natural language processing (NLP) techniques to understand and analyze user input. 3. Appointment Booking System: • Implementation: Provide a user-friendly interface where users can view profiles of doctors (including their specialties, qualifications, and patient reviews) and book appointments directly through the application. Integrate a calendar system to check doctor availability and manage bookings. 4. Detailed Doctor Profiles: • Feature: Detailed profiles of doctors available for users to review. • Implementation: Each doctor's profile includes details such as specialty, experience, qualifications, clinic address, availability, and patient ratings. Allow users to filter and sort doctors based on various criteria (e.g., proximity, specialty, ratings). 5. Location-Based Booking: • Feature: Users can book appointments based on nearest clinic locations. • Implementation: Implement location-based search functionality so users can easily find and book appointments at clinics closest to them. Display search results on a map with markers for clinic location. We aimed to help the patient to find the nearest clinic, the patient can reserve an appointment across the online reservation, it can pay within service online and the patient can usethe chatbot till visiting the doctor. • Efficient Appointment Management: Enable patients to book appointments with healthcare professionals or clinics seamlessly. This includes providing a user-friendly interface for scheduling, rescheduling, andcanceling appointments. • Telemedicine Services: Facilitate remote consultations through secure video calls, allowing patients to receive medical advice and treatment remotely. • Patient Information Portal: Offer a secure platform for patients to accesstheir medical records, test results, prescriptions, and other relevant information. • Online Payments and Billing: Provide a secure payment gateway for patients to settle their bills online for consultations, prescriptions, or servicesreceived. • Mobile Responsiveness: Ensure the website is mobile friendly to support users accessing the platform from smartphones or tablets. • Secure Communication Channels: Implement encrypted messaging systems to allow secure communication between patients and healthcareproviders. • Feedback and Reviews: Enable patients to leave reviews and ratings for healthcare services received, aiding others in making informed decisions. • Compliance with Healthcare Regulations: Ensure the website complies with healthcare services received, aiding others in making informed decisions.
objectives: These objectives aim to enhance the accessibility, efficiency, and security of the website for both patients and healthcare providers. healthcare data privacy regulations such as HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act) to safeguard patient data and privacy.

keywords: Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Computer Vision, Gesture Recognition, Virtual Environment, Webcam Interface, Assistive Technology, Motion Tracking, Machine Control.
abstract: Computers are being used in every aspect of our daily life. Beginning from scientific computation and research, computers are assisting us business, banking, e-commerce, publishing, word processing, database management, communication, traffic control etc... Everyday new applications are being developed benefit the human beings. New area of technology is being developed to overcome the limitation of traditional input, output devices of the computer. One of the major trends in the computer communication is to develop applications using virtual environment where direct interaction to the computers through tradio nal 2D keyboard, pen, or mouse-oriented graphical user interfaces are not suitable. Rather devices that sense body (e.g. hand) position and orientation ,direction of gaze, speech and sound, facial expression, galvanic skin response, and other aspects of human behavior or state can be used to model communication between a human and the environment. Significant research efforts are underway to capture human behavior or gesture and develop system for communicating to the medically disabled people, machine controlling, robot controlling, videoconferencing, traffic controlling, etc... Nowadays the majority of the human-computer interaction (HCI) is based on mechanical devices such as keyboards, mouse, joysticks or game pads.
description: In recent years there has been a growing interest in a class of methods based on computer vision due to its ability to recognize human gestures in a natural way. These methods used as input the images acquired from a camera or from a stereo pair of cameras. That use of only basic input such as mouse and keyboard is limiting the creativity and capabilities of the user. In this project we developed a machine-user interface which implements Free hand mouse using simple computer vision techniques. Interface allows the user to use their hands to control the mouse as well as easily move and open windows that are open on their screen. This interface is simple enough to be run using an ordinary webcam and requires little training. Human-computer interaction (HCI) expanding the ways that people are able to interact with their computers through using simple gesture.

project_title: Government Procurement and Warehouse Management System
student_names: Ahmed Mohamed Shaaban Mohamed Ramadan, Aml Sabry Ahmed Al-Khudari Nassar, Ziad Adel Abdullah Eid, Sohaila Amr Mahmoud Khairy, Safwa Mohamed Ahmed Mohamed, Mahmoud Al-Sayed Abdel Aziz Mahmoud, Mohamed Agami Fikry Qutb, Yasmine Abdel Rahman Mahmoud Sayed
technologies: Not Specified
keywords: Digital Transformation, Warehouse Management, Government Procurement, Inventory Tracking, E-Auctions, Egyptian Procurement Law, Strategic Decision Making, Administrative Efficiency.
abstract: Our project Government Procurement and Warehouse Management talks about the digital transformation the two sub systems: Government Procurement Management and Warehouse Management in accordance with the Egyptian Auctions and Tenders Regulation Law No. 89 of 1998 where all processes that were carried out manually will be converted to electronic using a web-based information system to improve efficiency and accuracy and reduce costs and developed to facilitate material management and delivery and improve planning and inventory tracking. The tool will provide an easy-to-use interface for users and provide detailed reports for data analysis and strategic decision making. It is expected that this project will contribute to improving the university's governmental and educational operations and better achieving the institution's goals
description: The government procurement and warehouse system are considered one of the vital systems in organizing and managing government operations. However, these systems may encounter some manual issues that can affect their efficiency and effectiveness. Below are some common problems in government procurement and warehouse system.
problem_statement: The government procurement and warehouse system are considered one of the vital systems in organizing and managing government operations. However, these systems may encounter some manual issues that can affect their efficiency and effectiveness. Below are some common problems in government procurement and warehouse system. Manual system problems: 1- Lack of organization of operations, purchasing management and warehouse management 2- Difficulty communicating with Decision Maker 3- Wasting time and effort due to manual work 4- The possibility of human errors leading to increased chances of administrative errors or manual data entry 5- Difficulty in creating reports 6- Security challenges: You may face challenges related to data security from abroad. 7- Difficulty tracking information. Controlling information manually can be difficult and lead to data loss. 8- Difficulty in creating comprehensive and accurate reports due to manual processes. 9- Difficulty organizing the inventory and ensuring the accuracy of the information. 10- Labor costs may be higher due to the need for additional employees to manage operations. 11- Difficulty in complying with quality and regulatory requirements manually. 12- The difficulty of performing a comprehensive graphical analysis is due to the system's reliance on manual data. 13- Difficulty updating the system manually to keep pace with technological developments and industrial requirements. 14- Difficulty in quality control due to manual processes. Warehouse system problems in previous systems 1- Purchasing warehouse management systems can be expensive, especially for small businesses. 2- The risks of use in some electronics require extensive training for users, which may lead to problems in their adoption. 3- Limited integration, which may include some integration with other systems in the company. 4- The possibility of poor performance in some cases, especially as the volume of data increases. 5- Reliance on an Internet connection in the case of a cloud system, reliance may be on dealing with an Internet connection. 6- Automatic updates may include some problems if they are not fully provided. 7- Security challenges: You may face challenges related to data security from abroad. 8- Difficulty in customizing the solutions: Some solutions may be less customizable to meet the unique needs of the company. 9- Hardware Requirements Some systems may require higher hardware specifications, which causes additional cost.
proposed_solution: Our project aimed solve this problem by transform the Government warehouse and purchasing system based on paper and manual work into an integrated digital system. This project will include the development of a custom software that collects and analyzes data related to inventory and purchases, and provides an easy-to-use interface for employees to manage various operations.

technologies: Camunda, BPMN 2.0
keywords: Business Process Management (BPM), Camunda, BPMN 2.0, Academic Workflow, Postgraduate Studies, Process Automation, Performance Metrics, Transparency & Accountability.
abstract: This project aims to automate and streamline the workflow management of postgraduate studies requests within an academic institution using Camunda, a powerful Business Process Management (BPM) platform. The current manual process for handling requests such as enrollment extension, cancellation, and other academic-related procedures is often time-consuming, error-prone, and lacks transparency. By implementing a digital workflow system, this project seeks to enhance efficiency, improve communication between departments, and provide real-time tracking of request statuses. The system will model various workflows using BPMN 2.0, where each type of request (e.g., enrollment, extension, cancellation, etc.) follows a predefined process involving multiple stakeholders, including the postgraduate studies administration, academic departments, postgraduate committees, and the faculty council. Camunda will serve as the backbone of the system, managing task assignments, approvals, and notifications at each stage of the workflow, and this project focuses on tracking the progress of postgraduate requests and measuring the time taken at each stage. Key features of the system include: • Automated Workflows: Each request type will have a customized workflow, ensuring that requests are processed consistently and efficiently. • Transparency and Tracking: All stakeholders can track the status of a request in real-time, reducing delays and improving accountability. • Automated Notifications: Users will receive alerts if a request requires attention or if there is a delay in processing. • Real-Time Tracking: All stakeholders can view the current status of a request and the time spent at each stage. • Performance Metrics: The system will measure the time taken by each department to process requests, helping identify bottlenecks. This project will contribute to a more efficient and transparent postgraduate studies management process, ultimately benefiting both students and administrative staff. The implementation of a BPM system will not only streamline current processes but also provide a foundation for continuous process improvement in the future.
description: The System is a comprehensive digital automate administrative processes across various departments. It facilitates seamless communication and document processing between departments involved in postgraduate studies, specifically for Master's and Ph.D. applications. By integrating all operations, specifically for workflow, the system minimizes delays, reduces paperwork, and enhances efficiency.

abstract: The explosive growth of malware variants poses a major threat to information security. Traditional anti-virus systems based on signatures fail to classify unknown malware into their corresponding families and to detect new kinds of malware in files. Therefore, we propose a machine learning based malware analysis in different types of files. On the other hand, Phishing is a common attack as they making people easily disclose their unique information using forged websites. The objective of phishing website URLs is to retrieve the personal information like user name, passwords and online banking transactions. As technology continues to grow, phishing techniques started to progress rapidly and this needs to be prevented by using anti-phishing mechanisms to detect phishing, so we are going to provide a solution using Machine learning as it is a powerful tool used to strive against phishing attacks.
description: Recently, malware and phishing attacks are becoming increasingly common forms of crucial threat to cyberspace security. Various types of malwares, such as viruses, trojans, adware, spam, ransomware, spyware, and other intrusive codes, have caused significant harm or damage to users, computers, and networks. The second problem -phishing attacks- in which scammers use social and technological tactics to obtain customer private information, identification, and financial credentials. Therefore, we aim to resolve these two significant concerns quickly and easily.

Our system boasts multiple advantages that set it apart from current systems. Unique Advantages: 1. High Accuracy (99.3%): Our system excels in accuracy, achieving an impressive accuracy rate of 99.3%. This superiority relies on advanced machine learning techniques to distinguish between harmful and safe content, providing an effective solution for users to tackle the latest threats. 2. Fast Results: Response speed is crucial in the cybersecurity field, and our system delivers quick results. Its efficient and optimized design allows for rapid analysis and detection, effectively minimizing the impact of cybersecurity threats. 3. Comprehensive Detection (URL & File): Instead of limiting detection to either URLs or files, our system offers a comprehensive solution covering various threat types. Users can examine malicious links and suspicious files, enhancing protection against the growing threats of the internet. 4. Free of Charge: We take pride in offering cybersecurity protection completely free of charge, without any additional costs. Everyone, regardless of their financial capacity, can benefit from robust protection without the need to pay any fees, making it easily accessible to all.

abstract: Chat Wave is a chat application equipped with cutting-edge technology to enhance the security of voice messages. Our app utilizes an AI model specifically designed for voice message detection. This AI model analyzes uploaded voice messages, examining various acoustic attributes and patterns, to determine their authenticity. By leveraging this technology, Chat Wave offers users a reliable means of verifying the realness of voice messages exchanged within the app.
description: Our app, named "Chat Wave" offers a chat service with advanced features focused on ensuring the security and authenticity of voice messages. In addition to standard messaging capabilities, we have integrated an AI model for voice message detection. This AI model analyses uploaded voice messages to determine if they are real or fake, providing an extra layer of security and trust for our users.
problem_statement: The problem addressed by Chat Wave is the lack of security and authenticity in voice messages exchanged through chat services. Voice messages have become a popular means of communication, but they can be easily manipulated or faked, leading to potential issues such as impersonation, misinformation, or privacy breaches. The challenge is to ensure that voice messages exchanged on the platform are genuine and trustworthy. Seamless management and improves overall efficiency
proposed_solution: Chat-Wave provides a secure chat service by integrating an advanced AI model for real-time voice message detection. This model analyzes various acoustic attributes and patterns of uploaded voice messages, including MFCC, Mel Spectrogram, and Chroma features, to determine their authenticity. Utilizing deep learning techniques, specifically Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) implemented with TensorFlow and Keras, the system identifies manipulated or fake audio, thereby ensuring the genuineness and trustworthiness of communications within the application.
objectives: The objective of the Chat Wave app is to provide a chat service with advanced features that prioritize the security and authenticity of voice messages. By integrating an AI model for voice message detection, the app aims to offer users an extra layer of security and trust in communication.

abstract: Jobify system helps students or graduates to search for a job and apply for a job that suits their requirements. In addition to that, companies offer job opportunities that they need by entering the company's specialization and the characteristics of the required job. This is done by: - 1. Create an account for the company (the employer) on the system, and the field of work of the company and its needs for jobs are determined, and the existence of the company is confirmed on the ground. 2. Create an account for the employee (who is looking for a job) on the system, and his field of work is determined, and his CV is created if it does not exist. For example, when the company offers that it is looking for employees for a specific job, the company enters the characteristics of the job and the system displays the available employees in this specialty to the company, while the system also displays the job at the same time to the employees who are looking for a job in the same specialty as the offered job. In this system, we have saved a lot of effort and time from company (the employer) and employee (who is looking for a job) especially in light of the current circumstances and the spread of covid-19, which gives the system great importance in our societies. The system was built using many programming languages coding the design and create its database: - Using front-end methodologies: HTML5, CSS3, SASS, Bootstrap4, JavaScript, jQuery, ReactJS, Adobe xd. Using back-end methodologies: PHP7, MySQL.
description: Work is the backbone of the economy of any country and is the main source of income for members of society. At the present time, society is facing high unemployment rates despite the availability of job opportunities and the availability of job seekers. The reason for this is the difficulty of communication between employers and job seekers. Therefore, we created a system to increase communication between employers and job seekers. Through the specialization that the employee enters, the companies that advertise vacancies in the same specialty will appear to him.
problem_statement: Recruitment is the process of attracting screening and selecting qualified people for a Job. A typical recruitment system consists of a database of jobseekers on one side and employers using the database to fill the vacancies on the other. Recruitment agencies are always seeking to increase the number of Job seekers using their databases.
proposed_solution: According to the recent events of Corona and others, which led to the creation of job opportunities and the difficulty of finding them, so we created this system to help people find suitable job opportunities. Most people who are looking for suitable jobs in other sites cannot know the salary for the appropriate job for them, but on the contrary, this system through which each company, while announcing the job, puts all its information and in addition to the salary before sending the CV to the company. We made the search process easy by allowing the employee to find a job opportunity in the nearest area to him. We will develop the system by adding many features, including: We will add a feature that the system sends an alert to the employee's email. These alerts contain jobs from the same specialty that the employee recorded in his data. We will use a protection system for the system through which the system can verify the identity of the company that has posted the job. We will make a chat so that the applicant can communicate with the company. We will add the ability for each person registered in the account to be able to follow up on other people who have registered on the system.
objectives: increases communication between employers and job seekers. reduce the unemployment rate in society, increase the rate of employment. make it easier for company owners to find the required employees and vice versa, Save the effort and time spent searching for work or employment.

abstract:
Fetal death is one of the major problems facing medicine in the current era for understandable and incomprehensible reasons. One of the most common causes that cause the death of the fetus in the first months is problems that occur in the heart of the fetus, and as we know that the heart of the fetus begins to form in the third week of pregnancy; It begins to palpitate in the fifth week of pregnancy; Its growth is completed in the seventh week of pregnancy; Then some heart problems begin to appear in some fetuses, such as congenital heart defects, which, if not discovered quickly, may cause complications and lead to the death of the fetus.

In this project, we aim to detect heart diseases that the fetus may be exposed to and that can threaten its life early, diagnose it and take the appropriate solution to treat it as soon as possible, so this project describes a system consisting of a website for doctors and the mother of the fetus linked to a database and models based on machine learning and deep learning To discover the symptoms that appear on the child early.

By searching on international sites about the most common problems facing the heart of fetuses, we were able to reach the most common problems that threaten the life of the fetus and search for how to save the fetus in any possible way during the nine stages of pregnancy.

using sonar of different types or ultrasound waves; It is one of the most important means of modern diagnosis in the world of medicine due to its accuracy, speed of conduct, and ease of examination, and through periodic follow-up of the mother with the specialist doctor and conducting sonar on a regular basis, this helps the treating doctor to make an accurate treatment decision and prevent any complications from occurring, and thus we can be able to From preserving the life of the fetus during the various stages of pregnancy, finally we have integrated our data set with a website to facilitate the examination, and the accuracy of our models reaches 0.99%.

The project proposes an innovative system featuring a website for doctors and mothers, integrated with a database and advanced machine learning and deep learning models for early symptom discovery and accurate diagnosis. Key technologies utilized include web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP) for the user interface and backend, alongside powerful machine learning and deep learning algorithms for classification, supported by tools like Anaconda, Kaggle, and Visual Studio Code. Supervised by Dr. Ibrahim Zaghloul, the project aims to provide integrated maternal and fetal care services, enable early disease prediction and detection for medical professionals, and facilitate timely treatment solutions. By achieving a model accuracy of 0.99% in classifying fetal health, this system offers a valuable solution to preserve fetal life and significantly advance online healthcare diagnostics.

technologies: Artificial Intelligence (AI), AI algorithms, image recognition technology, voice search, recommendation system, machine learning
keywords: Tourism, Egypt, Artificial Intelligence, AI, Smart Tourism, Travel Application, Personalization, Cultural Immersion, Image Recognition, Voice Search, Recommendation System, Machine Learning, Travel Technology, Historical Sites, Cultural Heritage, Dynamic Recommendations, Unified User Experience, Mobile Application
abstract: In an era where technology seamlessly integrates with the realms of exploration and adventure, our project, "Pharaohs Land Guide," emerges as a beacon of innovation in the domain of tourism. Rooted in the ancient wonders of Egypt, this smart tourism application harnesses the power of artificial intelligence (AI) to offer a transformative travel experience. Through a seamless blend of cutting-edge AI algorithms and comprehensive data analysis, "Pharaohs Land Guide" enables users to embark on an immersive journey through the rich tapestry of Egypt's cultural heritage. From the majestic pyramids of Giza to the serene banks of the Nile, users are guided to explore iconic landmarks, hidden gems, and off-the-beaten-path destinations. Key features of our application include image recognition technology, allowing users to discover historical sites by simply capturing a photo. Additionally, advanced voice search capabilities empower users to navigate through the application hands-free, enhancing accessibility and convenience. Moreover, "Pharaohs Land Guide" incorporates a sophisticated recommendation system that curates personalized travel itineraries based on user preferences, ensuring a tailored and unforgettable experience. With integrated transportation services, currency conversion tools, and interactive maps, users can seamlessly plan and navigate their Egyptian odyssey. Furthermore, the application fosters community engagement through features like user reviews and sharing experiences, enabling travelers to connect and share insights with fellow adventurers. In essence, "Pharaohs Land Guide" redefines the paradigm of modern tourism, offering a fusion of ancient wonders and cutting-edge technology to unravel the mysteries of Egypt's timeless legacy.
description: Welcome to Pharaohs Land Guide, a revolutionary project designed to transform the landscape of tourism applications and redefine the way travelers experience the wonders of Egypt. As we embark on this journey, our goal is to create a cutting-edge mobile application that seamlessly blends innovation, personalization, and cultural immersion to offer users an unparalleled exploration of Egypt's treasures.
problem_statement: In the realm of contemporary tourism applications, the existing solutions exhibit limitations in providing a truly personalized, culturally immersive, and technologically advanced exploration experience for users visiting Egypt. Current platforms lack the ability to dynamically adapt to individual preferences, offer indepth cultural narratives, and leverage cutting-edge technologies to enhance the overall journey. Specific Problems: 1- Generic Information Retrieval: Existing tourism apps often deliver generic information about landmarks and sites, lacking the ability to provide personalized details based on user preferences. 2- Recommendations: Recommendations in current solutions are static, relying on general popularity rather than real-time factors and individual preferences. 3- Cultural Disconnect: Users encounter a cultural disconnect as available apps provide basic factual information without immersing them in the rich historical and cultural context of Egypt. 4- Fragmented User Experience: Users are forced to switch between multiple platforms for information retrieval, recommendations, and travel assistance, resulting in a fragmented and disjointed user experience. Scope of the Problem: The identified problems within existing tourism applications emphasize the need for a solution that goes beyond conventional offerings. Pharaohs Land Guide aims to address these challenges by introducing a platform that prioritizes personalization, cultural immersion, and technological innovation, redefining the standards of tourism applications for users exploring Egypt.
proposed_solution: Pharaohs Land Guide introduces a groundbreaking approach to personalized exploration, tailoring the user experience to individual preferences, interests, and travel styles. Our app redefines recommendations with a dynamic system that considers real-time factors such as weather, events, and user behavior, ensuring up-to-date and relevant suggestions. Pharaohs Land Guide stands out by delivering a deeper cultural connection. Through engaging narratives and historical storytelling, users will gain a profound understanding of the cultural significance behind each landmark and site. Our application offers a seamless and unified user experience by integrating information retrieval, recommendations, travel assistance, and cultural insights within a single platform, eliminating the need for users to switch between multiple apps. Pharaohs Land Guide introduces voice search capabilities, enabling users to interact with the app using natural language, making it more intuitive and user-friendly. At the forefront of travel technology innovation, Pharaohs Land Guide leverages state-of-the-art tools like advanced recommendation algorithms to deliver a unique and technologically advanced travel experience. In summary, Pharaohs Land Guide goes beyond the limitations of current solutions, offering a revolutionary approach to tourism that prioritizes personalization, cultural immersion, and cutting-edge technology. Our app is poised to set a new standard in the industry, providing users with a transformative and enriching exploration of Egypt.
objectives: Overall Objectives: Revolutionize Tourism Experiences: Redefine the standards of tourism applications by introducing innovative features that go beyond conventional offerings. Create a Personalized Journey: Develop a platform that dynamically adapts to individual user preferences, ensuring a highly personalized and tailored exploration experience. Immerse Users in Cultural Richness: Provide users with in-depth cultural narratives, historical insights, and a profound connection to the cultural heritage of Egypt. Leverage Advanced Technologies: Harness cutting-edge technologies such as image recognition, and machine learning to enhance the overall travel experience. Unify User Experience: Design a unified platform that seamlessly integrates information retrieval, dynamic recommendations, travel assistance, and cultural insights. Key Objectives: Dynamic Personalization: Implement a dynamic personalization system that learns and adapts to users' preferences, ensuring each user receives tailored recommendations throughout their journey. Cultural Narratives: Develop engaging and informative cultural narratives for landmarks, historical sites, and tourist spots, enriching the user's understanding of the cultural significance behind each destination
ai_summary: Pharaohs Land Guide is a revolutionary smart tourism application designed to transform the travel experience in Egypt by addressing the limitations of existing generic and fragmented tourism platforms. Leveraging cutting-edge technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, image recognition, voice search, and advanced recommendation systems, the project offers a highly personalized and culturally immersive journey. It provides dynamic itineraries, in-depth cultural narratives, and a unified platform for information retrieval, recommendations, and travel assistance. The application aims to redefine modern tourism by seamlessly blending ancient wonders with innovative technology, ensuring an enriching and transformative exploration of Egypt's timeless legacy.
full_content: Pharaohs Land Guide. Pharaohs Land Guide. In an era where technology seamlessly integrates with the realms of exploration and adventure, our project, "Pharaohs Land Guide," emerges as a beacon of innovation in the domain of tourism. Rooted in the ancient wonders of Egypt, this smart tourism application harnesses the power of artificial intelligence (AI) to offer a transformative travel experience. Through a seamless blend of cutting-edge AI algorithms and comprehensive data analysis, "Pharaohs Land Guide" enables users to embark on an immersive journey through the rich tapestry of Egypt's cultural heritage. From the majestic pyramids of Giza to the serene banks of the Nile, users are guided to explore iconic landmarks, hidden gems, and off-the-beaten-path destinations. Key features of our application include image recognition technology, allowing users to discover historical sites by simply capturing a photo. Additionally, advanced voice search capabilities empower users to navigate through the application hands-free, enhancing accessibility and convenience. Moreover, "Pharaohs Land Guide" incorporates a sophisticated recommendation system that curates personalized travel itineraries based on user preferences, ensuring a tailored and unforgettable experience. With integrated transportation services, currency conversion tools, and interactive maps, users can seamlessly plan and navigate their Egyptian odyssey. Furthermore, the application fosters community engagement through features like user reviews and sharing experiences, enabling travelers to connect and share insights with fellow adventurers. In essence, "Pharaohs Land Guide" redefines the paradigm of modern tourism, offering a fusion of ancient wonders and cutting-edge technology to unravel the mysteries of Egypt's timeless legacy.. Welcome to Pharaohs Land Guide, a revolutionary project designed to transform the landscape of tourism applications and redefine the way travelers experience the wonders of Egypt. As we embark on this journey, our goal is to create a cutting-edge mobile application that seamlessly blends innovation, personalization, and cultural immersion to offer users an unparalleled exploration of Egypt's treasures.

technologies: Android Studio, Arduino IDE, Proteus, Arduino Uno Kit, Android based Smartphone, Bluetooth Module, Vibration Motor, Piezo Sounder, LED, Java, C++, Bluetooth API, Google Maps API
keywords: V-Traker, Item Tracking, Bluetooth Tracker, Android Application, Arduino, Lost and Found, Valuables Locator, Anti-Loss System, IoT, Location Tracking, Smart Device, Security
abstract: V-Traker application is an android and Arduino based application that provides the users with services that they might need during their life, either for saving time, saving efforts or security. This application benefits from the services that provided by smart phones and Arduino such as Bluetooth, Vibration, ...etc.
description: Did you know that the average person spends 10 minutes a day looking for things they own but cannot find. The idea is that you attach something to whatever is important to you such as a handbag or your keys and register the object with an android application on your smart phone using Bluetooth. Once registered, whenever you open the app (or go out of range of the object) you'll be able to track where it was and receive an alert with the last known location. There are lots of different ways to do that tracking and different form factors of the device so we've rounded the latest up for you to make an easier decision. After the jump we've got a look at the options available and which ones have the best features. This issue and the fact that smart phones became very common, made us thinking to find a good and an easy way to help the people and make it easier to find their lost stuff than before, and from here we got the idea of our graduation project which is “V-Traker”
problem_statement: It always seems like you’re losing your wallet or keys, right? Valuables like keys, wallet, pets...etc. are able to be lost or stolen and it's difficult to find it easily.
proposed_solution: V-Traker is a device uses Bluetooth to communicate with the companion android application on your smartphone. The V-Traker app discovers a V-Traker device and establishes a connection to it using the Bluetooth signal.
objectives: An application and a hardware device in general aim to: Spend less time looking for your stuff. Instead of relying on your memory, you can rely on V-Traker With V-Traker, you don’t need to keep a running inventory in the back of your head.
ai_summary: V-Traker is an innovative graduation project designed to address the common problem of losing valuables like keys or wallets, which often leads to wasted time and effort. This system integrates an Android-based application with a compact Arduino-powered hardware device. By utilizing Bluetooth technology, the V-Traker device attaches to important items and communicates with a companion smartphone app, enabling users to track the last known location of their belongings and receive timely alerts. The project's core objective is to provide a reliable solution for finding lost or stolen items, thereby enhancing personal security and convenience through smart technology.

student_names: Ali Saber Ali, Abdalmonem Anwar Abdalmonem, Shawky Sobhy Gouda, Wagih Mohamed Gamal, Muhamed Muhamed Abdulsalam, Mohamed Gamal
technologies: artificial intelligence (AI), natural language processing techniques, machine learning algorithms
keywords: Digital Transformation, Education, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Essay Grading, Text Summarization, Sentiment Analysis, Toxic Comment Classification, Personalized Learning, Online Learning Environment, Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning
abstract: In the era of digital transformation, education has undergone a significant revolution, redefining traditional learning methods. This project aims to contribute to this transformation by leveraging the power of artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance various aspects of education. The primary focus lies in the development and implementation of AI features such as essay grading, text summarization, sentiment analysis, and toxic comment classification. The project's core objective is to create an AI-powered essay grading system that automates the grading process, providing students with timely and consistent feedback on their assignments. By employing natural language processing techniques and machine learning algorithms, the system analyses essays for grammar, structure, coherence, and content relevance. This facilitates personalized learning experiences by enabling students to identify their strengths and areas for improvement. Furthermore, the project incorporates text summarization techniques to assist students in extracting crucial information from lengthy texts efficiently. By identifying key concepts and generating concise summaries, students can enhance their comprehension and effectively manage information overload. To promote a supportive learning environment, sentiment analysis is integrated, allowing educators to gain insights into students' emotional states and engagement levels. This valuable information enables targeted support and interventions tailored to individual students' needs, fostering a conducive learning atmosphere. In addition, the project implements a toxic comment classifier to create a safe and respectful online learning environment. The system automatically detects and flags toxic or abusive comments, fostering a positive and inclusive online community for students to engage in meaningful discussions. By developing and implementing these AI features, this project aims to enhance the learning experience, provide personalized support, and foster a safe online environment. Through the utilization of AI, it contributes to the ongoing digital transformation of education, empowering students and supporting educators in creating a more efficient, inclusive, and engaging educational landscape.
description: In an era characterized by rapid technological advancements, the digital transformation of various sectors has become an imperative for progress. One area where digital transformation holds immense potential is education. The integration of technology and artificial intelligence (AI) in education has the power to revolutionize traditional learning approaches, enhance student engagement, and provide personalized learning experiences. This project, titled "Towards Digital Transformation of Education," aims to contribute to this paradigm shift by developing and implementing AI features that address key challenges in the education sector and explore the potential of artificial intelligence (AI) to facilitate this transformation and unlock new possibilities in the field of education. Education is a fundamental pillar of society, shaping the minds and futures of individuals. In the age of technological advancements, the field of education stands on the brink of a significant transformation. The integration of artificial intelligence (AI) has the potential to revolutionize traditional educational practices, offering new opportunities for personalized learning, efficient assessment, and improved student engagement. Education is considered the cornerstone of personal and societal growth, enabling individuals to acquire knowledge, develop skills, and pursue their aspirations. In the era of digitalization, there is a pressing need to embrace technology to revolutionize traditional educational practices and adapt to the evolving needs of learners.
problem_statement: The traditional education system faces several challenges that can hinder effective learning and student engagement. One of the main problems is the lack of personalized feedback and timely assessments. Students often must wait for extended periods to receive feedback on their assignments, which hampers their ability to address areas of improvement promptly. Additionally, teachers face an enormous workload in manually grading many assignments, leading to delays in providing feedback.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an AI-powered system that integrates several key features to address educational challenges. This includes an automated essay grading system utilizing natural language processing and machine learning to provide timely and consistent feedback on assignments. Additionally, it incorporates text summarization for efficient information extraction, sentiment analysis to gauge student emotional states, and a toxic comment classifier to ensure a safe and respectful online learning environment. These AI features collectively aim to enhance learning experiences and support educators.
objectives: The primary objectives of this project are to leverage Artificial Intelligence (AI) to enhance various aspects of education, specifically by developing and implementing an AI-powered essay grading system for automated, timely feedback. It also aims to integrate text summarization for efficient information extraction, sentiment analysis for understanding student emotional states, and a toxic comment classifier to ensure a safe online learning environment. Ultimately, the project seeks to contribute to the digital transformation of education by providing personalized support, improving learning experiences, and fostering a more efficient, inclusive, and engaging educational landscape.
ai_summary: This project, "Towards Digital Transformation for Education," addresses the challenges in traditional education, such as the lack of personalized and timely feedback, by developing an AI-powered system. Utilizing artificial intelligence, natural language processing, and machine learning algorithms, the system automates essay grading, provides text summarization, performs sentiment analysis, and classifies toxic comments. These features aim to enhance the learning experience, offer personalized support, and create a safe online environment, thereby contributing to a more efficient, inclusive, and engaging educational landscape.

project_title: BUS PLUS An intelligent Transportation mobile application
student_names: Abdelrahman Alaa Abdelsatar, Abdulhakim Abdulrazak Abdulhakim, Habiba Hesham Elsharkawy, Mazen Shawky Abdelsadek, Nouran Mohamed Saad Eldin, Reem Mohamed Abdelnaby
technologies: Mobile Application Development, Artificial Intelligence, GPS, Speech Recognition, Text-to-Speech
keywords: Intelligent Transportation, Mobile Application, Public Transportation, Bus Tracking, Accessibility, Blind Users, GPS, Artificial Intelligence, Voice Interaction
abstract: Bus Plus application is an intelligent transportation mobile application that cooperates with government buses. It helps passengers in locating them then by selecting the station they are in and the station they will go to, the application starts to give information about (what the bus number that will pass the same direction is). With those abilities the application can facilitate public transportation for people and blind people. When the user chooses that he is one of the blind people, the application starts to read every single line by voice to make the user fill the required information in an easy manner.
description: Mobile applications have conquered everyone's minds due to their time-saving capabilities, convenience, flexibility, and ease of use. Therefore, the world resorts to using modern technology to develop many applications to solve all the problems and crises facing society, such as developing study sites to facilitate study and distance learning, developing shopping sites to facilitate the purchase process and avoiding congestion, and developing transportation and transportation applications to facilitate transportation and avoid crowding and delay, etc. Among the most important applications that have been developed recently are transportation and transportation applications to facilitate the transportation process for everyone and avoid congestion and delays in appointments, such as the application of Uber, Careem and Swvl. Hence, we thought of developing an application that facilitates public transportation (buses) for people. We also thought of adding some features to help blind people to reach their direction. Through these ideas, we thought of developing the Bus Plus application to facilitate public transportation for people and blind people. Bus Plus application contains many features: - Through this application, the user knows the bus that will pass their station and their directions. The blind person can talk to the application to know the bus that will pass their station and their directions. This application has a clear and easy-to-use interface. It makes transportation easier for people and the blind. The user can avoid getting on the wrong bus. In this approach, we aim to provide a solution for one of the most important problems in Egypt.
problem_statement: Public buses are late for their scheduled times, and consequently many services are disrupted and people are late for their work, important appointments, etc. This delay occurs due to accidents, technical malfunctions, and non-compliance with its timetable. Therefore, a big problem occurs when people do not know the current locations of the buses and how long the bus will be delayed and how long they will wait and whether these buses will pass their station or not. There is also a problem for blind people, which is that they cannot use transportation applications, so they want an application that is easy to use or talks to them and understands them so that they can reach their station.
proposed_solution: Transportation and transportation problems and traffic congestion are common problems in the country and for this reason, the world is currently searching for solutions to these problems using modern technology and artificial intelligence until they came up with many different solutions and applications to facilitate the transportation process for people. Through these ideas, we thought of developing the Bus Plus application to facilitate public transportation for people and blind people. Bus Plus is an intelligent transportation mobile application (bus) That tells the user information about the next coming bus (How does it take to arrive its station) and this by accessing its location by GPS and it tells the blind people the information by voices.
objectives: Our objective is to develop an application that facilitates public transportation (buses) for people and blind people.
ai_summary: The "BUS PLUS" project introduces an intelligent mobile application designed to enhance public transportation, particularly for bus users, and improve accessibility for blind individuals. It addresses issues like bus delays and lack of real-time information by providing users with details on bus locations, arrival times, and routes via GPS tracking. A key feature is its voice-enabled interface, which allows blind users to interact with the application and receive information audibly, making public transit more manageable. Leveraging modern technology and artificial intelligence, Bus Plus aims to streamline the commuting experience and ensure inclusivity for all passengers.

project_title: Eye and Mouth Movement Controlled Robot Arm: Enabling Independence and Accessibility for Individuals with Disabilities.
student_names: Rana Adel Kamal Jonamy Nassar, Abdelrahman Elsayed Mohamed, Yasmin Adel Soliman, Nada Ahmed Abdelsamiea, Salma Magdy Salah, Manar Abdelmonem Helmy, Eman Adel Tourky, Alaa Mohammed Hafez, Omar Sadiq Fathy
technologies: Robotics, Eye-tracking Technology, Mouth Gesture Recognition, Multimodal Human-Robot Interaction, Assistive Technology, Control Systems
keywords: Assistive Robotics, Eye-tracking, Mouth Gesture Recognition, Human-Robot Interaction, Upper Limb Impairments, Disabilities, Robotic Arm Control, Independence, Accessibility, Multimodal Control
abstract: This research presents an innovative assistive robotic system designed to aid individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis by harnessing the power of multimodal human-robot interaction. The system integrates eye-tracking technology to enable precise control of a robotic arm through intuitive eye movements, catering to the specific needs of users facing upper limb mobility challenges. Additionally, the gripping functionality of the robotic hand is seamlessly regulated through mouth gestures, providing a hands-free approach for users with limited or no arm functionality. The primary objective of this research is to enhance the independence and daily living capabilities of individuals with upper limb impairments by offering an intuitive and efficient control mechanism. By focusing on the unique needs of this user group, the project aims to contribute to the development of assistive technologies that empower users to perform a variety of tasks with greater ease and autonomy. The evaluation of the proposed multimodal assistive robotic system will involve user trials and assessments, with a particular emphasis on user satisfaction, system responsiveness, and the practicality of the designed interface for individuals facing upper limb mobility challenges. The research aspires to make significant strides in the field of assistive robotics, offering a promising avenue for improved human-robot interaction tailored to the specific needs of users with upper limb amputations or paralysis.
description: Innovations in robotics and assistive technology have opened new avenues for improving the lives of individuals with physical disabilities, particularly those facing upper limb amputations or paralysis. Despite significant advancements, challenges persist in providing intuitive and efficient solutions that cater to the diverse needs of this user group. Addressing these challenges requires a multifaceted approach that combines cutting-edge technology with user-centric design principles. This introduction sets the stage for a groundbreaking project focused on developing a multimodal assistive robotic system tailored to the unique requirements of individuals with upper limb impairments. By harnessing the power of eye-tracking technology and mouth gesture recognition, the project aims to create an intuitive and empowering interface that enhances users' independence and functionality in their daily lives. The following sections will delve into the motivations behind this project, the background context informing its development, the specific objectives guiding its implementation, and the anticipated outcomes that hold the promise of transforming the landscape of assistive technology for individuals facing upper limb mobility challenges. Through a holistic approach encompassing research, design, implementation, and evaluation, this project endeavors to make a meaningful and lasting impact on the lives of its intended beneficiaries.
problem_statement: Individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis face significant challenges in performing daily tasks, limiting their independence and overall quality of life. Traditional assistive technologies often fall short in providing intuitive. There exists a pressing need for a sophisticated and user-friendly solution that not only addresses the limitations of existing technologies but also empowers users to regain control and autonomy in their daily activities. Current assistive devices often lack the precision and versatility required for intricate tasks, and hindering the user experience. Moreover . As a result, there is a critical gap in the availability of assistive technologies that seamlessly integrate with the user's natural abilities and enhance their capacity to interact with the environment. The proposed research seeks to address these challenges by developing a state-of-the-art multimodal assistive robotic system. By incorporating eye-tracking technology for precise control of a robotic arm and implementing mouth gesture-based gripping, the system aims to provide an intuitive and hands-free solution for users with upper limb amputations or paralysis. The research endeavors to bridge the existing gap in assistive technologies, offering a tailored and efficient solution that significantly improves the daily lives of individuals facing upper limb mobility challenges. Through a comprehensive exploration of user needs, technology integration, and rigorous evaluation, this research aims to contribute to the advancement of assistive robotics, ultimately empowering individuals with upper limb impairments to regain control,
proposed_solution: The scope of the project is assistive robotic system designed to support individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis. The system leverages multimodal human-robot interaction, integrating eye-tracking technology for precise control of a robotic arm via intuitive eye movements. Additionally, the robotic hand's gripping functionality is seamlessly regulated through mouth gestures.
objectives: The primary objectives of this project are structured to address the challenges faced by individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis and to develop a multimodal assistive robotic system that significantly improves their quality of life. The specific objectives include: Develop Eye-Guided Robotic Arm Control: Design and implement a robust eye-tracking system to enable precise control of the robotic arm. Ensure real-time responsiveness and accuracy in translating user's eye movements into corresponding robotic arm motions. Implement Mouth Gesture-Based Gripping: Integrate a reliable mouth gesture recognition system for controlling the opening and closing of the robotic hand. Establish a seamless and intuitive mechanism for users to command the gripping action through natural mouth gestures. Ensure System Reliability and Safety: Implement safety features to prevent unintended movements or actions that may pose risks to users. Conduct rigorous testing to ensure the reliability and stability of the entire assistive robotic system. Enhance Independence in Daily Activities: Develop functionalities that empower users to perform a variety of daily tasks more independently. Prioritize features that facilitate activities such as grasping objects, reaching for items, and interacting with the environment. Conduct Usability Evaluations: Perform user studies to evaluate the usability and user satisfaction of the developed assistive
ai_summary: This graduation project introduces an innovative assistive robotic system designed to enhance independence and accessibility for individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis. The system addresses the critical need for intuitive and efficient assistive technologies by integrating eye-tracking technology for precise robotic arm control and mouth gesture recognition for gripping. This multimodal human-robot interaction approach empowers users to perform daily tasks with greater ease and autonomy. The project aims to significantly improve the quality of life for its beneficiaries through a robust, user-centric design and rigorous evaluation.

ai_summary: This graduation project presents a mobile application leveraging Virtual Reality for furniture arrangement. It addresses the challenges of traditional furniture shopping, such as time consumption, cost, and lack of trust due to 2D product representations. The application allows users to visualize 3D furniture models within their own rooms, customize them, and view them from various angles, enhancing the buying experience. Utilizing the min3d framework, the project aims to reduce the time and cost associated with furniture purchases while improving customer confidence through realistic virtual previews and online purchasing options. The app also facilitates finding company branches and supports online purchasing, making it a comprehensive e-commerce solution for furniture.

abstract: The project "E-commerce with image search" aims to address the significant challenge of product quality assurance in online purchasing. By integrating advanced image search capabilities into an e-commerce platform, this project seeks to empower users with tools to visually verify product details, compare items, and gain greater confidence in their purchasing decisions. This approach intends to mitigate the prevalent issue of lacking assurance regarding product quality, thereby enhancing the overall user experience and reliability of online shopping.
description: the convenience, safety, and user experience of e-commerce have improved exponentially since its inception. This article will address some of the key players and milestones of e-commerce.
problem_statement: 1- Quality issue The most severe problem while purchasing things online is that you have no assurance of a product's quality. Surveys are not
proposed_solution: The proposed solution involves developing an e-commerce platform that incorporates a robust image search engine. This engine will allow users to upload images of desired products or product features to find matching items, compare visual attributes, and potentially access user-generated content or reviews that include images. By providing visual verification tools, the system aims to directly tackle the problem of insufficient product quality assurance, enabling consumers to make more informed and confident purchasing decisions.
objectives: 1. To develop and implement an e-commerce platform featuring an integrated image search functionality. 2. To enhance user confidence and trust in online product quality through visual verification and comparison tools. 3. To enable users to efficiently search for and identify products based on visual characteristics, improving product discovery. 4. To provide a more transparent and reliable online shopping experience by addressing the current limitations in product quality assurance.

By leveraging technologies such as Computer Vision and Machine Learning for image search, the system aims to enhance user confidence and provide a more transparent and reliable online shopping experience, ultimately improving the overall e-commerce ecosystem.

technologies: Artificial Intelligence, AI
keywords: Artificial Intelligence, Recruitment Platform, Hiring Automation, CV Screening, Bias Reduction, Candidate Feedback
abstract: The recruitment process is often hindered by inefficiencies, high costs, and biases, leading to difficulties for employers in identifying qualified candidates and a lack of feedback for applicants. This graduation project introduces Hireverse, an AI-powered recruitment platform designed to automate and streamline the hiring process. By leveraging artificial intelligence for tasks such as CV screening, interview management, and feedback generation, Hireverse aims to create a more efficient, transparent, and inclusive recruitment system, benefiting both companies and job seekers.
description: The recruitment process plays a key role in the success of any organization, but it is often hindered by inefficiencies, high costs, and biases. Employers face difficulties in identifying the right candidates from a large pool, while applicants are often left without feedback, leading to uncertainty and missed opportunities for improvement. Hireverse was developed to address these challenges by automating the hiring process using artificial intelligence. This platform simplifies essential recruitment tasks, such as job posting, CV screening, and interview management, saving both time and money. It also removes biases, ensuring fairer and more accurate selection of candidates. For applicants, Hireverse provides valuable feedback on why they were rejected and offers suggestions on how to improve for future opportunities. Through this approach, Hireverse aims to create a more efficient, transparent, and inclusive recruitment system that benefits both companies and job seekers.
problem_statement: The traditional recruitment process is slow, inefficient, and prone to biases, resulting in high costs for companies and frustration for applicants. Companies often struggle to identify the most qualified candidates from large pools of applicants, leading to suboptimal hires. Applicants are often left without feedback, creating a lack of transparency and missed opportunities for improvement. This leaves both employers and applicants dissatisfied. The overall inefficiency in recruitment can lead to poor experience for both employers and job seekers, causing delays in hiring and growth. This project seeks to solve these issues through automation and AI.
proposed_solution: The scope of this project covers the development of an AI-powered recruitment platform, Hireverse, which automates key stages of the hiring process, including job posting, candidate application, CV filtering, interview scheduling and conducting to evaluate Technical and soft skills, and feedback generation for rejected candidates and reports to the employer including results of the process. The platform aims to serve employers by providing a faster, bias-free, and efficient way to hire qualified candidates, reducing the time spent on manual tasks. For applicants, it offers personalized job recommendations based on skills and experience, as well as valuable feedback after the hiring process, helping them improve for future opportunities.
objectives: To develop an AI-powered recruitment platform, Hireverse, that automates key stages of the hiring process including job posting, candidate application, CV filtering, and interview management. To provide employers with a faster, bias-free, and efficient method for hiring qualified candidates, thereby reducing manual tasks and costs. To offer applicants personalized job recommendations and valuable post-hiring feedback to aid in their professional development. To enhance transparency and inclusivity within the recruitment ecosystem for all stakeholders.
ai_summary: This graduation project introduces Hireverse, an innovative AI-powered recruitment platform designed to address the inefficiencies, high costs, and inherent biases prevalent in traditional hiring processes. By leveraging artificial intelligence, Hireverse automates critical tasks such as CV screening, interview scheduling, and feedback generation, ensuring a more streamlined and fair selection of candidates. The platform aims to benefit employers by reducing time and cost while improving candidate quality, and applicants by providing valuable feedback and personalized recommendations. Ultimately, Hireverse seeks to establish a more efficient, transparent, and inclusive recruitment ecosystem for both companies and job seekers.

project_title: Student portal web based Information System for Student At BFCAI
student_names: Rahma Fathy Mostafa Moustafa El-Sonbaty, Ahmed Adel Mohamed Abdallah, Reham Sobhy Hamdy Mohamed, Mohamed Hamed Abdelaziz, Omar Samir Ibrahim Mohamed, Ahmed Galal Eldin Mohamed El-Samanoudy, Rewan Saeed Mohamed Hekal, Mostafa Mohamed Fathy Abu El-Ezz, Mohamed Hany Ahmed
technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, Apache Web Server, QR Code Generation Libraries, PDF Generation Libraries
keywords: Student Portal, Web-based Information System, Academic Management, Course Registration, Grade Management, Student Affairs, University Administration, QR Code Attendance, Department Recommendation, Communication System, BFCAI
abstract: The project aims to serve several people by making their lives easier, simplifying university processes, saving time, and reducing congestion. The project helps Students: register for their courses, choose the appropriate department after reading detailed information about it, understand the courses offered and the faculty members, register for training, and find out if the training is suitable for them. Students can also view their semester grades and academic transcripts(صحيفة), easily communicate with student affairs via chat, extract a PDF report of registered courses, academic transcript and semester grades and generate a QR code for each student to facilitate the attendance process. Admin (Student Affairs): Add students, training, courses, faculty members, and new semesters. Extract comprehensive reports on students, courses, faculty members, and semesters in the system. Easily respond to student messages. View settings. Search engine to search for students, training, courses, faculty members, and semesters.
