These challenges lead to bureaucratic hurdles, congestion, and difficulties for students in navigating academic procedures, accessing vital information, and resolving inquiries promptly. The current system hinders efficient academic process management and negatively impacts the overall academic experience.
proposed_solution: This project proposes a comprehensive web-based Information System designed to automate and streamline various academic and administrative operations for students, faculty, and staff. The system provides functionalities such as online course registration, personalized department recommendations, efficient grade management, and a dedicated chat system for improved communication with student affairs. Furthermore, it incorporates QR code-based attendance tracking and PDF report generation, significantly reducing manual effort, enhancing data accessibility, and improving overall operational efficiency within the university environment.

project_title: Weather reporting system based on data mining and IoT
student_names: Mustafa Mahmoud abd elkawy, Kholod jamal eldin shazly, Mustafa Zain marzouk, Hager ahmed elziny, Mustafa Nabil Mohamed
technologies: data mining, IoT
keywords: Weather reporting, Weather forecasting, Data mining, IoT, Low-cost weather station, Benha, Real-time data, Environmental monitoring
abstract: This project addresses the critical need for localized weather monitoring and forecasting, particularly in areas like Benha, which currently lack dedicated weather stations. Human activities are significantly impacted by weather conditions, making accurate and timely information essential. The proposed solution involves developing a low-cost weather station leveraging IoT for data collection and data mining techniques for analysis and prediction. The primary objectives are to provide real-time weather reporting and accurate forecasting for Benha and its surrounding regions, thereby enabling better planning and understanding of local weather patterns.
description: Human activity is influenced by weather conditions, monitoring of weather conditions can help in controlling the activity. The weather change is not the same at the Benba area and the nearest places. It is important to monitor and study the pattern of weather at surrounding. The pattern and trend of weather at Benba and surrounding can be identified by making analysis study of weather data from hydrological station. Although there is a big need for weather stations, we have only 15 weather stations across the country reporting [1]. While there is no weather station in our city Benha. This means that each of these stations represents weather conditions on an area of 100,000 square kilometers. Unfortunately, weather monitoring sites are unevenly distributed across the country with some sites closed at night. During "fair" weather conditions, such representation may be appropriate for the service of most potential end users. However, during the often variable weather this limited network usually fails to discover and depict local weather conditions.

The weather change is not the same at the Benba area and the nearest places. It is important to monitor and study the pattern of weather at surrounding. The pattern and trend of weather at Benba and surrounding can be identified by making analysis study of weather data from hydrological station.
proposed_solution: This work shows a development model of a low cost weather station, using low cost hardware and software, connected to data mining model using internet that is giving real time data taken from the stations, as well as weather forecasting. this will make it Easy to use this weather station in many places that does not have professional weather stations like Benha city where we will setup our project. The unified process model development approach will be used to develop the system.
objectives: The objectives of this Project are as following: i. Real time Weather reporting in Benha and surrounding (Giza, Qalyubia). ii. Weather forecasting in Benha and surrounding (Giza, Qalyubia).
ai_summary: This graduation project focuses on developing an intelligent weather reporting system to address the critical lack of localized weather monitoring, particularly in the Benha area. The system leverages IoT for collecting real-time weather data from low-cost stations and employs data mining techniques for comprehensive analysis and accurate forecasting. The primary goal is to provide residents and organizations in Benha and surrounding regions with timely, precise weather information, thereby facilitating better planning and mitigating weather-related disruptions. This innovative approach aims to fill a significant gap in environmental monitoring using modern technological solutions.

project_title: Reading Text For Blind People Using Mobile App
student_names: Mohammed Ali Abdelmaujoud, Asmaa Saeed Saleh., Asmaa Magdy Elsayad., Mohammed Ebrahim Fatoh Elsaid., Asmaa Reda Adross Khater., May Elsayed Hassan Ali
technologies: Optical Character Recognition (OCR), Text to Speech (TTS)
keywords: Blind people, Vision impairment, Mobile application, Text to Speech (TTS), Optical Character Recognition (OCR), Accessibility, Reading assistance
abstract: Reading text is part of everyone's life. reading is important for gaining knowledge and entertainment, Reading on just reading books, but reading everything around you like bills - menus in the restaurant ,knowing the money numbers and time, etc. Etc. The World Health Organization (WHO) estimates 253 million people live with vision impairment: 36 million are blind and 217 million have moderate to severe vision impairment. Unfortunately, everything is not printed in Braille or audio format for the blind (or visually impaired). Braille includes problems such as large book size and slow reading in this context; the present work focuses the development of a text to speech for help the blind to read. Reading Text for Blind People is mobile application that allows a blind user to "read" text (a sheet of paper, a book, etc.). To achieve that, a set of frameworks of Optical Character Recognition (OCR) and Text to Speech (TTS) are integrated, which enables the user, using a smartphone, to take a picture and hear the text that exists in the picture.
description: Reading is a human right, but at the currently not all people can access books or other reading materials as they can buy devices that help to read because it is expensive so we thought about our project (Text Reading For blind people) which allow vision impairment and blindness to hear the voice without moves his/her finger across the page or your smart device.
problem_statement: Reading text is part of everyone's life, reading is important for gaining knowledge and entertainment. The World Health Organization WHOestimates 253 million people live with vision impairment: 36 million are blind and 217 million have moderate to severe vision impairment. It's estimated that 1:3 people with disability between the ages of 18-64 live in poverty 81% of all people who are blind or have moderate to severe vision impairment are aged 50 years and above. Unfortunately, not everything is printed in Braille or audio format for the blind (or visually impaired). Braille text includes problems such as large book size and slow reading, there are devices to help the blind to read like a ring (finger reader) but it is expensive.
proposed_solution: To solve this problem, we work on developing a mobile application to helps the blind people will be able to read any text easily in anywhere. In application, the blind can interact with application by commands voice, he/she can order application to take a photo or open file (pdf, word, etc.) and then apply the OCR technology to get the text and text convert to voice via TTS technology which the blind can hear this voice.
objectives: To develop a mobile application that enables blind and visually impaired individuals to easily read text from various sources. To integrate Optical Character Recognition (OCR) technology for extracting text from images and digital documents. To implement Text-to-Speech (TTS) functionality to convert extracted text into audible speech for users. To provide an intuitive user interface, potentially with voice command interaction, for seamless accessibility.
ai_summary: This graduation project addresses the significant challenge faced by millions with vision impairment in accessing printed and digital text. The project focuses on developing a mobile application designed to assist blind people in reading text from various sources, such as physical documents or digital files. It achieves this by integrating Optical Character Recognition (OCR) technology to accurately extract text from images and Text-to-Speech (TTS) technology to convert the extracted text into audible speech. This innovative solution aims to provide an accessible, affordable, and user-friendly tool to enhance the independence and information access for the visually impaired.

abstract: In order to adapt to the development of the mobile internet, intelligent , small mobile terminal will be the future of development . this paper describes the implementation of data communication between android operating system and pc . besides ,this paper also presents some solution of key issues including the event processing of command button and mouse movement involved pc server ,etc. to meet the needs of universities and schools in the next generation of learning operation development and education institutions . using this pp (Android based pc controller ) ,we can control on in pc using an android application ,we can send mouse event to control the mouse of computer ,we can send character as a keyboard ,we can control all media working plus to the PowerPoint and pdf ,we can also send the Qr code reader after reading it with other helping application ,finally this app can send the sound waves to make the sound appear on the receiver which is the computer or any pc that installed and working the server . finally, an android wireless mouse ,keyboard ,media ,PowerPoint and pdf software based on android operating system on mobile app and java on pc using the wireless. we are hoping to replace similar electronic pointer and achieve long rang wireless control such as joystick .
description: This project presents a dual-purpose system that integrates health monitoring with remote PC control functionality. It utilizes wearable technology to track heart rate data for disease prediction while simultaneously providing a robust Android-based interface to remotely control computer peripherals, media playback, and presentation software.
problem_statement: There is a lack of integrated systems that combine personal health monitoring with versatile, long-range remote control capabilities for educational and professional environments. Users often require separate devices for health tracking and managing computer-based presentations or media, leading to inefficiency and hardware clutter.
proposed_solution: The project implements a comprehensive Android application that communicates with a Java-based PC server to enable remote mouse, keyboard, and media control. Additionally, it incorporates a wearable device module designed to collect heart rate data, which is processed to provide insights into potential heart disease risks.
objectives: To develop a seamless data communication bridge between Android mobile devices and PC systems for remote operation. To implement a reliable heart rate monitoring system using wearable technology for proactive health assessment. To enhance educational and professional productivity by replacing traditional electronic pointers with a multifunctional mobile-based control interface.
ai_summary: This graduation project introduces an innovative system that merges health care monitoring with remote computer control. By leveraging Android and Java technologies, the platform enables users to track heart health via wearable devices while simultaneously controlling PC functions like mouse movement, keyboard input, and media presentations. This dual-functionality aims to streamline professional and educational workflows while providing essential health insights through a single, integrated mobile interface.

student_names: Ahmed Megahed Fettouh, Bassem Hossam Saad, Hazem Tarek Mahmoud, Nashwa Ramadan Mahmoud, Yara Akram Mohammed, Aya Elsayed Abdelfattah
technologies: AI, facial recognition
keywords: Cheat Detection, Facial Recognition, Academic Integrity, AI, Classroom Monitoring, Attendance Management
abstract: In the modern era, different universities keep track of student attendance using face recognition verification system or manually. Attendance management is a daunting and important task. In a biometric authentication system, the system keeps track of students' attendance and avoids fake entries. In this project, we focus on proposing a smart attendance management system based on facial recognition and focuses on cheat detection. Examination cheating is not a new problem. Cheating among students has been a known problem of which knowledge is difficult to gain. There are different approaches to cheat on an exam. Students can use passing note, phones and other methods. The increasing rates of cheating during examinations in Egypt, that results in an unfair educational experience. Developing a classroom monitoring system using AI to detect possible cheating incidents during examinations that creates a fair and safe examination environment. We develop a desktop-based application for cheat detection system to be used by both the doctor and assistant. Where the assistant uses it to take attendance of students and detect who can cheat, and the doctor can see reports on students' attendance and report on cheating student. The aim of this project is to help professors and teaching assistants because they are suffering from students monitoring activities in the exam rooms which are hard, boring, and time-consuming missions. So, the challenge was to make a reliable system to detect cheating. This project creates a safe and fair examination environment for students that eliminates the high rates of cheating during examinations in Egypt, by implementing a system that detects possible cheating incidents in physical exams. Consequently, violating academic integrity creates a critical issue that negatively affects the reputation of the national education system and the quality, and competence of graduates.
description: Cheating in exams has long been a problem that educational institutions around the world are trying to eliminate. And only recently it has become necessary to stop it due to the technological revolution and the use of the Internet. Cheating is a type of academic dishonesty. It includes helping another student with an exam without the permission of the professor, accessing an exam, or using unauthorized material on an exam.

keywords: Virtual Try-on, E-commerce, Size Recommendation, Augmented Reality, Computer Vision, AI-based Shopping
abstract: As technology advances, our core processes advance. Many of the things we have today are done in different ways than before. Shopping (online) is one of these processes and is our focus in this project. Mobile apps now enable people to do things (online). Taking things further and going to improve the user experience, making things easier is key. Search users' online shopping trip to try to figure out what problems they're facing and what makes some people commit to doing so offline. Shoppers avoid shopping online because they don't know the right size and don't wear clothes. As their online shopping and ordering are based on these photos provided by the merchant. When products are delivered, they may seem different from those in the e-store, which is a bad thing. So, providing a method that makes this process more efficient is an intuitive urgency. So, in this project we made an application not only for offering clothes but also for size recommendation, and we allow you to try the clothes by using the camera on your mobile through Artificial Intelligence (AI) to see the colors and the style of your clothes.
description: This project presents a mobile-based application designed to revolutionize the online shopping experience by integrating AI-driven virtual try-on capabilities. The system addresses the gap between digital product representation and physical reality, allowing users to visualize clothing items on themselves in real-time. By combining size recommendation algorithms with augmented reality, the platform enhances consumer confidence and reduces the rate of product returns in e-commerce.
problem_statement: Online shoppers frequently face uncertainty regarding garment fit and appearance, leading to a reliance on physical retail stores. The discrepancy between product photos provided by merchants and the actual delivered items often results in customer dissatisfaction and high return rates.
proposed_solution: The project provides a comprehensive mobile application that features an AI-powered virtual fitting room and an automated size recommendation system. By utilizing the user's mobile camera, the application allows customers to visualize how clothes fit, look, and match their style before making a purchase, thereby bridging the gap between online browsing and physical trying-on.
objectives: To develop an intuitive mobile application that improves the online shopping experience through advanced AI integration. To implement a reliable size recommendation engine that assists users in selecting the correct fit. To provide a virtual try-on feature that allows users to see the color and style of clothing on their own bodies using mobile camera technology.
ai_summary: This graduation project introduces an AI-powered mobile application designed to enhance the e-commerce experience by solving the common problem of sizing and fit uncertainty. By leveraging computer vision and augmented reality, the platform enables users to virtually try on clothes and receive personalized size recommendations directly through their mobile devices. This solution aims to increase consumer confidence in online shopping, ultimately reducing return rates and improving the overall digital retail experience.

student_names: Abdelaziz Ibrahim Abdelaziz Wahman, Abdelrahman Ahmed Fekry Hussein, Abdelfattah Samy Abdelfattah Mohamed, Abdelrahim Fathy Abdelrahim Gabr, Ahmed Mohamed Abdelhamed Eid, Mahitab Atef Mohamed Osman
technologies: Android, mobile camera, barcode scanner, voice recognition
keywords: Visually Impaired, Android Application, Barcode Scanning, Voice Recognition, Assistive Technology, Product Identification, Accessibility, Electronic Payment
abstract: Many of the visually impaired people face many problems while purchasing products such as difficult to distinguish between the products and identifying the product details to be purchased in terms of product name, product price and expiration date and etc. Therefore, Our System is developed to make the life of visually impaired people easy. We have developed an android mobile application system based on mobile camera to scan the barcode behind the image and read the description of the product with the help of Id stored in the barcode, And voice recognition to interact with the system. In general, System can be app on any device with camera as : Mobile, Drones, Robots and Smart Glasses. At present we used the mobile camera to develop our system, All the user needs to do is capture the image on the product in the mobile phone which then resolves the barcode which means it scans the image to find out the Id stored, then it will read the details of product like name, description, price and expiry date. Our system was not limited to knowing the product data, we provided it with many features to help the visually impaired in particular as well such as : Map : Visually Impaired people can locate the nearest supermarket to go and locate their locations if they can not know where they are. Emergency : Visually Impaired people can call the emergency number (It could be the number of a relative or a friend close to him) when they get into trouble. Electronic Payment : When Visually Impaired people decide to buy any product they can pay via electronic wallet. The proposed application can also be implemented in any shopping center, supermarket, bookstores, medical stores, etc.

student_names: Yousef Mahmoud Yousef, Hossam Hamdy Tawffiq, Ahmed Mahmoud Gouda, Toqa Gamal Mohamed, Habiba Elsayed Gouda
technologies: Computer Vision, Real-time Sign Language Recognition, Speech-to-Text (STT) processing, Video Conferencing API, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Mobile/Web Application Development.
keywords: Deaf accessibility, Sign language translation, Real-time communication, Assistive technology, Inclusive design, Video conferencing.
abstract: This project focuses on creating an application that will facilitate communication between deaf people. The application will be designed to enable users to communicate through text, video, and audio. It will also provide a platform for users to share documents, photos, and videos. The application will be designed with accessibility features for the deaf community in mind, such as captioning of audio/video content and support for sign language. Additionally, the application will include features such as group chat rooms, reminders and notifications, and the ability to search for other deaf people in the area. This project aims to create an accessible platform that can help bridge the communication gap between deaf people. The application will also provide a platform for users to connect with each other, share resources, and access relevant information about the deaf community. The goal of this project is to create an easy-to-use meeting application that can help bridge the communication gap between deaf and hearing individuals. By providing an accessible platform for communication, the application can help improve the quality of life of deaf individuals by allowing them to participate in meaningful conversations and exchanges with others. This graduation project seeks to create an accessible and inclusive solution for deaf people so that they can participate in meetings with ease and confidence.
description: The ability to communicate effectively is a fundamental aspect of human interaction, allowing individuals to convey their thoughts, emotions, and ideas. However, for individuals who are deaf or hard of hearing, traditional methods of communication can present significant challenges. Recognizing this issue, our graduation project aims to address the communication barriers faced by the deaf community by developing a video call application specifically designed to facilitate seamless and accessible communication. The project also emphasizes the importance of user experience and usability. We have designed the application to be intuitive and user-friendly, ensuring that both deaf and hearing users can navigate the platform effortlessly. Additionally, we have incorporated features such as adjustable camera angles and customizable display options to accommodate various communication preferences and optimize the user experience. In the following sections and chapters, we will delve into the technical aspects, implementation details, and evaluation of our video call application. We will discuss the underlying technologies employed, the challenges encountered during development, and the future possibilities for expanding and improving our solution.
problem_statement: Deaf individuals face communication challenges when interacting with people who do not understand sign language. Current communication methods, such as written notes or interpreters, are often cumbersome and limit spontaneous conversations. This leads to social isolation and restricted participation in various aspects of life. To address this, our graduation project focuses on developing a video call application that translates sign language into text in real-time. By using the application's camera, deaf users can express themselves through sign language, which is then instantly converted to text for the recipient to understand. This application aims to bridge the communication gap and enable seamless communication between deaf and hearing individuals.
proposed_solution: The project, titled 'Kaleem', is a specialized video conferencing platform designed to bridge the communication gap between deaf and hearing individuals. It integrates advanced assistive technologies, including real-time sign language-to-text translation and voice-to-text conversion, to facilitate seamless interaction. The application features an intuitive, accessible user interface with customizable display options and camera settings to ensure that users can participate in meetings and social exchanges with ease and confidence.
objectives: 1. Create a meeting application that enables deaf people to communicate with their colleagues in real-time. 2. Develop a user-friendly interface for the meeting application that is accessible to all users, regardless of their level of hearing loss. 3. Design an intuitive system that allows deaf users to easily access the meeting application and communicate with their colleagues without difficulty. 4. Implement features such as sign language to text, voice to text, and other assistive technologies to ensure effective communication between deaf and hearing users.
ai_summary: Kaleem is a graduation project from Benha University that addresses the communication barriers faced by the deaf community by providing an inclusive video conferencing platform. By leveraging computer vision and real-time translation technologies, the application converts sign language into text and spoken audio into captions, enabling spontaneous and effective interaction between deaf and hearing users. The system is designed with a focus on accessibility and user experience, aiming to reduce social isolation and empower deaf individuals to participate in professional and personal meetings with greater independence.

abstract: This project presents a comprehensive Shopping Management System designed to enhance the online retail experience by addressing common limitations in existing e-commerce platforms. By implementing an interactive, user-friendly interface with advanced search filtering, real-time product feedback, and a drag-and-drop shopping cart, the system aims to increase user trust and efficiency. The platform facilitates a seamless shopping journey, allowing users to search, evaluate, and purchase products securely while providing features like public chat and product reservation to bridge the gap between traditional and digital commerce.

abstract: This graduation project introduces an innovative interface for reading computer science books, serving as an efficient alternative to platforms like Google Drive for academic use. Our website provides a seamless reading experience, integrating features to enhance user engagement and learning outcomes. Key functionalities include user account creation, browsing a diverse collection of computer science books with an intuitive interface, creating personalized lists, and accessing book summaries and author information. The reading interface features a multi-functional chatbot with four capabilities: text summarization, an embedded translation tool, a question-answering system, and a generative AI model for enhanced reader engagement and understanding. Additionally, the project includes a comprehensive dashboard for administrators, enabling book management, user control, and visualization of key metrics and statistics through graphs and charts. This project aims to deliver a robust, user-friendly platform for reading and managing computer science literature, fostering a more interactive and supportive learning environment for students and educators alike.

abstract: The Student Attendance using QR Code project aims to modernize the traditional, time-consuming manual attendance process in academic institutions. By leveraging QR code technology, the system provides a secure, efficient, and automated method for tracking student presence in classrooms, thereby reducing administrative overhead and minimizing the potential for proxy attendance.
description: This project is a digital attendance management system designed for the Faculty of Computers and Artificial Intelligence at Benha University. It replaces paper-based attendance logs with a dynamic QR code scanning mechanism, allowing students to check in via their mobile devices while ensuring data integrity and real-time reporting for instructors.
problem_statement: Traditional manual attendance taking is inefficient, prone to human error, and susceptible to fraudulent practices such as proxy attendance. These methods consume valuable lecture time and create significant administrative burdens for faculty members when compiling attendance records.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a robust software application that utilizes unique, time-sensitive QR codes displayed by instructors. Students scan these codes using their mobile devices to register their attendance instantly, with the data being securely transmitted to a centralized database for real-time monitoring and reporting.
objectives: To automate the attendance tracking process, eliminate manual record-keeping errors, prevent proxy attendance through secure validation, and provide faculty with an efficient tool for generating accurate attendance reports.
ai_summary: The 'Student Attendance using QR Code' project, developed by a team at Benha University under the supervision of Dr. Mohamed Fawzy, addresses the inefficiencies of manual attendance tracking in academic environments. By implementing a secure QR code-based scanning system, the project streamlines the check-in process, enhances data accuracy, and reduces the potential for academic dishonesty. This digital solution serves as a modern tool for faculty to manage student presence effectively while saving valuable instructional time.

student_names: Hossam Sobhy Eid Allam, Ahmed Adel Mohamed Habib, Ibrahim Reyad Ibrahim, Esraa Saeed Mohamed Abid, Alzahraa Emad Abdelfattah

keywords: Credit Hours, Online Registration, Academic Management, Student Information System, Digital Transformation
abstract: Registration and enrolling for credit hours courses take a great effort to deal with manually due to the large number of students that register in governmental faculties. It is also known to everyone that documents are not safe because they have serious consequences, including: 1- Loss or damage of documents. 2- The accuracy and completeness of the data. Therefore, the system we offer is secure, data-protected, and easy to use and provides a lot of services such that: 1- The student can register his data through the system rather than filling the application to join the faculty. 2- He / she must attend the available courses according to certain conditions. 3- Modify the enrolled courses chosen after the approval of one of the faculty members. 4- The system enables the student to print his schedule and transcript. 5- If the student leave the faculty, his data is deleted from the system. The academic staff can also record their data and print out their schedule
description: Education plays an important role in collecting knowledge. University education is a means of innovation. Universities offer greater opportunities for students to innovate anything that is new. Credit hour is the unit by which an institution measures its course work. The number of credit hours assigned to a course quantitatively reflects the outcomes expected, the mode of instruction, the amount of time spent in class, and the amount of outside preparatory work expected for the class. Our system facilitate the work of universities in course registration.
problem_statement: Registration at the local university is currently done by hand Students fill out forms manually. The university decided to get rid of paperwork and get benefit of electronic format. The university decided to investigate the use of an online registration system. This system would be used by professors to indicate the courses they would teach, by students to select courses, and by the registrar to complete the registration process. All undergraduates will need to earn at least 120 SHUs and complete the minimum number of courses as stipulated when they matriculated into their degree program. The system must dividing students into group according to capacity of room. The system must achieve the constraint according to faculty.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a secure, web-based online registration system designed to replace manual, paper-based processes at the university. The system automates course enrollment, allows for real-time schedule and transcript generation, and enforces academic constraints such as room capacity and degree requirements, while providing distinct interfaces for students, faculty, and registrars.
objectives: To eliminate manual paperwork and enhance data security by digitizing the registration process. To provide a user-friendly platform for students to manage course enrollment and for faculty to oversee teaching assignments. To ensure academic compliance by automatically enforcing credit hour requirements, room capacity constraints, and faculty-specific regulations.
ai_summary: This project introduces a digital Credit Hours System designed to modernize the course registration process at Benha University. By replacing manual, paper-based workflows with an automated online platform, the system improves data accuracy, security, and administrative efficiency. It enables students to manage their academic progress, including course selection and transcript generation, while allowing faculty and registrars to effectively oversee enrollment and scheduling constraints.

abstract: The latest studies have shown a growing demand amongst people to make all their needs online. Booking, purchasing, asking, chatting and everything became online which provides continence and saves time and effort. This document has been prepared by a group of Computer Science Students, College of Computers and informatics Benha University to help medical corporations. In this document we are trying to make use of android mobile application and web based systems to play to their strengths and applying them to create a whole online system to help doctors and patients, facilitates medical corporation systems, to enhance medical services and to guard patients' medical data with privacy and security from loss. This application will make a journey inside the medical corporations (hospitals). It allows doctors to do their jobs in a good and organized manner, help patients to get their accurate diagnoses regarding their health history carefully, facilitation of services is a way to encourage them to take good care of their health which in return results in good health, happiness and long life.
description: I-CARE is a comprehensive digital health platform designed to bridge the gap between patients and medical institutions through an integrated Android mobile application and a web-based management system. The platform aims to digitize medical records, streamline hospital administrative workflows, and provide secure, reliable access to health information, thereby reducing the inefficiencies and data loss common in traditional healthcare settings.
problem_statement: A fact must be recognized that the medical care in our society isn't as good and charged as it should be, people don't recognize the importance of their health unless they lose it or feel bad in some way, bad services at hospital, people are treated with non-concern, waiting for hours before being helped, no nurses or doctors are available to help or examine you. It's so disappointing that people lose their health documentations and they're have to prepare them from the point they lost it which in return costs a lot of money, time and effort. Some have a lot of questions about their health and they search for their answers on the internet where it's not true and not secure so unfortunately in most cases the state became worse.
proposed_solution: The project provides a dual-interface solution consisting of an Android mobile application for patients and a web-based system for medical staff. This system centralizes patient health histories, automates appointment booking and service facilitation, and ensures that medical data is stored securely to prevent loss, while also providing a reliable channel for patient-doctor communication.
objectives: To enhance the quality of medical services by reducing patient waiting times and improving administrative efficiency within hospitals. To provide a secure, centralized digital repository for patient medical records to prevent data loss and ensure continuity of care. To offer a reliable platform for patients to manage their health information and access professional medical guidance, thereby discouraging the use of unverified online health sources.
ai_summary: I-CARE is a 2019 graduation project from Benha University that addresses critical inefficiencies in the healthcare sector, such as poor service quality, long wait times, and the loss of physical medical documentation. By leveraging Android and web-based technologies, the team developed an integrated system that digitizes patient records and streamlines hospital operations. This platform empowers patients to manage their health data securely while enabling doctors to provide more organized and effective care, ultimately aiming to improve overall public health outcomes.

Furthermore, the rapid evolution of knowledge requires a dynamic platform that allows for continuous updates and effective monitoring of student progress by both teachers and parents.

It facilitates seamless communication between teachers and students through video rooms and chat features, while providing tools for teachers to monitor student performance and offer targeted support to overcome specific learning difficulties.

project_title: Information System for Breeding and caring the Arabian Horses
student_names: Ahmed Mohamed Kamal Fadlalla, Mostafa Mohamed Sadek, Mustafa Mahmoud Mohamed, Youssef Nader EL-Sherief, Eman Ahmed Mohamed, Fatma-Elzahraa Mahmoud Abdelghfar
technologies: Mobile Application Development (Android/iOS), Database Management Systems (SQL/NoSQL), Web Development Frameworks, Cloud Storage, Real-time Communication APIs.
keywords: Arabian Horses, Digital Transformation, Horse Breeding, Veterinary Management, Smart Stud Management, Pedigree Tracking, Animal Welfare.
abstract: In light of the state's interest in purebred Arabian horses, their breeding, the preservation of rare breeds, and the provision of full care to them, as at El- Zahra station in Ain Shams and other and private studs as well, Also, the Arabian horses have a great Arab heritage, where the Arabs kept their horse lineage from mixing with the hybrid horses, so we went to create an application that provides the following: (1) A special profile for each horse that includes everything related to it, such as its pedigree certificate, its appearance, colour, name, the name of the mother and father, date of birth, ancestry, microchip, and age, To convert the paper system to the digital system, following the efforts of the state to make everything digital for its ease and to ensure that it is preserved from damage and loss. (2) Selling and buying horse supplies and communicating with their owners easily. (3) Easy ways to care for the horse, follow it, and organize vaccinations and treatments through the veterinarian. (4) Follow up on the condition of the horse and its nutrition by choosing the doctor for the appropriate diet for each horse, providing full care for the horse in each of its periods and following it up in periods Childbirth, pregnancy, and diseases. (5) Part of a special space for all those interested in horses to communicate between them and add publications (to provide some other services such as: requesting mobile clinics, ease of communication with physical therapy doctors for horse treatment, horse trips, horse transport vehicles, and knowing the dates of festivals) and knowing all the news related to horses with The ability to modify each user of his page. (6) There is a place for chatting between all users of the application. (7) A part to provide the shelter service and present it to the users to choose the most suitable place to house the horse. (8) A section that includes horses in the Qur'an and Sunnah, and knowledge of hadiths and verses mentioned in the Qur'an.
description: Purebred Arabian horses have great importance in Egypt and the Arab world and their prices are high, but breeders face some problems in horse breeding, organization, medical and health care, nutrition, scheduling of treatments and vaccines, and providing the appropriate feed for them. During different periods of his life, these problems affect the horse, as he suffers from some diseases that may lead to death. Therefore, we moved to create an application that solves part of these problems that educators face.
problem_statement: So far, some studs for horses are facing some different problems, including: - Storing and dealing with the data of the horses they have on paper so far, costs a lot of time and effort, as well as damage or loss of this data may occur when this paper is lost. - One of the important problems that any stud may encounter is that their horses do not receive adequate medical care properly, which may lead to the loss of any horse they have due to a medical error or lack of good follow-up, and the loss of this horse may cost the stud huge sums, there are horses Its price could reach millions of pounds, which is a great loss. - The problem of a horse getting proper or correct nutrition during the various stages of its life, starting from its birth. Wrong feeding may lead to the loss of horses' lives. - Having difficulty communicating with the owners of different stalls or veterinarians, as there may be someone who needs to communicate with a veterinarian to present a health problem facing his horse urgently.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a comprehensive digital platform that replaces traditional paper-based record-keeping with a centralized database for tracking horse pedigrees, health history, and nutritional needs. The application integrates a communication module for connecting breeders with veterinarians and service providers, alongside a marketplace for horse supplies and a social space for community engagement, ensuring efficient management and improved survival rates for high-value horses.
objectives: To digitize horse records to prevent data loss and improve accessibility, and to provide a structured system for monitoring medical care, vaccinations, and nutritional plans. Additionally, the project aims to facilitate seamless communication between horse owners, veterinarians, and service providers, while fostering a community for knowledge sharing and heritage preservation regarding Arabian horses.
ai_summary: This project introduces a specialized information system designed to modernize the management and care of purebred Arabian horses in Egypt. By transitioning from inefficient paper-based records to a digital platform, the system addresses critical challenges in medical tracking, nutritional management, and professional communication within the equestrian community. The application serves as an all-in-one solution that enhances horse welfare, supports breeders in protecting their high-value assets, and preserves the cultural heritage of Arabian horse breeding.

project_title: Web-Based Assistance CRM system for performance monitoring and improvement
student_names: Ahmed Reda Ahmed Abdelmoty, Ahmed Shahat Ebrahim Taha, Ahmed Fathy Mohamed Mekawy, Ahmed Elsayed Ali Elsayed, Ahmed Khaled Behary Elsayed, Ahmed Emad Elsayed, Ahmed Soliman Abdelrahman
technologies: Web-based development stack, Database Management Systems (DBMS), CRM software architecture, Digital data processing tools.
keywords: E-CRM, Customer Relationship Management, Online Shopping, Performance Monitoring, Digital Transformation, Customer Satisfaction, Sales Growth.
abstract: Unfortunately, there are still many companies that utilize Internet-based Customer Relationship Management or known as E-CRM well, customers have difficulty obtaining information and also convey complaints to the company. Many companies just use social media as a media for the delivery of information, complaints and criticism from its customers, and also took a long time for the employee to respond to complaints from the customer. Employee performance is also an important factor in maintaining customer relationships, with an adequate number of employees and good competence, employees are able to serve customers well . And we will begin to talk about the importance of E-CRM in marketing clothes online, and this is considered one of the most popular and most shopping areas in the world. Hence the idea of adding the E-CRM system to improve relations with customers more in order to meet their needs and achieve customer satisfaction by adding the E-CRM system to clothing marketing sites that are considered Now the most famous at all in the present day. There are many kinds of customer relationship management platforms. In the past, CRM software was targeted at enterprise-level companies. That's no longer the case. Small businesses are now able to implement a CRM platform without breaking their brains or budgets. That's great news because implementing a CRM solution can increase sales by double-digit percentage points.
description: Through the CRM approach and the systems used to facilitate it, businesses learn about their target audiences and how to best cater to their needs. Customer relationship management (CRM) is the combination of practices, strategies and technologies that companies use to manage and analyze customer interactions and data throughout the customer lifecycle, with the goal of improving customer service relationships and assisting in customer retention and driving sales growth. CRM systems compile customer data across different channels, or points of contact between the customer and the company, which could include the company's website, telephone, live chat, direct mail, marketing materials and social media. CRM systems can also give customer-facing staff detailed information on customers' personal information, purchase history, buying preferences and concerns.
problem_statement: Users who want to shop online, there are some problems such as communication and interaction between them and the employees who work within the organization... So we ask some questions about how to solve these problems? • How to communicate and interact with the clients? • How about collecting information about the customer? • How to improve the performance of employees within the organization?
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a web-based E-CRM system designed to bridge the communication gap between online customers and organizational staff. By centralizing customer data and interaction history, the system enables businesses to monitor employee performance, streamline complaint resolution, and provide personalized services to enhance customer retention and sales.
objectives: Based on the above, we decided to make the system transform the studs from paper handling to digital handling, • They can organize their studs so that it remains easy for them to handle, all owners can communicate with all workers in the studs, and it remains easy for them to enter horse data and organize them by species. It is easy for those who belong to it to reach the desired horses in the fastest time. • Based on some of the health problems in horses due to previous diseases for which data was not available, we decided to solve this problem by adding historical disease data for each horse. • Accordingly, the attending physician can determine the appropriate treatment and the appropriate treatment for the condition. • Among the goals is to provide the appropriate nutrition for each horse according to its condition and in the various stages of its life. • Facilitating the provision of accommodation services.
ai_summary: This project presents a web-based E-CRM system aimed at improving customer relationship management and operational efficiency for online businesses. It addresses critical challenges such as poor communication, slow response times to customer complaints, and inefficient data management. By implementing this digital platform, the project facilitates better interaction between customers and staff, ultimately driving sales growth and improving overall service quality.

student_names: Osama Mahmoud Abdelkhalek, Ahmed Mohamed AbdelTawab, Eslam Elsayed AbdelAleem, Mohamed Sobhy Ayesh, Asmaa Yassin Helmy, Arwa Abdel Azim Mohamed, Hossam Mahmoud AbdelHady, Ahmed Adel Hassan
technologies: Mobile Application Development, User Interface (UI) Design, User Experience (UX) Design, Assistive Technology, Educational Software Development.
keywords: Autism Spectrum Disorder, ASD, Assistive Technology, Special Education, Executive Functioning, Sensory Processing, Educational Application, User-Centered Design.
abstract: This project presents a specialized educational application designed to support children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) by addressing core challenges in executive functioning and sensory processing. By implementing a structured, customizable, and simplified user interface, the system provides a supportive environment for learning foundational skills, including literacy, vocabulary, and sentence construction. The platform aims to empower children to express themselves effectively through unconventional, technology-driven educational methods.
description: The project is an educational application tailored for children with Autism Spectrum Disorder, focusing on three progressive stages of learning: letter recognition and pronunciation, vocabulary building, and sentence formation. To ensure accessibility, the system incorporates features that mitigate sensory overload, such as adjustable sound and visual settings, and addresses executive functioning challenges through step-by-step task management, visual organizers, and timers. The platform serves as a comprehensive tool to facilitate communication and educational development in a user-friendly, non-overwhelming digital space.
problem_statement: 12. Executive Functioning Challenges: Autistic children may experience difficulties with executive functions, such as planning, organizing, and managing tasks. Complex or overwhelming interfaces, multi-step instructions, or lack of structure may hinder their ability to navigate technology applications effectively. 11 - Sensory Overload: Autistic children may be sensitive to sensory stimuli, such as bright lights, loud sounds, or crowded interfaces. This can cause discomfort or overwhelm them while using technology.
proposed_solution: Solution: Simplify the user interface and provide clear, step-by-step instructions. Break down complex tasks into smaller, manageable steps and provide visual cues or prompts to guide the user through the process. Incorporate visual organizers, checklists, or timers to help with task management and organization within the application. Solution: Provide customization options within the application to allow users to adjust settings according to their sensory preferences. This may include options to reduce visual stimuli, adjust sound levels, or provide a simplified interface. Additionally, consider incorporating features like visual schedules or timers to help manage time and transitions within the application.
objectives: 1-Education tools: We provide children with many unconventional methods of education at different ages so that they can express what is inside them. In the first stage, we start with the letters by learning what the child looks like and how to write and pronounce the letter Then we move to the second stage, which includes teaching children words and learning about things around them, such as the names of fruits vegetables, toys and furniture. Then, in the third stage, we begin to form sentences by arranging words together and learning how to talk to others and express them.
ai_summary: The Autism Spectrum Disorder (TBC Project) is an educational initiative developed to assist children with ASD in overcoming barriers related to sensory sensitivity and executive functioning. The project provides a structured, multi-stage learning curriculum that guides students from basic letter recognition to complex sentence formation. By utilizing a highly customizable and simplified interface, the application minimizes sensory overload while providing essential tools like visual schedules and task management. This solution aims to foster independence and improve communication skills for children on the autism spectrum through an inclusive and adaptive digital learning environment.

student_names: Mohamed Saeed Ali El-Korady, Mahmoud Saeed El-Kotb Abu-Ghazala, Ahmed Ebrahim Gharib El-Khateeb, Mohamed Ahmed Abd El-Samad Hegazy, Mohamed Sayed Hosny Azab, Mohamed Abd El-Rahman Abd El-Samee Mohamed
technologies: machine learning
keywords: Malware Detection, Machine Learning, Cybersecurity, Static Analysis, Dynamic Analysis, Threat Intelligence
abstract: Computers are everywhere in our lives, we are dependent on them in our everyday life, and the most dangerous risk to them are Malwares. Malware is defined as software designed to infiltrate or damage a computer system without the owner's informed consent. A simple classification of malware consists of file infectors and stand-alone malware. Another way of classifying malware is based on their particular action: worms, backdoors, trojans, rootkits, spyware, adware etc. Malware obfuscation techniques include mainly packing, metamorphosis, and virtual technologies. These technologies have been used widely to evade the detection of anti-virus software. Most malware detection systems adopted by antivirus manufacturers are based on signatures and anomaly detections. The old ways of catching malwares are not enough anymore, therefore in our project we are using cutting edge technologies to achieve better results. malware analysis can be divided into static and dynamic analysis. Static analysis refers to the analysis of executable files without executing the program. The advantages of static analysis are its ability to find an author's style and profile the code flow. The disadvantage is that it is bypassed easily by obfuscation techniques. Dynamic analysis, on the other hand, enables the observation of the running state of a program in a safe and controlled environment. By using machine learning techniques, the process for detecting malware can be divided into multiple steps. The features of the execution file, which are extracted by static and dynamic analysis, are mapped into the machine learning input. Machine learning is able to probe and discover the intrinsic properties of the software automatically, and the output is the state of executable application as malicious or legitimate.
description: Cheating in exams has long been a problem that educational institutions around the world are trying to eliminate. And only recently it has become necessary to stop it due to the technological revolution and the use of the Internet. Cheating is a type of academic dishonesty. It includes helping another student with an exam without the permission of the professor, accessing an exam, or using unauthorized material on an exam.

full_content: Malware Detection Using AI Techniques. Malware Detection Using AI Techniques. Computers are everywhere in our lives, we are dependent on them in our everyday life, and the most dangerous risk to them are Malwares. Malware is defined as software designed to infiltrate or damage a computer system without the owner's informed consent. A simple classification of malware consists of file infectors and stand-alone malware. Another way of classifying malware is based on their particular action: worms, backdoors, trojans, rootkits, spyware, adware etc. Malware obfuscation techniques include mainly packing, metamorphosis, and virtual technologies. These technologies have been used widely to evade the detection of anti-virus software. Most malware detection systems adopted by antivirus manufacturers are based on signatures and anomaly detections. The old ways of catching malwares are not enough anymore, therefore in our project we are using cutting edge technologies to achieve better results. malware analysis can be divided into static and dynamic analysis. Static analysis refers to the analysis of executable files without executing the program. The advantages of static analysis are its ability to find an author's style and profile the code flow. The disadvantage is that it is bypassed easily by obfuscation techniques. Dynamic analysis, on the other hand, enables the observation of the running state of a program in a safe and controlled environment. By using machine learning techniques, the process for detecting malware can be divided into multiple steps. The features of the execution file, which are extracted by static and dynamic analysis, are mapped into the machine learning input. Machine learning is able to probe and discover the intrinsic properties of the software automatically, and the output is the state of executable application as malicious or legitimate.. project_title: Early prediction of arrhythmia based on ECG
student_names: Mohamed Essam Lotfy Abdelaziz, Aya Ramadan Fath El Bab Saleh, Doaa Salem Yassin Mohammed, Hasnaa Fawzy Mahmoud Elshazly, Menna Tallah Hassan Ayad Ahmed, Mahmoud Ayman Hamed Mahmoud
technologies: machine learning, Internet of Things (IOT)
keywords: Arrhythmia, ECG, Machine Learning, Internet of Things (IoT), Early Detection, Cardiac Health, Predictive Modeling
abstract: Heart disease remains a leading cause of global mortality, accounting for a significant percentage of deaths worldwide. Early detection of cardiac abnormalities is crucial in preventing the progression of conditions such as atrial fibrillation and Ventricular heart failure, which are often diagnosed in advanced stages. This research aims to contribute to the timely identification of cardiac issues through the use of electrocardiogram (ECG) data. With over 23 million patients globally affected by heart-related ailments, and heart disease being the primary cause of death for 32 percent of 17.9 million deaths, there is a pressing need for effective predictive measures. The study focuses on interpreting ECG signals to predict arrhythmias, specifically targeting abnormalities like atrial fibrillation and Ventricular heart failure. We used the Internet of Things (IOT) technology, which is a system of interrelated computing devices, machines or objects with unique identifiers and the ability to communicate the data over a network or Internet without requiring human intervention.
description: Our project offers several advantages. Firstly, it can detect four additional heart diseases beyond standard classifications. Its use of machine learning ensures a minimal error rate, surpassing human capabilities. aiming to provide a dual benefit to both medical practitioners and patients. Whether in a hospital reception, emergency room, or on a sports field. Moreover, it is user-friendly, Additional features are also in development, enhancing its overall capabilities.
problem_statement: Despite advancements in medical diagnostics, there exists a critical gap in the early prediction of arrhythmias, hindering timely interventions and personalized patient care. Traditional approaches often rely on detecting irregularities after symptoms manifest, limiting the effectiveness of treatment strategies. The advent of Electrocardiogram (ECG) technology provides a valuable window into the heart's electrical activity, offering a potential solution for early prediction. However, the challenge lies in developing accurate and efficient predictive models capable of discerning subtle patterns indicative of impending arrhythmias.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated system that utilizes IoT-enabled devices to capture real-time ECG data, which is then processed by advanced machine learning algorithms to identify subtle patterns indicative of impending arrhythmias. This solution includes a user-friendly mobile application designed for healthcare professionals, facilitating early intervention and personalized patient care by detecting cardiac abnormalities before severe symptoms manifest.
objectives: The main goal is to create a system with 90% accuracy in arrhythmia prediction, focusing on early detection, improving patient outcomes, and providing user-friendly interaction through a mobile application for healthcare professionals.
ai_summary: This graduation project addresses the critical need for early arrhythmia detection by leveraging ECG signal analysis and machine learning to improve patient outcomes. By integrating IoT technology, the system enables continuous monitoring and automated data transmission, allowing for the identification of cardiac abnormalities such as atrial fibrillation and ventricular heart failure. The project aims to achieve 90% predictive accuracy, providing a robust, user-friendly tool for medical practitioners to facilitate timely clinical interventions.

project_title: Data Hiding Techniques By Using Encryption Method
student_names: Amira Abdallah Ahmed, Sara Hamada Mohammed, Hanem Darwish Ibrahim, Heba Mohammed Khalil
technologies: Digital Image Processing, Steganography, Encryption Algorithms, BMP File Architecture, Software Development
keywords: Data Hiding, Image Encryption, Steganography, BMP, Information Security, Pixel Manipulation
abstract: This project presents a robust framework for securing digital images by combining encryption and steganography techniques. By focusing on the BMP file format, the application addresses existing limitations in image security by modifying pixel positions to ensure content protection regardless of image type. The proposed solution enhances security efficiency by implementing a two-step process: initial image encryption followed by steganographic hiding of the encrypted data.
description: Nowadays, security issue becomes more important especially when it comes to the use of Internet and other networks. Security breaches may affect user's privacy and reputation. Due to this risk, various measurements have already been taken to prevent security breaches in the network. One example that has been made due to this problem is an encryption and hiding. Why encryption: Data encryption is an important way to protect data before it can be transmitted over any networks. Defining Encryption: Encryption is defined as modifying information into a special code, especially in order to prevent unauthorized users to have access to the information. Defining Decryption: Decryption on the other hand is the opposite meaning of encryption.
problem_statement: Protecting some of the images are as important as protecting the textual data and perhaps much more important. Limitations in protecting the images based on their types must be eliminated. In encrypting images, there is a need to protect its content regardless of the types. There are various image encryption algorithms but none of them can work with various image types like, BMP unlike this application. This application has successfully eliminated the limitation problems. The algorithm modified the position of the pixels, which is the manual property of the images. Thus, we use BMP image format can be encrypted using the application as an example. To improve security efficiency, we add Steganography of the encrypted image as a second step.
proposed_solution: The project provides a software application that secures BMP images by first modifying the spatial position of pixels to encrypt the content. To further enhance security, the system incorporates a secondary layer of protection by applying steganography to the already encrypted image. This dual-layered approach ensures that the data remains protected and inaccessible to unauthorized users during network transmission.
objectives: There are four objectives that have been achieved from this project and as to make the application possible. The first one is to study the architecture of image file. The project is focused to BMP file type because it is one of the most popular image formats used. The second objective is to develop an application that can be used to encrypt an image file. This application must be simple, easy to use, and powerful. Many factors have been considered in order to develop this application such as processing speed of image, the strength of the encryption result and ease of use to end user.
ai_summary: This graduation project addresses the critical need for enhanced digital image security by developing an application that integrates encryption and steganography. The team successfully created a tool that manipulates pixel positions within BMP files to provide robust encryption, overcoming limitations found in existing image security methods. By adding a secondary steganographic layer to the encrypted output, the project significantly improves data privacy and protection for images transmitted over networks.

abstract: Online Assessment System forms the lifeline of the Educational Institutes to the functioning of the Examination. It is very essential for an Institute to handle the Examinations and their results. It is very useful for an Institute to test its students continuously for their development. This system is helpful for conducting (M.C) Multiple Choice Examinations which can be conducted regularly as well as for surprise tests and provides immediate results saving the precious time of faculties to check the papers and prepare mark sheets. The Online Assessment System will include various Courses (IT, Commerce, Science... etc.) and subjects for conducting examinations. This system helps in conducting examinations quickly and can thus help in saving time and the operations will be carried out efficiently. With the effective use, any Institute can apply the Online Assessment System for conducting quick examinations and getting better results in less time.
description: E-learning offers practical and cost effective ways for higher education institutions as well as academic institutes to manage the delivery of education over the web and manage managerial / administrative aspects of education at the same time. If done right, it can produce great results by decreasing costs and improving performance. Also, unlike a one time classroom session, the e learning course is available for others. This includes the static eLearning course as well as any ongoing conversations in networked communities.
problem_statement: Traditional examination processes are time-consuming for faculty members, requiring significant manual effort to grade papers and prepare mark sheets. Furthermore, conventional classroom-based testing lacks the flexibility to provide immediate feedback and continuous assessment opportunities for students.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an Online Assessment System designed to streamline the examination process for educational institutions. By automating the delivery and grading of multiple-choice examinations, the system saves faculty time, enables continuous student development through regular and surprise testing, and provides immediate results.
objectives: To develop a web-based platform that facilitates the efficient administration of examinations across various academic disciplines. To reduce the administrative burden on faculty by automating the grading process and mark sheet generation. To enhance the learning experience by providing students with immediate feedback and flexible access to assessment tools.

By transitioning from traditional paper-based testing to a digital platform, the system enables the efficient administration of multiple-choice examinations and provides immediate results. This solution reduces the administrative workload for faculty while fostering a more responsive and continuous learning environment for students.

keywords: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD), Assistive Technology, Mobile Application, Web Development, Early Diagnosis, Behavioral Support, Social Skills Training
abstract: At present, some people still don't know what Autism is and how much it affects Children. It is difficult to identify autism spectrum disorders in a child before reaching the age of 12 months, but they can be diagnosed in general at the age of two years, and the distinctive features of the disease have a delay or temporary decline in the development of language and social skills, and the repetition of stereotypes in his behavior. Autism also called autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a complicated condition that includes problems with communication and behavior. It can involve a wide range of symptoms and skills. ASD can be a minor problem or a disability that needs full- time care in a special facility. People with ASD have trouble with communication. They have trouble understanding what other people think and feel. This makes it hard for them to express themselves, either with words or through gestures, facial expressions, and touch. In this project We are building a system to help autistics express their feelings and increase their social life and skills, help the parents how to discover the disease earlier and how to deal with it by using website and mobile application with an easy use interface, and well-organized methods help the autistics to learn new words and hear voices and increase their motivation. Children with autism also suffer almost certainly from difficulties in three basic developmental areas, namely: mutual social relations, language and behavior. Parents play an essential role in providing the necessary support for their autistic child, and they can help ensure access to health and education services for the child, and provide nurturing and stimulating environments as he develops. And it has recently been shown that parents can also help provide their child with psychological and behavioral treatments. Our system is useful for children where they can make interactions and chat with another children or their therapist.

Abnormal Body Posturing or Facial Expressions. Children with ASD showed a decreased static and dynamic postural stability, functional balance, and motor performance. Children at young age they make moves that not normal children do they cannot interact with lots of things if there is something sad they don't interact with it. Abnormal Tone of Voice. The speech of many children with autism appears abnormal and is often described as machine-like, "monotonic," or "sing-song." The abnormalities were even noted in early descriptions of autism. However, their exact characteristics, underlying mechanisms, consistency and diagnostic power had not yet been established. Avoidance of Eye Contact or Poor Eye Contact. For many people with autism, avoiding eye contact isn't a sign that they don't care - instead, it's a response to a deeply uncomfortable sensation. Researchers have discovered a part of the brain responsible for helping newborns turn towards familiar faces is abnormally activated among those on the autism spectrum, suggesting therapies that force eye contact could inadvertently be inducing anxiety.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated system consisting of a web platform and a mobile application designed to support children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) and their parents. The solution features educational content and videos to assist parents in early detection and behavioral management, while providing children with interactive tools to improve communication, social interaction, and emotional expression. Additionally, the system includes a secure chat interface for emergency communication and specialized modules for therapists to track progress and address specific behavioral challenges.
objectives: To add videos showing how to deal with children with autism and educational videos learn children with autism how to deal with people in a way normally. To help parents learn how to deal with their child. To make interaction between children and technology. To discover the Autism earlier. To add chat automatic communication between the people with autism and page in case of emergency. To add ways for the therapist to solve autistic problems.
ai_summary: This graduation project addresses the challenges faced by children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) and their families by providing a comprehensive web and mobile-based support system. The platform aims to facilitate early diagnosis, improve social and communication skills through interactive technology, and offer educational resources for parents and therapists. By leveraging digital tools, the system fosters a nurturing environment that enhances the developmental outcomes and quality of life for individuals on the autism spectrum.
