student_names: Ahmed Hamdy Saied Mohamed, Menna Ahmed Mohamed Fouad, Mohamed Gamal Zenhom Khalil, Marwa Mohamed Samy Mohamed, Mohamed Tarek Mohamed Hussein, Eslam Khairy Hamed Mohamed, Baher Mohamed Zakaria Elgobashi, Nourhan Ayman elsayed Ahmed
technologies: AI, IoT, machine learning, deep learning, image processing, smartphone application, web platform
keywords: Plant Disease Detection, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Smart Agriculture, IoT, Precision Farming, Image Processing, Automated Plant Care
abstract: Plant diseases are among the most significant challenges in agriculture, leading to substantial reductions in crop yield and quality. These diseases are caused by biological, environmental, and chemical factors, making early and accurate detection crucial for effective disease management. Traditionally, plant disease diagnosis relies on manual visual inspection by farmers or agricultural experts, which is time-consuming, requires experience, and is prone to human errors. To address these challenges, we propose an automated deep learning-based system for the diagnosis of the most common plant diseases. The system provides precise identification of the disease based on leaf images and suggests appropriate treatments to mitigate its effects. Our system is designed as both a smartphone application and a web platform, making it easily accessible to farmers and agricultural researchers. The system utilizes image processing and deep learning techniques to classify plant diseases with high accuracy. Plant images were collected using smartphone cameras and drones, ensuring a diverse dataset that enhances model robustness. Prior to training, various preprocessing techniques, including data augmentation, were applied to improve model performance. The proposed system consists of two deep learning models, each trained on a different subset of plant disease images. The first model achieved 94% training accuracy and 92% test accuracy, while the second model demonstrated 96% training accuracy and 95% test accuracy. The models were developed using pre-trained models architectures, which are known for their efficiency and high performance in image classification tasks. By leveraging machine learning and computer vision, this system offers an efficient and scalable approach to early disease detection, reducing the reliance on expert evaluations and enabling farmers to take proactive measures to protect their crops. As the dataset grows and model performance improves, the system has the potential to become a vital tool for modern precision agriculture, helping to increase crop productivity, reduce losses, and ensure food security on a global scale.
description: AI Integration: Machine learning models are utilized for plant identification, disease detection, and toxic plant classification, delivering precise and actionable insights. IoT Integration: IoT sensors for humidity and temperature enhance real-time monitoring and data collection, empowering users to make informed decisions.
problem_statement: Plant care is an essential yet challenging task that requires knowledge, consistency, and time. Despite the growing popularity of indoor and outdoor gardening, many individuals struggle to provide the appropriate care for their plants. This often leads to poor plant health, reduced aesthetic appeal, and, in severe cases, plant death. The key challenges faced by plant owners can be summarized as follows: 1- Plant Identification: • Difficulty in accurately identifying plant species. • Without accurate identification, understanding specific care needs such as soil type, light exposure, watering frequency, and temperature requirements becomes difficult. 2- Disease Recognition: • Inability to detect and diagnose plant diseases at an early stage. • Misdiagnosing or failing to diagnose diseases in time can lead to ineffective treatments or irreversible damage. 3- Lack of Reliable Information: • Limited access to reliable, real-time information about plant care practices. • Reliance on general advice that may not suit specific plant requirements. 4- Improper Placement: • Challenges in determining the best environmental conditions for plants. • Placing plants in areas with unsuitable light intensity or humidity. 5- Watering Issues: • Overwatering or underwatering due to inconsistent care routines. 6- Time Constraints: • Busy lifestyles leading to irregular care schedules. • Forgetting essential tasks like watering or checking plant health. 7- Environmental Monitoring: • Absence of tools to assess environmental conditions like light and humidity. • Difficulty maintaining optimal growth conditions for plants. 8- Communication Barriers: • Many users find it difficult to communicate with fellow plant enthusiasts to share information, tips, and experiences. This lack of communication can lead to isolation and missed opportunities for learning and support.
proposed_solution: To address these challenges, the proposed system offers a comprehensive platform for plant care, incorporating the following features: 1. Plant Identification: Users can take photos of their plants, and the system will identify them, providing names and relevant details to ensure proper care.
objectives: • Foster sustainable practices in agriculture and gardening. • Reduce the impact of plant diseases and environmental stressors on crops. • Enhance the accessibility of plant-related knowledge and resources. • Promote safety by identifying toxic plants and educating users. • Enable precise irrigation and water management for optimal plant growth and resource conservation.
ai_summary: The 'Leaf&Root' project is a comprehensive smart agriculture solution designed to address the challenges of plant care, disease management, and environmental monitoring. By integrating deep learning models for image-based disease diagnosis and plant identification with IoT sensors for real-time environmental data, the system provides users with actionable insights to improve crop health and productivity. The platform, available as both a mobile application and a web interface, effectively reduces reliance on manual expert evaluation and promotes sustainable gardening and farming practices. This multi-faceted approach leverages advanced technology to mitigate plant loss, optimize resource usage, and foster a collaborative community for plant enthusiasts.

abstract: Our application is about smart camera phone which we will put while the lecturer is explaining lecture. Our application captures photos and compares them with each other, saving the one that has high histogram and uploading them on the faculty website to make students downloading them to save their time in lecture and concentrate during explaining.
description: The Smart Lecture Project is an automated system designed to capture and process lecture content in real-time using a smartphone camera. By analyzing image histograms to ensure optimal clarity, the application automatically selects the best quality images of lecture materials and uploads them to a centralized faculty website. This system aims to bridge the gap between lecture delivery and material accessibility, allowing students to focus on the professor's explanation rather than manual note-taking.
problem_statement: The student can Not concentrate during lectures while writing and can concentrate on the lecture , but he will not write it, also the lecture time will be lost when the lecturer leaves some time for the students to write what has been explained, also difficulty in getting the materials or delay in the arrival of course material for students.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a smart application that utilizes image processing algorithms to capture and evaluate lecture board content. By comparing consecutive frames and identifying those with the highest histogram quality, the system filters out blurry or redundant images. These high-quality images are then automatically uploaded to a faculty portal, providing students with immediate access to lecture materials and eliminating the need for manual transcription during class.
objectives: To enhance student concentration during lectures by removing the burden of manual note-taking. To optimize lecture time by eliminating pauses previously required for students to copy board content. To improve the accessibility and distribution speed of course materials through a centralized digital platform.
ai_summary: The Smart Lecture Project addresses the challenge of student distraction and time inefficiency during academic lectures by automating the capture of board content. Using computer vision and histogram analysis, the application identifies and saves the highest-quality images of lecture notes, which are then uploaded to a faculty website for student access. This solution allows students to remain fully engaged with the lecturer while ensuring they have reliable, timely access to all course materials. By integrating modern mobile technology into the classroom, the project aims to streamline the educational process and improve overall learning outcomes.

abstract: An automatic attendance management system using biometrics would provide the needed solution . the results showed improved performance over manual attendance management system . Biometric-based techniques have emerged as the most promising option for recognizing individuals in recent years since, instead of authenticating people and granting them access to physical and virtual domains based on passwords, smart cards . Biometric based technologies include identification based on physiological characteristics . Face recognition appears to offer several advantages over other biometric methods.

problem_statement: Every time a lecture, section or laboratory starts the lecturer or teaching assistant delays the lecture to record students' attendance. this is a lengthy process and takes lot of time and effort, especially it is a lecture with huge number of students. it also causes a lot of disturbance and interruption when an exam is held. moreover the attendance sheet is subjected to damage and loss while being passed on between different students of teaching staff. and when the number of students enrolled in a certain course is huge, the lecturers tend to call a couple of students name at random which is not fair student evaluation process either. Finally, these attendance records are used by the staff to monitor the student's attendance rates. this process could be easy and effective with a small number of students but on the other hand dealing with the records of a large number of students often leads to human error. > One of the most important problems : o deal with large groups of students o checking the performance of students o the registers could easily be exploited by students Key factor of improving the quality of education is having students attend classes regularly . Traditionally students are stimulated to attend classes using attendance points which at the end of a semester constitute a part of a student's final grade. > Checking the performance of students : Maintaining the attendance is very important and compulsory in all the institutes for checking the performance of students .
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an automated attendance management system that utilizes image processing and face recognition technology to replace manual, paper-based methods. By capturing images of students in a classroom setting, the system performs automated face detection and recognition to identify individuals and cross-reference them with a secure database, thereby eliminating human error, saving instructional time, and preventing attendance fraud.
objectives: o provide plenty of paper documents that may be damaged over time. o providing effort to students and lecturers . o accuracy in the process of taking attendance . o save lost time and take advantage of it as much as possible in the educational process .
ai_summary: This project presents an automated attendance management system designed to modernize the traditional, time-consuming process of recording student presence in educational institutions. By leveraging image processing and face recognition technologies, the system accurately identifies students and updates attendance records in real-time, effectively addressing issues such as manual errors, administrative delays, and potential exploitation of paper registers. The implementation aims to enhance educational efficiency by allowing lecturers to focus on teaching rather than administrative tasks while providing a reliable method for monitoring student performance.

student_names: Ahmed Ibrahim Tantawy, Ahmed Hamdy Abd-El-Halim, Amira Youssef Mustafa, Reham Salah Mohamed, Fatma Saber Khalf, Hadeer Ramadan Hamid
technologies: Natural Language Processing (NLP), Machine Translation APIs, Mobile/Web Application Development Frameworks, Real-time Communication Protocols (WebSockets), Cloud Computing Services.
keywords: Automatic Translation, Real-time Chat, Cross-cultural Communication, Language Barrier, Social Connectivity, Multilingual Messaging.
abstract: The Bilingual project addresses the persistent barrier of language differences in global communication by developing a modern chat application that facilitates seamless interaction between users of different nationalities. By integrating real-time automatic translation, the system enables individuals to communicate in their native languages, thereby fostering cross-cultural connections and information exchange. This project aims to bridge the gap between advanced technological connectivity and the fundamental human need for effective, multilingual communication in the 21st century.
description: Immediate communication between different people of different nationalities and languages has been the center of our concern and the thing that drove us to search and look for real solutions that when applied, can make a real difference in human communication.
problem_statement: It must have happened that you want to talk to a person from another country for some reason but you can't speak the language of that person, you have no idea about that language, barely know a few words or rather no words at all! This is a serious matter especially when we're living in the 21st century where everything is connected, you can find information on any subject, anywhere and in anytime only by going online, you can be where you are now and miraculously witness second by second a live event on the other side of the world! Humans have landed on the Moon and currently exploring Mars, but how can we be at that level of scientific knowledge and technological advance while we are struggling to speak other people's languages? Connect to them? Share information on different aspects of life? Build friendships and/or perhaps relationships?!
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a specialized chat application that incorporates an automatic translation engine to bridge language gaps in real-time. By allowing users to send messages in their native language while the recipient receives them in their own, the application eliminates the need for manual translation or fluency in a foreign language. This approach ensures that users can build friendships, share information, and engage in meaningful dialogue regardless of their linguistic background.
objectives: To develop a user-friendly chat interface that supports seamless, real-time communication across different languages. To implement robust translation algorithms that maintain the context and intent of messages during cross-lingual exchanges. To facilitate global social interaction and reduce the friction caused by language barriers in digital communication.
ai_summary: Bilingual is a social media project designed to overcome language barriers by providing a real-time, automatic translation chat application. Developed by a team from the Faculty of Computers and Informatics at Benha University, the platform enables users to communicate effortlessly with people from different nationalities in their native languages. By leveraging modern translation technologies, the project aims to enhance global connectivity and foster cross-cultural relationships in an increasingly interconnected world.

student_names: Abd Elrahman Ashraf Gharib, Maha Fathy Mahrous, Mai Elsayed Salem, Mostafa Ahmed Mahmoud, Mahasen Safwat Elsayed, Mohamed Abbas Mohamed
technologies: Computer Vision, Image Processing, Video Analytics, Alarm Systems, Network Communication
keywords: Fall Detection, Elderly Care, Computer Vision, Patient Safety, Healthcare Monitoring, Automated Alert System
abstract: Hospitals and nursing homes are experiencing a simultaneous increase in injuries due to falls and a decrease in qualified staff hires. More than 16000 elderly patients die because of injuries sustained from falls each year and the severity of the issue is exacerbated by the staff-to patient ratio. Solving the problem involves implementing preventative measures that will minimize incidents leading to injury without necessitating a larger staff. The project used in conjunction with a current product that aims to prevent falls from ever occurring, like the sleep safe bed, can help decrease many of the problems. During hours when there is a smaller on-call staff, such as at night, the patient and the personnel have the option of activating the system to detect falls. Camera is strategically placed, depending on the patient's privacy concerns and desired level of safety, to record movement. A feed of the video is continuously transmitted to the local computer on the network. Where the data is analyzed and processed to determine if a fall has occurred and whether it medical assistance should be sent. The computer can differentiate between different types of movements by looking at certain conditions and if the analyzed activity fulfills the criteria. If help is necessary, an alarm is sent to nurse's station in order to alert staff.
description: This project presents a computer vision-based monitoring system designed to detect falls among elderly patients in clinical settings. By analyzing real-time video feeds, the system distinguishes between normal movements and fall events, automatically alerting medical staff when assistance is required to mitigate injury risks.
problem_statement: Hospitals and nursing homes face a critical challenge due to an increasing number of fall-related injuries among elderly patients coupled with a shortage of qualified staff. The high staff-to-patient ratio, particularly during night shifts, often leads to delayed responses to emergencies, significantly increasing the severity of injuries and mortality rates.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an automated fall detection system that utilizes strategically placed cameras to monitor patient movement. The system processes video data on a local network to identify fall patterns and triggers an immediate alarm at the nurse's station, allowing for rapid medical intervention without requiring additional personnel.
objectives: To develop a reliable, non-intrusive monitoring system capable of accurately identifying fall incidents in real-time. To reduce the response time for medical assistance in healthcare facilities and alleviate the burden on nursing staff by providing an automated, intelligent alert mechanism.
ai_summary: This 2017 graduation project from Benha University addresses the critical issue of elderly patient falls in healthcare facilities through an automated computer vision system. By analyzing video feeds, the project enables real-time detection of falls and immediate notification to nursing staff, thereby improving patient safety and optimizing resource allocation. The system serves as a vital technological intervention to reduce injury severity and mortality in environments with limited staffing.

student_names: Mohamed Atef Mohamed fooda, Yasmeen Mostafa Mohamed, Alaa Ahmed Mohamed Farahat, Doha Mohamed Abdo, Nahed Yassen Mohamed Nasser, Mona Mohamed Shaaban
technologies: regression algorithms, random forest, decision tree, KNN, SVM
keywords: Medical Analysis System, Machine Learning, Predictive Analytics, Healthcare Technology, Diabetes Prediction, Anemia Detection, Liver Function Analysis, KNN, Random Forest, SVM, Decision Tree, Specialist Recommendation, Geolocation, Patient Management
abstract: This project focuses on the application of straightforward yet effective regression algorithms in conjunction with random forest, decision tree, KNN and SVM for the analysis of medical data, specifically targeting some diseases (Anemia, Liver and Diabetes). The simplicity of the algorithms ensures a user-friendly and interpretable approach, making it accessible for medical practitioners with varying levels of technical expertise. Using some algorithms, when a patient uploads their personal data, their location and the analysis they want to know the result of, these algorithms analyze the patient's data and provide them with the analysis result, the appropriate specialist for their case, and their location. Through the integration of these technologies, we seek to create a versatile tool that empowers healthcare professionals in making informed decisions based on reliable and easily interpretable insights. The project's innovative approach lies in its commitment to simplicity, accessibility, and the utilization of cutting-edge technologies for medical analysis.
description: In recent years, the intersection of healthcare and technology has given rise to innovative solutions aimed at enhancing patient care and streamlining medical processes. One such advancement is the development of medical analysis systems that leverage machine learning to predict various health conditions. This project presents a comprehensive medical analysis system, accessible via both an application and a website, which predicts the results for diabetes, anemia, and liver functions. By utilizing machine learning algorithms such as K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) and Random Forest, the system not only forecasts potential health issues but also recommends relevant medical specialists and nearby doctors. Additionally, it features a robust dashboard for administrators, and provides users with functionalities such as setting alarms for medication and appointments, ensuring a holistic approach to managing their health.
problem_statement: The traditional methods of diagnosing and managing chronic conditions like diabetes, anemia, and liver dysfunctions are often time-consuming and dependent on direct medical consultation. Patients frequently face delays in receiving critical health information, which can lead to deteriorations in their conditions. Moreover, the lack of immediate access to specialized medical professionals and the difficulty in managing medication schedules and appointments exacerbate the challenges faced by patients. The primary problems this project aims to address include: 1. Delayed Diagnosis and Prediction: The need for timely and accurate prediction of diabetes, anemia, and liver functions to initiate early intervention. 2. Accessibility to Specialized Care: Difficulty in identifying and accessing the right medical specialists and nearby healthcare providers.
proposed_solution: The proposed medical analysis system offers a multifaceted solution to the aforementioned problems through its innovative features: 1. Predictive Analytics Using Machine Learning: - Diabetes Prediction: Utilizing patient data and employing algorithms such as KNN and Random Forest to predict the likelihood of diabetes. - Anemia Detection: Analyzing relevant health parameters to forecast anemia, enabling timely medical attention. - Liver Function Analysis: Assessing liver health indicators to predict potential liver dysfunctions, aiding in early diagnosis and treatment. 2. Specialist Recommendation and Locator: - The system recommends specialized doctors based on the predicted health conditions. - It provides a geolocation service to identify and locate the nearest available medical professionals, ensuring that patients receive prompt and appropriate care. 3. User and Admin Dashboards: - Admin Dashboard: Allows administrators to manage user data, monitor system performance, and oversee predictive analytics processes. - User Dashboard: Offers patients a personalized interface to view their health predictions, manage their medical information, and set up alerts. 4. Alarm System for Medications: - Users can set alarms for their medication schedules ensuring adherence to prescribed treatments.
objectives: - Develop a user-friendly medical website focused on medical analysis. - Design a mobile-friendly interface that enables patients to easily input their personal and medical data. - Enable users to enter medical analysis data for automated analysis. - Generate and display results based on the medical analysis data. - Include providing users with a platform to receive initial medical diagnosis, and find nearest doctor - Implement an admin dashboard for managing doctors, handle contact messages from users, and add new medical analysis types.
ai_summary: The Medical Analysis System is a comprehensive healthcare platform designed to address delays in diagnosis and limited access to specialized care for conditions such as diabetes, anemia, and liver dysfunction. By integrating machine learning algorithms including KNN, Random Forest, SVM, and decision trees, the system provides automated health predictions and personalized specialist recommendations based on patient data. The project further enhances patient outcomes through a user-friendly interface, administrative dashboards, and integrated medication management tools. This solution effectively bridges the gap between patients and medical professionals, facilitating timely interventions and improved health monitoring.

student_names: Omar Maged Galal Eldeen Ali, Omar Khaled Mahmoud Ali, Mohammed Mohsen Sayed Ahmed, Ali Mohammed Ahmed Abdelrady, Mervat Mohy Mohammed Gebriel, Osama Ahmed Elsaid Elazab
technologies: License Plate Recognition (LPR), Internet of Things (IoT), Artificial Intelligence (AI), sensors, RGB LEDs, parking blockers, mobile app, QR code
keywords: Smart Parking, IoT, License Plate Recognition, Artificial Intelligence, Automated Payment, Reservation System, Parking Management, Urban Mobility
abstract: The Smart Parking System aims to streamline the parking experience in private garages by integrating advanced technologies such as License Plate Recognition (LPR), Internet of Things (IoT) sensors, and Artificial Intelligence (AI). The system is designed to provide real-time parking spot availability, secure parking through barcode scanning, and automated payment upon exit. When a car approaches the garage, a camera captures the license plate, and the system verifies whether the driver is a registered user. For registered members, the system grants access based on reservation status, while visitors are allowed entry based on spot availability and entry limits. The system tracks the car's entry time, facilitates parking spot allocation using sensors and RGB LEDs, and monitors reserved spots using parking blockers. Upon exit, the system calculates parking fees based on the duration of stay, enabling mobile payment for registered users or a QR code for visitors. The system includes a rewards mechanism where users earn points for each parking session, redeemable for discounts or gifts. Additionally, an admin dashboard provides full control over system operations, such as monitoring parking space availability, managing user accounts, and overseeing transactions. Through the integration of IoT components like space availability sensors, boom gates, and entry-exit cameras, along with AI for license plate recognition, the system provides an efficient and secure parking solution that enhances user experience while optimizing space utilization in private garages.
description: The rapid growth of urban populations, coupled with an increase in vehicle ownership, has led to an escalating demand for parking spaces in both public and private garages. As cities become more congested, the availability of parking spots in high-demand areas is becoming increasingly scarce, resulting in a variety of problems for both drivers and property owners. These problems include:
problem_statement: 1. Limited Parking Space Availability: In densely populated urban areas, parking spaces are often limited. Drivers frequently face difficulty finding vacant spots, leading to wasted time, frustration, and increased traffic congestion. This inefficiency also affects the overall traffic flow in the area, contributing to environmental pollution due to longer driving times and more vehicle emissions. 2. Inefficient Parking Management: Traditional parking systems are often manually operated or lack real-time monitoring, making it difficult to track spot occupancy and manage space availability. This results in underutilized parking spaces while other areas may be overcrowded, causing inefficiency in parking space allocation. 3. Inconvenient Payment Systems: Traditional parking systems often rely on ticket-based payment methods, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. Users may need to walk to a kiosk or pay through cash or manual credit card transactions, resulting in delays at entry and exit points. These systems may also lack integration with mobile apps, leaving users with few convenient payment options. 4. Lack of Real-time Information: Many parking systems do not provide real-time information on parking spot availability, leading to unnecessary searches for available spaces. Drivers are forced to waste time and fuel driving around the parking facility or block access to other vehicles in search of an empty spot, worsening traffic congestion. 5. No Reservation System: Many parking facilities, especially in high-demand areas, do not offer a reservation system. As a result, drivers may not be able to secure a spot in
proposed_solution: The Smart Parking System aims to address the key challenges faced by traditional parking management systems in urban environments. The project objectives are as follows:
objectives: 1. Enhance Parking Space Efficiency: Optimize the utilization of parking spaces by providing real-time availability updates, allowing drivers to quickly identify and access vacant spots. This will help maximize the usage of limited parking resources and reduce congestion within the parking facility. 2. Automate Entry and Exit Control: Implement a seamless automated entry and exit system using License Plate Recognition (LPR) to identify registered vehicles and grant them access to reserved or available parking spots. For visitors, ensure efficient entry based on real-time space availability while managing entry limits to prevent misuse. 3. Enable Reservation-Based Parking: Allow registered users to reserve parking spots in advance through a mobile app. The system will secure reserved spots with parking blockers, ensuring that only the designated vehicle can access the space. 4. Implement a Mobile Payment Solution: Provide a mobile app-based payment system that allows users to pay for parking either directly through their account (for registered users) or via QR code for visitors. This will ensure a seamless and cashless payment process, reducing transaction times and enhancing user convenience. 5. Introduce a Rewards Program: Integrate a rewards system that allows users to earn points for each parking session. These points can be redeemed for discounts or gifts, incentivizing frequent use of the parking system and fostering user loyalty. 6. Ensure Security and Safety: Enhance the security of the parking facility by preventing unauthorized access through automated entry and exit controls. The system will also use surveillance cameras and parking blockers to secure reserved spots and ensure that only authorized vehicles can park in designated spaces.
ai_summary: The Smart Parking System is an IoT-based solution designed to modernize parking management in private garages by addressing inefficiencies in space utilization, payment processing, and access control. By integrating License Plate Recognition (LPR), real-time sensor monitoring, and a mobile application, the system automates entry and exit while providing users with the ability to reserve spots in advance. This project enhances security and user convenience through a cashless payment infrastructure and a loyalty rewards program, ultimately reducing traffic congestion and optimizing parking resource management.

abstract: Computers are being used in every aspect of our daily life. Beginning from scientific computation and research, computers are assisting us business, banking, e-commerce, publishing, word processing, database management, communication, traffic control etc... Everyday new applications are being developed benefit the human beings. New area of technology is being developed to overcome the limitation of traditional input, output devices of the computers. One of the major trends in the computer communication is to develop applications using virtual environment where direct interaction to the computers through traditional 2D keyboard, pen, or mouse-oriented graphical user interfaces are not suitable. Rather devices that sense body (e.g. hand) position and orientation, direction of gaze, speech and sound, facial expression, galvanic skin response, and other aspects of human behavior or state can be used to model communication between a human and the environment. Significant research efforts are underway to capture human behavior or gesture, and develop system for communicating to the medically disabled people, machine controlling, robot controlling, video conferencing, traffic controlling, etc... Nowadays the majority of the human-computer interaction (HCI) is based on mechanical devices such as keyboards, mouse, joysticks or gamepads. In recent years there has been a growing interest in a class of methods based on computer vision due to its ability to recognize human gestures in a natural way. These methods used as input the images acquired from a camera or from a stereo pair of cameras. That use of only basic input such as mouse and keyboard is limiting the creativity and capabilities of the user. Human-computer interaction (HCI) expanding the ways that people are able to interact with their computers through using simple gesture.
description: The Free Hand Mouse (FHM) project is a computer vision-based system designed to replace traditional mechanical input devices like keyboards and mice. By utilizing camera input to track hand movements and gestures, the system enables users to interact with their computers in a more natural and intuitive virtual environment.
problem_statement: Traditional human-computer interaction relies heavily on mechanical input devices such as keyboards, mice, and joysticks, which can be limiting to user creativity and accessibility. These conventional interfaces are often unsuitable for virtual environments or for individuals with physical disabilities who may struggle with standard hardware.
proposed_solution: The project implements a computer vision system that captures and interprets human hand gestures through a camera or stereo camera pair. This allows for seamless, touchless control of the computer interface, providing a more natural and inclusive method of interaction that transcends the limitations of physical peripherals.
objectives: To develop a robust gesture recognition system that accurately translates hand movements into computer commands. To enhance accessibility for users with physical disabilities by providing an alternative to mechanical input devices. To explore and implement advanced computer vision techniques that facilitate a more intuitive and natural human-computer interaction experience.
ai_summary: The Free Hand Mouse (FHM) project aims to revolutionize human-computer interaction by replacing traditional mechanical input devices with a gesture-based system. By leveraging computer vision technologies, the project enables users to control computer interfaces through natural hand movements captured by cameras. This solution addresses the limitations of standard hardware, offering a more creative and accessible interaction model for diverse users, including those with physical disabilities.

abstract: The mobile voice actions project (Speak2Do) is an android application enables mobile users to do many tasks on their phones via voice, especially handicaps and blind people in effective way. In this version, the application provides many features that a user frequently does and the minimum android platform supported is 2.3. The new versions will contain more specific features to focus help to blind people like OCR, Special spooking keyboard and custom user interface also will be provided for all android platform. The current main categories a speaker can order are custom views of call logs, send, show and read messages, send emails, call contacts, view contact details, create and delete calendar events, set alarms, ask about time and date, change mobile modes, Wi-Fi and Bluetooth settings, web queries, launch various apps... Speak2Do requires internet connection, since it uses Google speech API to get most related hypotheses of what user said. Mobile Voice Actions can work in acceptable level of noise. The returned hypotheses are affected by pronunciation of speaker and how he says words and phrases.
description: Speak2Do is an Android-based mobile application designed to facilitate hands-free interaction with smartphones through voice commands. By leveraging the Google Speech API, the application allows users to perform a wide range of system tasks, such as managing communications, calendar events, and device settings, with a specific focus on improving accessibility for visually impaired and handicapped users.
problem_statement: Many mobile users, particularly those with visual impairments or physical disabilities, face significant challenges in navigating complex smartphone interfaces and performing routine tasks efficiently. Traditional touch-based interfaces can be inaccessible or cumbersome for these users, creating a need for a more intuitive, voice-driven interaction model.
proposed_solution: The project provides a comprehensive voice-controlled interface that interprets user speech to execute common mobile operations. By integrating with the Google Speech API, the application converts spoken commands into actionable tasks, effectively bridging the gap between user intent and device functionality for individuals who require assistive technology.
objectives: The primary objective is to develop an accessible Android application that enables users to perform frequent mobile tasks via voice commands. Additionally, the project aims to support users with disabilities by simplifying device interaction, with future goals to include advanced features such as OCR and specialized keyboards to further enhance usability.
ai_summary: Speak2Do is a 2013 graduation project from Benha University that addresses mobile accessibility challenges by creating a voice-controlled Android application. The system utilizes the Google Speech API to allow users, especially those with visual or physical impairments, to manage calls, messages, calendar events, and device settings through natural language commands. By providing a hands-free alternative to traditional touch interfaces, the project successfully demonstrates an effective assistive technology solution for mobile device management.

abstract: The project is a full-fledged e-commerce platform equipped with a powerful recommendation system. The primary goal of the platform is to provide an engaging and personalized shopping experience to customers while maximizing sales for the business. The platform is built using modern web development technologies and frameworks, ensuring a high level of performance, scalability, and security. It offers a wide range of products across various categories, including electronics, fashion, home appliances, and more. The recommendation system is the core feature of the platform, designed to provide personalized product recommendations to each customer based on their browsing and purchase history. The system employs advanced machine learning algorithms and data analysis techniques to understand each customer's preferences and behavior, thus offering highly relevant and accurate recommendations. The platform also incorporates various other features to enhance the customer experience, such as a user-friendly interface, easy navigation, detailed product descriptions, product reviews and ratings, multiple payment options, and order tracking. The business benefits from the platform's recommendation system by increasing customer engagement, driving sales, and improving customer retention. The system provides valuable insights into customer behavior, enabling the business to make data-driven decisions regarding product offerings, pricing, and marketing strategies. Overall, the full e-commerce platform with a recommendation system is a powerful tool for businesses looking to offer an engaging and personalized shopping experience to their customers. With its advanced technology and user-friendly features, the platform can help businesses increase sales and grow their customer base in a highly competitive market.
description: E-commerce (EC) systems have seen a significant increase in sales volume in recent years, especially with significant technological advances and advances in the services offered by the Internet. This fact has led to the emergence of many large companies and increased competition between these companies to attract the largest possible number of customers and achieve the highest financial returns. This competition consists in increasing the number of goods offered, offering offers and discounts, facilitating payment processes, as well as facilitating the process of searching for goods for each customer according to his directives. technologies: Web development frameworks (e.g., React, Django or Node.js), Artificial Intelligence/Natural Language Processing (NLP) libraries for semantic text matching, Database management systems (e.g., PostgreSQL or MongoDB), and Cloud hosting services.
keywords: Knowledge sharing, Q&A platform, Artificial Intelligence, Semantic matching, Community-driven content, User engagement
abstract: Query is a free website that offers a wide range of questions and answers on many topics: programming, medical, literary, ......... etc. The site serves as a platform for users to ask and answer questions about each other, to vote on questions and answers, by joining and actively participating, by accepting (up) or rejecting (down) and editing questions and answers in a manner like a wiki or reddit. This is a traditional question and answer site. Users are given new privileges such as the ability to vote and comment. All User Generated Content is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike License. Each user has his own page, and you can follow his own content in response to questions. You can also follow the most frequently asked questions and the most commented questions. The new questions are reviewed through artificial intelligence and matched with the questions on the site so that the questions are not repeated, and the user reaches his goal quickly.
description: Query is a collaborative knowledge-sharing platform designed to facilitate community-driven question and answer interactions across diverse domains such as programming, medicine, and literature. The system incorporates user-centric features like voting, commenting, and content tracking, while leveraging artificial intelligence to optimize information retrieval and prevent redundant inquiries.
problem_statement: Users often struggle to find accurate information quickly due to the proliferation of repetitive questions and the lack of organized, community-verified knowledge bases. Traditional forums often suffer from information fragmentation, making it difficult for users to track relevant topics or verify the quality of answers.
proposed_solution: The project provides a centralized, wiki-style Q&A platform that utilizes AI-driven semantic analysis to match new queries against existing content, effectively reducing redundancy. By implementing a reputation-based voting system and user-specific content tracking, the platform ensures high-quality, relevant information is easily accessible to the community.

The platform fosters community engagement through voting, commenting, and user-tracking features, all governed by a Creative Commons licensing model to promote open knowledge sharing.

student_names: Omar Maged Galal Eldeen Ali, Omar Khaled Mahmoud Ali, Mohammed Mohsen Sayed Ahmed, Ali Mohammed Ahmed Abdelrady, Mervat Mohy Mohammed Gebriel, Osama Ahmed Elsaid Elazab
supervisor: Dr. Shadia Sarhan, ENG. Mawada Ashraf
technologies: ESP32-CAM, Arduino Uno, MQTT, HiveMQ, License Plate Recognition (LPR), Mobile App, QR Code, Sensors, RGB LEDs, LCD Display
keywords: Smart Parking, IoT, License Plate Recognition, Automation, Mobile Application, Reservation System, Parking Management
abstract: The Smart Parking System aims to streamline the parking experience in private garages by integrating advanced technologies such as License Plate Recognition (LPR), Internet of Things (IoT) sensors, and Artificial Intelligence (AI). The system is designed to provide real-time parking spot availability, secure parking through barcode scanning, and automated payment upon exit. When a car approaches the garage, a camera captures the license plate, and the system verifies whether the driver is a registered user. For registered members, the system grants access based on reservation status, while visitors are allowed entry based on spot availability and entry limits. The system tracks the car's entry time, facilitates parking spot allocation using sensors and RGB LEDs, and monitors reserved spots using parking blockers. Upon exit, the system calculates parking fees based on the duration of stay, enabling mobile payment for registered users or a QR code for visitors. The system includes a rewards mechanism where users earn points for each parking session, redeemable for discounts or gifts. Additionally, an admin dashboard provides full control over system operations, such as monitoring parking space availability, managing user accounts, and overseeing transactions. Through the integration of IoT components like space availability sensors, boom gates, and entry-exit cameras, along with AI for license plate recognition, the system provides an efficient and secure parking solution that enhances user experience while optimizing space utilization in private garages.
description: The project is a comprehensive smart parking management solution that automates the entire parking process. It utilizes IoT sensors for real-time occupancy detection, AI-based LPR for vehicle identification, and a mobile application for user reservations and payments. The system includes features like automated boom gates, parking blockers for reserved spots, a rewards program to incentivize users, and a centralized admin dashboard for facility management.
problem_statement: Traditional parking systems are often manually operated, lack real-time monitoring, rely on inefficient ticket-based payment methods, and fail to provide users with information on spot availability, leading to traffic congestion, wasted time, and reduced user satisfaction.
proposed_solution: An automated, IoT-enabled smart parking system that provides real-time availability tracking, automated entry/exit via License Plate Recognition, a mobile app for reservations and cashless payments, and a rewards system to improve user engagement and parking efficiency.
objectives: 1. Enhance parking space efficiency through real-time monitoring. 2. Automate entry and exit using LPR. 3. Enable reservation-based parking. 4. Implement a mobile payment solution. 5. Introduce a rewards program. 6. Ensure security and safety with automated controls. 7. Provide a comprehensive admin dashboard for facility management.
ai_summary: This project implements an automated, IoT-based smart parking system that uses AI-powered license plate recognition and real-time sensors to manage vehicle entry, exit, and spot availability. It features a mobile application for user reservations and payments, alongside a rewards program and an admin dashboard to optimize parking facility operations and improve user experience.

student_names: Shimaa Ismail Mohamed Mostafa
supervisor: Prof. Dr. Tarek Ahmed Elshishtawy, Prof. Dr. AbdelWahab Kamel Alsammak
technologies: FastText, Python, Levenshtein distance, Vector Space Model, Arabic Lemmatization
keywords: Natural Language Processing, Knowledge-based Systems, Semantic Textual Similarity, Arabic Lemmatization, Arabic Text Similarity, Vector Space-Based Model
abstract: This thesis focuses on measuring semantic textual similarity between two Arabic texts. It presents two hybrid approaches: the first combines vector space-based and alignment-based methods using FastText embeddings and lemmatization to enrich search space. The second approach uses an extended Levenshtein algorithm at the token level with semantic weights and permutation techniques to handle word order and negation. Experimental results on SemEval 2017 datasets demonstrate that these methods achieve higher Pearson Correlation Coefficients compared to existing state-of-the-art systems.
description: A doctoral dissertation exploring advanced methodologies for calculating semantic similarity in the Arabic language. The project addresses challenges such as morphological inflection, lack of linguistic resources, and the impact of word order and negation on semantic meaning. It introduces novel alignment techniques and lemmatization-based vector models to improve accuracy in information retrieval and NLP tasks.
problem_statement: Measuring semantic similarity in Arabic is challenging due to morphological complexity, orthographic ambiguity caused by optional diacritics, and the lack of free, high-quality linguistic resources. Existing lexical-based approaches often fail to capture semantic nuances, and current semantic models for Arabic underperform compared to their English counterparts.
proposed_solution: The research proposes two hybrid approaches: 1) An alignment-based technique using a semantic word space matrix and FastText embeddings to map words to vectors, and 2) An extended Levenshtein algorithm operating at the token level with custom edit costs and permutation-based word ordering to mitigate the impact of sentence structure and negation.
objectives: To develop robust semantic similarity measures for Arabic, eliminate diacritization problems through lemmatization, build an Arabic thesaurus dictionary, and improve Pearson Correlation scores on benchmark datasets compared to existing state-of-the-art models.
ai_summary: This project introduces two hybrid AI-driven approaches to accurately measure semantic similarity between Arabic text snippets. By combining advanced word embeddings, lemmatization, and a modified Levenshtein algorithm, the system effectively handles linguistic challenges like word order and negation to outperform existing models on benchmark datasets.

project_title: Medical Records with Brain Tumor Detection Models
student_names: Haidy Hassan Elsayed Hassan, Ibthal Mohamed Abdelghany, Omnia Khaled Said, Eman Salah Moustafa Mohamad, Mayar Ashraf Fathy Abd Elhalim, Moaz Ashraf Abdelghany Hussein

abstract: This project presents an integrated digital health record system designed to modernize medical documentation and improve patient care. The system facilitates the transition from paper-based records to a secure, automated digital platform. Beyond administrative management, the project incorporates advanced deep learning models to analyze medical X-rays for the detection and classification of brain tumors, assisting in early diagnosis and reducing the risk of misdiagnosis.
description: The project is a comprehensive medical informatics solution that combines a digital health record management system with AI-driven diagnostic tools. It allows clinics to manage patient appointments, store medical histories, and digitize prescriptions. Additionally, it features a specialized module for the neurology department that utilizes deep learning to analyze brain scans, helping to identify and classify potential tumors.
problem_statement: Current medical record systems suffer from limited storage, security risks, inefficient information sharing, and the potential for human error. Furthermore, manual diagnosis of brain tumors is prone to misdiagnosis due to the complexity of symptoms and the reliance on subjective interpretation of medical scans.
proposed_solution: A centralized, secure digital platform that automates appointment scheduling, digitizes patient medical records, and provides an AI-powered diagnostic tool. The system allows doctors to upload X-rays for automated tumor detection and provides patients with access to their medical history and test results.
objectives: To design a system for better patient care and reduced clinic operational costs; to implement a secure database for storing and recalling patient data; to leverage modern machine learning and deep learning techniques to detect brain tumors from X-rays; and to provide features like prescription digitization and appointment management.
ai_summary: This project develops a comprehensive digital health record system that streamlines clinic operations, such as appointment booking and medical history management. It also integrates a deep learning-based diagnostic tool that analyzes brain X-rays to detect and classify tumors, aiming to improve diagnostic accuracy and patient outcomes.

abstract: In general, digital services provide many advantages and benefits in a wide range of industries and sectors, including the public and private sectors, public utilities, buildings and facilities. Digital services help improve communication and interaction between users, devices and systems, improve efficiency and productivity, reduce costs, save time, and increase security and protection. With the development of digital technologies, digital services will remain available and available mainly in all industries and sectors, and the demand for them will continue in the coming years. It is expected that the interest in digital services will increase in the future, which will lead to the development of new technologies and services, and the improvement of the services currently available. Thus, digital services will remain an essential part of our daily lives and the development of industries and sectors in the future. Our system is trying to solve a big problem faced by the state in accomplishing tasks related to the field of real estate and buildings. As the goal of the project is to facilitate services for citizens in the field of real estate and buildings, where the state aims to use information technology to provide the services required for the stages of construction and processing, and through our website, all real estate applications can be made available and submitted to citizens anywhere with the speed and efficiency required.
description: This project is a web-based information system designed to digitize and streamline government services related to real estate and building management. It allows citizens to perform various tasks online, such as applying for building permits, requesting utility connections (electricity, water, natural gas), submitting reconciliation requests for agricultural lands, and paying utility bills, thereby reducing the need for physical visits to government offices.
problem_statement: Citizens face significant difficulties and delays in completing tasks related to real estate and building construction due to overcrowding in government departments, inefficient manual processes, and the lack of accessible digital alternatives for service requests and utility management.
proposed_solution: The development of a centralized web portal that enables citizens to submit applications for building permits, request utility connections, track service progress, update personal data, and make online payments, effectively reducing physical crowding and improving service delivery speed.
objectives: To facilitate citizen access to real estate and building services, reduce physical crowding at government agencies, improve the efficiency of construction and processing stages, provide online tracking for service requests, and enable convenient online payment and consultation options.
ai_summary: This project is a web-based platform designed to digitize government services for the real estate and construction sectors. abstract: Due to the current bad economic situation in Egypt and the whole world, we decided to build a 'Stock Market Simulator' to help people to begin investing in the stock market without using real money to know how the process works using many daily used techniques as indicators, analyze stock news and stock price prediction and track user performance. In this project we focus on offering stock prices, a portfolio to show you what stocks do you own, the ability to buy and sell stocks, and a price prediction feature to give you a glimpse of how the price of a stock will be in the near future. We focused on making the website as simple as possible with a friendly user interface, so anyone from any age, who just has access to a mobile phone, or a laptop and an internet connection can start his journey of trading.
description: TradeSmart is a web-based stock market simulation platform designed to educate users on financial trading. It provides a risk-free environment where users can practice buying and selling stocks, manage virtual portfolios, and utilize machine learning models to predict future stock price trends.
problem_statement: The stock market is complex, volatile, and difficult for beginners to navigate. Investing without prior experience or knowledge in data analysis poses a significant risk of financial loss, especially in challenging economic climates.
proposed_solution: A web-based simulation platform that allows users to trade with virtual currency. The system integrates real-time market data, portfolio tracking, and an LSTM-based machine learning model to provide predictive insights, enabling users to learn trading strategies safely.
objectives: To provide a risk-free trading environment, educate users on market dynamics, offer tools for portfolio management, and implement machine learning algorithms to assist in predicting stock price movements.
ai_summary: TradeSmart is a web-based stock market simulator that allows users to practice trading and portfolio management in a risk-free environment. It features an integrated machine learning model using the LSTM algorithm to provide predictive stock price analysis for educational purposes.

description: Treasure Hunt is a location-based mobile augmented reality game designed to educate users about Egyptian history. Players navigate real-world historical sites, using GPS and AR technology to discover and collect virtual 3D treasures. The game aims to promote tourism and provide an engaging, interactive learning experience about ancient Egyptian culture.
problem_statement: The project addresses the technological gap in AR accessibility, specifically the lack of AR support on many Android devices compared to iOS, and the high cost of specialized AR hardware. Additionally, it tackles the challenge of creating user-friendly, location-based AR experiences that are accessible on standard smartphones.
proposed_solution: The team developed a location-based AR game using Unity that utilizes standard smartphone sensors (GPS, gyroscope, magnetic sensor) to create an immersive experience. The solution focuses on optimizing AR performance for mobile devices to make the technology accessible to a wider audience without requiring expensive AR gear.
objectives: Enhance the real world with virtual 3D objects to create a mixed reality environment; allow users to find and collect virtual treasures at historical locations; provide educational content about Egyptian history; boost tourism in Egypt; implement GPS-based navigation for treasure hunting; and incorporate a progression system with medals and levels.
ai_summary: Treasure Hunt is an educational augmented reality mobile game that encourages users to explore historical sites in Egypt to collect virtual treasures. abstract: The Personal Profiling & Assistance project is a digital health platform designed to provide initial mental health assessments and support. By leveraging artificial intelligence, the system evaluates user responses to identify potential indicators of anxiety, depression, and personality traits. The platform also serves as a bridge between users and professional care by providing a search feature for nearby psychiatrists and clinics, aiming to reduce the barriers to accessing mental health services.
description: This project is a comprehensive mental health support system that combines personality profiling with AI-driven diagnostic tools. It addresses the growing need for accessible mental health resources by offering self-assessment tools, initial diagnostic reports, and a directory of professional medical services. The platform is designed to provide guidance, reduce the stigma associated with seeking help, and offer immediate support for individuals experiencing psychological distress.
problem_statement: Individuals face significant challenges in accessing mental health support, including the high cost of services, geographical barriers, the stigma surrounding mental health, and the difficulty of obtaining an initial diagnosis without immediate professional consultation. Furthermore, the rise in mental health issues like anxiety and depression, coupled with a decline in face-to-face interaction, necessitates a digital solution for self-assessment and guidance.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an AI-powered platform that offers interactive personality tests and mental health evaluations. The system analyzes user inputs to provide an initial assessment of mental well-being, including indicators for anxiety and depression, and generates personalized guidance tips. Additionally, it includes a location-based search feature to help users find nearby psychiatrists and clinics for further professional assistance.
objectives: To provide accessible and easy-to-use personality and mental health assessment tools, to utilize AI for initial diagnosis of mental health conditions, to offer actionable guidance and support tips to users, and to facilitate easier access to professional psychiatric care through a clinic locator service.
ai_summary: This project is an AI-driven mental health platform that provides users with personality assessments and initial screenings for conditions like anxiety and depression. It aims to bridge the gap in mental healthcare by offering immediate digital support and helping users locate professional psychiatric services in their area.

abstract: Mobile application that aims to serve the community and facilitate life matters. When a person searches for a technician in a specific profession, He may find it difficult to reach the right and qualified technicians. So, our flutter app facilitates the following tasks: 1- Searching for technicians in various fields. 2- Viewing the technician's Portfolio that contains previous work. 3- in-app chat between the customer and the technician to reach an agreement. 4- Order the technicians from the app and when the work is done the customer must provide feedback about the work. 5- this feedback is processed by AI model and turned into a rate for the technician. 6- the app makes technicians find work easily and urges them to do their best in their work. thus, we won't face problems finding the proper people to do a specific job and we will spare time and effort.
description: The project is a mobile application designed to connect customers with qualified technicians for maintenance work. It features a search function, technician portfolios, in-app chat, location tracking, and an AI-driven rating system based on customer feedback to ensure quality and reliability.
problem_statement: The difficulty of finding qualified and trustworthy technicians for maintenance tasks, leading to wasted time, effort, and the risk of being deceived by unqualified individuals.
proposed_solution: A mobile application that allows users to search for nearby technicians, view their portfolios, communicate via in-app chat, and rate them based on completed work using an AI-powered feedback system.
objectives: To facilitate the connection between customers and technicians, provide a platform for technicians to showcase their work, ensure service quality through AI-based ratings, and save time and effort for both parties.
ai_summary: This project is a mobile application that connects users with local maintenance technicians. It uses AI to process customer feedback into technician ratings and provides features like in-app chat and portfolio viewing to ensure reliable service.

By shifting the focus from passive gaming to active learning, the application teaches children aged 8 to 15 the fundamentals of electrical circuits through interactive lessons, practical applications, and engaging puzzles. The system utilizes a child-friendly interface with animations and sound effects to enhance focus and make the educational process both fun and effective.
description: The application features a simple, intuitive design tailored for children. It includes a home page with three main sections: Lessons, Practical Applications, and Puzzles. The lessons cover basic circuit components and connection methods. The application incorporates colorful visuals, animations, and audio feedback to maintain the child's interest and provide an immersive learning experience that encourages scientific curiosity.
problem_statement: Children frequently use tablets for entertainment and gaming, which can negatively impact their educational progress and waste valuable time that could be spent on productive learning activities.
proposed_solution: A dedicated educational mobile application that gamifies the learning of electrical circuits, providing children with a fun, interactive, and educational alternative to standard gaming apps.
objectives: To teach children aged 8-15 the basics of electrical circuits, provide interactive lessons on circuit design, incorporate puzzles to make learning enjoyable, and improve the overall educational value of tablet usage for children.

project_title: Building DSS with data warehouse for scientific researchers
student_names: Amr Hamdy Abd elwahab El-Kotory, Hassan Ibrahim Mohamed Omran, Mohamed Ahmed Abd Rabo Ahmed, Salah Salem Salem El-Dahshan, Eslam Ayman Mohamed Meselhy
technologies: Python, Web Scraping, Data Warehousing, SQL
keywords: Decision Support System, Data Warehouse, Web Scraping, Google Scholar, Webometrics, Scientific Research, University Ranking
abstract: The scientific researcher is basically based on one of the most highly scientific field of Google Corporation called google scholar which concerns to collect all scientific researches, articles, journals from academic researchers enrolled in different universities all over the world. All of these researches available online with citation for every research and all citation for each researcher there are many organizations depend on google scholar to rank work of all universities that have verified mail on google scholar. Our mission was to find a suitable method using Python language to extract all data of any university from Google Scholar using verified mail of university and build our own huge data warehouse that enable us to rank work of university and faculties that we need, provide reports help decision makers to achieve performance of these faculties that reflect positively on performance of university and obtain strength and weakness points, evolution, expectations and recommendations of the publishing and scientific operation of different universities.
description: This project involves the development of a Decision Support System (DSS) integrated with a data warehouse to analyze and rank academic institutions based on scientific research output. By leveraging web scraping techniques to extract data from Google Scholar, the system aggregates publication and citation metrics to provide actionable insights for university decision-makers regarding research performance and institutional ranking.
problem_statement: Extracting decision support reports at the university or national levels is difficult, as it requires browsing thousands of webpages to gather important data. Current ranking systems often suffer from inaccuracies, such as the 'bubble HEI' phenomenon, where rankings are skewed by a small number of highly-cited researchers, leading to false ratings of Higher Education Institutions.
proposed_solution: The project proposes building a dedicated data warehouse that utilizes Python-based web scraping to collect comprehensive publication and citation data from Google Scholar. This data is then processed to generate objective decision support reports that evaluate university performance, track research evolution, and provide a more accurate ranking mechanism compared to existing webometric indicators.
objectives: To build a data warehouse to support decision making based on data from Google Scholar; to compare the excellence of universities using 'Webometrics' metrics; to provide reports that help decision makers identify strengths, weaknesses, and trends in scientific research; and to provide an excellence factor for ranking universities at the regional and national levels.
ai_summary: This project creates a Decision Support System (DSS) that uses web scraping to collect and analyze academic research data from Google Scholar. It builds a data warehouse to generate performance reports and rankings for universities, helping decision-makers evaluate research output more accurately than traditional methods.

The system is intended to serve as an assistive tool for the deaf and as an educational aid for sign language instructors.

proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a computer-based system that uses real-time gesture recognition to translate sign language into speech or text. The system employs imaging and tracking techniques, such as skin color-based hand detection, to interpret gestures and provide a bridge for communication.

project_title: Integrated Intelligent System for City Services (Citi Linked)
student_names: Magdy Mohamed Diab, Eslam Kamel Metwally, Mohamed Helmy Ibrahim, Mohamed Mohamed BERAKA, Mohand Mohamed Mounir, Mohamed Roshdy El-halawany
supervisor: Assoc. prof. Mazen Selim, Eng. Mustafa Elgendy
technologies: Google Maps API, Web Technologies, Sensors, GPS, Mobile/Web Interface
keywords: Smart City, IoT, Urban Management, AS3FNY, Reporting Service, Emergency Response
abstract: A smart city is an urban development vision to integrate information and communication technology (ICT) and Internet of things (IOT) technology in a secure fashion to manage a city's assets. These assets include local departments' information systems, schools, libraries, transportation systems, hospitals, power plants, water supply networks, waste management, law enforcement, and other community services. ICT allows city officials to interact directly with the community and the city infrastructure and to monitor what is happening in the city, how the city is evolving, and how to enable a better quality of life. Through the use of sensors integrated with real-time monitoring systems, data are collected from citizens and devices - then processed and analyzed. The information and knowledge gathered are keys to tackling inefficiency.
description: The project, titled 'Citi Linked', is an integrated intelligent system designed to improve urban management and citizen services. It focuses on two primary services: AS3FNY, an emergency response system that uses GPS and user input to dispatch the nearest ambulance to accident locations, and a Reporting Service that allows citizens to document and report urban issues like pollution or crime via social media and mobile uploads, facilitating better decision-making for city authorities.
problem_statement: Cities face significant inefficiencies in managing urban assets, responding to medical emergencies, and addressing public grievances like pollution and crime. Existing systems are often fragmented, slow, and lack real-time interaction between citizens and government authorities.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated ICT and IoT-based platform that connects citizens directly to city services. It implements a real-time emergency dispatch system (AS3FNY) that identifies the nearest hospital and ambulance, and a crowdsourced reporting platform that enables citizens to participate in urban maintenance and crime prevention.
objectives: To develop an easy-to-use web-based interface for searching and managing city services, to implement a rapid emergency response system (AS3FNY) for accident victims, to provide a reporting mechanism for citizens to help eliminate pollution and crime, and to improve the overall quality of life by enhancing communication between citizens and the government.
ai_summary: This project, 'Citi Linked', is an integrated smart city platform that leverages IoT and web technologies to improve urban services. It features an emergency response system for rapid ambulance dispatch and a citizen-reporting tool to help authorities address pollution and public safety issues in real-time.

student_names: Doaa Ahmed Abbas, Esraa Lofty Abd-Alaziz, Hani Abd-Elhadi, Mostafa Mohamed, Yasmeen Elsayed Hassan, Yasmeen Hassan Yasin
supervisor: Dr. Rasha Orban, Eng. Mohamed Ebrahim
technologies: Android, Augmented Reality SDK, C++, Java, XML, GPS, MEMS Sensors
keywords: Augmented Reality, First-Person Shooter, Android Game, Mobile Gaming, AR Markers
abstract: The purpose of this project is to design and implement an interactive single-player first-person shooter game using the Android platform. The game utilizes Augmented Reality (AR) technology to immerse the player within the game world by fixing the game camera to the player's perspective. This document details the development process, system analysis, and the technical challenges overcome during the creation of the application.
description: Gun War is an interactive mobile game that integrates Augmented Reality to provide an immersive first-person shooter experience. The application leverages smartphone hardware, including cameras and MEMS sensors (accelerometer, GPS, compass), to overlay virtual game elements onto the real-world environment, allowing for dynamic interaction and navigation.
problem_statement: Traditional mobile games often lack physical immersion and spatial awareness. The project addresses the challenge of determining the camera's pose relative to virtual objects in real-time, which is a fundamental requirement for creating a convincing Augmented Reality experience.
proposed_solution: The team developed an Android-based AR game that uses marker-based tracking and natural feature detection to anchor virtual objects in the physical environment. By utilizing the device's built-in sensors and camera, the game provides a seamless transition between the real world and the virtual game space.
objectives: To design and implement a functional single-player AR first-person shooter game on Android, to explore the integration of mobile sensors for AR tracking, and to document the development lifecycle and lessons learned during the project.
ai_summary: Gun War is an Android-based augmented reality first-person shooter game that uses mobile sensors and camera tracking to immerse players in a virtual environment. The project demonstrates the integration of AR technology into mobile gaming to create interactive and spatially aware gameplay experiences.

technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, ASP.NET, Artificial Intelligence
keywords: Question and Answer, Knowledge Sharing, Web Platform, AI-matching, Community Forum
abstract: Query is a free website that offers a wide range of questions and answers on many topics: programming, medical, literary, etc. The site serves as a platform for users to ask and answer questions about each other, to vote on questions and answers, by joining and actively participating, by accepting (up) or rejecting (down) and editing questions and answers in a manner like a wiki or reddit. This is a traditional question and answer site. Users are given new privileges such as the ability to vote and comment. All User Generated Content is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike License. Each user has his own page, and you can follow his own content in response to questions. You can also follow the most frequently asked questions and the most commented questions. The new questions are reviewed through artificial intelligence and matched with the questions on the site so that the questions are not repeated, and the user reaches his goal quickly.
description: Query is a collaborative knowledge-sharing platform designed to facilitate information exchange across various domains. It functions as a community-driven Q&A site where users can post inquiries, provide answers, and curate content through voting and editing mechanisms. The platform integrates AI to analyze incoming questions, preventing redundancy by matching them with existing content to ensure users find relevant information efficiently.
problem_statement: Students, professors, and general users often face difficulties in finding specific, high-quality answers to their questions online. Existing search methods can be inefficient, and users struggle to find reliable information or solutions to complex problems due to fragmented or repetitive content.
proposed_solution: The project proposes 'Query', a centralized, community-driven Q&A web platform. It utilizes a structured voting and editing system to maintain content quality and incorporates an AI-based matching engine to filter and categorize new questions, ensuring that users are directed to existing solutions or relevant discussions, thereby reducing redundancy and improving search accuracy.
objectives: To create a user-friendly platform for knowledge exchange, implement a community-based moderation system (voting/editing), utilize AI to minimize duplicate content, and provide a reliable resource for students and professionals to solve academic and technical problems.
ai_summary: Query is a community-driven question and answer platform that allows users to share knowledge across various fields. It features an AI-powered matching system to prevent duplicate questions and uses a collaborative voting and editing model to ensure high-quality content for all users.
