abstract: The main idea of our project is monitoring the road, detecting traffic jam, accidents and weather conditions by using Opencv, Web service, cloud computing, big data, and Raspberry Pi. Our project does not only monitor the road, detect traffic jam, accidents and weather conditions, but sends the road status to digital screen on road or mobile screen via web service to guide drivers about the status of road, sends the road status to Police station if it detects traffic jam or accidents via web service with the video of accident and also can call ambulance organization if it detect an accident. Certainly identify any road where traffic jam or accidents.
description: The project is an intelligent traffic system that utilizes Raspberry Pi and computer vision (OpenCV) to monitor road conditions, detect traffic jams, accidents, and weather patterns. It integrates big data analytics and cloud computing (Azure) to process information and provide real-time updates to drivers via digital signage and mobile applications, while also automating emergency responses by notifying police and ambulance services.
problem_statement: Increasing population and traffic congestion lead to frequent accidents and significant delays. Emergency services often struggle to reach accident scenes quickly due to lack of real-time information, and authorities often cannot identify the perpetrators of accidents or the root causes of traffic congestion.
proposed_solution: A comprehensive intelligent traffic system that uses cameras and Raspberry Pi for real-time monitoring. The system detects accidents and traffic jams, automatically alerts emergency services with location and video data, identifies vehicles involved in accidents, and provides real-time traffic status to drivers to help them avoid congested routes.
objectives: Reduce time delays caused by traffic jams, notify drivers about road conditions, assist police in identifying accident perpetrators, help drivers avoid accident-prone areas, and save lives by automating ambulance notification.
ai_summary: This project is an intelligent traffic management system that uses Raspberry Pi and computer vision to monitor road conditions in real-time. project_title: Helping Autistics using web and mobile application
student_names: Mohamed Adel Zaki Elbaal, Eslam Tarek Elgeyoshi, Ahmed Farouk Atallah, Mahmoud Alaa eldin Abd-Elmaged, Mohamed Elnady Mohamed, Mohamed Elsayed Okasha
technologies: Web Development, Mobile Development, Voice Recognition, Animation Frameworks
keywords: Autism, ASD, Mobile Application, Web Application, Social Skills, Child Development, Special Needs
abstract: At present, some people still don't know what Autism is and how much it affects Children. It is difficult to identify autism spectrum disorders in a child before reaching the age of 12 months, but they can be diagnosed in general at the age of two years, and the distinctive features of the onset of the disease have a delay or temporary decline in the development of language and social skills, and the repetition of stereotypes in his behavior. Autism also called autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a complicated condition that includes problems with communication and behavior. It can involve a wide range of symptoms and skills. ASD can be a minor problem or a disability that needs full-time care in a special facility. People with ASD have trouble with communication. They have trouble understanding what other people think and feel. This makes it hard for them to express themselves, either with words or through gestures, facial expressions, and touch. In this project we are building a system to help autistics express their feelings and increase their social life and skills, help the parents how to discover the disease earlier and how to deal with it by using website and mobile application with an easy use interface, and well-organized methods help the autistics to learn new words and hear voices and increase their motivation. Children with autism also suffer almost certainly from difficulties in three basic developmental areas, namely: mutual social relations, language and behavior. Parents play an essential role in providing the necessary support for the child, and they can help ensure access to health and education services for the child, and provide nurturing and stimulating environments as he develops. And it has recently been shown that parents can also help provide their child with psychological and behavioral treatments. Our system is useful for children where they can make interactions and chat with another children or their therapist.
description: This project is a comprehensive platform consisting of a web and mobile application designed to support children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) and their parents. The system provides interactive tasks to help children improve their sensory skills, vocabulary, and social interaction. It includes features like voice recognition for pronunciation practice, color identification tasks, and a chat interface for communication with peers or therapists.
problem_statement: Many children with autism struggle with communication, social interaction, and sensory processing. Parents often face challenges in identifying the disorder early and lack accessible, well-organized tools to help their children develop essential life skills, language, and social behaviors.
proposed_solution: A dual-platform system (web and mobile) that provides structured learning modules, including voice-based pronunciation tasks, visual color identification, and interactive communication tools. The platform aims to improve the child's social skills, speech, and sensory perception while providing parents with resources to better understand and support their child's development.
objectives: To provide educational videos for parents on dealing with autistic children, to help parents learn how to interact with their child, to facilitate interaction between children and technology, to enable early detection of autism, to provide a chat interface for communication between children and therapists, and to offer emergency support features.
ai_summary: This project provides a web and mobile-based platform designed to support children with Autism Spectrum Disorder by improving their communication, social skills, and sensory processing. It offers interactive learning modules, voice recognition for speech practice, and resources for parents to better understand and manage their child's development.

student_names: Ayman Fawzy Zaki Sherief, Noura Hussien Fekry, Anas Zoher natouf, Sara mosaad Elsayed, Abdelraman el-saeed, Mohamed Shehata
technologies: Python, Google Colab, Twitter API, Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Neural Networks
keywords: Social Media, Sentiment Analysis, Text Mining, Big Data, Predictive Modelling, Opinion Mining
abstract: Social media websites have become the largest, most complex, and most data-rich means of communication in our digital world. Huge amounts of data are being published, posted, tweeted and shared daily. Public opinions are expressed and information about markets are being shared among a wide spectrum of social media users. However, most of this data goes unchecked, unharnessed. So, our team has set out with one simple objective in mind; to reach out to this data and make use of it. By applying means of big data analytics, opinion mining, and deep learning to the data. We aim to gather public social media data -mostly in the form of text- and then use sentiment analysis, text mining, and deep learning to extract information and value from this data. From public opinion and direction about certain topics over time and location. To patterns and trends in public sentiment about products or public figures. Then delivering results in the form of figures and plots for the average viewer to understand. Or in the form of statistical reports for organizations who wish to harness the knowledge on social media to make smart decisions. Or even in the form of programming-oriented responses through an API for developers to use.
description: This project provides a comprehensive social media analysis system that leverages machine learning and natural language processing to extract actionable insights from public social media data. It includes a five-stage pipeline for data collection, cleaning, and sentiment analysis, providing both a web interface for visualization and an API for developers to access trends and public opinion data.
problem_statement: The massive volume of social media data is largely unharnessed, making it difficult for organizations and decision-makers to extract meaningful insights, public opinions, or market trends in real-time.
proposed_solution: A software package and web-based system that automates the process of collecting, cleaning, and analyzing social media data using deep learning and sentiment analysis techniques to provide statistical reports and visual trends.
objectives: To automate the process of extracting meaning from social media text, bridge the gap between decision-makers and their audience, and provide tools for organizations to capture public opinion without the need for manual polls.
ai_summary: This project is a social media analysis platform that uses machine learning and NLP to process large volumes of public data. It provides organizations with sentiment analysis, trend tracking, and statistical insights to help them better understand customer opinions and market directions.

abstract: This project proposes a location-based recommendation system designed to bridge the gap between commercial vendors and public customers. By leveraging mobile technology and location awareness, the system enables vendors to send targeted, real-time promotional offers to customers in their vicinity. This approach enhances the selling process for businesses while providing customers with convenient access to relevant offers, thereby reducing the time and effort spent searching for products and services.
description: The project is a mobile-based information system that facilitates location-aware advertising. It connects vendors (shops, restaurants, cinemas) with customers by sending notifications about offers based on the user's current geographic location. The system includes a central server to manage data, user authentication, and the delivery of location-specific content to mobile devices.

proposed_solution: A mobile application that utilizes location-based services (LBS) to provide personalized, proximity-based notifications and recommendations, allowing vendors to reach customers effectively and helping customers discover local deals easily.
objectives: To enhance the selling phase for commercial entities, provide customers with a convenient way to find suitable offers, reduce advertising expenditures, and facilitate efficient communication between vendors and customers based on geographic proximity.

abstract: In order to effectively run a restaurant, cost and time saving are essential. Minimizing time by a few seconds for each table can speed up order processing, increase efficiency and boost profits. The biggest hurdle most restaurants face is the migration from a paper-pencil system to a completely automated touch-screen system. Most retail establishments choose to use E-menu system to handle their transactions.
description: The E.MENU system is a comprehensive restaurant management solution that replaces traditional paper-based ordering with a digital, touch-screen interface. It consists of a customer-facing Android application for ordering, a waiter-facing interface for order management and assistance, and a manager-facing web application for administrative tasks, menu updates, and sales reporting. The system utilizes a centralized database and Wi-Fi connectivity to ensure real-time communication between customers, staff, and the kitchen.
problem_statement: Restaurants face significant operational challenges including human errors in order taking, the high cost and time consumption of re-printing paper menus for price or availability changes, the difficulty of manually analyzing sales data, and customer dissatisfaction due to long wait times and potential billing inaccuracies.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an automated E-menu system that allows customers to place orders directly from tablets at their tables. This system streamlines the workflow by sending orders instantly to the waiter's interface, providing managers with real-time tools to update menus, track sales, and monitor restaurant performance, thereby reducing errors and improving overall service efficiency.
objectives: To automate the restaurant ordering process, reduce operational costs associated with paper menus, minimize human error in order processing, provide real-time sales analytics for management, and improve the overall customer experience through faster service and interactive ordering.
ai_summary: The E.MENU project is an automated restaurant management system that replaces paper menus with Android-based tablets for customers to place orders directly. It includes a centralized server and web interface for managers to track sales, update menus, and manage staff, significantly improving operational efficiency and reducing order errors.

student_names: Asmaa Mohamed Elnokaly, Dina Emad Fathallah, Hassan Ahmed Ali, Leila Mohamed Ismael, Mohamed Khalaf, Sara Adel Mahmoud
technologies: Computer Vision, Mean Shift Algorithm, Color-based Tracking, Webcam, Gesture Recognition
keywords: Free Hand Mouse, Human-Computer Interaction, Computer Vision, Gesture Recognition, Mean Shift, Hand Tracking
abstract: Computers are being used in every aspect of our daily life. Nowadays the majority of the human-computer interaction (HCI) is based on mechanical devices such as keyboards, mouse, joysticks or gamepads. In recent years there has been a growing interest in a class of methods based on computer vision due to its ability to recognize human gestures in a natural way. This project introduces the Free Hand Mouse, a system that allows users to interact with an operating system using hand tracking and gesture recognition via a webcam, removing the constraints of traditional input devices.
description: The Free Hand Mouse (FHM) is a vision-based computer pointing device designed to replace traditional mechanical mice. It utilizes a webcam to track hand movements and gestures in real-time. The system uses color-based markers (Red for movement, Green for right-click, Blue for left-click) to interpret user intent, allowing for a hands-free, natural interaction with the computer interface.
problem_statement: Traditional input devices like the mouse and keyboard are limited by mechanical constraints, ergonomic issues like 'palm grip' fatigue, and a lack of natural interaction, which limits user creativity and accessibility.
proposed_solution: A computer vision-based system that tracks hand motion and specific color markers in real-time via a standard webcam. By using a mean shift algorithm to track these colors, the system translates hand gestures into mouse movements and click actions, providing a hands-free alternative to traditional hardware.
objectives: To develop a natural, hands-free human-computer interaction system; to implement efficient object tracking algorithms for real-time hand motion; to improve upon the limitations of traditional mouse ergonomics; and to enable computer control through simple, intuitive gestures.
ai_summary: The Free Hand Mouse is a computer vision project that replaces traditional mechanical mice with a hands-free gesture recognition system. By using a standard webcam and color-based tracking, it allows users to control the mouse pointer and perform clicks through natural hand movements.

technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, Apache Server
keywords: Online Voting, E-voting, Security, Authentication, Democracy, Digital Election
abstract: The word “vote” means to choose from a list, to elect or to determine. Our project discusses the various security threats for an online internet voting system and describes the most common threat in the communication medium. This online voting system seeks to address these issues by providing a secure, transparent, and accessible platform for citizens to cast their votes remotely. By leveraging digital technology and robust verification protocols, the system aims to increase voter participation, reduce costs, and minimize human error associated with traditional paper-based polling.
description: The Online Voting System is a web-based platform designed to modernize the democratic process in Egypt. It allows eligible citizens over the age of 18 to cast their votes securely from any location, eliminating the need for physical presence at polling stations. The system integrates with the Civil Registry of Egypt database to ensure voter authenticity and maintains high security standards to prevent fraud and ensure the integrity of the election results.
problem_statement: Traditional manual election processes are plagued by issues such as time-consuming hand counts, potential for voter error, lack of transparency, high costs, and physical congestion at polling locations. Furthermore, paper-based systems are susceptible to manipulation and logistical delays in declaring results.
proposed_solution: An automated, secure online voting platform that authenticates voters using their National ID (SSN) and multi-factor verification (security questions and SMS codes). The system manages the entire election lifecycle—pre-voting registration, secure voting, and automated post-voting reporting—to ensure accuracy, confidentiality, and verifiability.
objectives: To increase voter participation rates in Egypt, prevent electoral fraud through high-security measures, reduce the logistical burden and costs associated with physical polling stations, and provide a fast, efficient, and transparent method for casting and counting votes.
ai_summary: This project is a secure web-based online voting system designed to replace traditional manual paper-based elections. It enables eligible citizens to cast their votes remotely while ensuring identity verification through national databases and multi-factor authentication to maintain election integrity.

keywords: Augmented Reality, Tourism, Object Recognition, Museum Guide, Indoor Tracking, Mobile Application, Egyptian Monuments
abstract: Museums are the places where we can reflect our ancient civilizations, and their life style in a traditional way. The world is moving towards digitization, and the traditional way of reflecting our ancient civilizations doesn't keep up with the technological improvement, so we came with an idea to connect the legacy of the past with the progress of the present. Main idea of this project (AR Museum) is to make visitors know all information they want to know about any object or monument in the museum by just using the application, it uses object recognition technology to recognize the objects and displaying all the information about them, and also make a restoration for the distorted objects or monuments by replacing the real object with a restored 3D model, to make a better visual experiment for the visitor, This project also concerned with locating the places of any monument in the museum using the technology of Indoor Tracking, it can work as tour guide for visitors and help them to find what they need and also can provide them with most visited places to help them to decide what they should visit.
description: The project is a mobile-based AR application designed to enhance the museum experience for visitors. It features an object recognition system that identifies monuments via the phone camera and provides detailed information through AR annotations. Additionally, it includes an indoor tracking and mapping system to guide visitors through the museum and help them locate specific artifacts.
problem_statement: Museum visitors often lack sufficient information about the monuments they are viewing, as traditional displays provide limited details. There is a need to digitize this information and provide an interactive, self-guided experience that allows visitors to learn about objects in real-time.
proposed_solution: A mobile application that utilizes object recognition and augmented reality to identify museum artifacts and display comprehensive information. The system also includes an indoor navigation map and an admin interface for museum management to update object details and locations.
objectives: 1. Develop a mobile app for museum visitors. 2. Enable identification of monuments using a phone camera. 3. Provide AR annotations for detailed information on identified pieces. 4. Construct an indoor map for navigation. 5. Provide museum staff with tools to manage and update object information. 6. Reduce museum crowding by replacing traditional guided tours with an informative, self-paced application.
ai_summary: This project is an augmented reality mobile application designed to act as a digital tour guide for museum visitors. It uses object recognition and indoor tracking to identify monuments, display detailed historical information, and provide navigation within the museum.

student_names: Abeer Abd El-hameed Abd-rabo, Ahmed Magdy Saber, Asmaa Atef Hasaneen, Ayman Mohamed Elbery, Ibrahim Mohamed El-sayed, Mohamed Magdy Abd El-shafy
technologies: Python, PHP, JAVA, Android, TextRank, Natural Language Processing (NLP)
keywords: Natural Language Processing, Movie Trailers, TextRank, Subtitle Analysis, Automated Video Editing
abstract: The movie industry has long perfected advertising its movies. In order to inform audiences about an upcoming movie and to attract it, short previews are presented in cinema or TV - the "movie trailers". A branch of Hollywood's film industry has specialized in trailer production. This process of creating a trailer has always been determined by manual editing of video and audio. Generating a movie trailer is a complex process and takes a lot of time, so we have used Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to generate an automatic trailer by extracting the most important scenes in the movie depending on the movie genre. Making an automatic trailer like the people do now is an open issue and a lot of researchers wrote many papers in this field, some of them using image processing techniques, video semantics, audio processing, but we try to take a step in this field using Natural Language Processing (NLP) to do the best.
description: The project aims to automate the creation of movie trailers by analyzing movie subtitles. Instead of relying on manual video editing or complex image/audio processing, the system uses NLP techniques to classify subtitle text and extract unique keywords. These keywords are used to build a text graph based on the TextRank algorithm to identify the most important scenes in a movie, allowing for the automatic generation of a trailer without human interaction.
problem_statement: Building movie trailers similar to those generated by humans is an open issue. Current methods often rely on complex image, video, or audio processing, while neglecting the importance of text, and the full understanding of 'movie grammar' remains limited by current scientific progress.
proposed_solution: The project proposes using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to understand subtitles, classify text, and extract unique keywords. By applying the TextRank algorithm to these keywords, the system constructs a text graph to identify and assemble the most important scenes from a movie to produce a trailer automatically.
objectives: To automate the trailer production process, reduce the time and effort required for manual editing, leverage NLP for semantic understanding of movie content, and produce high-quality trailers without human intervention.
ai_summary: This project automates the creation of movie trailers by using Natural Language Processing to analyze movie subtitles. By applying the TextRank algorithm to extract key themes from the text, the system identifies and compiles the most important scenes into a cohesive trailer without the need for manual editing.

abstract: The idea of the project is to collect all the services related to the World Cup provided by the organizing country to fans from outside the country. It enables users to choose trips, find information about airports, stadiums, and hotels. The platform also provides news, match updates, and a chat room for fans. Additionally, it includes a predictive model to forecast match results based on team performance, historical data, and match location.
description: World Cup Services is a comprehensive web-based platform designed to centralize all information and services required by fans and travelers during a World Cup tournament. It integrates travel logistics, stadium information, and real-time sports updates with an AI-driven match prediction engine to enhance the fan experience.
problem_statement: Currently, services for World Cup fans are fragmented across multiple websites, with separate platforms for hotel booking, flight information, match results, and news, making it difficult for visitors to access all necessary information in one place.
proposed_solution: A unified web portal that aggregates travel, accommodation, and tournament information, while providing a community chat feature and an AI-based predictive analytics tool to forecast match outcomes.
objectives: To provide a single, comprehensive platform for World Cup visitors; to facilitate easy access to travel and accommodation information; to offer real-time match updates and news; and to implement a predictive model for match results to engage fans.
ai_summary: World Cup Services is a centralized web platform that aggregates travel, accommodation, and tournament information for international fans. It also features a community chat system and an AI-powered predictive model to forecast match outcomes based on historical team performance.

supervisor: Dr. ElSayed Badr, Eng. Mohamed Hakeem
technologies: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), Python, Google Colab, Kaggle, Web Technologies
keywords: Alzheimer's Disease, Deep Learning, CNN, Medical Imaging, MRI, Early Detection, Healthcare
abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) presents a significant global health challenge, with early detection being crucial for effective intervention and management. In this project, we propose a novel approach leveraging Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for the automated detection of Alzheimer's disease from brain MRI images. The CNN model is trained on a dataset comprising MRI scans of both healthy individuals and patients diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease, enabling it to learn distinctive features indicative of the disease.
description: This project develops an AI-driven system for the automated detection and classification of Alzheimer's disease using brain MRI scans. The system utilizes deep learning models (CNNs) to classify images into four categories: mild demented, moderate demented, non-demented, and very mild demented. Additionally, the project includes a web-based application to assist healthcare professionals and caregivers in monitoring patient progress and managing care.
problem_statement: Healthcare professionals face significant challenges in diagnosing and managing Alzheimer's disease, as current diagnostic processes rely on subjective assessments and cognitive tests that are time-consuming and prone to errors. Furthermore, there is a lack of accessible tools for caregivers to monitor the well-being and daily activities of elderly patients.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a robust Alzheimer's detection system leveraging Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to analyze MRI images with high accuracy. The solution includes a web-based platform that integrates the AI model for diagnosis and provides features for caregivers, such as medication reminders, activity tracking, and educational resources to support elderly patients.
objectives: The objectives are to design a web-based application for Alzheimer's detection, improve diagnostic accuracy using deep learning, provide decision support tools for doctors, and facilitate remote caregiving and monitoring for family members to enhance the quality of life for affected individuals.
ai_summary: This project utilizes Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to automatically detect and classify Alzheimer's disease stages from brain MRI scans with high accuracy. It also features a web-based platform designed to assist doctors in diagnosis and provide caregivers with tools to monitor the daily well-being and medication adherence of patients.

supervisor: Dr. Shadia Sarhan, Eng. Nada Adel

keywords: E-commerce, Home Decor, 3D Visualization, AI Chatbot, Web Development, User Experience, Vendor Management
abstract: This project focuses on creating a modern e-commerce platform tailored for the home decor industry, offering an enhanced and interactive shopping experience. Inspired by top brands like Home Zmart and IKEA, the platform includes a user-friendly interface where customers can browse products, view high-quality images, compare items, save favorites, and manage wish lists and carts easily. A key feature is the integration of advanced 3D Design and visualization tools, allowing users to preview decor items in their own spaces, making the shopping process more informed and personalized. Real-time order tracking and delivery updates add transparency and build customer trust. Vendors benefit from a subscription-based model, gaining access to intuitive tools for managing product listings, updating inventory, adjusting pricing, and tracking performance. An admin dashboard provides full control over users, vendors, and orders, alongside analytics for monitoring platform efficiency. Additionally, a built-in chatbot offers real-time assistance and recommendations, supporting both users and vendors with inquiries, updates, and troubleshooting. Secure payment methods ensure financial data is protected, while multiple checkout options offer flexibility. Overall, the platform delivers a seamless, efficient, and secure experience, combining innovative features with robust management tools to serve the needs of customers, vendors, and administrators alike.
description: Esaltare Dekör is an innovative e-commerce platform designed specifically for the home decor market. It bridges the gap between traditional shopping and modern technology by providing a user-centric interface, 3D visualization tools for space planning, and an AI-powered chatbot for personalized recommendations and support. The platform also includes a comprehensive vendor portal and an administrative dashboard for efficient management and data-driven decision-making.
problem_statement: Consumers face a fragmented shopping experience with limited personalization and an inability to visualize how decor items will look in their own homes. Simultaneously, vendors struggle to reach broader audiences and manage product listings effectively, while administrators lack the necessary tools to oversee platform operations and performance.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated e-commerce platform featuring 3D design visualization, an AI-driven chatbot for personalized assistance, a robust vendor management system with subscription tiers, and an administrative dashboard for analytics and order processing to streamline the entire home decor shopping journey.
objectives: To develop a comprehensive e-commerce platform that provides a seamless shopping experience for users, efficient product management tools for vendors, and robust administrative controls. Key goals include integrating 3D visualization, AI-powered chatbots for support and recommendations, secure payment processing, and data analytics for platform optimization.
ai_summary: Esaltare Dekör is a comprehensive e-commerce platform for the home decor industry that integrates 3D visualization tools and AI-powered chatbots to enhance the user shopping experience. It provides vendors with subscription-based management tools and administrators with a data-driven dashboard to streamline operations and improve platform efficiency.

The system is designed to streamline the development process by providing easy access to shared code and collaborative tools.

proposed_solution: A mobile application that acts as a community-driven repository where developers can upload, share, and organize source code and APIs, enabling a collaborative ecosystem for mobile development.

student_names: Ahmed Mansour Mohamed Saber, Ahmed Mohamed Mohamed Abdelrahman, Aya Abdalla Elsaid Laban, Eslam Esmael Fathy Elsaid, Eslam Mohamed Elsyad, Rania Saeed El-shahaat sherif
supervisor: Dr. Mohamed Taha, Eng. Fatma Elsayd
technologies: Unity Game Engine, 3D Max, Leap Motion Controller
keywords: Neuromuscular patients, 3D game, Leap Motion, Rehabilitation, Hand motion analysis, Physical therapy
abstract: In this project we have designed and implemented a 3D game system for neuromuscular patients and other people. The hardware selected for the project was leap motion controller sensor connected to a standard laptop. The system tracks the 3D motion of the patient's hand within the virtual environment. The system has a GUI for patient information data entry. It also includes the possibility for the doctor to select/set game parameters (range of motion, game speed) according to each specific patient. Finally, there is a quantitative reporting section which includes two parts: a session report with game parameters, scores and outcomes of the hand motion including joint angles.
description: A virtual rehabilitation system that uses a Leap Motion sensor to track hand movements in a 3D game environment. The system is designed to assist neuromuscular patients with physical therapy by making exercises more engaging while providing doctors with quantitative data on patient progress, such as joint angles and range of motion.
problem_statement: Neuromuscular patients suffer from nerve atrophy and limited hand mobility, making it difficult to perform daily tasks. Traditional physiotherapy sessions can be tedious and difficult to schedule, leading to a need for more engaging and accessible rehabilitation methods.
proposed_solution: The development of a 3D interactive game integrated with a Leap Motion sensor that allows patients to perform therapeutic hand exercises in a gamified environment. The system enables doctors to customize game parameters for individual patients and generates detailed reports on performance and physical improvement.
objectives: To provide an entertaining and effective rehabilitation tool for neuromuscular patients, to reduce the time and effort required in traditional clinical physiotherapy, and to provide accurate, quantitative tracking of hand motion and joint angles for medical evaluation.
ai_summary: This project is a 3D gaming system designed for the rehabilitation of neuromuscular patients using Leap Motion sensor technology. It gamifies physical therapy exercises to improve patient engagement while allowing doctors to track progress through detailed quantitative reports on hand motion and joint performance.

project_title: Improving Learning Outcomes Using EEG and AI
student_names: Yara Ahmed Mohmed, Ola Eid Abu Elwafa Eid, Somia Ashraf Soliman, Sohila Gamal Ibrahim, Manar Wageh Disoky, Sondos Abdelhamid Ahmed, Shahd Ahmed Shookri
supervisor: Dr. Ahmed Shalaby, Eng. Ghada Elrefaey
technologies: EEG Headsets, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, Predictive Analytics
keywords: EEG, Artificial Intelligence, Personalized Learning, Brain-Computer Interface, Educational Neuroscience, Student Engagement, Learning Disabilities
abstract: This project explores the integration of Electroencephalography (EEG) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) to revolutionize the educational experience. By monitoring students' cognitive states, attention levels, and mental workloads in real-time, the system provides personalized learning content and pacing. The project aims to enhance learning outcomes, facilitate early detection of learning disabilities, and provide educators with actionable insights through an intuitive dashboard, ultimately fostering a more inclusive and effective learning environment.
description: The project is an AI-driven educational platform that utilizes EEG brain-computer interfaces to analyze student cognitive states. It aims to bridge the gap in traditional education by providing real-time feedback on attention and engagement, allowing for adaptive learning paths, early identification of learning challenges, and reduced educator workload through automated insights and personalized interventions.
problem_statement: Traditional education often fails to cater to individual learning styles and challenges, leading to disparities in student outcomes. Educators lack real-time insights into students' mental states, such as confusion or fatigue, and interventions for learning disabilities are often reactive rather than proactive.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an EEG-AI integrated system that monitors brain activity to provide real-time analysis of attention and engagement. This data powers a personalization engine that adapts learning content and difficulty to individual needs, while an educator dashboard provides predictive analytics to support timely interventions and personalized teaching strategies.
objectives: To monitor cognitive states in real-time, personalize learning experiences based on individual needs, enable early identification of learning disabilities, enhance overall learning effectiveness, reduce learning disparities, and improve learner well-being through supportive environments.
ai_summary: This project leverages EEG headsets and AI algorithms to monitor students' cognitive states and attention levels in real-time. technologies: Python, TensorFlow, Keras, OpenCV, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), MobileNetV2, Raspberry Pi, Non-contact temperature sensor, Buzzer, LED
keywords: Face Mask Detection, COVID-19, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, IoT, Smart Door, Body Temperature Monitoring
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has necessitated the use of face masks in public areas to reduce virus transmission. This project develops an IoT-enabled smart door system that utilizes computer vision and deep learning to detect whether individuals are wearing face masks and to monitor their body temperature. Using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with the MobileNetV2 architecture, the system achieves high accuracy in real-time mask detection. If a person is not wearing a mask or has an abnormal body temperature, the system alerts authorities and controls door access, providing a cost-effective and reliable solution for public safety in locations such as hospitals, schools, and airports.
description: This project is a smart entry system designed to mitigate the spread of COVID-19. It integrates AI-based face mask detection with IoT hardware to monitor individuals at building entrances. The system uses a camera to capture video streams, processes them through a trained CNN model to classify mask usage, and employs a non-contact sensor to check body temperature. Based on these inputs, the system triggers alerts via email or mobile notifications and controls a physical gate or door mechanism to ensure only compliant individuals enter.
problem_statement: The COVID-19 pandemic has created a global health crisis where the lack of consistent face mask usage and temperature monitoring in public spaces significantly increases the risk of virus transmission, necessitating an automated, reliable, and digitalized scanning solution.
proposed_solution: An IoT-enabled smart door system that combines deep learning (CNN/MobileNetV2) for real-time face mask detection with hardware sensors for body temperature monitoring, automatically managing entry based on safety compliance.
objectives: To develop an accurate and robust system for face mask detection, monitor body temperature in real-time, automate entry control based on health safety standards, and provide an efficient alert mechanism for authorities to reduce the spread of COVID-19.
ai_summary: This project implements an IoT-based smart door system that uses deep learning and computer vision to detect face masks and monitor body temperature in real-time. The system automatically restricts or allows entry based on these health metrics, providing an automated safety solution for public and private facilities.

student_names: Mohamed Hassan Emam, Mohamed Refaat Bayuomi, Asmaa abd elrzaqe abd elslam mousa, Dina ahmed mohamed ahmed, Ahmed Mosad EL-Sayed, Samy Samir khattab
technologies: Artificial Neural Network (ANN), Least Square Support Vector Machine (LS-SVM), Levenberg-Marquardt Back Propagation (LMBP)
keywords: Earthquake Prediction, Computational Intelligence, Seismicity Indicators, Neural Networks, Gutenberg-Richter Law
abstract: Nowadays, a great deal of effort is being devoted to developing techniques to predict natural disasters in order to take precautionary measures. One of the most dangerous nature disasters is Earthquake which occurs unexpectedly in an instant, causing catastrophic damages. The aim of this research is to propose Computational Intelligence (CI) techniques for detecting and alarming for earthquakes based on analysis of historical data and studying of some mathematically computed factors known as seismicity indicators. CI techniques are namely Artificial Neural Network (ANN), least square support vector machine(LS-SVM).
description: This project focuses on the development of a predictive model for earthquakes using computational intelligence. By analyzing historical seismic data and calculating specific seismicity indicators—such as the Gutenberg-Richter inverse power law parameters and characteristic earthquake distributions—the system aims to forecast the magnitude of the largest seismic event in a given future time window. The project employs advanced machine learning architectures, specifically feed-forward neural networks with Levenberg-Marquardt backpropagation, to handle the complex, non-linear relationships between seismic precursors and earthquake occurrences.
problem_statement: Earthquakes occur unexpectedly and cause catastrophic damage, yet there is no established mathematical or empirical relationship between seismic indicators and the location or magnitude of succeeding earthquakes, making medium-term and short-term prediction a significant challenge.
proposed_solution: The project proposes using Computational Intelligence (CI) techniques, specifically Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) and Least Square Support Vector Machines (LS-SVM), to analyze eight distinct seismicity indicators. These indicators are fed into a feed-forward Levenberg-Marquardt backpropagation neural network to model and predict earthquake magnitudes.
objectives: To develop a reliable earthquake prediction model, identify key seismicity indicators that correlate with earthquake occurrence, and implement a neural network capable of processing these indicators to provide early warnings and reduce potential economic and human loss.
ai_summary: This project utilizes Computational Intelligence and Artificial Neural Networks to predict earthquake magnitudes by analyzing historical seismic data and specific seismicity indicators. By implementing a feed-forward Levenberg-Marquardt backpropagation model, the system aims to provide early warnings for seismic events to help mitigate damage and save lives.

keywords: Universal Health Insurance, Medical Informatics, Healthcare System, Digital Transformation, Public Health
abstract: This project introduces a comprehensive digital platform for the Universal Health Insurance system. It aims to streamline healthcare services, reduce administrative burdens, and ensure equitable access to medical care for all citizens, including state employees, students, and the unemployed. By transitioning from manual, fragmented processes to an integrated digital solution, the system improves transparency, efficiency, and the quality of health services provided to the public.
description: The project is a web-based information system designed to support the implementation of a national Universal Health Insurance program. It addresses current inefficiencies in healthcare administration by providing a centralized platform for citizens to access services, manage insurance records, and interact with healthcare providers. The system is built to handle complex insurance workflows, including family-based coverage, diagnostic services, and treatment tracking.
problem_statement: Current health insurance systems are fragmented, lack transparency, and often fail to cover all segments of society. Issues include high administrative costs, corruption risks, lack of effective control mechanisms, and difficulty for citizens to access services efficiently, leading to increased financial and health burdens on individuals.
proposed_solution: The development of a comprehensive, centralized web-based health insurance portal that digitizes the insurance process. This system provides a unified interface for citizens to manage their health insurance, ensures equitable distribution of resources, and implements digital controls to prevent fraud and improve service delivery efficiency.
objectives: To provide universal health coverage for all citizens, ensure equitable distribution of health services, improve the quality and efficiency of healthcare delivery, and reduce the time and effort required for citizens to access insurance benefits.
ai_summary: This project develops a web-based information system to support a national Universal Health Insurance program, aiming to digitize and streamline healthcare access for all citizens. By replacing inefficient manual processes with a centralized digital platform, the system enhances transparency, reduces administrative costs, and ensures equitable medical service delivery.

student_names: Ahmad Mohamed Abdul-Aziz Gouda, Ahmed Abd-Elghani, Ahmed Reda Ahmed, Aml Shabaan Almahdy
technologies: Web, Database, Data Mining, Artificial Intelligence
keywords: Medical Diagnosis, Symptom Checker, Healthcare, Data Mining, Web Application
abstract: Health is essential for everyone. Health can't be bought by anything. Health is important no matter what country we are from or what race we are, or what age or gender we are. It might have happened so many times that you or someone yours need doctors help immediately, but they are not available due to some reason. The Health Prediction system is an end user support and online consultation project. Here we propose a system that allows users to get instant guidance on their health issues through an intelligent health care system online. The system is fed with various symptoms and the disease/illness associated with those systems. The system allows user to share their symptoms to check for various illness that could be associated with it. Here we use some data mining techniques to guess the most accurate illness that could be associated with patient's symptoms. This system is split into three main parts that comprise of Patient's Registration, Diagnosis and Treatment.
description: Diagnose Yourself is a web-based medical diagnosis application designed to provide users with instant health guidance. The system allows users to input their symptoms, age, gender, and region to receive a list of the most likely diagnoses. It utilizes data mining and artificial intelligence to analyze user-provided symptoms against a medical database to suggest potential illnesses, helping bridge the gap when professional medical help is not immediately available.
problem_statement: There is a significant shortage of medical experts relative to the patient population (a ratio of 1:600), leading to difficulties in accessing timely medical advice. Additionally, medical errors, improper performance, and failure to recognize complications contribute to poor health outcomes, necessitating a more accessible and intelligent diagnostic support tool.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an intelligent, web-based medical diagnosis system that acts as an end-user support tool. By allowing users to input their symptoms, age, gender, and region, the system uses data mining and AI algorithms to process the information and provide a ranked list of the top 10 most likely diagnoses, along with red-flag warnings for severe conditions.
objectives: To provide instant health guidance to users, to reduce the burden on medical professionals by offering preliminary diagnostic support, to utilize data mining techniques for accurate symptom-to-illness mapping, and to create an accessible web platform for health monitoring and diagnosis.
ai_summary: Diagnose Yourself is a web-based medical diagnostic tool that uses artificial intelligence and data mining to help users identify potential illnesses based on their symptoms. By inputting personal details and health concerns, users receive a ranked list of likely diagnoses, providing immediate guidance when professional medical care is not readily available.

abstract: Our idea is to design and develop a virtual reality application that aims to refresh tourism around the world, particularly in Egypt, through interactive and collaborative gaming. The application takes users from a real world to a virtual world through amazing stations and adventures that lead to four wonderful historical places in Egypt. The app is divided into two states: a downtown walk-through with a map for navigation, and a museum experience where users can explore historical pieces, play interactive games, and collect information about touristic sites.
description: This project is a free-to-play mobile application that utilizes virtual reality technology to promote tourism in Egypt. It features a virtual environment where users can explore historical sites, interact with 3D models, and participate in collaborative games. By gamifying the tourism experience, the project aims to increase cultural awareness and attract more tourists to visit Egypt in real life, thereby boosting the national economy.
problem_statement: The tourism sector in Egypt needs innovative ways to attract global interest and improve cultural awareness, as traditional methods of promotion may not fully engage younger or tech-savvy audiences.
proposed_solution: A virtual reality mobile application that provides an immersive, interactive, and collaborative gaming experience. It allows users to virtually visit historical sites in Egypt, learn about their history through games, and gain descriptive information that encourages them to visit these locations in person.
objectives: To design and develop a VR application that refreshes tourism in Egypt, to create an interactive and collaborative gaming platform, to increase cultural awareness of Egyptian history, and to attract tourists to visit historical sites in Egypt by providing a virtual simulation.
ai_summary: This project is a virtual reality mobile application designed to promote Egyptian tourism by offering an immersive, gamified experience of historical sites. technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, Apache
keywords: Online Voting, E-voting, Security, Authentication, Election, Digital Democracy
abstract: The word “vote” means to choose from a list, to elect or to determine. The main goal of voting is to come up with leaders of the people’s choice. Our project discusses the various security threats for an online internet voting system and describes the most common threat in the communication medium. This online voting system seeks to address the above issues. It should be noted that with this system in place, the users, citizens in this case shall be given ample time during the voting period. They shall also be trained on how to vote online before the election time. objectives: To provide a powerful, secure, and efficient tool for online voting; to reduce paperwork and election costs; to save time for both voters and the election committee; to minimize human error in vote counting; and to increase voter participation by allowing voting from any location.

This system integrates various functionalities essential for efficient clinic management, including patient registration, appointment scheduling, medical record management, billing, and prescription management. The system is intended to be used by doctors, receptionists, administrators, and patients, providing each user with specific capabilities suited to their roles. Doctors can manage patient records, prescriptions, and appointments, while receptionists handle patient check-ins and billing. Administrators have control over user management and report generation. The implementation includes a database schema, use case diagrams, and sequence diagrams to ensure a robust and user-friendly experience.

It provides a centralized platform for all stakeholders to interact seamlessly, automating routine tasks to improve the quality of healthcare services.

proposed_solution: A centralized, automated Clinical Information System (CIS) that streamlines clinical workflows, enhances data accuracy, improves communication between stakeholders, and provides a secure, scalable platform for managing clinic operations.
objectives: Streamline clinic operations, enhance data accuracy, improve communication, increase efficiency, and enhance patient satisfaction.

technologies: Python, C++, Snort, Wireshark, SQL, Linux, Bash, Regex
keywords: Intrusion Detection System, IDS, Cybersecurity, Network Security, Signature-Based Detection, Threat Mitigation, Digital Forensics
abstract: This project develops a Signature-Based Intrusion Detection System (IDS) with the goal of identifying and mitigating known threats through precise pattern matching techniques. The system analyzes network traffic and system activities against a comprehensive database of signatures—unique identifiers for known malicious activities—to excel in pinpointing and alerting on specific attacks. The core functionality revolves around real-time monitoring and historical data analysis to ensure timely detection of intrusions, thereby minimizing potential damage. The architecture of the IDS is designed with scalability in mind, permitting regular updates to the signature database to address emerging threats. It incorporates adaptive mechanisms that enable seamless growth and improvement as the cybersecurity landscape evolves. By leveraging efficient algorithms and optimized data structures, the IDS balances high throughput with minimal latency, ensuring it can handle network traffic in real-time. This system is fortified by a user-friendly interface, allowing cybersecurity professionals to easily manage signatures, analyze alerts, and configure the detection parameters.
description: A robust Signature-Based Intrusion Detection System designed to protect digital infrastructure by monitoring network traffic for known malicious patterns. The project focuses on high-accuracy threat detection, real-time analysis, and providing a user-friendly management interface for security professionals to handle alerts and signature databases effectively.
problem_statement: The constant evolution of cyber threats, the inability of traditional signature-based systems to detect zero-day attacks, high false-positive rates, scalability issues under heavy network traffic, and the difficulty of maintaining and updating signature databases with the latest threat intelligence.
proposed_solution: A cutting-edge Signature-Based Intrusion Detection System that leverages an extensive and continuously updated database of threat signatures, optimized pattern-matching algorithms for real-time analysis, and a user-friendly interface for seamless integration into existing security frameworks.
objectives: To develop a scalable and robust IDS, achieve high-precision threat detection with minimal false positives, provide real-time network monitoring, ensure easy management of security signatures, and facilitate swift incident response through comprehensive logging and reporting.
ai_summary: This project presents a Signature-Based Intrusion Detection System designed to identify and mitigate known cyber threats in real-time. By utilizing advanced pattern-matching algorithms and a regularly updated signature database, the system provides a scalable and efficient solution for protecting network environments from malicious activity.

abstract: UNI-ASSIST is an intelligent system designed to modernize the traditional, paper-based student attendance and academic communication process. By utilizing QR code technology for secure and efficient attendance tracking, the system eliminates manual errors and time-consuming administrative tasks. Additionally, it provides a centralized platform for faculty to manage course materials and communicate important updates, serving as a more structured and reliable alternative to informal social media groups.
description: UNI-ASSIST is a comprehensive academic management platform that integrates three core functionalities: a secure QR-code-based attendance system, an automated academic material management system, and a dedicated communication portal for faculty-student interaction. The system aims to digitize the educational environment, ensuring accurate attendance records, streamlined access to course content, and improved information dissemination.
problem_statement: Traditional attendance systems rely on manual paper-based methods that are inefficient, prone to falsification, and time-consuming. Furthermore, communication between faculty and students is often fragmented across social media, leading to information loss, difficulty in accessing course materials, and general administrative confusion.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an automated system that uses time-sensitive QR codes for attendance to prevent fraud and save time. It also includes a centralized module for faculty to upload course materials and post official announcements, ensuring that all students have reliable access to critical academic information.
objectives: To replace manual attendance with a secure, automated QR-based system; to reduce administrative workload for faculty; to provide a centralized, reliable channel for academic communication; to improve data accuracy for attendance reporting; and to ensure students have easy access to their course-related information.
ai_summary: UNI-ASSIST is a digital academic platform that replaces manual, paper-based attendance with a secure QR code system. abstract: The Fair Electricity Distribution (FED) system addresses the chronic issues of electricity outages and inefficient meter reading in Egypt. By implementing a system that records consumption in real-time and transmits data to an online server, the project enables both the electricity company and the consumer to monitor usage, manage balances, and reduce consumption, thereby improving grid stability and billing accuracy.
description: The Fair Electricity Distribution (FED) project is an integrated smart grid solution designed to modernize electricity management. It features an Android application that allows users to track their daily electricity consumption, receive alerts about usage, control home power remotely, and pay bills digitally. For utility companies, it provides automated remote meter reading, eliminating the need for manual site visits and reducing billing disputes.
problem_statement: Electricity companies face significant challenges including frequent power outages due to high loads, difficulty in reading meters in remote areas, lack of consumer awareness regarding their actual energy usage, and inefficiencies in the billing and collection process.
proposed_solution: The FED system proposes an automated smart metering infrastructure that sends consumption data to a central server. This allows for real-time monitoring, remote power control, automated billing, and consumer-facing mobile tools to help users manage their energy consumption and costs effectively.
objectives: To reduce electricity station loads, increase consumer awareness of energy usage, provide remote meter reading capabilities, enable remote home power control, and facilitate convenient digital bill payment.
ai_summary: The Fair Electricity Distribution (FED) project is an IoT-based smart metering system designed to optimize electricity usage and billing. abstract: Portal OCR is an iPhone app platform that utilizes optical character recognition to transform image-based characters into editable digital text. The application allows users to capture text via a mobile camera or gallery, edit the recognized text, save it as a PDF, email it, or upload it to Dropbox. Additionally, it features translation capabilities, text-to-speech conversion, and a communication engine for users to discuss and share information.
description: Portal OCR is a mobile application designed for the iOS platform that bridges the gap between physical documents and digital content. It enables users to digitize printed materials instantly using their phone's camera, eliminating the need for traditional scanners. Beyond simple OCR, the app integrates translation services, text-to-speech functionality, and a social messaging component to facilitate collaboration and information exchange among users.
problem_statement: Traditional OCR processes require expensive scanners and specialized hardware, making it difficult for users to digitize documents on the go. Furthermore, manual retyping of printed documents is time-consuming and prone to errors.
proposed_solution: A mobile application for iOS that leverages the device's built-in camera to perform real-time OCR. The solution includes features for text editing, PDF generation, cloud storage integration (Dropbox), multi-language translation, and text-to-speech conversion to enhance accessibility and productivity.
objectives: To develop an iOS-based OCR application that eliminates the need for external scanners, provides efficient text-to-speech conversion, supports multi-language translation, and includes a messaging engine for user collaboration.

keywords: Mobile Voice Actions, Speech Recognition, Android, Accessibility, Voice Control
abstract: The mobile voice actions project (Speak2Do) is an android application that enables mobile users to perform tasks via voice, specifically designed to assist individuals with handicaps and the visually impaired. The application leverages the Google Speech API to interpret user commands, allowing for actions such as sending messages, managing contacts, setting alarms, and controlling device settings like Wi-Fi and Bluetooth. The system is designed to handle varying levels of background noise and provides a user-friendly interface for all Android platforms.
description: Speak2Do is an Android-based mobile application that provides a voice-controlled interface for common smartphone tasks. It aims to improve accessibility by allowing users to execute commands through natural language processing, effectively bridging the gap between complex mobile interfaces and users who may have physical limitations or prefer hands-free interaction.
problem_statement: Many mobile users, particularly those with physical handicaps or visual impairments, face significant challenges in navigating complex smartphone interfaces and performing basic tasks efficiently using traditional touch-based input methods.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a voice-driven Android application that utilizes the Google Speech API to convert spoken commands into actionable system events, providing a hands-free, accessible alternative for managing phone features and applications.
objectives: To develop an Android application that supports voice-based task execution, to enhance accessibility for users with disabilities, to integrate with core Android services (contacts, messaging, settings), and to ensure the system remains functional under varying environmental noise conditions.
ai_summary: Speak2Do is an Android application that enables users to control their smartphones using voice commands, making mobile technology more accessible for people with disabilities. By integrating the Google Speech API, the app allows users to perform tasks like sending messages, managing contacts, and toggling device settings hands-free.

student_names: Ahmed Abd-Elghany Dabour, Ahmed Iraki Mohamed, Esraa Ragab Abd-Elhameed, Hend Sabry Hassan, Manar Mohamed Ahmed, Mervat Karam El-Sayed, Samar Samy Mohamed
technologies: Web technologies, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, PHP
keywords: Project Management, Team Collaboration, Task Tracking, Productivity, Digital Workflow
abstract: Many of the projects are not completed due to poor planning. In many organizations most of projects exceeded time, or money limits while others lost their objectives. Many studies are made to look for all the complexities and difficulties that face teamwork and cause that failure in delivery of many projects. One of the main reasons that the studies found was that individuals in organization are not fully prepared to adapt to an increasingly digital work environment, either online or offline. Another reason was that most of time is wasted in casual meetings rather than using this time in productivity. In a real organization, each member may work in more than one project at the same time what makes it difficult that all employees are aware of all challenges that face their organization. Accordingly, our solution is that we developed a project management system named "Project Manager". Project Manager platform enables manager to create projects, tasks, assign them to team members and upload attachments. Easy communication among teamwork is guaranteed through project chat that allows all project members to do digital meeting. There is also ability to comment on tasks to easily communicate and solve any misunderstanding between one task members. We hope that our platform will be turning point in project management for saving time and cost and help teams work in more productive environment and deliver more projects.
description: Project Manager is a web-based platform designed to streamline organizational workflows by centralizing project tracking, task assignment, and team communication. It aims to replace inefficient traditional meeting structures with digital collaboration tools, allowing team members to manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining transparency and accountability.
problem_statement: Organizations frequently fail to complete projects on time or within budget due to poor planning, inefficient communication, excessive time spent in unproductive meetings, and a lack of preparedness for digital work environments.
proposed_solution: The development of a centralized 'Project Manager' web platform that enables managers to create projects, assign tasks, share files, and facilitate real-time team communication through integrated chat and task-specific commenting features.
objectives: To improve project delivery rates, reduce time wasted in meetings, enhance team collaboration, provide a clear overview of project status for all members, and ultimately save time and costs for organizations.
ai_summary: Project Manager is a web-based collaboration platform designed to help organizations improve productivity by centralizing task management and team communication. It replaces inefficient traditional meetings with digital tools for assigning tasks, sharing files, and real-time project tracking to ensure projects are completed on time and within budget.

student_names: Asmaa Adel Nasif, Asmaa Fathi Abdullah, Fatma Mohammed El Kenawy, Yara Essam Abd El Monem
technologies: Workflow Management Software, Document Management Systems, Database Management, Web-based Process Automation
keywords: Workflow Management, Process Automation, Document Management, Business Process, Information Systems
abstract: Work Flow Management is a fast evolving technology which is increasingly being exploited by businesses in a variety of industries. Its primary characteristic is the automation of processes involving combinations of human and machine-based activities, particularly those involving interaction with IT applications and tools. Although it's most prevalent use is within the office environment in staff intensive operations such as insurance, banking, legal and general administration, etc, it is also applicable to some classes of industrial and manufacturing applications. Many software vendors have WFM products available today which involve workflow technology and there is a continual introduction of more products into the market. The availability of a wide range of products within the market has allowed individual product vendors to focus on particular functional capabilities and users have adopted particular products to meet specific application needs. However, there are, as yet, no standards defined to enable different WFM products to work together, which is resulting in incompatible "islands" of process automation.
description: The project focuses on developing a Workflow Management System (WFMS) to help organizations define, administer, and coordinate different business processes. It aims to streamline the movement of documents and tasks between employees, ensuring that processes are completed efficiently and that information is controlled and accessible to authorized personnel.
problem_statement: Organizations face challenges with unrecorded, manual business processes that are not machine-readable. Current processes often lack coordination, suffer from long durations (days, weeks, or months), and rely heavily on human participants without adequate support from business systems, leading to inefficiencies and "islands" of automation.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a Workflow Management System that utilizes document management and automation technologies to capture, manage, and distribute information electronically. This system enforces structured workflows, ensures secure document storage with defined access permissions, and coordinates tasks between users to improve organizational efficiency.
objectives: To automate business processes, improve document security, ensure controlled flow of information within an organization, reduce the time spent on manual tasks, and provide a digital platform for task review, approval, and rejection.
ai_summary: This project develops a Workflow Management System designed to automate and coordinate business processes within an organization. By digitizing document management and task routing, the system aims to increase efficiency, improve security, and eliminate the manual bottlenecks associated with traditional office workflows.

student_names: Ahmed Raafat Abd El-Zaher, Ahmed Yousry Abd El-Satar, Amany Youssef Hassan, Fawzeya Rashed Abd El-Hamid, Reham Khaled, Sarah Yacoub Fahmy, Zienab Abd El-Naser Mohamed
technologies: Raspberry Pi, PHP, Android SDK, Java, Apache Server, SQL, JSON, Python, PIR Sensor, Camera
keywords: Car Security, Anti-theft, GPS Tracking, Embedded Systems, Raspberry Pi, Remote Monitoring
abstract: The Car Security System is an integrated anti-theft solution designed to enhance vehicle safety through real-time monitoring and remote control. By leveraging the Raspberry Pi platform, the system provides GPS tracking, engine control, and sensor-based alerts, allowing owners to monitor their vehicle's status and location via a mobile interface. This project aims to provide a cost-effective and user-friendly alternative to existing commercial vehicle tracking services.
description: This project is an embedded system designed for vehicle security and tracking. It utilizes a Raspberry Pi as the central processing unit, connected to various sensors (PIR, switches) and a camera to detect unauthorized access. The system communicates with an Android mobile application, allowing users to track the vehicle's location, receive alerts, and remotely control vehicle functions such as engine ignition or door locks.
problem_statement: Vehicle theft is a persistent criminal issue. Existing anti-theft solutions are often expensive or lack comprehensive features, leaving vehicle owners with limited options for effective, real-time monitoring and remote intervention in the event of a theft.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a low-cost, integrated embedded system based on the Raspberry Pi. It combines GPS tracking, mobile connectivity, and sensor integration to provide a comprehensive security suite that allows users to track their vehicle, receive instant notifications, and remotely disable the engine or monitor the interior via a mobile application.
objectives: To develop a cost-effective car security system, implement real-time GPS tracking, enable remote engine and door control via mobile, provide sensor-based intrusion detection, and create a user-friendly mobile interface for vehicle management.
ai_summary: This project is an IoT-based car security system that uses a Raspberry Pi to provide real-time GPS tracking and remote vehicle control. It allows users to monitor their car's status, receive intrusion alerts, and control engine functions through a dedicated Android mobile application.

keywords: Medical Analysis, Machine Learning, Random Forest, KNN, SVM, Diabetes Prediction, Anemia Prediction, Liver Function Analysis, Healthcare, Mobile Application
abstract: This project focuses on the application of straightforward yet effective regression algorithms in conjunction with random forest, decision tree, and SVM for the analysis of medical data, specifically targeting some diseases (Anemia, Liver and Diabetes). project_title: KIDS ZONE: Where Learning Meets Innovation
student_names: Aya Mahmoud Saber, Abdallah Ahmed Hussien, Ahmed Nabil Elsayed, Andrawes Aisr Adolf, Eman Ibrahim Abdelhalim, Khaled Ahmed Hamed, Said Reda Mohamed, Ranim Samir Atef
supervisor: Dr. Mostafa Elgendy, Eng. Mahmoud Mansour
technologies: Computer Vision, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Web Development, Mobile Development
keywords: Kids Zone, Carpal Tunnel Syndrome, Computer Vision, AI, Education, Interactive Learning, GANs, Child Development
abstract: The KidsZone project leverages artificial intelligence and computer vision technologies to create an interactive and engaging educational platform for children, particularly benefiting those with carpal tunnel syndrome. This innovative project is accessible via both website and mobile application, providing a variety of services designed to enhance learning and entertainment. Key features include air writing recognition, which allows children to write letters and numbers in the air that are accurately captured and displayed on a screen. This feature helps children practice handwriting in a fun, less physically demanding manner, making it ideal for those with carpal tunnel syndrome. The word recognition and image display feature enables kids to write words, with the system recognizing these and displaying corresponding images, enhancing their vocabulary and comprehension skills. A curated selection of video stories offers both educational and entertaining content, fostering a love for reading and learning while providing a screen-time option that is both enjoyable and beneficial. Additionally, children can draw pictures on the platform, which uses AI to predict and identify the images, encouraging creativity and artistic expression while providing instant feedback and helping to develop their drawing skills.
description: KidsZone is a comprehensive educational and entertainment platform designed to support children's development, with a specific focus on inclusivity for children suffering from carpal tunnel syndrome. By utilizing computer vision and AI, the platform allows children to interact with digital content through air writing, drawing, and voice commands, bypassing the physical strain of traditional input methods. It provides a personalized learning journey with adjustable text sizes and customizable content tailored to individual interests, aiming to foster creativity, skill development, and cognitive growth in an enjoyable environment.
problem_statement: The prevalence of electronic devices has led to a surge in health issues among children, such as carpal tunnel syndrome, which impacts their ability to engage in traditional writing and drawing activities, thereby hindering their physical well-being and learning development.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an interactive platform that uses computer vision and AI to allow children to interact with educational content through air writing, drawing, and voice commands. This approach removes the physical barriers associated with traditional input devices, enabling children to learn and express creativity without physical strain.
objectives: To provide an inclusive learning environment for children with carpal tunnel syndrome, to foster creativity and imagination through AI-driven drawing tools, to enhance vocabulary and comprehension through interactive word recognition, and to provide a safe, engaging, and educational digital space that supports holistic child development.
ai_summary: KidsZone is an AI-powered educational platform designed to help children, especially those with carpal tunnel syndrome, learn and create through touchless interactions. By using computer vision to recognize air writing and drawings, the system provides an inclusive, engaging way for children to develop their skills without physical strain.
