abstract: Smart Home systems are systems and devices that can control elements of your home environment - lighting, appliances, telephones, as well as home security, mechanical, entry and safety systems. They can be used to improve safety, expand usability and make life easier for people of all abilities. Smart Home systems can be operated by electricity or a computer chip using a range of different types of switches. Smart Home is the residential extension of building automation. It is automation of the home, housework or household activity. Smart Home is a central system that can control and create communication between nearly all aspects of your house. This includes: Lighting, Heating and Air Conditioning, Fire control system, and Security System (doors).
description: The project is a smart home automation system that allows users to remotely control and monitor home appliances and security features using a smartphone. It integrates various sensors and actuators to manage lighting, temperature, fire safety, and door security, providing a centralized and automated home environment.
problem_statement: In these days, we face a problem to control our home in outside such as turn on or off lights, electrical devices as TV, air condition and etc., and open or close the doors.
proposed_solution: The project provides a system for solving these problems by using Arduino to monitor and control home appliances. It uses Bluetooth technology to allow users to connect to their home network via smartphones and tablets to manage devices remotely.
objectives: 1. Develop a Smart Home remote system. 2. Use Bluetooth technologies. 3. Use devices that are easy to install. 4. Use low prize material and devices. 5. Make it suitable for users. 6. Manage multiple control points. 7. Control home doors. 8. Control home lights. 9. Fire sensor and alarm. 10. Temperature and air conditioning.
ai_summary: This project implements a smart home automation system using Arduino and Bluetooth technology to allow users to remotely control home appliances and security features via an Android smartphone. It integrates various sensors, including temperature, smoke, motion, and door locks, to provide a centralized and efficient home management solution.

keywords: Electricity distribution, Smart metering, Load management, Energy consumption, Remote monitoring
abstract: After increasing electricity consumption bills in Egypt, a chronic problem has emerged regarding the difficulty of reading meters, especially in remote areas. The Fair Electricity Distribution (FED) system addresses this by recording electricity consumption at short intervals and transmitting the data to an online server. This allows the Electricity Company to monitor consumption accurately and provides users with real-time feedback to manage their usage and reduce costs.
description: The Fair Electricity Distribution (FED) project is an IoT-based solution designed to modernize electricity management. It involves smart meters that automatically transmit consumption data to a central server, eliminating the need for manual meter reading. The system includes an Android application that allows users to monitor their consumption, receive alerts about overloads, and remotely control their home power supply.
problem_statement: The current electricity distribution system suffers from inaccurate manual meter reading, difficulty in accessing remote meters, lack of consumer awareness regarding real-time usage, and frequent power outages due to load imbalances.
proposed_solution: An automated smart metering system that transmits consumption data to a central server, provides an Android application for user monitoring and remote power control, and implements load management to prevent system overloads.
objectives: To reduce electricity load imbalances, increase consumer awareness of energy usage, automate meter reading to eliminate manual errors, provide remote power control for home safety, and ensure fair billing based on actual consumption.
ai_summary: This project introduces an IoT-based smart metering system that automates electricity consumption tracking and billing. It features an Android application that empowers users to monitor their energy usage in real-time and remotely control their home power supply to improve efficiency and prevent overloads.

abstract: Over 1.35 million people die in road traffic crashes each year. This project presents a system based on computer vision techniques that detects road accidents and reports them in nearly real-time. The system uses a client-server architecture with an interactive GUI to monitor accidents and notify authorities. The first version achieved 92% accuracy in crash detection at 30 fps using Python.
description: The project is a comprehensive accident detection system that utilizes deep learning models to analyze video feeds from surveillance cameras. It provides real-time alerts, video storage for future analysis, and a user-friendly desktop interface for administrators to manage and control the system, aiming to reduce response times for emergency services.
problem_statement: Road accidents are a global issue causing millions of injuries and deaths annually. Traditional IOT-based sensor systems are costly, complex to manage, and difficult to deploy in remote areas, while existing AI attempts have suffered from insufficient accuracy.
proposed_solution: A deep learning-based computer vision system that processes video streams to detect accidents in real-time. The solution uses the YOLO algorithm to identify crashes and provides an automated notification system to alert authorities, offering a more cost-effective and scalable alternative to sensor-based hardware.
objectives: To develop an integrated deep learning model for real-time accident detection, implement a user-friendly desktop application, provide immediate alerts, incorporate video storage for analysis, and collect accident data to identify trends and improve road safety.
ai_summary: This project implements a real-time accident detection system using deep learning and computer vision to monitor road traffic via surveillance cameras. It automatically identifies crashes and notifies authorities, aiming to reduce emergency response times and improve overall road safety.

technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, React Native, Bootstrap 5, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, MongoDB, VS Code, XAMPP, Git, Draw.io
keywords: Daycare management, Childcare, Enrollment, Parental communication, Student monitoring, Transportation logistics
abstract: The project revolves around the development of an Information System tailored for managing daycare services for children. This system streamlines the application process, interview scheduling, child evaluation, administrative tasks, supervision, and stakeholder communication. The application process involves parents completing a form containing personal details about the child. Subsequently, an evaluator reviews the submitted data and grants initial acceptance if the criteria are met. Parents receive email notifications regarding interview scheduling with an assigned interviewer, responsible for evaluating the child's suitability. Administrators play a crucial role in staff selection, group formation, and event planning within the daycare center. Supervisors oversee attendance, issue notifications, compile weekly reports, and manage meal arrangements. Additionally, they ensure effective communication with parents through designated notification schedules and report mechanisms. Social specialists are tasked with monitoring student behavior, providing guidance, and reporting behavioral concerns to parents. They aim to foster a positive and conducive learning environment for all children. Bus supervisors oversee transportation logistics, including student distribution and coordination with bus monitors. They ensure timely and efficient transportation services, minimizing disruptions for both students and parents. Parents play an active role in the system, inputting data, communicating with daycare staff, and monitoring their child's progress. This collaborative approach enhances daycare management efficiency, promotes effective communication, and ensures the well-being of children under care.
description: The Daycare Management System is an innovative information platform designed to revolutionize childcare services. It provides a centralized hub for managing enrollment, staff coordination, student behavior monitoring, transportation logistics, and parent-teacher communication. By digitizing manual processes, the system aims to reduce administrative burdens, improve data accuracy, and foster a more transparent and nurturing environment for children.
problem_statement: Current daycare management suffers from fragmented records, inefficient enrollment processes, poor communication between parents and staff, lack of structured behavioral monitoring, and disorganized transportation logistics, leading to reduced service quality and increased parental dissatisfaction.
proposed_solution: An integrated web-based information system that automates enrollment, provides a portal for parental engagement and communication, implements a structured behavioral monitoring and intervention module, and optimizes transportation scheduling and bus allocation.
objectives: To streamline the enrollment process, facilitate seamless communication between stakeholders, improve child behavior monitoring and intervention, optimize transportation logistics, and enhance the overall quality and accessibility of daycare services.
ai_summary: This project is a comprehensive web-based management system designed to streamline daycare operations, including enrollment, staff coordination, and transportation. It facilitates better communication between parents and daycare staff while providing tools for monitoring child behavior and attendance to ensure a high-quality, safe learning environment.

description: The Hospital Management System is a comprehensive software solution developed to digitize and streamline hospital administration. It handles patient registration, doctor scheduling, pharmacy management, and billing. The system provides a secure, centralized database that allows authorized personnel to quickly retrieve patient history, diagnosis details, and staff availability, significantly improving operational efficiency and data accuracy.
problem_statement: The current manual system suffers from difficult information retrieval, inefficient paper-based record keeping, lack of prompt updates, error-prone manual calculations for billing, and difficulty in generating accurate reports, leading to wasted time and resources.

The system allows families to manage their ration accounts, view consumption, and add or remove family members. For providers, it offers a management dashboard to track inventory, process sales via QR code scanning, and automatically calculate point deductions, ensuring a transparent and efficient supply chain.

project_title: Treatment Child With Cerebral Palsy using VR supplement
student_names: Mohamed Ahmed Imam Talab, Mohamed Ashraf Fahmy, Mohamed Bashir Antar Bedir, Mohamed Ahmed Nabih El-Dighidy, Kyrillos Samir Halim, Latifa Mohamed El-Bakry, Manar Samir Mohamed El-Absy
supervisor: Dr. Amr M Nagy, Eng. Fatma Mohamed
technologies: Unity, Virtual Reality (VR), Computer Vision
keywords: Cerebral Palsy, Virtual Reality, Rehabilitation, Physiotherapy, Motor Skills, Healthcare Technology
abstract: This project aims to explore the effectiveness of utilizing virtual reality (VR) technology in the treatment of children with cerebral palsy (CP). Specifically, we developed two mini-sport games within 3D Unity environment and computer vision: football and squash. The football game targets various physical aspects including balance, hip flexors, knee extensors, ankle dorsiflexors, as well as addressing symptoms such as ataxia and polyneuropathy commonly associated with CP. On the other hand, Tennise focuses on enhancing fine motor skills and occupational therapy for these children. Through immersive VR experiences tailored to the needs of children with CP, we seek to provide an engaging and effective therapeutic approach to improve their physical and cognitive abilities. This study highlights the potential of VR-based interventions in pediatric rehabilitation, offering a promising avenue for enhancing the quality of life and functional independence of children with CP.
description: The project is a VR-based therapeutic system designed to assist children with Cerebral Palsy in their physical rehabilitation. By gamifying physiotherapy through immersive sports simulations like football and squash, the system encourages children to perform necessary exercises to improve motor skills, balance, and muscle control in an engaging and motivating environment.
problem_statement: Traditional therapy for Cerebral Palsy often suffers from limited accessibility, lack of personalization, high costs, and difficulty in tracking patient progress, which can lead to suboptimal outcomes and decreased patient motivation.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an immersive VR gaming system that provides customized, interactive exercises targeting specific muscle groups and motor skills, making therapy more enjoyable and accessible for children with CP.
objectives: To enhance motor skills by utilizing a VR gaming system to provide interactive activities that target specific muscle groups, improve balance, and encourage physical movement in children with Cerebral Palsy.
ai_summary: This project develops a virtual reality gaming platform to assist in the physical rehabilitation of children with Cerebral Palsy. By using immersive sports games like football and squash, the system helps children improve their motor skills, balance, and muscle control in a more engaging and effective way than traditional therapy.

project_title: Medical tests and Intelligent Diagnosis system
student_names: Heba Reda Mohamed Omran, Shahd Mohamed Sobieh Mohamed, Sarah AbdElhamed Abdelghani Hamza, Mohamed Akram Sayed Ali, Mohamed Abdullah Elsayed Essa
supervisor: Dr. Mona Arafa, Eng. Fatma Elzahraa
technologies: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Chatbot, LIMS (Laboratory Information Management Systems), Cloud Computing, Data Encryption
keywords: Healthcare, Artificial Intelligence, Medical Diagnosis, Laboratory Management, Radiology, Patient Support, Data Security
abstract: The Integrated Healthcare Management System with AI-Driven Diagnostics and Patient Support signifies a groundbreaking evolution in healthcare delivery by amalgamating advanced technologies and seamlessly integrating laboratory and radiology services. This transformative system is aligned with the broader context of the digitalization of laboratories, where the shift from paper-based, analog recording to digital infrastructure fosters efficiency, collaboration, and transparency. The digitalization of laboratories encompasses the adoption of automated systems, robotics, and artificial intelligence. Within this context, the Integrated Healthcare Management System emerges as a comprehensive solution, prioritizing accessibility and accuracy. Users navigate a user-friendly interface to manage accounts and explore laboratory sites, streamlining the search for nearby, cost-effective, and high-quality testing facilities. Through the system's intuitive interface, users gain access to a detailed catalog of tests and radiological services, complete with information on requirements and transparent cost breakdowns. Artificial intelligence analyzes test results meticulously, identifying health indicators and generating comprehensive reports. An interactive chatbot engages users in meaningful dialogues, offering diagnostic recommendations and suggesting specialized medical professionals based on AI-driven analyses. Moreover, the system facilitates the seamless upload of X-ray images, subjecting them to advanced AI analysis for the generation of clear and concise reports. Paramount to the system is the emphasis on privacy and data security, ensuring the protection of sensitive healthcare information through robust measures.
description: The project is an Integrated Healthcare Management System designed to digitize and streamline laboratory and radiology services. It provides a centralized platform for users to manage their medical data, book appointments, select testing facilities, and receive AI-driven diagnostic insights. The system includes features for X-ray image analysis, a patient-support chatbot, and secure data management to ensure compliance with healthcare privacy regulations.
problem_statement: The current manual and disjointed processes within the laboratory and radiology sectors lead to inefficiencies, potential delays, errors, and a lack of integration. Users face difficulties in finding suitable testing sites, understanding test requirements, and interpreting results, while sensitive medical data remains vulnerable to security risks.
proposed_solution: A comprehensive, AI-powered digital platform that integrates laboratory and radiology services. The solution includes a centralized user account system, a searchable catalog of medical services, AI models for test result analysis and X-ray interpretation, and an interactive chatbot for patient guidance, all secured with robust data protection measures.
objectives: To enhance accessibility and user experience, streamline laboratory and radiology services, implement AI-driven diagnostics for improved accuracy and speed, provide personalized patient support through a chatbot, ensure data security and privacy, and establish mechanisms for continuous system improvement.
ai_summary: This project is an integrated healthcare management platform that uses artificial intelligence to streamline laboratory and radiology services. It features AI-driven diagnostic analysis for test results and X-ray images, a patient-support chatbot, and a centralized system for booking appointments and managing medical records securely.

abstract: As cities continue to grow and evolve, the demand for flexible and convenient housing solutions has never been greater. The project aims to meet this demand by offering a range of thoughtfully designed rental properties tailored to the needs of diverse lifestyles and demographics. By leveraging technology to streamline the rental process, the project enhances security and improves overall convenience for residents through online leasing and payment platforms.
description: BEYOUT is a comprehensive rental platform designed to bridge the gap between landlords and tenants. It provides a centralized system for property listings, virtual tours, and secure communication. The platform integrates advanced search filters, robust verification processes to ensure listing legitimacy, and digital tools for lease management and rent collection, creating a transparent and efficient rental experience.
problem_statement: Traditional rental methods are inefficient, time-consuming, and lack transparency. Prospective tenants face challenges in finding legitimate listings, verifying property quality, and comparing options, while landlords struggle with managing tenant inquiries, scheduling viewings, and handling administrative tasks like background checks and lease agreements.
proposed_solution: The BEYOUT platform offers a centralized, user-friendly application that integrates advanced search capabilities, virtual tours, and secure digital lease management. It incorporates robust verification processes to prevent scams and provides landlords with automated tools for tenant communication, background checks, and rent collection, ensuring a secure and streamlined experience for all parties.
objectives: To develop a comprehensive rental application that addresses current market inefficiencies, provide a centralized platform with advanced search and filter options, ensure the legitimacy of listings through verification, and streamline property management and tenant interactions to create a seamless, transparent, and efficient rental process.

project_title: DR/CARE: Medical Application Based on Deep Learning
student_names: Hossam fares alsayed metwally, Hossam medhat sayed Mohamed, Fady Maher Mazhor Barh, Ahmed Emad Mahmoud Abdel Rahman, Aya Almadah Atef Naser, Raneem saleh mohamed abo elmawaheb
technologies: Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NLP, Android Studio, Java, Python, Firebase, Google API, Microsoft Azure, ESP8266, NodeMCU, MAX30102, DS18b20, Qt Designer
keywords: Deep Learning, IoT, Medical Diagnosis, Telemedicine, Health Monitoring, Mobile Application
abstract: The application Doctor Care is concerned with the medical follow-up of patients, providing several advantages such as a chatbot for medical inquiries, disease classification from medical images (X-rays, skin cancer, brain tumors, Retinal OCT), and heart rate monitoring. It includes features for appointment scheduling, doctor communication, and emergency alerts. The system integrates IoT technology to monitor vital signs like oxygen ratio, heart rate, and body temperature, enabling remote patient follow-up without requiring constant human intervention.
description: DR/CARE is a comprehensive medical platform consisting of a mobile application and IoT hardware. The software component provides disease classification for various medical conditions using deep learning models, a chatbot for patient-doctor interaction, and appointment management. The hardware component utilizes sensors to track patient vitals (heart rate, oxygen, temperature) and uploads this data to a cloud database for real-time monitoring and emergency response.
problem_statement: The deterioration of the health status of the elderly, poor financial conditions, and the difficulty of visiting doctors due to global health crises like COVID-19, combined with the burden on hospitals to process medical scans, create a need for remote, accessible, and automated medical diagnostic tools.
proposed_solution: A dual-system approach: a mobile application that uses deep learning models to classify medical images (X-rays, skin, brain, retina) and a wearable IoT device that monitors vital signs. The system provides automated alerts, location services for the nearest hospital, and a communication platform between patients and doctors.
objectives: To keep the elderly safe, simulate a doctor in emergency situations, provide constant health status monitoring, offer access to the latest medical news, facilitate communication with doctors, and identify the nearest medical clinic to the patient's location.
ai_summary: DR/CARE is a dual-platform medical solution that combines deep learning-based image classification for disease diagnosis with IoT-based wearable sensors for real-time patient monitoring. The system enables remote health tracking, automated emergency alerts, and direct communication between patients and medical professionals.

project_title: Electronic Medical Records System Using Blockchain Technology (MedRecChain)
student_names: Ghada Abdul Wahab Awwad, Fatma Mohamed Sorour, Heba Walid Seliem, Farouk Hamed Seliem, Ali Tharwat Mohamed, Aya Hamdy Abdalla, Fatma Samir El Sayed
supervisor: Dr. Mona Mohamed Arafa, Eng. Esraa Hassan El Gamal
technologies: Ethereum, Solidity, Web3.js, React.js, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Truffle, Ganache, MetaMask, IPFS, Visual Studio Code, GitHub
keywords: Electronic Medical Records, EMR, Blockchain, Ethereum, IPFS, Decentralization, Data Privacy, Smart Contracts, Healthcare Interoperability
abstract: MedRecChain is a decentralized solution designed to address the challenges faced by Electronic Medical Records (EMR) sharing systems. Leveraging the Ethereum network and IPFS technology, MedRecChain offers a secure and efficient platform for storing and exchanging medical records. Traditional EMR systems often encounter issues such as data breaches, lack of interoperability, and limited patient control over their own records. MedRecChain aims to overcome these challenges by employing blockchain technology, ensuring data immutability, transparency, and enhanced security. By utilizing the Ethereum network, MedRecChain establishes a decentralized infrastructure that allows healthcare providers, patients, and other authorized parties to access and share medical records in a seamless and trustless manner. The use of smart contracts further enhances the integrity and reliability of transactions, enabling automated and auditable interactions. In addition, MedRecChain incorporates IPFS (InterPlanetary File System) technology to efficiently store and distribute medical records. IPFS facilitates the decentralized storage and retrieval of data, eliminating reliance on a single central server and enabling greater scalability and resilience. The key features of MedRecChain include secure patient identification, granular access control, data privacy, and auditability. Patients have full control over their medical records, granting or revoking access to healthcare providers as needed. The system ensures data privacy through encryption techniques, while still allowing authorized parties to trace and audit record access and modifications. Through the implementation of MedRecChain, the healthcare industry can benefit from a decentralized and secure solution for EMR sharing. It has the potential to streamline record management, enhance patient privacy and control, and foster interoperability among different healthcare entities.
description: MedRecChain is a blockchain-based platform designed to modernize Electronic Medical Records (EMR) management. It replaces centralized, vulnerable, and fragmented EMR systems with a decentralized architecture that prioritizes patient data ownership, security, and interoperability. By integrating Ethereum for smart contract-based access control and IPFS for distributed file storage, the system ensures that medical records are immutable, transparent, and accessible only to authorized parties, thereby reducing the risk of data breaches and single points of failure.
problem_statement: Traditional centralized EMR systems suffer from security vulnerabilities (data breaches), lack of interoperability between different healthcare providers, fragmented patient records, limited patient control over their own data, and reliance on single points of failure, which can lead to system outages and compromised patient safety.
proposed_solution: A decentralized EMR sharing platform called MedRecChain that utilizes Ethereum blockchain for secure, transparent, and immutable transaction logging and access control, combined with IPFS for decentralized, fault-tolerant storage of medical records. This approach empowers patients with control over their data and ensures seamless, secure interoperability between healthcare entities.
objectives: 1. Develop a secure and private platform for sharing EMRs among healthcare providers, patients, and authorized entities. 2. Enhance interoperability and data accessibility between different EMR systems. 3. Leverage blockchain technology to ensure data integrity and transparency. 4. Establish a decentralized network to eliminate single points of failure. 5. Ensure a user-friendly experience for both healthcare providers and patients.
ai_summary: MedRecChain is a blockchain-based platform that decentralizes Electronic Medical Records (EMR) to improve security, patient privacy, and data interoperability. By using Ethereum smart contracts and IPFS storage, it eliminates the risks associated with centralized servers and gives patients full control over who can access their medical history.

abstract: This project is an assistive tool designed to simplify medical record management and patient monitoring. By utilizing a smartwatch to collect vital signs such as heart rate, blood pressure, and calories burned, the system transmits data to the cloud. This information is accessible via a mobile application and a website, allowing doctors to monitor patients remotely. The system includes an emergency alert feature that notifies doctors and ambulances in case of sudden health changes or accidents, ensuring timely medical intervention.
description: The project provides a comprehensive platform for tracking patient vitals and health data in real-time. It bridges the gap between patients and doctors by providing a centralized cloud-based database. The system is designed to be cost-effective, requiring only a smartwatch and a free account on the platform to access services, thereby removing financial barriers to quality health monitoring.
problem_statement: A significant percentage of the population suffers from chronic conditions requiring constant monitoring, and many sudden deaths occur due to the inability to reach patients in time during medical emergencies. objectives: To ensure patient safety and health monitoring around the clock, store patient data in a secure database, provide automated diagnosis for critical cases, alert doctors and emergency services during emergencies, and offer personalized medical advice based on patient records.

project_title: Heart Diseases detector using Deep Learning
student_names: Ahmed Abd El-Salam Gameel Abd El-Salam, Fady Girgis Aziz Girgis, Hamdi Mahmoud Fawzy Ellithy, Hamada Mohamed Abd El-Naby Ali, Hassan Mohamed Hassan Gaafer, Khaled Ahmed Mohamed Ahmed
supervisor: Dr. Mohamed Loey, Dr. Ahmed Taher, Ass. Lec. Mahmoud Sobhy
technologies: Python, Java, Deep Learning, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), WAMP Server, NumPy, OpenCV
keywords: Heart Disease, Deep Learning, CNN, Medical Imaging, MRI, Image Processing, Healthcare Automation
abstract: Heart disease is one of the most serious diseases spread. Methods such as x-rays, CT scans and magnetic resonance imaging are available to detect heart disease and to help surgeons provide better visibility. Moreover, many researchers have found that people die because of the inaccurate discovery of the affected part of the heart. It is necessary to find the exact part of the affected area in the heart. Medical image analysis is the most difficult field these days. This project describes the method of discovery and extraction of heart disease from MRI images to the patient through CNN deep learning algorithm. This work will help to identify the type of disease that saves valuable time for doctors and pathologists to diagnose the disease automatically in a short period of time.
description: This project focuses on automating the detection and classification of heart diseases using medical imaging (MRI). By leveraging Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), the system processes 2D and 3D medical images to identify abnormalities, aiming to reduce diagnostic time and improve accuracy for cardiologists and pathologists. The system includes a user-friendly GUI developed in Java that connects to a WAMP server to manage patient history and diagnostic data.
problem_statement: Manual analysis of medical images for heart disease is time-consuming, prone to human error, and subject to operator fatigue, which can lead to inaccurate diagnoses and delayed treatment for patients.
proposed_solution: An automated deep learning-based system using CNNs to process and classify MRI images. The solution includes image preprocessing (equalization and layer rounding), a robust classification model, and a Java-based GUI integrated with a WAMP server for efficient patient data management.
objectives: To create an automated method for processing and training on heart images for tumor detection; to build an efficient classification system; to reduce analysis time and eliminate the influence of subjective factors; to improve diagnostic accuracy; and to provide a user-friendly interface for medical professionals.
ai_summary: This project develops an automated heart disease detection system using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to analyze MRI images. By processing both 2D and 3D medical data, the system assists doctors in identifying diseases more accurately and quickly, featuring a Java-based GUI for managing patient records.

project_title: Find Missing people using Face Recognition
student_names: Ahmed Hamdy Khater Arafa, Eslam Ahmed Mohamed Elabady, Khaled Ayman Abd Elhaleem Soliman, Mohamed Ali Soliman Ali, Mostafa Ali Soliman Ali, Salem Gamal Salem Mohamed
technologies: Android, Kotlin, Python, Flask, SQLite, Face Recognition API
keywords: Face Recognition, Missing Persons, Android, Biometrics, Mobile Application
abstract: Our project "Find Missing People Using Face Recognition" is an Android application that aims to help users find missing individuals by utilizing advanced facial recognition technology. With this application, users can upload an image of the missing person, along with other relevant details, such as their name, age, and last known location. The uploaded image will then be compared with the images in the system's database using state-of-the-art facial recognition algorithms, which will allow the application to identify and match the missing person's face with a high level of accuracy.
description: The project is a mobile-based platform designed to assist in the search for missing persons. It leverages facial recognition technology to match uploaded photos of missing individuals against a centralized database. The system aims to provide a faster, more accurate, and accessible alternative to traditional, manual, and time-consuming search methods like door-to-door searches or unorganized social media posts.
problem_statement: The current process for finding missing persons is inefficient, relying on manual reporting, police records, and unorganized social media posts. There is no centralized, easily accessible platform to match missing persons using biometric data, leading to delays and increased emotional and financial burdens on families.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an Android mobile application that uses advanced facial recognition technology to identify missing persons. By allowing users to upload photos and details, the system automates the matching process against a database, significantly reducing the time required to locate missing individuals from months to minutes.
objectives: To develop a reliable, fast, and secure mobile application for reporting and identifying missing individuals; to reduce the search time for missing persons; to provide a centralized platform that improves the accuracy of identification; and to offer peace of mind to families by streamlining the search process.
ai_summary: This project is an Android application that uses facial recognition technology to help locate missing persons. Users can upload photos and details of missing individuals, which the system then matches against a database to provide quick and accurate identification.

project_title: Road Surface Quality Detection Using Accelerometer Data
student_names: Mahmoud Ahmed Hosni Mousa, Mahmoud El-Sayed Soliman Ali, Mohamed Yehia Mohamed Mohamed, Mohamed Mashhour Sayed Ahmed, Mohamed Mohamed Mohamed El-kholy
technologies: Android, Accelerometer, GPS, K-means clustering, Random Forest, Google Maps API
keywords: Road surface quality, Pothole detection, Accelerometer, GPS, Machine learning, K-means, Random Forest, Road safety
abstract: In today's days, due to increase in number of vehicles the probability of accidents is also increasing. The user should be aware of the road circumstances for safety purpose. Several methods require installing dedicated hardware in vehicle which are expensive. So, we have designed a Smart-phone based method which uses a Accelerometer and GPS sensors to analyze the road conditions. The designed system is called as Bumps Detection System (BDS) which uses Accelerometer for pothole detection and GPS for plotting the location of potholes on Google Map. Drivers will be informed in advance about count of potholes on road. we have assumed some threshold values on z-axis (Experimentally Derived) while designing the system. To justify these threshold values, we have used a machine learning approach.
description: This project presents a mobile-based application that utilizes smartphone sensors, specifically the accelerometer and GPS, to monitor and analyze road surface quality. By measuring vertical vibrations, the system identifies bumps and potholes, logs their geographic coordinates, and provides drivers with real-time or pre-trip information about road conditions to improve safety and navigation.
problem_statement: Egypt faces high rates of road traffic accidents, with poor road conditions, including numerous bumps and potholes, being a significant contributing factor. Existing solutions for monitoring road quality often require expensive, dedicated hardware that is not accessible to the average driver.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a smartphone-based application (BDS) that leverages built-in accelerometer and GPS sensors to detect road irregularities. The system collects vibration data, processes it using experimentally derived thresholds, and employs machine learning algorithms (K-means clustering and Random Forest) to classify road conditions and map them via the Google Maps API.
objectives: To develop a cost-effective road monitoring system using existing smartphone hardware, to accurately detect and map potholes and bumps, to provide drivers with actionable information about road safety, and to utilize machine learning to improve the accuracy of road condition predictions.
ai_summary: This project introduces a smartphone-based system that uses accelerometer and GPS data to detect and map road surface irregularities like potholes and bumps. By applying machine learning algorithms such as K-means and Random Forest, the application provides drivers with safety insights and road quality information without the need for expensive, dedicated hardware.

student_names: Ahmed Mahmoud Mohamed, Ahmed Yousry Abd el Hamed, Alaa Gamal Yousif, Amira Maher Abd el Aliem, Fatma Tayseer Mohamed
technologies: Digital Image Processing, Kalman Filter, C++, OpenCV
keywords: Sperm analysis, Computer vision, Image processing, Kalman filter, Male infertility, Sperm tracking
abstract: Sperm analysis is an interest to biologists studying sperm function and its role in evaluating male infertility. Today the prevailing method for analyzing human sperm at fertility clinics is both laborious and subjective. The number and quality of sperm are often visually appraised by technicians using a microscope. This project proposes a computer-assisted sperm analysis software to save time and provide accurate results for patient sperm count and tracking. The system uses image processing techniques including frame cropping, noise reduction, and Kalman filtering for object tracking to achieve an average accuracy rate of 97.28% compared to manual results.
description: The Computer Assisted Sperm Analysis (CASA) system is a software solution designed to automate the analysis of human sperm samples. By capturing video frames from a microscope, the system processes the imagery to detect, count, and track individual sperm cells. It calculates key motility parameters such as curvilinear velocity (VCL), straight-line velocity (VSL), and linearity of progression (LIN), providing a more objective and efficient alternative to manual microscopic examination.
problem_statement: Manual sperm analysis at fertility clinics is laborious, time-consuming, and subjective, leading to potential human error and fatigue. Technicians often rely on visual appraisal, which lacks the precision required for detailed clinical diagnostics and makes it difficult to accurately measure complex motility parameters.
proposed_solution: The project implements a computer-assisted system that digitizes video frames from a microscope. It utilizes digital image processing algorithms to automatically detect and count sperm cells, and applies a Kalman filter to track sperm movement across frames, enabling the calculation of precise kinematic parameters.
objectives: To automate the sperm analysis process, reduce the time required for clinical evaluation, eliminate human subjectivity, and provide accurate, objective measurements of sperm concentration and motility parameters to assist in the diagnosis of male infertility.
ai_summary: This project develops a computer-assisted system that uses image processing and Kalman filtering to automatically detect, count, and track sperm cells from microscopic video. By automating the analysis of sperm motility and concentration, the system provides a more objective and efficient alternative to traditional manual methods used in fertility clinics.

project_title: TAWSYLA: Mobile Application for Sharing One Car
student_names: Asmaa Mohamed Sorour, Esraa Ahmed Abd Elmawgoud, Hossam Saeed Soliman, Hassan Shaban Farhat, Khaled Mamdouh, Mohamed El tantawey, Refaat Gamal Refaat
supervisor: Dr. Diaa Salama, Dr. Yasser Maher
technologies: Java, PHP, XML, JSON, SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Android Studio, Android SDK, XAMPP, 000webHost, MySQL, PHPMyAdmin, Google Maps API, Google Navigation API, Google Places API
keywords: Carpooling, Ride-sharing, Android, Traffic reduction, Fuel efficiency, Transportation, Mobile application
abstract: Carpooling is one of the latest technologies discovered which has made travelling convenient and efficient to the common man. It also known as car sharing in which one can travel to their destination while sharing the vehicle and the expenses incurred. Hence fuel costs, tolls and the stress of driving will be reduced when more people travel together in one vehicle. Tawsyla is an environment friendly app and we can save our mother nature by using this app. It also helps in reducing traffic congestion, and other poisonous gases in the air. We can save a lot of space in the Parking lot. During high fuel prices and high pollution periods, making use of the carpooling system is an intelligent decision. In our application, we will make an Android based application that will allow passengers to collaborate with other like-minded people and plan out their journey using the easy UI of the app after signing in to it. People will be able to share expenses and not worry about reaching late while making new connections.

abstract: 3D scanning is used in many applications such as entertainment industry, Historical Preservation, Engineering, Production, Interaction and Navigation and many applications. The aim of our project is creating a 3D image from a 3D model in the real world. Our project depends on using low cost tools such as laser that provides more accuracy results than other tools, and a camera (either webcam or digital camera for more accurate results). 3D scanning has many advantages such as Quickly capture all of the physical measurements of any physical object, Save time in design work, Ensure parts will fit together on the first try, Capture engineering optimizations inherent in manufactured parts, Utilize modern manufacturing on parts that were originally manufactured before CAD, Compare "as-designed" model to "as-built" condition of manufactured parts.
description: This project implements a low-cost 3D laser scanning system. It uses a hand-held line laser and a standard webcam to capture the geometry of physical objects. The system processes the video feed in MATLAB to reconstruct a 3D digital model, providing an affordable alternative to expensive industrial 3D scanners.
problem_statement: Existing 3D scanning devices are often extremely high-cost and complex, making them inaccessible for many users who need to create 3D models of physical objects for design, manufacturing, or historical preservation.
proposed_solution: A low-cost 3D laser scanning system that utilizes a standard webcam and a hand-held line laser. The system captures video of an object illuminated by a laser line, processes the data in MATLAB to extract 3D coordinates, and reconstructs a digital 3D model.
objectives: To design and implement a system that constructs a 3D model out of a real object using available and low-cost components, ensuring the solution is simple, inexpensive, and effective compared to existing commercial 3D scanning technologies.
ai_summary: This project develops a low-cost 3D scanning system that uses a standard webcam and a hand-held laser to reconstruct 3D digital models of physical objects. By processing video data in MATLAB, the system provides an affordable and accessible solution for 3D modeling and measurement.

student_names: Ashraf Saad Shewail, Eslam Mamdouh Abd Elmoteleb, Eslam Zakaria Gad-Allah, Ahmed Hamdy Yassein, Mohamed Abd Elfattah Abd Elgwwad, Abd Elmonaem Ezzat Abd Elmonaem
technologies: Android, Java, Wi-Fi Direct, Android Studio, Gradle, NDK
keywords: Local Social Media, Wi-Fi Direct, Peer-to-Peer, Ad-hoc Network, Mobile Communication, LAN
abstract: With the introduction of smart phones and mobile devices, the rate of technology usage has become widespread. It is very likely to see anyone using mobile device on the street, in the bus, at work, at school or even at home no matter if there is a fully functional computer nearby. Particularly, the usage of smart phones is not just limited to basic communication; they are being used as a technological gadget in our daily lives for years. We can easily reach such applications on different fields e.g. image processing, audio tuning, video editing, voice recognition. With the help of these smart applications we are able to interact with our environment much faster, and consequently make life easier, relatively for sure. Apart from mobile phone industry, sharing and staying connected to our environment has become very popular. A person who has a mobile phone with latest technology desires to communicate with friends, share feelings instantly, and of course meet new people who understand him well. In this context, technology came to the point where needs of modern human overlaps today's technology. This study aims to provide a basic application to users who has got those needs in terms of sharing and communicating, for maintaining easy and costless solution. This study currently offers prototype application to this problem using WIFI Direct technology, and intends to be pioneer of its field in consequence of existing small numbers of related applications in the market. As a consequence of this study a basic application is developed where user can discover peers, transfer images and audio data. Connection is established.
description: RapidShare is a local social media application designed for organizations, faculties, companies, and individual users. It facilitates peer-to-peer communication and file sharing without relying on the internet, utilizing Wi-Fi Direct technology to create an ad-hoc network between devices. The application supports voice, text, and drawing-based communication, as well as high-speed file transfers, making it a cost-effective and secure solution for local environments.
problem_statement: Smart phones require 3G or network access points, which are not always available or affordable. Furthermore, connecting to public access points can be insecure, and internet-based communication is often costly or unavailable in specific locations like factories, tunnels, or museums.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an Android-based application that uses Wi-Fi Direct technology to establish an ad-hoc network between smart phones. This allows users to communicate and share data directly with each other without needing an internet connection or external network infrastructure.
objectives: The main goal is to develop a solution for smart phones and computers to communicate (voice and data) between each other at a close range without being dependent on 3G or access points. Key objectives include enabling high-speed file sharing, supporting peer-to-peer chat, and providing a secure, low-cost communication platform for local organizations.
ai_summary: RapidShare is an Android-based peer-to-peer communication application that enables users to share files and chat without an internet connection. By utilizing Wi-Fi Direct technology, it creates a local ad-hoc network, providing a secure and cost-effective solution for high-speed data exchange in environments like schools or offices.

abstract: The Online Assessment System is designed to streamline the examination process for educational institutes. It provides a platform for conducting Multiple Choice Examinations (M.C) efficiently, allowing for regular testing and surprise quizzes. By automating the assessment process, the system saves significant time for faculty members in preparing mark sheets and grading, while providing students with a flexible and accessible testing environment.
description: This project is an online assessment platform tailored for e-learning environments. It aims to modernize the traditional examination process by moving it to a digital interface. The system supports various courses across different disciplines, enabling institutes to manage student evaluations, track performance, and provide immediate feedback. It addresses the logistical challenges of traditional testing by reducing manual administrative work and providing a scalable solution for large student bodies.
problem_statement: Traditional examination methods are time-consuming, labor-intensive for faculty, and often lack the flexibility required for modern e-learning environments. Manual grading and paper-based testing create bottlenecks in the educational process and delay feedback for students.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a web-based Online Assessment System that automates the creation, administration, and grading of examinations. It allows for the seamless management of multiple-choice tests, providing immediate results and reducing the administrative burden on instructors while enhancing the learning experience for students.
objectives: To develop a digital platform for conducting online examinations, to reduce the time and effort required for manual grading, to provide immediate feedback to students, to support various academic courses, and to improve the overall efficiency of the assessment process in educational institutions.

project_title: Aqar Broker: E-Commerce & Decision Support System
student_names: Ahmed Alaa Eldin Hassan, Ahmed Kamal Ahmed, Omar Yasser Hamed, Mashhour Seif Elnasr Abdallah, Michael Maher Fekry, Mostafa Ahmed Mohamed
technologies: Flutter, Dart, Firebase, Android Studio, VS Code, Draw.io
keywords: Real Estate, E-Commerce, Decision Support System, Property Management, Mobile Application, Residential Units
abstract: The real estate market is one of the strongest economic areas and must keep pace with current technology. We decided to contribute to this sector by facilitating the process of selling, buying, and renting residential units throughout Egypt. Our application provides a convenient and direct environment for both sellers and buyers. Additionally, we aim to introduce an electronic platform to help people navigate the new administrative capital, providing a safe way to make decisions about buying residential units in this emerging city.
description: Aqar Broker is a mobile application designed to streamline the real estate market by connecting buyers, sellers, and renters. Users create accounts to access information about residential units, neighborhoods, and investment opportunities. The system includes a recommendation engine to help users find properties that match their budget and preferences, specifically focusing on the new administrative capital in Egypt.
problem_statement: The current real estate market suffers from a lack of transparency, fraudulent dealings, and bias between buyers and sellers. Furthermore, there is a lack of accessible information regarding new urban developments like the new administrative capital, making it difficult for users to make informed investment or housing decisions.
proposed_solution: A mobile-based E-Commerce and Decision Support System that acts as an intermediary to eliminate the need for human brokers. The platform provides a secure environment for property transactions, offers personalized recommendations based on user budget, and serves as a comprehensive guide for residential units in new cities.
objectives: To dispense with the human element in real estate brokerage and commissions, facilitate the decision-making process for buyers, help users choose residential units according to their specific budgets, and provide a dedicated platform for the new administrative capital.
ai_summary: Aqar Broker is a mobile application that digitizes the real estate market in Egypt to facilitate secure buying, selling, and renting of residential units. It features a decision support system that helps users find properties based on their budget and provides specific guidance for navigating the real estate landscape in the new administrative capital.

abstract: We all suffer from violations daily, but it's hard for us to report them for several reasons and this causes the repetition of this violation and the increase of negative effects caused by this. Thus, we thought about a solution to limit violations using cell phones and our application was the idea. Blaghaty is an application that allows citizens to report any violation they see at any place and time whatever the violation is whether: Traffic, Environmental ... etc. This is done by: Taking a photo of the violation, writing out it. The location of the violation will be directed to the competent authorities to deal with it after confirming the validity of the violation.
description: Blaghaty is a mobile application designed to empower citizens to report various types of violations, such as traffic or environmental issues, in real-time. By leveraging mobile technology and AI-driven conversational interfaces (Dialogflow), the app streamlines the reporting process, allowing users to submit photos and descriptions of violations, which are then routed to the appropriate authorities for verification and action.
problem_statement: Citizens face significant difficulties in reporting daily violations due to complex or inaccessible reporting channels, leading to the persistence and repetition of these violations and negative societal impacts.
proposed_solution: A user-friendly mobile application (Android/iOS) that enables citizens to easily report violations by capturing photos and providing descriptions, which are then processed and forwarded to relevant authorities for validation and resolution.
objectives: Build an elegant Android/iOS app for reporting violations, provide an easy way to submit information about violations, reduce the number of violations, find a way to activate censorship, and ensure proper application of the law.
ai_summary: Blaghaty is a mobile application that enables citizens to report various violations, such as traffic or environmental issues, by submitting photos and descriptions. The system utilizes Dialogflow's AI capabilities to facilitate user interaction and streamline the reporting process to the relevant authorities.

project_title: A Smart Automatic System for Criminal Identification
student_names: Yousef Yacoub Mohammed
supervisor: Dr. Fathy Al Kazzaz, Ass.Lec. Mahmoud Sobhy
technologies: OpenCV, Haar Cascades, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), Android, Python
keywords: Face Recognition, Biometrics, Criminal Identification, Haar Cascades, CNN, Surveillance
abstract: The increasing use of biometric technologies in high security applications has created the requirement for highly accurate face recognition systems. This project presents a real-time face recognition system using an automated surveillance camera. The system utilizes Haar-classifier for face detection and a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for face recognition. The proposed system achieves an accuracy of 95.5% on a dataset of 20,000 images, providing a robust and efficient alternative to traditional identification methods like ID cards.
description: This project develops an automated criminal identification system designed for government institutions and high-security areas like airports. By replacing traditional, easily forged ID cards with biometric facial recognition, the system provides a faster, more secure, and reliable method for verifying identities in real-time using surveillance camera feeds.
problem_statement: Traditional identification methods, such as physical ID cards, driver's licenses, and ATM cards, are prone to forgery, theft, and impersonation, leading to security vulnerabilities in governmental and high-security environments.
proposed_solution: A real-time facial recognition system developed for the Android platform that captures images via camera, detects faces using Haar Cascades, and identifies individuals by comparing extracted facial features against a secure database using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN).
objectives: To develop an automated system for identifying individuals in real-time, to enhance security in governmental institutions and airports, to replace vulnerable physical identification methods with secure biometric technology, and to achieve high accuracy in face recognition using machine learning algorithms.
ai_summary: This project implements a real-time criminal identification system that uses OpenCV's Haar Cascades for face detection and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) for accurate face recognition. Designed for high-security environments like airports, the system replaces easily forged physical ID cards with secure biometric verification to improve identification speed and reliability.

The application enables users to create challenges, track progress, and share moments with friends, fostering a supportive environment to achieve personal and group goals.

technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, ASP.NET Core, SQL Server, YOLO, Pose Estimation, WebRTC, Jitsi Meet
keywords: Online Education, Student Engagement, Facial Expression Analysis, AI, Real-time Analytics, WebRTC, E-learning
abstract: The EduFocus system is an AI-powered educational platform designed to enhance virtual learning experiences by integrating facial expression analysis and personalized learning recommendations. With the increasing adoption of online education, maintaining student engagement has become a significant challenge. EduFocus aims to bridge this gap by utilizing AI-driven techniques to assess student concentration levels during live sessions and provide real-time feedback to instructors. The system incorporates various features, including real-time video conferencing, automated learning recommendations, questionnaire-based feedback collection, and performance tracking. If a large number of students exhibit low engagement, the system recommends instructors to send quizzes to evaluate focus levels. The platform supports multiple user roles, such as instructors, students, and administrators, ensuring seamless interaction and data-driven decision-making.
description: EduFocus is an intelligent online education platform that monitors student engagement in real-time during virtual classes. By leveraging AI-powered facial expression analysis and pose estimation, the system detects when students are distracted and provides instructors with actionable insights. It includes a dashboard for instructors to view engagement reports and tools to trigger interactive content or quizzes to re-engage students, thereby improving overall learning outcomes.
problem_statement: Traditional online learning platforms lack integrated mechanisms to measure and maintain student engagement in real-time. Instructors struggle to assess student attentiveness during virtual lectures, which leads to lower participation and ineffective knowledge retention.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an AI-powered platform that integrates WebRTC for video conferencing and uses the YOLO model and pose estimation to analyze students' facial expressions. The system automatically detects disengagement and prompts instructors to intervene with interactive content, ensuring students remain focused.
objectives: Develop a real-time AI-based system for analyzing students' facial expressions; Integrate WebRTC-based video conferencing (Jitsi Meet) for seamless communication; Provide instructors with engagement analytics and reports; Implement an alert system for low student engagement; Automatically send interactive questions and prompts when distraction is detected; Enhance the overall virtual learning experience.
ai_summary: EduFocus is an AI-driven educational platform that monitors student engagement during online classes using facial expression analysis and pose estimation. When low engagement is detected, the system alerts instructors and provides tools to re-engage students, creating a more interactive and data-informed virtual learning environment.

project_title: Early prediction of arrhythmia based on ECG
student_names: Mohamed Essam Lotfy Abdelaziz, Aya Ramadan Fath El Bab Saleh, Doaa Salem Yassin Mohammed, Hasnaa Fawzy Mahmoud Elshazly, Menna Tallah Hassan Ayad Ahmed, Mahmoud Ayman Hamed Mahmoud
technologies: IoT, Machine Learning, ECG Sensors, Mobile Application
keywords: Arrhythmia, ECG, Heart Disease, IoT, Machine Learning, Early Detection, Predictive Modeling
abstract: Heart disease remains a leading cause of global mortality, accounting for a significant percentage of deaths worldwide. Early detection of cardiac abnormalities is crucial in preventing the progression of conditions such as atrial fibrillation and Ventricular heart failure, which are often diagnosed in advanced stages. This research aims to contribute to the timely identification of cardiac issues through the use of electrocardiogram (ECG) data. With over 23 million patients globally affected by heart-related ailments, and heart disease being the primary cause of death for 32 percent of 17.9 million deaths, there is a pressing need for effective predictive measures. The study focuses on interpreting ECG signals to predict arrhythmias, specifically targeting abnormalities like atrial fibrillation and Ventricular heart failure. We used the Internet of Things (IOT) technology, which is a system of interrelated computing devices, machines or objects with unique identifiers and the ability to communicate the data over a network or Internet without requiring human intervention.
description: The project is a portable, user-friendly IoT-based system designed to detect cardiac abnormalities and predict arrhythmias using machine learning. It aims to provide a dual benefit to medical practitioners and patients by enabling early diagnosis in various settings, such as hospitals, emergency rooms, or sports fields, thereby improving patient outcomes and reducing mortality rates.
problem_statement: There is a critical gap in the early prediction of arrhythmias, as traditional diagnostic approaches often rely on detecting irregularities only after symptoms have manifested, which limits the effectiveness of treatment strategies.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an IoT-based system that utilizes machine learning models to analyze ECG signals for the early prediction of arrhythmias. The solution includes a portable, cost-effective device that captures ECG data and a mobile application that provides rapid, accurate results for healthcare professionals.
objectives: The main goal is to create a system with 90% accuracy in arrhythmia prediction, focusing on early detection, improving patient outcomes, and providing user-friendly interaction through a mobile application for healthcare professionals.
ai_summary: This project develops an IoT-based, portable medical device that uses machine learning to analyze ECG signals for the early prediction of arrhythmias. By providing rapid, accurate diagnostic results via a mobile application, the system aims to improve patient outcomes and enable timely medical intervention for heart conditions.

project_title: An Intelligent System for Assessing Student Participation and Interaction
student_names: Hossam Elsayed Mohamed Fakher, Khaled Emad-El-Din, Abdallah Hesham Abdallah, Zain-Elabdeen Khaled, Alshimaa Mahmoud Abdelghafar, Shimaa Maher Ahmed
technologies: Facial Recognition, Mobile Application, Database, Biometric Authentication
keywords: Attendance Management, Facial Recognition, Biometric Authentication, Student Participation, Smart ID, Automation
abstract: In the modern era, different universities keep track of student attendance using face recognition verification system or manually. Attendance management is a daunting and important task. In this documentation, we focus on proposing a smart attendance management system based on facial recognition and also focuses on the student's participation during the lecture and checks whether the student is wearing a mask or not. We develop a mobile application for it to be used by both the student and the lecturer, where the student uses it to see the percentage of his attendance and participation in the lectures, and the lecturer can see reports on all the students. The system will register students and accept student attendance using this smart ID card, keeping all records for subsequent operations in the backend using the database.
description: This project is a mobile-based intelligent attendance and participation tracking system that utilizes facial recognition technology. It aims to replace traditional, time-consuming manual attendance methods with an automated, secure, and efficient biometric solution that monitors student presence and engagement throughout the duration of a lecture.
problem_statement: Traditional attendance systems are time-consuming, prone to errors, and suffer from the issue of students leaving lectures early after marking their initial attendance, leading to a loss of educational value and inaccurate data.
proposed_solution: A mobile application integrated with a facial recognition backend that tracks student attendance and participation in real-time. The system uses biometric identification to ensure secure check-ins and check-outs, monitors mask compliance, and provides automated reporting for lecturers and attendance tracking for students.
objectives: To computerize the traditional attendance process, eliminate manual paperwork, save time for both students and lecturers, ensure accurate attendance records, and provide insights into student participation and compliance with college regulations.
ai_summary: This project introduces a mobile-based intelligent system that uses facial recognition to automate student attendance and monitor participation during lectures. By replacing manual paper-based methods with biometric verification, the system ensures accurate tracking, prevents unauthorized access, and provides real-time reports for both students and faculty.

technologies: Python, OpenCV, Haar Cascade, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), Deep Learning (DL), Excel
keywords: Attendance System, Facial Recognition, Facial Expression Analysis, Student Engagement, Deep Learning, Computer Vision
abstract: Due to the rapid spread of technology in our lives, it can be used to eliminate the traditional methods of the attendance system by using AI technology to speed up the process of taking attendance. This system aims to achieve this by using computer vision to identify students at the start of each lecture to minimize time wasted and cheating. We used the Haar Cascade algorithm to detect faces and CNN models to classify them, recording attendance in an Excel sheet. Additionally, the system monitors student concentration levels and analyzes facial expressions to gauge understanding and engagement, providing feedback to both students and educators.
description: The project is an AI-powered educational application designed to modernize classroom management. It replaces manual attendance with automated facial recognition, monitors student concentration during lectures, and analyzes facial expressions to assess student engagement and comprehension levels. By leveraging deep learning and computer vision, the system provides educators with data-driven insights to improve the learning environment.
problem_statement: Traditional attendance methods are time-consuming and prone to cheating. Furthermore, educators struggle to assess student engagement, concentration, and understanding in real-time, leading to a lack of actionable data to improve academic performance and learning outcomes.
proposed_solution: A comprehensive system that utilizes a camera to perform real-time facial recognition for automated attendance tracking. The system also employs deep learning models to analyze student facial expressions and concentration levels, providing educators with feedback on student engagement and understanding throughout the lecture.
objectives: Improve attendance tracking accuracy, enhance facial expression analysis, monitor student engagement and concentration levels, provide timely feedback to students, streamline administrative tasks for educators, and improve overall student academic outcomes through data-driven insights.
ai_summary: This project is an AI-driven classroom management system that automates attendance tracking using facial recognition. It also monitors student engagement and comprehension by analyzing facial expressions and concentration levels during lectures, providing valuable feedback to both students and instructors.

project_title: Skin Disease Early Detection and Optimization using Explainable AI
student_names: Nagham Hazem Metwally, Israa Ali Ahmed, Tharaa Ali Mohammed, Hager Eslam Abd El-Monem, Menna-Allah Fathy Abd El-Monem, Mariam Ahmed Eid
supervisor: Dr. Sara Sweidan, Eng. AbdulWahab Almestekawy
technologies: Python, TensorFlow, Keras, CNN (Convolutional Neural Networks), Grad-CAM, Web Development, Mobile Development
keywords: Skin Disease, Early Detection, Explainable AI, CNN, Grad-CAM, Medical Informatics, Machine Learning
abstract: Skin diseases are a global health problem that is difficult to diagnose due to their complexity and the time-consuming nature of traditional diagnosis. This project develops a multiclass machine learning model to differentiate between healthy skin and various skin diseases, including Melanocytic Nevi, Melanoma, Basal cell Carcinoma, Eczema, and others. The model utilizes feature extraction and training stages to classify skin images, and incorporates Grad-CAM to provide explainability by highlighting the specific areas in the image that led to the classification decision.
description: This project provides an automated system for the early detection of skin diseases. It allows users to upload images of skin conditions, which are then analyzed by a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model. The system provides a diagnosis and uses Grad-CAM to visualize the model's decision-making process, helping doctors verify the results. Additionally, the project includes a service for patients to book appointments with dermatologists.
problem_statement: Skin diseases are difficult to diagnose, requiring specialized expertise and equipment that are not always available. Delayed diagnosis can lead to severe health consequences, and the process is often time-consuming and stressful for patients.
proposed_solution: The team developed a machine learning-based application that uses CNNs for automated image analysis and classification of skin diseases. The solution includes an explainable AI component (Grad-CAM) to increase trust in the diagnosis and a platform to connect patients with medical professionals for timely treatment.
objectives: To build a highly accurate machine learning model for skin disease classification, provide explainable results to assist doctors, and create an accessible web or mobile application for patients to receive early diagnosis and book medical appointments.
ai_summary: This project introduces an AI-powered diagnostic tool that uses Convolutional Neural Networks to classify various skin diseases from images. It enhances clinical decision-making by providing explainable results through Grad-CAM visualization and integrates a patient-facing application to facilitate early detection and medical consultation.

description: The project is a telematics-based system that monitors driver behavior to improve road safety and vehicle maintenance. It utilizes hardware (Raspberry Pi) installed in vehicles to collect driving data such as speed, acceleration, braking, and location, which is then transmitted to a cloud server (Firebase) for analysis using deep learning models to generate a safety score for the driver.

objectives: To monitor driver behavior, collect and analyze driving data, improve driving habits, reduce traffic accidents, and minimize environmental impact through better vehicle management.

student_names: Ahmed Bassuny Abd Elhameed Bassuny, Moustafa Mahmoud Mohamed Gaber, Abdelrahman Motawea Abo-Elmagd, Mazen Mohamed Mansour, Shehab Nabil Mokhtar, Aya Refaat Mohamed Khatab
technologies: Python, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-learn, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, PHP, Anaconda, Jupyter, SQLAlchemy
keywords: Stock Market Prediction, Machine Learning, LSTM, Neural Networks, Financial Forecasting, Web Application
abstract: The business and financial sector is today the world's financial leader, and stock market trading is a normal practice in the financial world. When it comes to stock market predictions, financial exchange predictions are always more difficult. It is a method of attempting to predict the future value of a company's present shares to avoid loss or possibly profit. Using various characteristics mentioned later in this document, this project will present a machine learning approach to predict the stock exchange accurately and these predicted stocks will be displayed on the website we designed in the form of tables and charts. Python is a programming language that allows for greater reach and understanding. We propose a Machine Learning Algorithm that will be trained using historical datasets from various companies to make near-effective predictions. A strategy for predicting the future value of a company's stock or other financial instrument traded on an exchange is stock market prediction. The main goal of stock market prediction is to make a visible consequential gain, as well as to avoid large losses. Some people may question the veracity of these predictions, claiming that the efficient market hypothesis states that these predictions cannot be achieved with the data currently available, making it essentially unpredictable. However, there are several methods and technologies that can assist in obtaining information about future trends, resulting in effective earnings. In the software, we developed a machine learning model to predict the stock market for the next 7 days, and we will link this model with a website to facilitate the interaction with the users. The website is implemented using the Visual Studio Code and the code is written using Html, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, PHP. The machine learning model is implemented using Anaconda and Jupyter and the code is written using Python. We made programme this project to predict stock market stocks with the highest possible accuracy with less losses. Through this website, you can choose and see the stock exchange shares of any of the companies displayed on the website. Users can easily use the website and go through our services.
description: The project, titled 'Stocko', is a web-based application designed to assist users in making informed investment decisions by providing stock price forecasts for the next seven days. It leverages machine learning models, specifically Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN) with LSTM and Dense layers, trained on historical stock data from companies like AAPL, AMD, and RBLX. The platform integrates a user-friendly web interface with a backend capable of processing financial data and displaying predictions through interactive charts and tables.
problem_statement: Stock market prediction is a highly challenging and risky task due to the inherent volatility and complexity of financial markets, making it difficult for individual investors to predict future price movements accurately and avoid financial losses.
proposed_solution: The team developed a web application that utilizes a machine learning model based on Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural networks to analyze historical stock data and forecast price trends for the upcoming seven days, providing users with actionable insights to optimize investment timing.
objectives: 1) Predict the future movement of financial exchange share prices. 2) Increase potential profits for investors through accurate price movement predictions. 3) Minimize financial losses by providing data-driven forecasts. 4) Create an accessible, user-friendly web interface for visualizing stock trends and predictions.
ai_summary: This project is a web application called 'Stocko' that uses machine learning, specifically LSTM neural networks, to predict stock market prices for the next seven days. It provides users with an intuitive interface to view historical data, price forecasts, and trends for various companies to help them make better investment decisions.
