student_names: Abdallah samir elsayed, Abdallah adel abdallah, Ahmed barakat Mohamed, Naglaa saad Mohamed, Hend hamdy
technologies: Android, Java, Data Mining, Google Maps API, PayPal API
keywords: E-commerce, Android, Data Mining, Recommendation Systems, Mobile Application
abstract: Online shopping or Ecommerce became very common nowadays. And with tremendous increase in mobiles and tablets, shopping on mobile is getting more popular each day. Customers have started expecting their retailers to have a mobile presence. From this point, our team developed an ecommerce mobile application for which this document has been prepared. The proposed system is an android application that acts as an intermediary between customer and vendor. The vendors add the products to the system freely, then customer purchase these added products with cache on delivery payment. The proposed system satisfies basic functions of an ecommerce application such as registration, shopping cart, product management, order management and other functions. So improving services provided to application users is a must. To achieve that, we followed two approaches which are optimizing customer services approach and vendor services approach. Mining algorithms. By using data mining, various recommendation algorithms are developed upon customer behavior and customers' orders. Not only that, but a dynamic shipment cost algorithm is developed to calculate cost of shipment dynamically. Vendor provided services improved by providing visualization reports about interactivity and sales of percentage of products. The sales of percentage reports are about product, branches, and competitors. Also, vendor can advertise an added product and pay for the advertisement. The vendor also can use the Google maps to help him/her to deliver requested orders easily. The good thing is that map could be used also by customer to ease reaching to vendor branch if customer decided to get requested orders rather than shipping by vendor.
description: The project is an Android-based e-commerce platform that acts as a broker between customers and vendors. It provides a comprehensive suite of features including user registration, product browsing, shopping cart management, and order processing. Beyond standard e-commerce functionality, the system integrates advanced data mining algorithms to provide personalized product recommendations and dynamic shipment cost calculations. It also offers vendors analytical tools for sales visualization and advertising capabilities, alongside Google Maps integration for efficient order delivery and branch location.
problem_statement: With the continuous increase in ecommerce applications, competition among them has increased. Therefore, each one seeks to attract more customers or even to conserve and retain customers rather than seeking to expand its market by improving customer services. Companies found themselves have huge amount of data like transactions and browsing history of customers so the need to make use of this huge amount of data sets to improve customer services too. All these requirements have introduced the extraction of knowledge and discover patterns from data in ecommerce applications, using data mining techniques.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an Android application that implements data mining algorithms to optimize customer and vendor services. It uses recommendation algorithms based on customer behavior and order history to suggest products. It also features a dynamic shipment cost calculator, visualization reports for vendors to track sales and competitor performance, and Google Maps integration to facilitate order delivery and store location.
objectives: To develop an Android e-commerce application that improves user experience through data mining, provides dynamic shipment cost calculation, offers vendors analytical sales reports, and integrates location-based services for efficient delivery.
ai_summary: This project is an Android-based e-commerce platform that connects customers and vendors while leveraging data mining to provide personalized product recommendations. It includes advanced features such as dynamic shipment cost calculation, vendor sales analytics, and Google Maps integration for improved delivery logistics.

project_title: DR/CARE: Medical Application Based on Deep Learning
student_names: Hossam fares alsayed metwally, Hossam medhat sayed Mohamed, Fady Maher Mazhor Barh, Ahmed Emad Mahmoud Abdel Rahman, Aya Almadah Atef Naser, Raneem saleh mohamed abo elmawaheb
technologies: Deep Learning, TensorFlow, Keras, Android, IoT sensors, Firebase, Python
keywords: Medical diagnosis, Deep Learning, IoT, Telemedicine, Healthcare monitoring, Disease classification
abstract: The application Doctor Care is concerned with the medical follow-up of patients, providing advantages such as disease identification via a chatbot, medical image analysis (chest x-rays, heartbeat, skin cancer, brain tumor, retinal OCT), and facilitating doctor-patient communication. It includes medication reminders, hospital location services, and remote health monitoring for patients with irregular vital signs (oxygen ratio, heart rate, temperature) using wearable IoT devices.
description: DR/CARE is a comprehensive mobile health platform that integrates AI-driven diagnostic models with IoT hardware. The system consists of two main parts: a hardware device that monitors vital signs and uploads data to a database, and a mobile application that provides medical services, including AI-based image classification for various diseases, a medical chatbot, appointment scheduling, and emergency location services.
problem_statement: The project addresses the deterioration of health status in the elderly, the high cost and difficulty of accessing regular medical follow-ups, and the challenges posed by global health crises like COVID-19, which make visiting hospitals for routine check-ups difficult and risky.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an integrated mobile application and IoT hardware system that allows for remote patient monitoring, AI-assisted medical image diagnosis, and virtual communication with doctors, effectively simulating a doctor's presence for initial diagnosis and continuous health tracking.
objectives: The project aims to keep the elderly safe, simulate a doctor's presence during emergencies, provide constant health monitoring, facilitate communication with medical professionals, and help patients locate the nearest medical clinic.
ai_summary: DR/CARE is a mobile and IoT-based healthcare platform that uses deep learning to classify medical images and monitor patient vitals remotely. It provides users with a medical chatbot, medication reminders, and direct access to doctors to improve health outcomes and accessibility.

project_title: Remember Me: Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease and a patient follow-up system
student_names: Nora Ali Ali Mohammed, Salma Ahmed Marouf Abd-Elhameed, Azza Nasser Elsheshtawy Bahloul, Raheel Mohammed Mohammed, Engy Ebrahim Salah-Eldeen, Abd-Elwahab Mohammed Abdo
supervisor: Dr. Mostafa Elgendy, Eng. Mahmoud Sobhy
technologies: Python, TensorFlow, Keras, MRI Imaging, Web Development, Mobile Development, Desktop Application Development
keywords: Alzheimer's disease, Early diagnosis, MRI, Medical Informatics, Patient follow-up, Brain training, Dementia
abstract: According to the WHO, around 50 million people suffer from dementia, and nearly 10 million new cases of AD are reported every year. Alzheimer's disease (AD) is the most common type of dementia, a progressive disease beginning with mild memory loss. The major problem is that it cannot be recognized except by the appearance of its symptoms, and once the symptoms appear, the disease cannot be stopped. This project aims to early diagnose the disease based on patient MRI images and create a complete system to help patients in all stages of the disease and support their families and health care providers. The project consists of 4 parts: a web application for patient follow-up, a mobile application to activate the patient's memory, an AI model for diagnosis through MRI, and a desktop application for memory testing and disease diagnosis.
description: Remember Me is an integrated medical informatics system designed to assist in the early diagnosis and management of Alzheimer's disease. The system utilizes AI-driven analysis of MRI scans to detect early signs of cognitive impairment and provides a multi-platform ecosystem (web, mobile, and desktop) to support patients and caregivers. It includes features for memory training, patient monitoring, and providing educational resources to families and healthcare providers.
problem_statement: Alzheimer's disease is a leading cause of death with no known cure, and it is difficult to diagnose in its early stages. There is a lack of public awareness, insufficient research, and a lack of comprehensive software systems that provide both diagnostic capabilities and daily support for patients and their caregivers.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated system that combines an AI model for early diagnosis using MRI scans with a multi-platform software suite. This suite includes a web application for information and follow-up, a mobile application for memory activation through puzzles and tests, and a desktop application for continuous memory monitoring and diagnosis.
objectives: To provide an integrated service for Alzheimer's patients to help them perform daily activities, enable early diagnosis through MRI analysis, increase public awareness about the disease, and improve the living conditions of patients by assisting caregivers in providing better care.
ai_summary: Remember Me is a comprehensive medical informatics project that uses AI to diagnose Alzheimer's disease through MRI image analysis. The system provides a multi-platform solution including web, mobile, and desktop applications to help patients with memory training and assist caregivers in managing patient care.

The project consists of 4 parts: a web application for patient follow-up, a mobile application to activate the patient's memory, an AI model for diagnosis through MRI, and a desktop application for memory testing and disease diagnosis.. Remember Me is an integrated medical informatics system designed to assist in the early diagnosis and management of Alzheimer's disease. The system utilizes AI-driven analysis of MRI scans to detect early signs of cognitive impairment and provides a multi-platform ecosystem (web, mobile, and desktop) to support patients and caregivers. It includes features for memory training, patient monitoring, and providing educational resources to families and healthcare providers.

project_title: Vibrant: IOT Based Smart Monitoring System For Intensive Care Utilization
student_names: Mahmoud Tarek Mohamed, Asmaa Mosad Mohamed, Abeer Kamal Ali, Eman AbdElwanees Hamad, Abdel Rahman Baiuomy Metwaly, Mahmoud Rawy Nady
supervisor: Dr. Ahmed Shalaby, Eng. Aya Hatem
technologies: Internet of Things (IoT), Mobile Application, Database Server, Sensor Nodes, Gateway Nodes
keywords: IoT, Intensive Care, Healthcare, Smart Monitoring, Hospital Management, Patient Survival
abstract: In Egypt, citizens suffer to obtain medical services, particularly intensive care due to the shortage of the intensive care units. One of the reasons for the late arrival is the shortage of information about the available rooms for intensive care in hospitals. So patients move from hospital to another unit they find a room. We tried to solve a part of this problem by carrying out a system to provide the information about the utilization of intensive care rooms at hospitals in the region. This system can help citizens to find out the nearest available room to move to directly. As a result, the survival rate will increase and the cost of treatment will decrease significantly. Thereby the efficiency of intensive care utilization raises. The main idea is to provide the information about intensive care utilization at hospitals based on Internet to Things (IOT) technology. The System is divided into three units: device node, gateway node, and database server. The device node watches the intensive care unit. The Gateway nodes collect the information from device nodes and send it to the server to collect the data and make it available for citizens. The project aims at designing, implementing and deploying a cost effective IOT system to monitor the intensive care utilization and give citizens access to this information. Hence, citizens can move to the nearest available hospital directly at the right time.
description: Vibrant is an IoT-based system designed to monitor the availability and utilization of intensive care units (ICU) in hospitals. The system consists of device nodes installed in ICU rooms, gateway nodes that aggregate data, a central database server, and a mobile application that provides real-time information to citizens, doctors, and ambulance drivers.
problem_statement: Patients in Egypt often face critical delays in receiving intensive care due to a lack of real-time information regarding bed availability. Current methods, such as calling hospitals, are inefficient, inaccurate, and lead to patients being transported between multiple hospitals before finding an available unit, which negatively impacts survival rates.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an IoT-based monitoring system that tracks ICU bed occupancy in real-time. By deploying sensor-based device nodes in hospitals and connecting them through gateways to a central server, the system provides an accessible interface (mobile application) for users to locate the nearest hospital with an available ICU bed, thereby reducing travel time and improving emergency response efficiency.
objectives: To design and implement a cost-effective IoT system for monitoring ICU utilization, to provide real-time data access to citizens and medical professionals, to reduce the time spent searching for available intensive care, and to ultimately increase patient survival rates by streamlining hospital admissions.
ai_summary: Vibrant is an IoT-based healthcare solution that monitors intensive care unit (ICU) availability in real-time to help patients and ambulance drivers find open beds quickly. By connecting hospital sensor nodes to a central server and mobile application, the system reduces critical delays in emergency care and improves overall hospital resource utilization.

abstract: Wasally is a lifestyle e-commerce android application which retails various fashion and lifestyle products. It enables registered users to purchase products instantly using PayPal or Cash on Delivery. The system provides administrators and managers with tools to view orders and manage the shopping process, aiming to save consumer time and effort through a multi-tiered architecture.
description: Wasally is an online shopping platform designed for mobile devices. It features four distinct user roles: Visitor (browsing), User (purchasing), Shop Owner (product management), and Delivery Boy (order fulfillment). The system focuses on providing a seamless shopping experience with integrated payment options and efficient local delivery.
problem_statement: The project addresses several e-commerce challenges: poor product quality (addressed via feedback/ratings), sizing issues (addressed by providing detailed dimensions), limited payment methods (addressed by adding Cash on Delivery), and slow delivery times (addressed by a direct shop-to-consumer delivery model).
proposed_solution: A mobile-based e-commerce application that connects local shops directly to consumers. It implements a robust backend using PHP and a relational database, providing a user-friendly interface for browsing, secure payment processing, and a streamlined delivery management system.
objectives: To develop a general-purpose e-commerce store, ensure customer satisfaction through quality products and timely delivery, facilitate an efficient delivery process (within one day), save user time, provide a user-friendly interface, track conversion rates, and build trust through secure payment options.
ai_summary: Wasally is an Android-based e-commerce application designed to streamline the shopping experience for users in Benha, Egypt. It connects customers with local shops, offering features like product ratings, flexible payment methods including Cash on Delivery, and an efficient local delivery system.

By digitizing these daily tasks, the system aims to reduce reliance on inefficient paper-based methods and improve overall personal productivity.

It provides users with tools to manage their religious practices (reading Qur'an), health (diet systems), professional life (job searching and recruitment), and daily schedule (appointments and reminders). The solution provides a digital interface for scheduling, health tracking, job matching, and quick access to religious texts and emergency protocols, replacing manual, paper-based processes.
objectives: To create a unified application that helps individuals manage their personal lives across religious, social, health, and practical domains. The goal is to improve user efficiency, provide timely reminders, facilitate job searching for users, and assist companies in finding qualified candidates.

abstract: The project introduces a virtual store system that replaces physical product displays with boards containing product images and QR codes. Customers use their smartphones to scan these codes, review product details, and place orders, which are then routed to the nearest branch for fulfillment. The system aims to reduce the overhead costs of physical retail space while providing a convenient, anytime-anywhere shopping experience for customers.
description: This project proposes a mobile-based virtual shopping platform that allows retailers to establish a presence in high-traffic areas like subway stations or malls without the need for full-scale physical stores. By utilizing QR codes on product boards, customers can browse and purchase items directly from their mobile devices. The backend system manages order routing to the nearest distribution branch, optimizing inventory and delivery processes.
problem_statement: Investors face high costs for physical store construction, land acquisition, and maintenance, while customers often struggle with limited time and the inconvenience of traditional shopping, including travel and waiting times.
proposed_solution: A virtual store system that uses QR codes to represent products, allowing customers to shop via mobile devices. The solution includes a distributed server architecture that routes orders to the nearest branch, enabling retailers to expand their reach with minimal physical infrastructure.
objectives: To help investors open new branches in any location at a lower cost, and to enable customers to perform their shopping anytime and anywhere.
ai_summary: This project develops a mobile-based virtual store system that uses QR codes to allow customers to shop from anywhere, such as public transit stations or malls. description: The project, titled 'Discopter', is a safety information system that utilizes a quad-copter to address challenges in emergency medical response, traffic management, and environmental exploration. By integrating a mobile application with IoT-enabled hardware, the system allows for remote control of the drone to deliver medical aid, monitor traffic conditions, and provide safety surveillance for scientists in hazardous environments.
problem_statement: The project addresses three main issues: the inability of ambulances to reach patients quickly due to traffic congestion, the lack of real-time data for police to manage traffic obstacles, and the safety risks faced by scientists and explorers in dangerous natural environments.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an IoT-based quad-copter system controlled via an Android application. The system uses a Pixhawk flight controller and Raspberry Pi to enable remote navigation, medical aid delivery, traffic monitoring, and environmental observation, providing real-time data to a web-based dashboard.
objectives: The primary objectives are to reduce patient death rates by facilitating faster medical aid delivery, improve traffic flow by monitoring and suggesting alternative routes, and enhance the safety of explorers and scientists by providing remote surveillance in dangerous areas.
ai_summary: This project develops an IoT-based quad-copter system controlled by an Android application to assist in emergency medical response and traffic management. It aims to save lives by delivering medical aid to congested areas and provides a safer way for scientists to explore hazardous natural environments.

student_names: Ahmed Mostafa Abdallah, Fathy Tarek Ali, Mohamed Ahmed Abdel-Mohsen, Mohamed Belal Abdel-Majeed, Mahmoud Ahmed Yaseen, Mahmoud Ashraf Ali
technologies: Raspberry Pi 3 Model B, Python, OpenCV, Support Vector Machine (SVM), Firebase, Pose Estimation
keywords: Fall detection, Elderly care, Computer vision, Raspberry Pi, Machine learning, Pose estimation, IoT
abstract: Fall detection of the elderly is a major public health problem. This project is a survey of systems, algorithms, and sensors for the automatic early detection of the fall of elderly persons. It points out the difficulty to compare the performances of the different systems due to the lack of a common framework. In this paper, we develop a low-cost fall detection system through a Raspberry Pi module to exactly detect an event when an accidental fall occurs. The system uses acceleration and pose estimation to detect early fall events. If a fall is detected, the system sends an alert message along with location information to the responsible person.
description: This project presents a low-cost, vision-based fall detection system designed for the elderly. By utilizing a Raspberry Pi and a camera, the system monitors individuals in a static environment without requiring them to wear any devices. It employs pose estimation and machine learning (SVM) to distinguish between accidental falls and normal activities, triggering an automated alert to caregivers via a mobile application integrated with Firebase.
problem_statement: Existing wearable and non-wearable fall detectors are often unreliable, prone to false alarms, require maintenance, or are uncomfortable for elderly users. Current vision-based systems are often expensive, lack portability, and struggle to differentiate between accidental falls and normal activities like lying down or sleeping, leading to high false-positive rates.
proposed_solution: A low-cost, vision-based system using a Raspberry Pi 3 and a camera module. The solution implements pose estimation to track body landmarks and uses a Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm to classify movement patterns. When a fall is detected, the system sends a real-time notification to a caregiver's mobile application via Firebase.
objectives: To develop a camera-based human fall detection system on a low-performance embedded device (Raspberry Pi), develop foreground feature extraction from static backgrounds, and create a robust algorithm for fall detection based on parameters like vertical velocity, aspect ratio, traveled distance, and change in height.
ai_summary: This project develops a low-cost, vision-based fall detection system for the elderly using a Raspberry Pi and pose estimation technology. The system monitors individuals in real-time and uses machine learning to accurately identify falls, automatically alerting caregivers via a mobile app when an incident occurs.
full_content: Fallen Detection. Fallen Detection. Fall detection of the elderly is a major public health problem. This project is a survey of systems, algorithms, and sensors for the automatic early detection of the fall of elderly persons. It points out the difficulty to compare the performances of the different systems due to the lack of a common framework. In this paper, we develop a low-cost fall detection system through a Raspberry Pi module to exactly detect an event when an accidental fall occurs. The system uses acceleration and pose estimation to detect early fall events. If a fall is detected, the system sends an alert message along with location information to the responsible person.. This project presents a low-cost, vision-based fall detection system designed for the elderly. By utilizing a Raspberry Pi and a camera, the system monitors individuals in a static environment without requiring them to wear any devices. It employs pose estimation and machine learning (SVM) to distinguish between accidental falls and normal activities, triggering an automated alert to caregivers via a mobile application integrated with Firebase.

project_title: Oncology Center Services and Prediction Techniques to Assist in Making Right Decision

abstract: Cancer is a leading cause of death, and predicting the efficacy of cancer drugs is challenging due to patient heterogeneity. This project integrates GDSC and CCLE databases to analyze genomic, transcriptomic, and epigenomic data using deep learning models (CNN and GCN) to predict drug effectiveness. Additionally, an Android application is developed to streamline oncology center services, including appointment booking and digital patient record management, to assist doctors in clinical decision-making.
description: The project is a comprehensive medical informatics system designed for oncology centers. It combines a predictive AI engine that evaluates drug sensitivity for cancer patients based on multi-omics data with a management platform that digitizes hospital workflows, including patient scheduling, service selection, and electronic health records.
problem_statement: Oncology centers face significant challenges including inefficient appointment scheduling, reliance on manual paper-based patient records, and the difficulty for junior doctors to accurately predict the effectiveness of specific cancer drugs for individual patients.
proposed_solution: The solution consists of two parts: a deep learning-based predictive model (using CNN and GCN) to determine drug efficacy based on patient profiles, and an Android application that digitizes administrative tasks, enables online appointment booking, and provides doctors with centralized access to patient records.
objectives: To improve cancer treatment outcomes by predicting drug effectiveness, to reduce administrative overhead in oncology centers through digital record keeping, to facilitate patient access to medical services via an online booking system, and to support doctors in making informed clinical decisions.
ai_summary: This project develops an integrated oncology management system that combines a deep learning model for predicting cancer drug sensitivity with an Android application for streamlining patient appointments and digital record management. It incorporates AI methods for product recommendations based on user behavior and feedback. The platform also addresses unemployment by allowing users to register as freelance delivery agents, and ensures security through digital contracts between buyers, sellers, and suppliers.

keywords: Deepfakes, Facial Manipulation, Image Forensics, CNN, Misinformation, Security
abstract: With rapid progress in recent years, the techniques that generate and manipulate multimedia content can now provide a very advanced level of realism. The line between real and synthetic media has become very thin. This project presents an analysis of methods for verifying the integrity of visual media, specifically focusing on the detection of manipulated images and videos. We propose an automated benchmark for facial manipulation detection based on DeepFakes, Face2Face, FaceSwap, and NeuralTextures. Our research demonstrates that using domain-specific knowledge and deep learning models improves forgery detection with high accuracy, outperforming human observers.
description: FakeFinder is a web-based application designed to detect manipulated facial images. By leveraging advanced deep learning techniques, specifically Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), the system analyzes uploaded images to determine their authenticity. The project aims to combat the spread of misinformation, identity theft, and extortion crimes by providing a reliable tool for users to verify if a facial image has been tampered with.
problem_statement: The rise of social media and advanced AI-powered tools has made it increasingly easy to create realistic fake images and videos. This manipulation poses significant security threats, including identity theft, fraud, defamation, and the spread of misinformation, making it difficult for ordinary users to distinguish between real and synthetic content.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a machine learning and deep learning-based web application that utilizes CNN models trained on large datasets of manipulated and genuine facial images. The system provides an automated, user-friendly interface that allows individuals to verify the authenticity of images, thereby protecting users from potential extortion and deception.
objectives: To develop an accurate and reliable tool for detecting manipulated facial images, to educate users with limited technical background on identifying synthetic media, to contribute to the fight against digital misinformation and extortion, and to provide a robust system that performs consistently across various devices.
ai_summary: FakeFinder is a web-based security tool that uses deep learning and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to detect manipulated or 'deepfake' facial images. The project aims to combat digital fraud and misinformation by providing an accessible platform for users to verify the authenticity of visual content.

abstract: This project addresses the critical need for securing digital image data, specifically focusing on the BMP format. By developing a robust application that combines image encryption through pixel manipulation with steganography, the project ensures that sensitive visual information remains protected from unauthorized access during transmission over networks.
description: The project is an image encryption and steganography application designed to protect BMP image files. It utilizes pixel position modification for encryption and incorporates a secondary layer of security by hiding the encrypted image using steganography techniques, ensuring high integrity and confidentiality.
problem_statement: Existing image encryption algorithms often lack compatibility with various image formats and fail to provide comprehensive protection for image content. There is a specific need for a solution that can effectively encrypt popular formats like BMP while maintaining security efficiency and ease of use.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a Java-based application that modifies the position of pixels within BMP images to encrypt them. It further enhances security by applying steganography to the encrypted image, providing a dual-layer approach to data protection.
objectives: 1. Study the architecture of image files, specifically BMP. 2. Develop a simple, powerful, and user-friendly application for image encryption. 3. Implement a secure password handling process to maintain data integrity. 4. Integrate steganography to hide encrypted images for added security.

technologies: Flutter, Raspberry Pi, NodeMCU, YOLO, Face Net, MTCNN, InceptionResNetV1, Python, Android Studio, Solenoid Lock, Relay Module
keywords: Smart Surveillance, IoT, Facial Recognition, Access Control, Computer Vision, Real-time Monitoring
abstract: This project presents the development of a mobile-controlled door locking system utilizing a kit of hardware and a solenoid. The primary objective is to enhance home security and convenience by enabling remote locking and unlocking of doors via a custom-built flutter application. The system integrates hardware components such as a solenoid lock mechanism controlled by a Raspberry Pi, interfaced through a relay module, and powered by a standard 5V adapter. The mobile application, developed using flutter in Android Studio, establishes Wi-Fi communication with the kit, allowing users to send lock and unlock commands. The system successfully demonstrates the feasibility of integrating IoT technologies with everyday security applications, offering a scalable and adaptable solution for various residential and commercial environments.
description: The Magic Eye System is an intelligent surveillance and access control solution that combines computer vision with physical security hardware. It uses advanced machine learning models to perform real-time object detection and facial recognition, allowing the system to identify individuals and automatically manage door access. The system is managed through a user-friendly mobile application that provides remote control, event logging, and real-time status updates.
problem_statement: Traditional surveillance camera systems have limited intelligence, often capturing data without the ability to analyze it in real-time. They lack the capability to differentiate between normal and abnormal events or recognize specific individuals, leading to delayed responses to security incidents and missed opportunities for proactive security measures.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a smart camera system that integrates AI, computer vision, and IoT hardware. By utilizing models like YOLO and Face Net, the system can perform real-time facial recognition and object tracking. This intelligence is coupled with a solenoid-based door lock, allowing the system to automatically grant or deny access based on recognized identities and user-defined permissions.
objectives: To create a state-of-the-art surveillance system capable of capturing, analyzing, and interpreting visual data in real-time; to enhance home and commercial security through automated access control; to provide a user-friendly mobile interface for remote monitoring and door management; and to integrate IoT hardware with advanced machine learning for proactive threat identification.

abstract: An application to detect Jaundice disease in infants, it's one of the most common diseases in newborns. Neonatal jaundice is a common condition that occurs in newborn infants in the first week of life. So, we need to classify between the children with jaundice and the normal children. Some of the available solutions are specialized children's hospitals, where parents of children with jaundice resort to these hospitals to examine the children and to make sure if they need medical analysis to ensure their safety and the extent of the effect of jaundice on them. The solution that we offer is an application that works on pictures of children that the user enters to discover whether the children have jaundice or not. They are infected with jaundice and follow-up on them periodically, which reduces the serious impact that the disease may cause if it worsens and increases with time.
description: This project is a web-based application that utilizes Artificial Intelligence and Computer Vision to assist parents and medical professionals in the early detection of neonatal jaundice. By analyzing images of infants, the system classifies whether the infant shows signs of jaundice, providing a non-invasive, accessible screening tool to prevent serious complications like brain damage.
problem_statement: Neonatal jaundice is a common condition that requires timely detection to prevent severe health complications. Current diagnostic methods often rely on invasive blood tests or specialized clinical equipment, which may not be immediately accessible or convenient for parents, leading to potential delays in diagnosis.
proposed_solution: A web-based application powered by a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model that analyzes images of infants to detect signs of jaundice. This non-invasive approach allows for early screening and periodic monitoring, helping parents identify the need for professional medical intervention.
objectives: To develop an accessible, non-invasive tool for early jaundice detection; to utilize deep learning (CNN) for accurate classification of healthy versus jaundiced infants; to reduce the reliance on immediate clinical testing for initial screening; and to provide a platform for parents to monitor their infants' health.
ai_summary: This project presents a web-based application that uses Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to detect jaundice in newborns from images. By providing a non-invasive screening tool, it helps parents and caregivers identify potential health risks early, facilitating timely medical intervention.

project_title: Mock Interview: WEB-based Virtual interview for job seeker's
student_names: Sameh Elisha Abdelaty Awad, Khaled Mohamed Abdelwahab, AbdelRahman Kamal Meslhi, AbdelRahman Ragae Mahrous, Heba Ashraf Shapan
technologies: Python, TensorFlow, OpenCV, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Speech-to-Text, Web Development
keywords: Mock Interview, AI, Facial Emotion Analysis, Voice Emotion Analysis, Grammar Correction, Job Preparation
abstract: A key factor in career success is the ability to perform well in job interviews. However, it can be challenging to obtain feedback on one's performance, particularly in a practice setting. This project presents an AI-powered mock interview platform that provides personalized feedback to users on their interview skills. The platform utilizes a range of AI models to analyze user performance, including face detection, facial emotion analysis, voice emotion analysis, similarity of answers, and grammatical error correction. The platform provides a seamless and personalized experience, allowing users to practice and improve their interview skills in a user-friendly environment.
description: The project is a web-based virtual interview platform designed to help job seekers practice and improve their interview performance. It simulates real-world interview scenarios and provides comprehensive feedback on verbal and non-verbal communication, including facial expressions, voice tone, grammar, and the content of answers.
problem_statement: Job seekers often face fear of rejection due to a lack of experience and understanding of the interview process. Furthermore, there is a significant lack of constructive feedback provided to candidates after interviews, leaving them unable to identify their weaknesses or improve their performance for future opportunities.
proposed_solution: The project provides a virtual interview environment that uses AI to analyze the candidate's performance in real-time. It evaluates facial expressions, voice emotions, grammatical accuracy, and the semantic similarity of answers compared to ideal responses, offering actionable insights to help users refine their interview skills.
objectives: To reduce the fear of rejection among job seekers, provide personalized feedback on interview performance, analyze non-verbal communication (facial and voice emotions), improve grammatical accuracy in responses, and help candidates prepare for specific job requirements.
ai_summary: This project is an AI-powered web platform that simulates job interviews to help candidates practice and improve their performance. It provides real-time feedback by analyzing the user's facial expressions, voice emotions, grammar, and the quality of their answers.

project_title: Weapon Detection System for Smart Surveillance
student_names: Abdel-lateef Eid Abdel-lateef Mohamed, Tarek Ismail Fathy El-Sayed, Sherif Samy Mohamed El-Sayed, Nadia Yasser Fouad Elrbh, Hanaa Nassef Abdel-razek Abdel-hady, Huda Ahmed Mustafa Ahmed, Abdullah Galal Abdullah hasan
technologies: Deep Learning, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), Python, OpenCV, TensorFlow/Keras
keywords: Weapon Detection, Smart Surveillance, Deep Learning, CNN, Object Detection, Public Safety
abstract: This project presents an automated weapon detection system designed for smart surveillance applications. By leveraging deep learning and computer vision techniques, the system identifies and classifies handheld weapons such as guns and knives in real-time video streams. The goal is to enhance public safety by reducing reliance on manual monitoring, providing faster response times, and improving the accuracy of threat detection in crowded or complex environments.
description: The project focuses on developing a robust AI-based surveillance system capable of detecting weapons in real-time. It addresses the limitations of traditional manual security monitoring by utilizing Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to process video feeds. The system is designed to handle challenges such as self-occlusion and background interference, providing an automated alert mechanism for security personnel to intervene in potential criminal activities.
problem_statement: Traditional video surveillance relies on human operators to manually monitor footage, which is prone to fatigue, slow response times, and human error. Furthermore, weapon detection is inherently difficult due to challenges like self-occlusion, complex backgrounds, and the visual similarity between weapons and everyday objects.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an automated, AI-driven surveillance system that employs deep learning models, specifically Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), to perform real-time object detection and classification of weapons. This system automates the monitoring process, provides immediate alerts upon detection, and improves the consistency and scalability of security operations in public spaces.
objectives: To automatically detect guns and knives in video surveillance, to provide real-time alerts with location information, to improve the consistency and speed of threat detection compared to manual review, and to ensure the system is scalable for use in complex and crowded public environments.
ai_summary: This project implements an AI-powered surveillance system that uses deep learning and Convolutional Neural Networks to automatically detect weapons like guns and knives in real-time video. By automating threat identification, the system aims to enhance public safety and assist security personnel in responding more effectively to potential criminal activities.

abstract: Nowadays, and with the technological revolution we live in, there are a lot of Muslims who aren't aware of the importance of the inheritance laws and Islam so, the Mirath calculator project aims to develop a mobile application to calculate the portion and value of Mirath based on laws that came in Qur'an and Sunnah. The project will be a mobile application that aims to facilitate the understanding and calculation of inheritance in Islam. It provides an innovative technical and educational solution for individuals who wish to understand the legal inheritance rules and regulations. Thanks to this application, users can calculate the inheritance in an accurate and fair manner, which contributes to avoiding potential disputes and disagreements between family members. The AI chat built into the app is a powerful and useful addition. Where users can ask questions and inquiries related to inheritance in Islam and get fast and reliable answers from artificial intelligence. Answers are provided based on reliable legal information and sources in Islam.
description: The Islamic Arabic Mirath Application is a mobile-based platform designed to simplify the complex process of calculating Islamic inheritance (Mirath). It combines a precise calculation engine based on Sharia law with an AI-powered chatbot to provide users with reliable answers to legal inquiries, aiming to foster family harmony and prevent disputes over wealth distribution.
problem_statement: Family discord has risen due to a lack of awareness about inheritance laws and the proper distribution of wealth according to Islamic Sharia. Many individuals struggle to calculate inheritance shares accurately, leading to potential conflicts and disagreements among family members.
proposed_solution: A mobile application that provides an intuitive, user-friendly interface for calculating inheritance shares accurately based on Islamic law. The system incorporates an AI chatbot to answer user questions regarding inheritance and includes features to generate and save reports as PDFs.
objectives: To simplify the complex process of calculating inheritance in Islam, provide a user-friendly and accessible tool for all users, ensure high accuracy in calculations based on Sharia law, and foster family harmony by minimizing disputes through clear and authoritative information.
ai_summary: This project is a mobile application designed to accurately calculate Islamic inheritance shares based on Sharia law. It features an integrated AI chatbot to provide users with reliable legal guidance and helps prevent family disputes by ensuring fair and transparent wealth distribution.

description: This project is an E-Learning platform designed to facilitate communication and educational resource sharing between teachers, students, and parents. It provides a centralized web-based environment where teachers can upload lessons (videos and documents), create assignments, and track student grades, while students can access materials, submit assignments, and communicate with teachers, and parents can monitor their children's academic progress.
problem_statement: The COVID-19 pandemic forced students to stay at home, highlighting the lack of dedicated platforms for educational material delivery. Teachers were forced to rely on social media for sharing content, which is disorganized and difficult for students to access, leading to challenges in tracking student progress, managing assignments, and maintaining effective communication between stakeholders.
proposed_solution: A dedicated, centralized web-based E-Learning platform that provides a structured environment for teachers to upload educational content, manage assignments, and grade students. The system includes specific interfaces for students to access learning materials and for parents to track their children's performance, ensuring a streamlined and efficient educational process.
objectives: 1. Raise the level of education by providing all ways for the student to learn. 2. Save time and effort for the Teacher and students. 3. Facilitate communication between Teacher and students. 4. Improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the educational process.

project_title: Eye and Mouth Movement Controlled Robot Arm: Enabling Independence and Accessibility for Individuals with Disabilities
student_names: Rana Adel Kamal Jonamy Nassar, Abdelrahman Elsayed Mohamed, Yasmin Adel Soliman, Nada Ahmed Abdelsamiea, Salma Magdy Salah, Manar Abdelmonem Helmy, Eman Adel Tourky, Alaa Mohammed Hafez, Omar Sadiq Fathy
technologies: Computer Vision, Eye-tracking, Gesture Recognition, Robotics, Python, OpenCV, TensorFlow
keywords: Assistive Robotics, Eye-tracking, Mouth Gesture Recognition, Human-Robot Interaction, Disability Support, Robotic Arm
abstract: This research presents an innovative assistive robotic system designed to aid individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis by harnessing the power of multimodal human-robot interaction. The system integrates eye-tracking technology to enable precise control of a robotic arm through intuitive eye movements, catering to the specific needs of users facing upper limb mobility challenges. Additionally, the gripping functionality of the robotic hand is seamlessly regulated through mouth gestures, providing a hands-free approach for users with limited or no arm functionality.
description: The project develops a multimodal assistive robotic system that allows users with upper limb impairments to control a robotic arm using eye movements for navigation and mouth gestures for gripping actions. It aims to provide an intuitive, hands-free interface that enhances the independence and daily living capabilities of the target user group.
problem_statement: Individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis face significant challenges in performing daily tasks, limiting their independence. Traditional assistive technologies often lack the precision, versatility, and intuitive control required for intricate tasks, creating a gap in the availability of effective solutions.
proposed_solution: A state-of-the-art multimodal assistive robotic system that incorporates eye-tracking technology for precise control of a robotic arm and implements mouth gesture-based recognition for controlling the robotic hand's gripping functionality.
objectives: Develop an eye-guided robotic arm control system, implement reliable mouth gesture-based gripping, ensure system reliability and safety, enhance user independence in daily activities, and conduct usability evaluations to ensure user satisfaction.
ai_summary: This project creates an assistive robotic arm that can be controlled hands-free by individuals with upper limb disabilities. It uses eye-tracking to navigate the arm's movement and mouth gesture recognition to trigger the gripping mechanism, providing users with greater autonomy in daily tasks.

keywords: Training Management, Student Registration, Course Management, Academic Reporting, Web Portal
abstract: Training management system are important to organize the training process in faculties. In BFCI, the student should take three compulsory training after the first, second and third year respectively. There is no system to manage the training process inside BFCI. We have developed a system to manage the training process in our faculty. The system facilitates the supervisor of the training to raise the announcement of the courses available and registration and approval of the registration of students and also facilitates the lecturer to take the absence of the student and value during the course of the course through the site. The system will be able to generate report regarding the training operation. For example, the number of student per semester and courses, the system is able to check the inventory for applied courses. The target user for this system is students, staff of training and instructors (both internal and external). Prototyping approach is applied while developing this system. This will involve an iterative process to make this system is usable and easy to use by the user. this system have the important part is tracking the whole training operation among the students and instructors, through uploading content and assigning tasks in discussion room.

The system provides a centralized hub for course announcements, student registration, attendance tracking, performance evaluation, and administrative reporting.
problem_statement: The current manual process for managing student training is inefficient, leading to difficulties in tracking student progress, managing course inventory, handling registration approvals, and maintaining communication between instructors and students, resulting in significant time wastage.
proposed_solution: A centralized web-based Training Management System that automates course registration, provides real-time tracking of student attendance and performance, enables instructors to upload content and assign tasks, and allows administrators to generate comprehensive reports on training operations.
objectives: To organize the training process within the faculty, facilitate easy registration for students, provide tools for instructors to manage attendance and evaluations, enable efficient reporting for administrators, and reduce administrative time and resource waste.

abstract: In this modern era, indeed, recent developments in science and technology have drastically changed the way a normal person lives their life, but we also have to accept that there are certain groups of people who have not benefited from this development. Technology has made a drastic change in the medical field, but we are still facing some problems. This wheelchair is fully automated and was created especially for patients and elderly people. Patients with physical disabilities, such as losing an arm or hand, or elderly people with various physical disabilities, face many challenging problems in their daily lives when commuting from one place to another, and sometimes they must rely on another person to move from one place to another. Many significant efforts have been made in recent years to develop smart wheelchair platforms that allow people to easily operate them without any ambiguity. Besides that, the helper becomes tired from pushing the wheelchair with the patient. So the objective of this invention is to solve the problems of three main people in one shot. They are the patients, disabled people, elderly people, and also the helpers. This wheelchair takes commands from a user and, according to those, it moves in the required direction. A person who is unable to move the chair by hand can move this wheelchair just by giving commands. This is a boon for paralyzed people. Hence, using this chair, the patient can go anywhere independently. Hence, physically disabled people can use this wheelchair easily and live their lives happily.
description: The project presents a smart, voice-controlled, and autonomous wheelchair designed to assist elderly and physically disabled individuals. The system integrates hardware components like Arduino and Raspberry Pi with an Android application to process voice commands, while utilizing various sensors (ultrasonic, IR, RFID, MPU9250) for obstacle detection, line following, and navigation, thereby reducing the need for manual operation or caregiver assistance.
problem_statement: Physically disabled and elderly individuals face significant mobility challenges with manual wheelchairs, including high energy expenditure, reliance on caregivers, physical discomfort (back pain), and the inability to easily transition to a bed, all of which contribute to a loss of independence and quality of life.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an intelligent, motorized wheelchair that operates via voice commands through a smartphone application. It features an embedded control system using Arduino and Raspberry Pi, integrated with sensors for obstacle avoidance, path tracking, and autonomous navigation to provide a safe, independent, and low-cost mobility solution.
objectives: To ease the suffering of disabled and elderly people, provide facilities for those with limited mobility, develop a voice-controlled wheelchair, reduce the burden on caregivers, improve posture stability, prevent injuries, and enable autonomous obstacle avoidance.
ai_summary: This project develops a voice-controlled, autonomous smart wheelchair designed to provide independence to elderly and physically disabled individuals. By integrating an Android-based voice recognition system with an embedded hardware platform featuring obstacle detection and navigation sensors, the wheelchair allows users to move safely without manual effort or caregiver assistance.

student_names: Mostafa Reda Abo El-ghait, Mostafa Hassan Maher, Mahmoud Mohamed Hamed, Mona Samy Sobhy, Mona Abd Ellatef Sayed
technologies: Python, OpenCV, Haar Cascade Classifiers, Arduino, Bluetooth, Servo Motors
keywords: Gesture Control, Robotic Arm, Computer Vision, Human-Computer Interaction, Automation
abstract: The project demonstrates the concept of gesture controls for robotic applications. By utilizing a 6DOF robotic arm controlled by an Arduino board, the system enables users to manipulate robots using human hand gestures, eliminating the need for traditional remotes or expensive sensors. The system detects and tracks hand movements using OpenCV and Haar Cascade Classifiers, transmitting control information to the robotic arm via a Bluetooth connection.
description: This project presents a cost-effective, intuitive method for controlling robotic systems through natural human hand gestures. It integrates computer vision techniques to interpret hand movements in real-time and translates these movements into actionable commands for a 6-degree-of-freedom (6DOF) robotic arm. The system is designed to be modular, allowing the gesture-control interface to be adapted for various other robotic or software applications.
problem_statement: Traditional methods of controlling robots often require complex remote controllers or expensive, specialized sensors, which can be cumbersome and inaccessible for general users.
proposed_solution: A gesture-based control system that uses a standard camera to capture hand movements, processes the video feed using OpenCV and Haar Cascade machine learning classifiers to identify gestures, and sends the resulting coordinates to an Arduino-controlled robotic arm via Bluetooth.
objectives: To develop a convenient and natural way to control robots using hand gestures, to implement a cost-effective gesture recognition system using computer vision, and to establish a reliable communication protocol between a software-based detection system and hardware robotic actuators.
ai_summary: This project implements a gesture-controlled 6DOF robotic arm that uses computer vision to track human hand movements. By leveraging OpenCV and Haar Cascade classifiers, the system translates real-time hand gestures into commands sent via Bluetooth to an Arduino-based controller.

project_title: BUS PLUS: An intelligent Transportation mobile application
student_names: Abdelrahman Alaa Abdelsatar, Abdulhakim Abdulrazak Abdulhakim, Habiba Hesham Elsharkawy, Mazen Shawky Abdelsadek, Nouran Mohamed Saad Eldin, Reem Mohamed Abdelnaby
technologies: GPS, Mobile Application Development, Voice Recognition/Text-to-Speech, Android/iOS SDK
keywords: Intelligent Transportation, Mobile Application, Public Transport, Visually Impaired, GPS Tracking, Voice Interface
abstract: Bus Plus application is an intelligent transportation mobile application that cooperates with government buses. It helps passengers in locating them then by selecting the station they are in and the station they will go to, the application starts to give information about (what the bus number that will pass the same direction is). With those abilities the application can facilitate public transportation for people and blind people. When the user chooses that he is one of the blind people, the application starts to read every single line by voice to make the user fill the required information in an easy manner.
description: Bus Plus is a mobile application designed to modernize public transportation by providing real-time bus tracking and route information. It specifically addresses the needs of the general public and visually impaired users by offering a voice-guided interface to help them identify the correct buses and stations, thereby reducing travel delays and navigation errors.
problem_statement: Public buses often lack reliable schedules and clear stop information, leading to delays and uncertainty for passengers. Additionally, existing transportation applications are not optimized for visually impaired users, who struggle to navigate public transit systems independently.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an intelligent mobile application that utilizes GPS technology to track bus locations in real-time. It allows users to input their current station and destination to receive accurate bus arrival information, with a dedicated voice-command and text-to-speech interface to ensure accessibility for blind users.
objectives: To develop an application that facilitates public transportation for all users, provide real-time bus arrival information, reduce traffic congestion by encouraging public transport use, and create an accessible, voice-enabled interface for visually impaired passengers.
ai_summary: Bus Plus is an intelligent mobile application designed to improve public transportation by providing real-time bus tracking and route information. It features a specialized voice-guided interface to assist visually impaired users in navigating bus routes independently and efficiently.

student_names: Ahmed Adel Mohyeldin Ahmed, Youssef Samir Mohamed Ali, Khaled Ahmed Salah Elbadawy, Elsayed Rady Elsayed Abdelhamid, Youssef Selim Noshi Mohammed, Mai Mossad Ragab Mohamed, Manar Hussein Ahmed Hussein, Aia Abdelrahman Ali Abdelrahman, Hagar Abdelfatah Mohamed
technologies: Machine Learning, Computer Vision, Mobile Application Development, Image Processing, Point-of-Sale (POS) Integration
keywords: Recycling, Sustainability, Object Detection, Rewards System, Mobile App, Environmental Impact, Waste Management
abstract: The proposed supermarket system with integrated recycling capabilities aims to create a sustainable and environmentally friendly shopping experience. The system incorporates innovative features that encourage and facilitate recycling practices among customers while streamlining the supermarket operations. The primary goal of the system is to promote recycling by incentivizing and rewarding customers for their eco-conscious behaviours. It achieves this through the implementation of smart recycling stations strategically placed throughout the supermarket. This application is equipped with computer vision mechanisms that can identify and categorize different recyclable materials such as plastic bottles, cans, and paper. Customers are encouraged to deposit their recyclables at the market, and in return, they receive rewards or recycling points that can be redeemed within the supermarket. The recycling system utilizes a user-friendly interface, guiding customers on the proper disposal of items and providing real-time feedback on the environmental impact of their recycling efforts.
description: Green Market (RE Earth) is a comprehensive supermarket recycling rewards mobile application designed to combat waste mismanagement. By leveraging advanced machine learning and computer vision, the app allows users to scan recyclable items (plastic bottles, cans, paper) via their smartphone camera. The system automatically identifies these items and awards points to the user, which can be redeemed for discounts or purchases within the supermarket, thereby fostering a culture of environmental responsibility and sustainable shopping.
problem_statement: The project addresses the substantial environmental challenge of widespread littering and improper waste disposal of items like plastic bottles, cans, and paper. This mismanagement poses significant threats to public health, marine and terrestrial ecosystems, and contributes to visual pollution, while also representing a missed economic opportunity for resource recovery.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a mobile application that integrates real-time object detection technology to identify and classify recyclable items. The system incentivizes users to recycle by providing a points-based reward mechanism, where points earned through recycling can be redeemed for discounts at the supermarket, thus creating a circular economy model that benefits both the environment and the consumer.
objectives: The project objectives include: 1) Developing a real-time object detection system to accurately classify recyclable materials; 2) Creating an engaging, user-friendly mobile interface to encourage participation; 3) Implementing a robust points-based reward system; 4) Enabling seamless points redemption for supermarket benefits; 5) Ensuring data security and privacy; and 6) Providing customer support and feedback mechanisms to continuously improve the recycling program.
ai_summary: Green Market is a mobile application that uses AI-powered computer vision to identify and categorize recyclable items like plastic bottles and cans. By rewarding users with points for their recycling efforts, the platform incentivizes sustainable behavior and integrates directly with supermarket reward systems to promote environmental responsibility.

student_names: Ali Elsayed Ragab, Manar Abdulrahman Ahmed, Mohab Mustafa Fathy, Mohammed Ehab Hassan, Yomna Mohammed Abdelfatah
supervisor: Dr. Ahmed Hassan, Eng. Mohammed Ibrahim
technologies: Python, SQL, Vulnerability Scanning Frameworks, Network Security Protocols, Threat Intelligence Feeds
keywords: Vulnerability Assessment, Cybersecurity, Network Security, Risk Management, Threat Intelligence, Penetration Testing
abstract: In the rapidly evolving landscape of cybersecurity, organizations face persistent threats and vulnerabilities that pose significant risks to their sensitive information and critical systems. To address these challenges, this graduation project introduces a state-of-the-art Vulnerability Assessment Tool (VAT) designed to provide a comprehensive and efficient approach to identify, analyze, and mitigate potential security weaknesses within an organization's infrastructure. The Vulnerability Assessment Tool project is a strategic initiative aimed at developing a robust software solution to fortify organizational defenses against cyber threats. In an era where digital assets face incessant risks, this project seeks to empower security professionals and IT administrators with an advanced tool capable of proactively identifying, assessing, and prioritizing vulnerabilities within infrastructures.
description: The Vulnerability Assessment Tool (VAT) is a comprehensive software solution developed to automate the identification, analysis, and mitigation of security vulnerabilities within network infrastructures. It features a user-centric interface, an up-to-date vulnerability database, and advanced scanning algorithms to provide actionable insights for security professionals, helping them prioritize risks based on severity.
problem_statement: Manual vulnerability assessment processes are labor-intensive, time-consuming, and prone to human error, leading to gaps in security coverage. Furthermore, the rapidly evolving threat landscape makes it difficult for organizations to keep up with new vulnerabilities, leaving them exposed to potential cyber-attacks.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an automated, user-friendly Vulnerability Assessment Tool that provides real-time intelligence, continuous monitoring, and a prioritized severity assessment system. The tool aims to simplify the scanning process, provide local data storage for privacy, and offer an API for integration with the latest vulnerability databases.
objectives: Develop a user-friendly tool for vulnerability assessment with intuitive interfaces; provide advanced techniques for vulnerability scanning; maintain an up-to-date vulnerability database; offer detailed severity assessment for prioritizing actions; and provide clear procedures for vulnerability mitigation.
ai_summary: This project presents a comprehensive Vulnerability Assessment Tool designed to automate the detection and prioritization of security weaknesses in network infrastructures. By providing a user-friendly interface and real-time threat intelligence, the tool enables organizations to proactively manage risks and strengthen their overall cybersecurity posture.

keywords: Automated guided vehicle, Autonomous parking, Self-driving car, Computer vision, Obstacle avoidance
abstract: This project presents an Automated Guided Vehicle (AGV) system designed to address the challenges of modern driving, specifically focusing on autonomous parking and self-driving capabilities. The system utilizes a combination of laser and ultrasonic sensors for obstacle detection and collision avoidance, alongside computer vision for lane tracking and road sign recognition. By integrating these technologies, the project aims to reduce traffic congestion and improve road safety through intelligent, automated vehicle control.
description: The project focuses on developing a smart vehicle capable of autonomous operation. It is divided into two main phases: an automatic parking system that maneuvers the vehicle into parking spots, and a self-driving system that navigates roads by processing visual data from cameras to control steering and speed. The system is designed to act with human-like intelligence to avoid accidents and optimize driving performance.
problem_statement: Drivers face significant challenges with parking in constrained environments and navigating traffic safely. Existing vehicles lack the intelligence to autonomously handle parking maneuvers, maintain safe distances, or react to sudden obstacles, leading to accidents and traffic congestion.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an Automated Guided Vehicle that integrates hardware sensors (laser and ultrasonic) with software-based image processing. The system enables the car to sense its environment, perform autonomous parallel or perpendicular parking, and adapt its speed and steering based on real-time visual data and obstacle detection to ensure collision-free navigation.
objectives: To develop a reliable autonomous parking system, implement a self-driving mechanism for road navigation, reduce traffic accidents through intelligent obstacle avoidance, and minimize human error in vehicle operation.
ai_summary: This project develops an automated guided vehicle capable of autonomous parking and self-driving navigation. By utilizing Raspberry Pi, laser and ultrasonic sensors, and computer vision, the system can detect obstacles, track lanes, and maneuver safely to reduce traffic congestion and accidents.

abstract: Security Assistant and Guide Robot (SAGR) is an automated machine designed to assist security personnel and guide students/visitors within a college campus. In response to health and safety concerns, the system identifies registered individuals (students, faculty, employees) and alerts security to unregistered persons. Additionally, it provides navigation assistance to various campus locations, reducing congestion and improving building security.
description: The project involves a robotic system equipped with a Raspberry Pi and a touchscreen interface. It utilizes facial recognition technology to verify the identity of people entering the college premises. If an individual is not recognized, the system triggers an alarm for security personnel. Furthermore, the robot acts as a guide, displaying interactive video paths to help visitors and students locate offices, labs, and other facilities.
problem_statement: The college faces challenges with overcrowding at entrances, unauthorized access, and difficulty for visitors and new students in navigating the campus to find specific offices, laboratories, and halls.
proposed_solution: A mobile robotic assistant (SAGR) that integrates facial recognition for automated access control and a GUI-based navigation system to provide visual directions to campus destinations.
objectives: To automate the identification of college personnel, enhance campus security through real-time monitoring, reduce congestion at entry points, and provide an intuitive navigation guide for visitors and students.
ai_summary: This project presents a robotic security assistant that uses facial recognition to identify authorized personnel and alert security to unauthorized visitors. It also features a touchscreen-based navigation system to guide students and visitors to various locations within the college campus.

technologies: Python, TensorFlow, React, Node.js, MongoDB, Flutter, Machine Learning, Computer Vision
keywords: Plant disease detection, AI chatbot, Gardening, Plant care, E-commerce, Agriculture technology
abstract: Our app and website provide a comprehensive solution for plant enthusiasts, addressing the challenges of plant selection, care, and disease detection. With a wide range of plants available for purchase and high-quality fertilizers, users can easily find and nurture their ideal plants. The integration of AI-powered plant disease detection allows for early identification and treatment, ensuring plant health. Furthermore, the chatbot feature offers real-time support and guidance for plant-related inquiries. By combining these features, our platform aims to empower individuals to enjoy the beauty of plants while fostering healthier and more successful gardening experiences.
description: Doctor of Plants is a comprehensive digital platform consisting of a mobile application and a website designed to assist plant enthusiasts. It serves as a one-stop shop for purchasing plants and fertilizers, while also providing advanced digital tools for plant maintenance. The platform features an AI-driven disease detection system that analyzes photos of plants to identify health issues and suggest treatments, alongside an intelligent chatbot that provides real-time gardening advice and support.
problem_statement: Many individuals face challenges when it comes to finding suitable plants for their living spaces or gardens. Additionally, identifying and addressing plant diseases can be a complex task. There is a lack of access to expert advice and a limited availability of a comprehensive platform that integrates plant purchasing, fertilizers, disease detection, and plant-related information.

technologies: Android, Wi-Fi, GPS, Ultrasound Sensor, Temperature Sensor, Joystick, Microcontroller
keywords: IoT, Smart Wheelchair, Healthcare, Assistive Technology, Fall Detection, GPS Tracking
abstract: There are many paralysis patients who suffer from the difficulty of using the chair for the traditional wheelchair, in addition to the fact that many of them also suffer from loneliness and the absence of anyone to care for them, based on that the idea of our project came. This project helps people with paralysis who have no one to look after them either. The wheelchair is moved via a joystick or an Android app that the patient uses to give four way movement commands (left, right, forward, or backward). The patient can also move the chair by voice commands using the same Android app. The wheelchair is equipped with an ultrasound sensor, If the chair falls in any direction, a message will be sent via the sensor to the hospital to obtain a rescue. The Global Positioning System (GPS) is used to send the exact location of an infected patient so that the hospital sends someone to rescue him. The wheelchair also has a sensor to sense the patient's body temperature. All patient data read by the sensors is sent to the hospital in order to send patient rescue when needed.
description: The project is a smart wheelchair designed for people with special needs or paralysis who lack constant supervision. It integrates IoT technology to allow the patient to control movement via a joystick, voice commands, or an Android mobile application. The chair is equipped with safety features including fall detection, GPS location tracking, and body temperature monitoring, all of which transmit data to a hospital or care agency to ensure immediate assistance in emergencies.
problem_statement: Traditional wheelchairs require significant physical effort from the patient and do not provide safety mechanisms for those who are alone. Patients are at risk of falling or experiencing medical emergencies without the ability to alert caregivers or provide their location for rescue.
proposed_solution: An IoT-enabled smart wheelchair that provides motorized movement controlled by the patient, combined with a suite of sensors (ultrasound for fall detection, temperature sensors, and GPS) that automatically communicate with a hospital or emergency service to provide real-time health and location data.
objectives: To assist people with special needs in moving independently, to provide a communication link between the patient and medical/rescue agencies, and to ensure patient safety through automated monitoring of health status and physical orientation.
ai_summary: This project presents an IoT-based smart wheelchair designed to provide mobility and safety for paralyzed or elderly patients. It features multiple control methods, including a mobile app and voice commands, alongside integrated sensors for fall detection, temperature monitoring, and GPS tracking to alert medical services during emergencies.

abstract: Traditional learning systems are often expensive, time-consuming, and limited by physical classroom capacity. This project proposes a distance learning content management system to facilitate remote education, allowing instructors and students to interact in a virtual environment. The system aims to improve time management, reduce physical travel, and provide a flexible, accessible platform for learning and resource management.
description: This project is a comprehensive Content Management System (CMS) specifically designed for distance learning. It provides a centralized platform where instructors can manage course materials and students can access learning resources, search for books in a media library, and engage in a flexible credit-hour study system. The platform is designed to bridge the gap between traditional classroom settings and modern digital learning needs.
problem_statement: Traditional education is hindered by high costs, physical space limitations, and the logistical challenges of requiring students and instructors to be in the same physical location, which is inefficient and time-consuming.
proposed_solution: The development of a robust, web-based distance learning content management system that enables virtual classrooms, digital resource management, and flexible, anytime-anywhere access to educational content.
objectives: To improve flexibility of course delivery, reduce learning costs, link training with Knowledge Management, improve job performance, make learning available anytime and anywhere, and enhance collaboration and interactivity among students.
