student_names: Dina Mohamed Hassan, Hanya Mohamed Abd_Allah, Heba Reda Anter, Hoda arag Abdl-Aleim, Toka Ateif Sayed
technologies: Android, Java, Eclipse, MATLAB, Servlet, Web Services, Google Translate API
keywords: Optical character recognition, mobile application, Android, image processing, text extraction
abstract: In the last years, mobile phones have evolved to devices with high resolution cameras and Internet connection. In this context, the idea of applying OCR techniques to the pictures taken with these devices rises. As result of this idea, we have built mOCRa, the application presented in this work.
description: mOCRa is a mobile application designed to capture images of text using a smartphone camera, process the image to extract text, and provide translation services. The system bridges mobile devices with server-side processing using MATLAB for character recognition and web services for communication, ultimately allowing users to digitize and translate handwritten or printed text.
problem_statement: Users face difficulties in manually entering data into mobile devices due to small keyboard sizes and the inability to easily transfer information from physical sources like posters or personal cards to digital formats. Additionally, there is a need for OCR tools to assist low-vision individuals in daily tasks like reading receipts or traffic signs.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a mobile application that captures high-resolution images of text, sends them to a server for processing via MATLAB-based OCR algorithms, and returns the recognized text to the mobile device. The system also integrates with the Google Translate API to provide language translation for the extracted text.
objectives: To simulate the functionality of a typist by providing an automated tool for converting scanned images to electronic text on mobile devices, to overcome the difficulty of recognizing handwritten paper, and to attract users of all ages by providing a time-saving and efficient data entry solution.
ai_summary: mOCRa is a 2013 Android application that uses mobile camera images to perform Optical Character Recognition (OCR). It leverages MATLAB for text processing and Google APIs for translation, allowing users to digitize and translate printed or handwritten text on the go.

It serves as an educational and diagnostic tool that provides farmers and agricultural engineers with insights into crop care, disease prevention, and the integration of modern technologies like AI, Data Mining, and IoT. description: This project develops a quadcopter-based system designed to assist in emergency medical response, traffic monitoring, and environmental observation. problem_statement: The project addresses three primary issues: the inability of ambulances to reach patients quickly due to traffic congestion, the lack of real-time information for authorities to clear traffic obstacles, and the safety risks faced by scientists and explorers in dangerous natural environments like forests and deserts.

The system includes a web service (PHP/MySQL) for data management and a Pixhawk flight controller on the drone to receive telemetry and movement commands, allowing for remote medical aid delivery, traffic monitoring, and safe environmental observation.

abstract: Egypt is striving and our efforts are focused these days towards digital transformation and the nationalization of all its government facilities, including the higher education sector. With more than 3.4 million university students and up to 644,000 graduates annually, we need smart digital systems that support the educational process and scientific research. Therefore, we have developed a smart library application that takes care of books, recommendations, and user opinions, and provides the appropriate electronic environment for university students to find and nominate appropriate books through an electronic application based on artificial intelligence. Where, using artificial intelligence algorithms, the application will analyze book data and student data together to choose the most appropriate scientific content, in addition to the chatbot is designed to intelligently simulate human conversations. Finally, the smart library provides books to students faster and easier, and encourages them to read and benefit from their information, and the presence of suggestions for similar books will make them not stop reading and expand their horizons, and also the presence of a chatbot will increase the ease of access to books.
description: The Smart Library project is a digital platform designed to modernize university library systems in Egypt. It integrates AI-driven book recommendations, an interactive chatbot for user assistance, social groups for collaborative reading, and a QR-code-based borrowing system to streamline library operations and improve student access to academic resources.
problem_statement: University libraries in Egypt face delays in digital transformation, relying on traditional, non-interactive systems. This leads to inefficient resource usage, difficulty for students in finding relevant academic materials, and a lack of engagement, ultimately hindering the educational process.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an AI-powered smart library application that features a machine learning recommendation engine, an intelligent chatbot for conversational support, social networking features for students, and a QR-code system for automated book borrowing and management.
objectives: To facilitate the digital transformation of university libraries, improve student access to scientific content through personalized recommendations, automate the borrowing process using QR codes, and enhance student engagement through interactive chatbots and social reading groups.

technologies: Flutter, Firebase, Raspberry Pi, MQ2 gas sensor, MQ5 gas sensor, PiCamera, Deep Learning, Python
keywords: Smart Helmet, Mining Safety, IoT, Gas Detection, Health Monitoring, Deep Learning, Worker Safety
abstract: A smart helmet has been developed that is able to detect hazardous events in dangerous workplaces (mines, building sites, etc.) to protect and secure workers. The project focuses on the mining industry, utilizing gas sensors (MQ2 & MQ5) to detect toxic and flammable gases like CO, CO2, CH4, and H2S. The system integrates hardware sensors and a camera with an AI model to monitor environmental conditions and worker health, providing real-time data to a mobile application for immediate safety intervention.
description: The project involves creating an intelligent mining helmet equipped with a wireless sensor network and camera. It monitors the mine environment for hazardous gases, structural instability (cracks), and fire risks, while simultaneously tracking the health status of the miners. Data is processed via an AI model and transmitted to a centralized system, allowing supervisors to monitor conditions via a Flutter-based mobile application and take preventative actions to save lives and reduce economic loss.
problem_statement: Mining is one of the most dangerous industries, characterized by high rates of injury and death. Current safety helmets only provide physical protection against bumps and lack the technology to monitor environmental hazards (toxic gases, fire, structural collapse) or the health status of miners in real-time, leaving workers vulnerable in noisy and hazardous environments.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a smart helmet integrated with IoT sensors and a camera. The system continuously monitors the mine environment for gas leaks, temperature, humidity, and structural cracks. It uses a Raspberry Pi to collect data and images, which are sent to Firebase. An AI model analyzes this data to detect potential dangers, and the results are displayed on a Flutter mobile application for supervisors to monitor and respond to emergencies.
objectives: Reduce and prevent unpredicted mine collapses by detecting wall cracks; prevent fires by detecting coal layers and monitoring flammable gases; monitor miners' health to prevent fatalities; detect toxic gas leaks; and monitor temperature and humidity to prevent equipment damage and environmental hazards.
ai_summary: This project introduces a smart mining helmet equipped with IoT sensors and a camera to monitor environmental hazards like toxic gases and structural instability, as well as the health of the miners. The system uses an AI model to analyze collected data and provides real-time safety alerts to supervisors through a Flutter mobile application.

student_names: Ibrahim Samir El-Tbakh, Ibrahim Ahmed El-Badwy, Ahmed Medhat Serag, Asmaa Ahmed Saeed, Manar Ahmed Mohamed, Hager Mahmoud Maher

abstract: Internet-of-Things (IoT) is the expansion of internet services. Applications of IoT are increasing. Rapid growth in technologies and improvements in architecture comes out many problems that how to manage and control the whole system. We developed a flutter app which consists of all the rooms of the house, at each room there is separated control of each device in addition to sensors of heat and humidity, which increase safety in the house. Every family member can have his own account on the app to have access to all rooms and devices. Security is not a big problem anymore, once you have the whole house in your pocket, you get notifications if there is water leak or increase in heat or even there is smoke.
description: The project is a cross-platform mobile application built with Flutter that allows users to remotely monitor and control smart home appliances and sensors. It provides a centralized interface for managing home devices, ensuring security through user authentication, and enhancing safety by providing real-time notifications for environmental hazards like smoke, heat, or water leaks.
problem_statement: Managing and controlling various household devices and ensuring home security remotely is difficult due to the lack of a unified, user-friendly interface and the complexity of integrating diverse IoT hardware.
proposed_solution: A centralized Flutter-based mobile application that connects to household IoT devices and sensors via standard network protocols, allowing users to monitor and control their home environment from anywhere.
objectives: To provide an easy-to-use interface for remote home automation, enhance home security through sensor integration, enable multi-user access with individual accounts, and provide real-time alerts for safety-critical events.
ai_summary: This project presents a Flutter-based mobile application designed to provide centralized remote control and monitoring for smart home devices. It integrates various IoT sensors to enhance home security and safety, allowing users to manage their home environment and receive real-time alerts directly from their smartphones.

abstract: Our application is about smart camera phone which we will put while the lecturer is explaining lecture. Our application captures photos and compares them with each other, saving the one that has high histogram and uploading them on the faculty website to make students downloading them to save their time in lecture and concentrate during explaining.
description: The Smart Lecture project is a mobile application designed to assist students during lectures by automating the capture and distribution of board content. By using the smartphone camera to take pictures of the board when it is filled with writing, the application processes these images and uploads them to a Firebase database, allowing students to focus on the lecture rather than manual note-taking.
problem_statement: Students struggle to concentrate during lectures because they are preoccupied with writing down notes from the board. Additionally, valuable lecture time is lost when professors pause for students to copy material, and there are often delays in students receiving course materials.
proposed_solution: A mobile application that uses the device camera to automatically capture images of the whiteboard when it is full of content. The system uses image processing (OpenCV) to select the best quality images based on histogram analysis and stores them in a Firebase database for easy student access.
objectives: Help students concentrate during lectures, eliminate the need for manual note-taking, save lecture time, ensure course materials are available at any time, facilitate the educational process, and leverage technology to improve learning outcomes.
ai_summary: The Smart Lecture project is an Android application that automates the capture of whiteboard content during classes to help students focus on the lecture. abstract: The main idea of our project is protecting the laptop from theft or loss by using Raspberry Pi, an Android application, and a web service. Our project not only helps you to protect your laptop but in the worst case (if the laptop has been stolen), you can track it and easily find the laptop's location. In general, you can open the camera for taking photos, but what is important is to control the use of important data by encrypting it until the laptop is recovered or tracked, not only in the case of theft.
description: The Laptop Security Management System is an integrated solution designed to safeguard laptops against theft. It combines hardware (Raspberry Pi) with software (Android app and web service) to provide real-time tracking, remote camera access for surveillance, and data encryption capabilities to protect sensitive information if the device is compromised.
problem_statement: Theft is a persistent criminal behavior, and traditional methods of prevention are often insufficient or lack modern technological integration. Users need a reliable, cost-effective, and easy-to-use system to protect their hardware and sensitive data from unauthorized access or theft.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an innovative embedded system that integrates a Raspberry Pi with a mobile application and web service. This system allows users to monitor their laptop's status, track its physical location, capture images of unauthorized users via a camera, and remotely encrypt sensitive data to prevent unauthorized access.
objectives: To develop a comprehensive security system for laptops that includes real-time tracking, remote surveillance via camera, and data protection through encryption, all managed via a user-friendly mobile application.
ai_summary: This project is an IoT-based security system that protects laptops from theft using a Raspberry Pi, a mobile app, and a web service. It enables users to track their device's location, remotely capture photos of unauthorized users, and encrypt sensitive data to ensure security.

student_names: Abd Elrahman Ashraf Gharib, Maha Fathy Mahrous, Mai Elsayed Salem, Mostafa Ahmed Mahmoud, Mahasen Safwat Elsayed, Mohamed Abbas Mohamed
technologies: Computer Vision, Image Processing, Surveillance Cameras, Alarm Systems, Motion Analysis Algorithms
keywords: Fall Detection, Elderly Care, Computer Vision, Patient Safety, Automated Monitoring, Healthcare Technology
abstract: Hospitals and nursing homes are experiencing a simultaneous increase in injuries due to falls and a decrease in qualified staff hires. More than 16000 elderly patients die because of injuries sustained from falls each year and the severity of the issue is exacerbated by the staff-to patient ratio. Solving the problem involves implementing preventative measures that will minimize incidents leading to injury without necessitating a larger staff. The project used in conjunction with a current product that aims to prevent falls from ever occurring, like the sleep safe bed, can help decrease many of the problems. During hours when there is a smaller on-call staff, such as at night, the patient and the personnel have the option of activating the system to detect falls. Camera is strategically placed, depending on the patient's privacy concerns and desired level of safety, to record movement. A feed of the video is continuously transmitted to the local computer on the network. Where the data is analyzed and processed to determine if a fall has occurred and whether it medical assistance should be sent. The computer can differentiate between different types of movements by looking at certain conditions and if the analyzed activity fulfills the criteria. If help is necessary, an alarm is sent to nurse's station in order to alert staff.
description: This project is a computer vision-based monitoring system designed to detect falls among elderly patients in hospitals or nursing homes. By analyzing video feeds in real-time, the system identifies abnormal movements or sudden changes in orientation that indicate a fall, subsequently triggering an automated alarm to notify medical staff for rapid intervention.
problem_statement: Elderly patients frequently suffer from falls in healthcare settings, leading to severe injuries or death, a situation worsened by high patient-to-staff ratios and limited monitoring capabilities during off-peak hours.
proposed_solution: A computer vision system that continuously monitors patient movement via strategically placed cameras, processes the video data to distinguish between normal activity and falls, and automatically alerts nursing staff when a fall is detected.
objectives: To reduce the mortality and morbidity rates associated with falls in elderly patients, to provide an automated monitoring solution that compensates for limited staff availability, and to ensure rapid response times for medical assistance.
ai_summary: This project implements a computer vision-based fall detection system for elderly patients in healthcare facilities. It uses camera feeds to monitor patient movement and automatically alerts nursing staff when a fall is detected, helping to improve patient safety and reduce response times.

abstract: This project presents an information system designed for companies that rely on the sale and distribution of products through a team of delegates. The system facilitates communication in medical sales operations, making them more flexible, efficient, and secure. It includes a web-based platform for management and customers, and an Android application for delegates to manage orders, track deliveries, and report on customer interactions.
description: The Medical Rep system is a comprehensive solution for managing medical sales operations. It replaces traditional paper-based records and manual processes with an integrated digital platform. The system connects managers, customers, and field delegates through a centralized database, allowing for real-time updates on product availability, order status, and sales performance.
problem_statement: Traditional methods of medical sales rely on paper records and manual invoices, leading to difficulties in data storage, transport, and tracking. Companies struggle with managing delegate locations, maintaining consistent pricing, tracking sales targets, and monitoring inventory in real-time.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated system consisting of a web application for managers and customers, and an Android mobile application for field delegates. The system uses a centralized database connected via web services to ensure that all stakeholders have access to accurate, real-time information regarding orders, product pricing, and delegate performance.
objectives: To digitize the medical sales process, improve communication between delegates and management, ensure accurate tracking of sales and inventory, facilitate efficient order management for customers, and provide managers with detailed reports on sales, returns, and tax information.
ai_summary: The Medical Rep project is an integrated information system that digitizes the medical sales and distribution process. It features a web platform for management and customers alongside an Android app for field delegates to streamline order tracking, inventory management, and sales reporting.

student_names: Ahmed Nabil, Ahmed Salah, Karam Azab, Mohammed Megahed, Mohammed Salman, Salem Salama
technologies: Web Crawler, Search Algorithm, Information Retrieval Systems, Database Management
keywords: Search Engine, Web Crawler, Information Retrieval, SERPs, Content-based Ranking
abstract: A web search engine is designed to search for information on the World Wide Web. The search results are generally presented in a list of results often referred to as search engine results pages (SERPs). The information may consist of web pages, images, information and other types of files. Some search engines also mine data available in databases or open directories. Unlike web directories, which are maintained only by human editors, search engines also maintain real-time information by running an algorithm on a web crawler. This significance of search engine was the main motivation for our team to try to implement a Search Engine That helps users to find what they search for Easily, Quickly and satisfy their Needs. The implemented search engine ranks results based on term - content relevance.
description: This project involves the development of a custom web-based search engine. The system is designed to crawl the web, index information, and provide users with relevant search results. Unlike systems that rely heavily on link analysis, this project focuses on content-based ranking to improve the efficiency and relevance of search results for the end-user.
problem_statement: Web search is one of the main and basic activities of almost every computer user. Users are in constant need of a system that helps them reach their targets as fast as possible. Many existing search engines rely on link analysis and global page importance, which may not always be the most efficient method for content-based relevance.
proposed_solution: The team developed a web-based search engine that utilizes a web crawler to gather data and implements a ranking algorithm based on term-content relevance to ensure users find information easily and quickly.
objectives: Survey information retrieval systems and study web-based search engines; Implement a search engine that combines ease of use and satisfies user's needs.
ai_summary: This project focuses on the development of a custom web-based search engine designed to improve information retrieval. By utilizing a web crawler and a content-based ranking algorithm, the system aims to provide users with faster and more relevant search results.

project_title: Expert System for identifying and diagnosing Plants
student_names: Ahmed Hatem Abd Elsamie, Ahmed Reda Mousa, Ahmed Mohamed Ahmed Abd ElMoaty, Aml Salah Hussine, Samar Mohamed Mahmoud Sallam, Mostafa Ashraf Fathy Elbayomi
supervisor: DR. Alaa Eldin Abdullah Yassin, Eng. Amany Saied
technologies: Python, TensorFlow, Keras, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Machine Learning, Image Processing
keywords: Expert System, Plant Identification, Plant Disease Diagnosis, Convolutional Neural Networks, Botany, Agriculture
abstract: The main objective of this project is to create a robust and user-friendly platform that assists botanists, researchers, and enthusiasts in their endeavors to identify various plant species and diagnose diseases affecting plants. The proposed system incorporates a vast knowledge base of plant taxonomy and pathology, ensuring accurate and reliable results. To achieve the project's goals, an extensive dataset of plant images and associated metadata will be collected from diverse botanical sources and databases. The dataset will undergo meticulous preprocessing, including image augmentation and feature extraction, to extract meaningful and discriminative features that represent the unique characteristics of different plant species. The implementation of the Expert System will involve the utilization of state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms, such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs), to train a model capable of classifying plants based on their visual attributes.
description: This project develops an expert system designed to identify plant species and diagnose plant diseases. By leveraging machine learning techniques, specifically Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), the system allows users to upload images of plants to receive identification and health status information. It serves as a valuable tool for hobby gardeners, professional landscapers, and researchers by providing automated, accurate, and accessible botanical analysis.
problem_statement: Users often struggle to identify plant species or diagnose plant diseases accurately. Existing methods require manual research or expert consultation, which can be time-consuming and inaccessible to the general public or amateur gardeners.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an automated expert system that uses computer vision and deep learning (CNNs) to identify plants and detect diseases from user-uploaded images. The system provides detailed information about plant species, cultivation conditions, and disease treatment options.
objectives: To create a search engine that allows users to quickly find plants, identify plant species from images, detect plant diseases, and provide detailed information about plant care and pathology to support informed decision-making.
ai_summary: This project implements an AI-powered expert system that identifies plant species and diagnoses plant diseases using Convolutional Neural Networks. By allowing users to upload images, the platform provides automated, accurate botanical insights to assist gardeners and researchers in plant care and management.

project_title: E-learning System with Automated Arabic Essay Questions Grading
student_names: Abdulwahab Mohammed Ahmed, Abdullah Mohammed Abd El-Moamen, Abdullah Hassan Hussein, Sara Atef Ibrahim, Zeinab Yasser Mohammed, Rowayda Adel Elsayed, Doaa Ali Elsayed
supervisor: Dr. Mustafa Abdul-Salam, Dr. Ahmed El-Sawy
technologies: Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Character-based n-gram, Word Embeddings, Manhattan LSTM, Support Vector Regression, WordNet, Latent Semantic Analysis, Android, Web Technologies
keywords: Automated Grading, Semantic Textual Similarity, Arabic NLP, E-learning, Essay Questions, Machine Learning
abstract: Automatic grading for exams is very essential with the increasing number of students and the increasing need for saving the time and effort of human graders. While there are some kinds of questions that can be easily graded by the machine (such as multiple-choice questions MCQ), essay questions are still very difficult for the machine to grade because they require high level of natural language understanding. In order to tackle this problem, we have to find a way to make the machine able to predict the semantic similarity between the student answer and the model answer, and assign the marks based on this similarity. This can be done by using the power of machine learning and natural language processing. In this project we propose a hybrid model that can estimate the semantic similarity between two pieces of text. The hybrid model is based on character-based n-gram similarity, word embeddings, Manhattan LSTM, and support vector regression. We also test other models based on WordNet and Latent Semantic Analysis. Our model achieves comparable results on both STS Benchmark dataset and SemEval-2017 Task 1 dataset for semantic textual similarity evaluation. Finally, we integrate this model into a complete e-learning system including a website and an android app.
description: This project develops a comprehensive e-learning platform that incorporates an automated grading system for Arabic essay questions. By utilizing advanced machine learning and NLP techniques, the system evaluates the semantic similarity between student responses and model answers, providing instant feedback and reducing the burden on human instructors.
problem_statement: Short essay questions are difficult for machines to grade because they require natural language understanding. Current systems rely on keyword matching, which is unfair to students who express correct answers using different vocabulary, and there is a lack of reliable automated grading systems specifically for the Arabic language.
proposed_solution: A hybrid machine learning model that estimates semantic similarity between student answers and model answers using character-based n-grams, word embeddings, Manhattan LSTM, and support vector regression, integrated into a web and Android-based e-learning platform.
objectives: To automate the grading of open-ended essay questions, reduce the time and effort required by human graders, provide instant feedback to students, and improve the accuracy of automated assessment for the Arabic language.
ai_summary: This project introduces an automated e-learning grading system that uses machine learning and natural language processing to evaluate Arabic essay questions based on semantic similarity. By comparing student answers to model answers using a hybrid model, the system provides efficient, instant, and fair grading for educational assessments.

keywords: Virtual Reality, Pain Management, Chemotherapy, Distraction Therapy, Healthcare, Gaming
abstract: Our idea is to design and develop a virtual reality application that aims to help children with cancer control their pain during chemotherapy session, and not feeling long in the session. Our virtual reality application takes the patient from a real world to a virtual world using two level of the game. Our virtual reality application is divided into two levels; in the 1st level the patient use a gun to shot specific dinosaur that have a color and size which will be determined for him at the beginning of the game. The patient must shot all specific dinosaurs to win this level and be able to go to the next level. But in case of lose he should repeat this level again. In the 2nd level the patient use a gun to shot a specific dinosaur, but in this level the dinosaurs attack the patient and a certain number must be killed to win the game.
description: This project is a VR-based therapeutic game designed to distract pediatric cancer patients during chemotherapy sessions. By immersing the child in a 3D interactive environment, the application aims to reduce the perception of pain and anxiety associated with medical treatments, providing a non-pharmacological method for pain management.
problem_statement: Children undergoing chemotherapy experience severe pain and emotional distress. Traditional methods of pain management, such as medication, often have side effects and lose effectiveness over time. Passive distractions like watching movies are often insufficient because they do not fully immerse the child or separate them from their immediate clinical environment.
proposed_solution: A VR application that provides an immersive, interactive gaming experience. The game uses two distinct levels—one focused on target identification and another on defensive gameplay—to engage the child's senses and divert their attention away from the painful medical procedure.
objectives: To use virtual reality technology to help cancer patients manage their pain during chemotherapy sessions by diverting their attention away from the painful procedure, and to create an immersive 3D environment that acts as a gatekeeper to an artificial world, reducing the need for pain medication.
ai_summary: This project utilizes Virtual Reality to create an immersive gaming experience designed to distract pediatric cancer patients from the pain and anxiety of chemotherapy sessions. By engaging children in interactive 3D environments, the application serves as a non-pharmacological tool to improve the patient's experience during treatment.

student_names: Aalaa Ahmed Elsayed, Aya Essam EL-Dien Abd Allah, Omnia Alaa Elsayed, Atef Gamal Atef, Mostafa Borham, Taha Hussien
technologies: Arduino, Bluetooth, Android, GPS, Cloud Server
keywords: Healthcare, Wearable, IoT, Patient Monitoring, Heart Attack Detection, Sensors
abstract: The world today isn't the one which it was yesterday. With the continuing evolution in technology and technological applications on medical field, innovative products and services have been emerging every day. Wearable gadgets have risen up as revolution in the medical field for patient care. A number of tech giants are pouring into this segment; wearables have already shown an impact on various fields such as communication and navigation; but perhaps the greatest potential lies in healthcare. Since our society is rapidly aging, there exists an urgent need to shift from passive medical care to preventive medicine and health management, to improve individuals' quality of life and reduce medical expenses. At the same time, rapid advances in micro-machine and LSI technologies with revolutionary advances in wireless information and communication technology have enabled development of wearable sensing systems for healthcare monitoring in daily life. We have been developing our project on the basis of wearable sensors for services to counter lifestyle diseases.
description: In this system, a patient carries hardware equipped with sensors to monitor body temperature and heart rate. This data is transmitted via Bluetooth to an Android smartphone application, which then sends the information to a cloud server. The system includes an automated detection mechanism for heart attack symptoms; if abnormalities are detected, the application sends an SMS alert containing the patient's status and GPS location to their doctor and relatives.
problem_statement: The healthcare environment is increasingly technology-oriented, yet patients still face the risk of unexpected death due to heart attacks, often caused by a lack of timely medical intervention and the difficulty of maintaining regular doctor checkups.
proposed_solution: A wearable health monitoring system that uses sensors to track vital signs in real-time, transmits data to a smartphone and cloud server, and provides automated emergency alerts to medical professionals and family members when critical health abnormalities are detected.
objectives: To provide accessible healthcare monitoring for people in remote areas, reduce sudden death rates by enabling continuous body health monitoring, and improve communication between doctors and patients by allowing for real-time health tracking and remote checkups.
ai_summary: This project is a wearable IoT-based healthcare monitoring system that tracks a patient's heart rate and body temperature. It uses an Android application and cloud integration to detect health emergencies and automatically notify doctors and relatives via SMS with the patient's location.
full_content: Healthcare wearable device. Healthcare wearable device. The world today isn't the one which it was yesterday. With the continuing evolution in technology and technological applications on medical field, innovative products and services have been emerging every day. Wearable gadgets have risen up as revolution in the medical field for patient care. A number of tech giants are pouring into this segment; wearables have already shown an impact on various fields such as communication and navigation; but perhaps the greatest potential lies in healthcare. Since our society is rapidly aging, there exists an urgent need to shift from passive medical care to preventive medicine and health management, to improve individuals' quality of life and reduce medical expenses. At the same time, rapid advances in micro-machine and LSI technologies with revolutionary advances in wireless information and communication technology have enabled development of wearable sensing systems for healthcare monitoring in daily life. We have been developing our project on the basis of wearable sensors for services to counter lifestyle diseases.. In this system, a patient carries hardware equipped with sensors to monitor body temperature and heart rate. This data is transmitted via Bluetooth to an Android smartphone application, which then sends the information to a cloud server. The system includes an automated detection mechanism for heart attack symptoms; if abnormalities are detected, the application sends an SMS alert containing the patient's status and GPS location to their doctor and relatives.

project_title: Explore Egypt: An Intelligent Mobile Tour Guide Application
student_names: Not specified
technologies: Mobile Application Development, Computer Vision, Image Recognition, Chatbot, OCR
keywords: Tourism, Egyptian Civilization, Mobile Application, Image Recognition, Chatbot, Tour Guide, Cultural Heritage
abstract: The Egyptian government has made a lot of efforts to develop tourism and spread awareness of Egyptian civilization in the world by building projects like renovating museums and building new museums, such as the Grand Egyptian Museum. During the past five years, the General Administration of Recovered Antiquities has been able to recover 29 thousand artifacts. We have decided to participate in these efforts and to help spread awareness of the Egyptian identity in the world in an advanced way that keeps pace with the technological progress that the world is witnessing by linking the ancient Egyptian civilization with technology and also to keep up with the requirements of the times and the trends, especially with the spread of the phenomenon of travel bloggers and the presence of many people who like to rely on themselves and travel alone.
description: Explore Egypt is a mobile application designed to act as an intelligent, self-service tour guide for tourists visiting Egypt. The application leverages image recognition technology to allow users to scan statues, artifacts, or historical sites to receive detailed historical information. It also includes a chatbot feature to answer tourist questions and provides practical information such as local product pricing to prevent tourist exploitation.
problem_statement: Tourists in Egypt often face misconceptions about the country's history and identity, harassment, and fraud due to a lack of reliable information. Additionally, relying on human tour guides can sometimes be expensive, intrusive, or lead to exploitation regarding pricing and information accuracy.
proposed_solution: A mobile application that serves as an electronic tour guide. It features an image scanning function that identifies historical items and provides accurate historical context, a chatbot for real-time assistance, and a database of information to help tourists navigate Egypt independently, safely, and affordably.
objectives: To provide accurate and complete information about Egyptian history, eliminate the need for potentially unreliable human tour guides, protect tourists from financial exploitation by providing fair pricing information, and save tourists time by offering instant access to historical data.
ai_summary: Explore Egypt is a mobile application that serves as an intelligent, self-guided tour assistant for tourists visiting Egypt. By using image recognition to identify historical sites and artifacts, the app provides accurate historical information and includes a chatbot to help users navigate their trip safely and avoid common tourist scams.

abstract: The Antivirus Project is a comprehensive cybersecurity solution meticulously crafted to ensure users enjoy seamless interaction while being shielded against a multitude of malware threats. Utilizing advanced techniques such as signature-based detection, behavioural analysis, and real-time scanning, the system adeptly identifies and neutralizes potential threats. Beyond traditional scanning of files and URLs, the project boasts sophisticated features like file encryption and decryption, fostering a secure environment for data management. The integration of a user-friendly chatbot elevates the user experience by promptly addressing queries and providing valuable insights. We are committed to prioritizing the implementation of a sexual content blocker and a password manager within the project timeline, with a contingency plan to address them in the future if necessary. This strategic approach fortifies the user's digital defence, encouraging a proactive stance toward online security. In essence, the Antivirus Project not only safeguards user devices but also empowers users with knowledge to enhance their own cybersecurity.
description: BugsBunny is a desktop-based antivirus application designed to provide comprehensive protection against malware. It combines signature-based, behavior-based, and heuristic analysis to detect threats. The application includes a sandbox environment for analyzing suspicious files, file encryption/decryption tools, and an integrated chatbot for user support and security guidance. It is designed with a user-friendly interface, specifically targeting the Arabic-speaking region.
problem_statement: The persistent threat posed by malware to computer systems, networks, and data, which can lead to compromised system integrity, unauthorized access, data breaches, financial losses, and operational downtime.
proposed_solution: A robust, user-friendly desktop antivirus application named 'BugsBunny' that utilizes multi-layered detection (signature, behavior, heuristic), real-time monitoring, sandbox analysis, and additional security features like file encryption and a support chatbot.
objectives: To develop a robust antivirus desktop application with advanced detection capabilities, real-time protection, sandbox integration, file encryption, and chatbot support; to ensure the application is user-friendly, efficient, and compatible with Windows, macOS, and Linux; and to achieve high detection rates with minimal false positives.

abstract: The Civil Assistance System During Emergencies is designed to address the challenges faced by individuals and communities during crises. By integrating wearable devices, AI models, data transmission, and real-time communication systems, the project ensures quick responses in emergency situations. The system provides vital information, monitors health indicators, tracks emergency cases, and offers immediate alerts to enhance safety and support decision-making. It aims to create a more resilient society by providing governmental foundations and civilians with immediate access to safety information, emergency services, and humanitarian aid through a mobile application, wearable device, AI-based heat map, and dashboard.
description: The Civil Assistance System is a comprehensive, integrated platform designed to bridge the gap between individuals in distress and emergency responders. It utilizes a wearable device for real-time health and location tracking, a mobile application for civilians to report emergencies and receive safety guidance, and a web-based dashboard for administrators and government authorities to manage resources, track incidents, and distribute humanitarian aid effectively.
problem_statement: Traditional emergency response mechanisms are often reactive, relying on manual distress calls, which leads to slow response times, lack of real-time data, and inefficient coordination of humanitarian aid. This leaves individuals vulnerable during natural disasters, medical emergencies, or other crises.
proposed_solution: A proactive, integrated system consisting of a wearable device for continuous health and location monitoring, a mobile application for real-time alerts and emergency reporting, and an AI-powered administrative dashboard for efficient resource management and decision-making.
objectives: To enable remote health and location monitoring, support elderly care and patient tracking, integrate IoT technologies into real-time healthcare use cases, reduce emergency response times, and improve the efficiency of humanitarian aid distribution.
ai_summary: The Civil Assistance System is an integrated IoT and mobile platform that provides real-time health monitoring and emergency reporting to improve crisis response. It uses wearable sensors to track vital signs and location, while providing authorities with an AI-powered dashboard to manage resources and aid distribution effectively.

abstract: The Double Helix Detective is an integrated system designed to address challenges in paternity testing, missing persons identification, and forensic science. By leveraging DNA analysis, machine learning algorithms, and a secure, user-friendly interface, the system provides a robust platform for DNA matching and data management. It aims to overcome current limitations in accuracy and efficiency by fostering collaboration and secure data sharing among relevant entities, ultimately assisting in family reunification and criminal investigations.
description: This project is a comprehensive DNA testing and analysis system that serves as a central database for genetic information. It utilizes machine learning to enhance the accuracy of DNA matching and provides a secure environment for storing and processing sensitive genetic data. The system is designed to assist forensic departments and researchers in identifying individuals, solving criminal cases, and reuniting families through advanced computational biology techniques.
problem_statement: There is a lack of a centralized, secure database for DNA analysis to assist in identifying missing persons, solving crimes, and conducting paternity testing. Current methods face challenges in accuracy, efficiency, and the secure handling of sensitive genetic information, making it difficult for forensic departments to process cases effectively.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated web-based system that uses machine learning and bioinformatics tools (like Biopython) to automate and improve the accuracy of DNA sequence alignment and matching. It provides a secure platform for collecting and managing DNA data, facilitating faster identification processes for forensic evidence and family reunification.
objectives: To implement robust privacy and ethical guidelines for genetic data, contribute to genomic research, provide a secure DNA database, conduct public awareness campaigns, and establish protocols for reuniting individuals with their relatives through DNA matching.
ai_summary: The Double Helix Detective is a bioinformatics platform that uses machine learning and DNA analysis to assist in forensic investigations and family reunification. It provides a secure, centralized system for DNA matching and sequence alignment to improve the accuracy and speed of identifying missing persons and solving criminal cases.

student_names: Ahmed Mamdoh Fadl, Emary Aymen Mohamed, Mohamed Abdalgafar Salem, Mohamed Adel Mahmoud Ghobara, Mahmoud Abdelwahid Elsayed Elkolaly, Mahmoud Mohamed Wafik Kharboush
technologies: React Native, JavaScript, Android, iOS
keywords: E-Wallet, Mobile Payment, QR Code, Digital Transactions, Fintech
abstract: The current advancements in information technology and communications have brought about significant changes in the business world. These developments have created an opportunity for the widespread acceptance of mobile payments. To understand the potential of this trend, we conducted a statistical survey to gauge the number of people using electronic payment methods and making purchases online. During our research, we discovered a couple of factors that hindered the adoption of electronic payment methods. First, small shops often faced challenges in providing electronic payment options due to various reasons such as cost, technical infrastructure, or lack of knowledge. Second, individuals expressed concerns about the security of their personal data, particularly when it came to their bank and visa information. These fears surrounding data theft or privacy breaches acted as a barrier to the adoption of electronic payment methods. To address these challenges and promote the usage of mobile payments, we developed a mobile application. This app serves as a platform for users to easily transfer money between each other. It is available for both Android and iOS devices, ensuring compatibility with the majority of smartphones. The primary purpose of this mobile app is to facilitate payment transactions in various scenarios. It can be used in commercial settings, allowing businesses to accept payments conveniently. Additionally, it provides a means for family members to transfer funds to each other, supports individuals in need, and enables easy donations. One of the key features of the app is the 'Just Scan to Pay' functionality. Users can make payments by scanning QR codes, using payment links, providing an order ID, or specifying a user ID. This ensures a seamless and secure transaction experience by offering these capabilities, the mobile app caters to a wide range of users, including online merchants, market sellers, shops, family members, workers, and freelancers. It addresses the needs of both individuals and businesses, making it a versatile and valuable tool in the evolving landscape of mobile payments.
description: The E-Wallet project is a mobile application designed to facilitate secure and convenient financial transactions for individuals and small businesses. It supports various payment methods, including QR code scanning, payment links, and user IDs, aiming to bridge the gap between traditional cash-based transactions and modern digital payment systems.
problem_statement: Small businesses face high costs and infrastructure barriers to accepting digital payments, while individuals have concerns regarding the security of their financial data and the lack of trust in online transactions. Additionally, there is a need for a more efficient way to handle daily expenses and transfers without relying solely on physical cash or bank cards.
proposed_solution: A cross-platform mobile application (Android and iOS) that provides a 'Just Scan to Pay' feature. The app integrates with payment gateways to support bank cards and mobile wallets, allowing for secure, on-the-spot transactions via QR codes, links, or IDs, thereby eliminating the need for expensive point-of-sale hardware.
objectives: To facilitate seamless money transfers between users, provide a cost-effective payment solution for small businesses, enhance transaction security through digital encryption, and reduce the reliance on physical cash and traditional payment machines.
ai_summary: The E-Wallet project is a mobile application developed using React Native that enables secure, contactless digital payments for individuals and small businesses. It features a 'Scan to Pay' system that supports QR codes and various payment gateways to simplify financial transactions and reduce reliance on physical cash.

project_title: Endpoint Security: Effective Protection Against Cyber Threats
student_names: Ahmed Osama Ahmed, Abdelhamid Ahmed Abdelhamid, Islam Essam Saeed, Esraa Essam Abdullatif, Mariam Mohamed Abdullah, Mohamed Mohamed Abdelkader, Marina Ramzy Shabib
supervisor: Dr. Ahmed Shalaby, Eng. Ahmed Yousry
technologies: HIDS (Host-based Intrusion Detection Systems), Malware Detection tools, API, OTX AlienVault, YARA rules
keywords: Endpoint Security, Cybersecurity, HIDS, Malware Detection, Threat Intelligence, OTX AlienVault, YARA, Network Security
abstract: Endpoint Security project presents a comprehensive Cybersecurity platform for managing Endpoints Security through three interconnected components: client-side protection, centralized management, and threat intelligence integration. The client component includes Host-based Intrusion Detection Systems (HIDS) and Malware Detection tools, which provide robust security measures directly on the endpoints. These systems monitor and analyze activities to detect suspicious behaviour and potential malware infections in real-time. The CenterPoint component functions as an API that manages all endpoints. It serves as the core of the system, overseeing and coordinating security policies, rules, and updates across the network. This centralized management ensures consistent security measures and facilitates streamlined control over multiple endpoints. The threat intelligence component focuses on fetching Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) from OTX AlienVault. This integration allows the system to stay updated with the latest threat intelligence, including IP addresses, URLs, file hashes, and YARA rules, enhancing its ability to detect and respond to emerging threats.
description: This project is a comprehensive web-based cybersecurity platform designed to secure network endpoints. It integrates real-time monitoring, centralized policy management, and automated threat intelligence to protect devices from malware, ransomware, and unauthorized network activities.
problem_statement: Organizations are highly vulnerable to cyber-attacks, such as spear phishing and malware, which can bypass human awareness and cause significant financial and data loss. Relying solely on manual security or employee education is insufficient, necessitating an automated, robust endpoint security solution.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a three-tiered security architecture: a client-side agent for HIDS and malware detection, a centralized API (CenterPoint) for policy management, and a threat intelligence module that integrates with OTX AlienVault to provide real-time updates on emerging threats using IOCs and YARA rules.
objectives: To develop a centralized management system for endpoints, implement real-time host-based intrusion detection, automate the integration of global threat intelligence, and provide a unified interface for consistent security policy enforcement.
ai_summary: This project provides a comprehensive cybersecurity platform that secures network endpoints through real-time malware detection and host-based intrusion monitoring. It features a centralized API for policy management and integrates with OTX AlienVault to automatically update security rules against the latest cyber threats.

abstract: Tourism is a vital source of income for Egypt, yet it has faced significant challenges due to political events and the COVID-19 pandemic. This project introduces a comprehensive web application designed to showcase Egyptian civilization, natural resources, and tourist monuments. The platform provides tourists with information on destinations, hotel services, and includes an interactive AI chatbot to answer queries and assist in planning customized trips based on user budget and time constraints.
description: The Tourism Web Application is a centralized platform for tourists visiting Egypt. It aggregates data on hotels, restaurants, museums, beaches, and archaeological sites, eliminating the need for users to navigate multiple websites. The system features an AI-driven chatbot for real-time assistance and a trip-planning engine that suggests itineraries based on specific user inputs such as destination, budget, and duration of stay.
problem_statement: Tourists often struggle with fragmented information when planning trips, leading to time-consuming searches across multiple platforms. Poor representation of services and lack of centralized, reliable data can result in negative impressions of tourist destinations, potentially discouraging travel.
proposed_solution: A unified web application that consolidates tourism data, including hotels, landmarks, and local services. The solution incorporates an AI chatbot to provide interactive, personalized support and a trip-planning feature that generates travel suggestions based on user-defined constraints like budget and time.
objectives: To provide a comprehensive digital guide for tourists in Egypt, improve the accessibility of information regarding tourist services, enhance user experience through an interactive AI chatbot, and assist tourists in planning cost-effective and time-efficient trips.
ai_summary: This project is a web-based tourism platform for Egypt that consolidates travel information and services into a single interface. It features an AI-powered chatbot to answer tourist questions and a trip-planning tool that generates personalized itineraries based on user budget and time preferences.

keywords: Ophthalmology, Retinal Imaging, AI-powered Diagnostics, Mobile Health, Telemedicine, Patient Management, 20D Lens, Computer Vision
abstract: The increasing prevalence of retinal diseases, color blindness, nearsightedness, and farsightedness underscore the critical need for innovative solutions that enhance diagnostic accuracy and streamline patient care in the field of ophthalmology. Our project presents a groundbreaking approach, integrating cutting-edge technology to empower healthcare professionals and improve patient outcomes. The core of our initiative lies in a mobile application designed for both iOS and Android platforms. Leveraging the capabilities of modern smartphones, our application seamlessly integrates a 20D lens attachment to the device's camera. This novel combination enables users to capture high-resolution retinal images, facilitating the early detection and diagnosis of various ophthalmic conditions. The captured images are processed through a sophisticated AI-powered diagnostic system, providing healthcare practitioners with valuable insights to support their clinical decision-making process. In addition to retinal disease diagnosis, our system extends its functionality to assess color vision deficiencies, nearsightedness, and farsightedness. Through a user-friendly interface, individuals can easily perform self-assessments, fostering early awareness and proactive management of visual impairments. Complementing the mobile application is a robust web platform tailored to the specific needs of healthcare providers. The platform facilitates seamless appointment scheduling, allowing both doctors and patients to manage their engagements efficiently. Doctors can access a centralized database for patient records, enabling them to monitor and analyze longitudinal data, leading to more informed treatment plans. Patients, on the other hand, benefit from a user-centric web interface, empowering them to book appointments, access their medical records, and receive personalized health insights. The secure and user-friendly design ensures a smooth and engaging experience for individuals seeking eye care services.
description: The Smart Assistant for Ophthalmologist is an integrated healthcare solution combining a mobile application and a web platform. The mobile app uses a 20D lens attachment with smartphone cameras to capture retinal images, which are then analyzed by AI algorithms for disease detection. The web platform serves as a management system for doctors to handle appointments, patient records, and longitudinal data analysis, while providing patients with a portal for booking and health tracking.
problem_statement: Traditional ophthalmic diagnostic methods are often expensive, stationary, and inaccessible, leading to challenges in early detection and management of eye conditions. There is a lack of portable, cost-effective tools for high-resolution retinal imaging and a need for better integration between patient-doctor interactions and diagnostic workflows.
proposed_solution: A dual-platform system: a mobile application that utilizes a 20D lens for portable, high-resolution retinal imaging processed by AI for immediate diagnosis, and a web-based management system to streamline appointment scheduling, patient record keeping, and communication between patients and eye care professionals.
objectives: To enhance accessibility to ocular care, facilitate early detection of ocular conditions through AI, streamline patient-doctor interactions, empower patients with self-assessment tools, and provide a cost-effective alternative to traditional diagnostic equipment.
ai_summary: This project provides an integrated AI-powered diagnostic tool for ophthalmology that uses a smartphone-based 20D lens system to capture and analyze retinal images. It includes a web platform for efficient appointment scheduling and patient record management, aiming to make eye care more accessible, affordable, and proactive.

keywords: Student Portal, Faculty Information System, Web Application, Academic Management, Information Retrieval
abstract: The BFCI Student Portal is designed to provide the latest news and information for stakeholders at the Faculty of Computers and Informatics (BFCI), Benha University, including professors, students, administration, and student affairs. The system addresses the challenges students face in accessing faculty news, schedules, event times, and academic results, which were previously only available via physical boards. By providing a centralized, accessible web portal, the system ensures efficient information flow, saves students time and effort, and serves as a convenient channel for announcements and academic materials.
description: The BFCI Student Portal is a web-based information system developed to bridge the communication gap between the faculty administration, professors, and students. It acts as a centralized hub where administrators can manage users, professors can upload materials and create posts, and student affairs can publish schedules and results. The platform is designed to be accessible anytime and anywhere, providing a modern, digital alternative to traditional physical notice boards.
problem_statement: Students frequently struggle to access critical faculty information such as lecture schedules, exam results, event announcements, and summer training details. The reliance on physical notice boards is inefficient, especially for students living far from the faculty, and often leads to missed opportunities or lack of awareness regarding important academic updates.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a web-based portal that serves as a centralized, digital communication channel. It allows for role-based access for admins, professors, students, and student affairs, enabling the real-time dissemination of news, schedules, and academic materials, thereby streamlining information flow and improving accessibility for all stakeholders.
objectives: To efficiently manage faculty information, provide 24/7 access to academic news and schedules, support prospective students with relevant information, facilitate communication between lecturers and students, and provide a platform for students to submit assignments online.
ai_summary: The BFCI Student Portal is a web-based platform developed for Benha University to centralize the distribution of academic news, schedules, and results. It replaces traditional physical notice boards with a digital system that allows administrators, professors, and students to interact, share materials, and stay updated efficiently.

keywords: Online Election, E-voting, Web-based System, Candidate Information, Secure Voting
abstract: Elections are the official process for choosing a person to hold an official position, and their success depends on citizen participation. This project aims to solve obstacles in traditional paper-based voting, such as overcrowding at polling stations, the risk of virus transmission (e.g., COVID-19), and potential electoral fraud. By transitioning to an electronic system via the Internet, the project facilitates access to candidate information, reduces the time and effort required for citizens to vote, and ensures a more secure and efficient electoral process.
description: The Online Election project is a web-based platform designed to digitize the voting process for student and senate elections. It provides a centralized portal where users can view candidate profiles, including their curriculum vitae and electoral symbols, and cast their votes securely. The system incorporates user verification via mobile codes and provides real-time election results, aiming to modernize the voting experience while maintaining transparency and accessibility.
problem_statement: Traditional paper-based elections suffer from several issues: overcrowding at polling stations, difficulty in locating voting centers, increased risk of spreading viruses, susceptibility to electoral fraud, significant time consumption, and a lack of accessible information regarding candidates.
proposed_solution: A secure, web-based electronic voting system that allows users to vote remotely from any internet-connected device. The system includes features for candidate information display, user identity verification via mobile SMS codes, secure data collection, and automated result calculation to ensure accuracy and efficiency.
objectives: To provide an easy-to-use, secure, and accessible platform for elections that eliminates the need for physical paperwork. Key goals include saving time, reducing the number of required workers, providing comprehensive information about candidates, supporting multiple election types (Senate and Student elections), and ensuring a secure environment for casting votes.
ai_summary: This project is a web-based online voting system designed to replace traditional paper-based elections with a secure, digital platform. It allows users to view candidate information and cast votes remotely, helping to reduce overcrowding, prevent fraud, and minimize the spread of viruses.

project_title: Medical Records with Brain Tumor Detection Models
student_names: Haidy Hassan Elsayed Hassan, Ibthal Mohamed Abdelghany, Omnia Khaled Said, Eman Salah Moustafa Mohamad, Mayar Ashraf Fathy Abd Elhalim, Moaz Ashraf Abdelghany Hussein
supervisor: Dr. Sara Sweidan, ENG. Ebrahim Reyad
technologies: Deep Learning, CNN, Python, Web Development, Mobile Development, OCR
keywords: Medical Records, Brain Tumor Detection, Deep Learning, CNN, Healthcare Informatics, Digital Records
abstract: Healthcare is an essential aspect of human life, and it is crucial to provide medical services in a professional and efficient manner. One of the significant advancements in healthcare is the transition from paper-based medical records to digital medical records. Digital medical records are automated and online, providing a paperless solution for storing and managing patient medical data. This includes information about a patient's medical history, appointments, prescriptions, and billing information. However, there are still challenges in healthcare that need to be addressed, such as misdiagnosis of brain tumors. To address this challenge, deep learning models can be used to detect brain tumors and help healthcare providers make accurate diagnoses. The project provides a reliable, accurate, and easy-to-use method for early diagnosis of brain tumors using deep learning techniques. In addition to making appointments and transferring between clinics, organizing doctor's appointments, and allowing access to medical records, and text recognition for prescriptions through the mobile application and the website, it is easier for the patient and doctor. The diagnostic techniques used were able to achieve an accuracy of (99.19%) with detecting the x-ray if it has a tumor, and an accuracy of (98.8%) with classifying the three types of brain tumors, and an accuracy of (94%) with handwriting recognition using a CNN.
description: This project is a comprehensive medical informatics system designed to digitize patient records and integrate advanced AI diagnostics. It provides a platform for managing patient history, scheduling appointments, and digitizing prescriptions via OCR, while specifically focusing on the neurology department by utilizing CNN-based deep learning models to detect and classify brain tumors from X-ray images.
problem_statement: The current healthcare system suffers from limited storage space, security risks with paper records, inefficient information retrieval, and the potential for human error in diagnosis and prescription management. Specifically, doctors face challenges in accurately identifying brain tumors and interpreting handwritten prescriptions.
proposed_solution: A centralized digital medical record system that automates administrative tasks like scheduling and record-keeping, combined with a deep learning-based diagnostic tool that uses Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to analyze X-rays for brain tumor detection and classification, and OCR technology to digitize handwritten prescriptions.
objectives: To design a system for better patient care, reduce clinic operational costs, facilitate coordination between patients and doctors, provide a secure digital database for medical records, and implement high-accuracy AI models for early brain tumor detection and prescription text recognition.
ai_summary: This project develops a digital medical records platform that streamlines clinic management and patient scheduling. It integrates advanced deep learning models, specifically CNNs, to provide high-accuracy brain tumor detection from X-rays and utilizes OCR to digitize handwritten medical prescriptions.
full_content: Medical Records with Brain Tumor Detection Models. Medical Records with Brain Tumor Detection Models. Healthcare is an essential aspect of human life, and it is crucial to provide medical services in a professional and efficient manner. One of the significant advancements in healthcare is the transition from paper-based medical records to digital medical records. Digital medical records are automated and online, providing a paperless solution for storing and managing patient medical data. This includes information about a patient's medical history, appointments, prescriptions, and billing information. However, there are still challenges in healthcare that need to be addressed, such as misdiagnosis of brain tumors. To address this challenge, deep learning models can be used to detect brain tumors and help healthcare providers make accurate diagnoses. The project provides a reliable, accurate, and easy-to-use method for early diagnosis of brain tumors using deep learning techniques. In addition to making appointments and transferring between clinics, organizing doctor's appointments, and allowing access to medical records, and text recognition for prescriptions through the mobile application and the website, it is easier for the patient and doctor. The diagnostic techniques used were able to achieve an accuracy of (99.19%) with detecting the x-ray if it has a tumor, and an accuracy of (98.8%) with classifying the three types of brain tumors, and an accuracy of (94%) with handwriting recognition using a CNN.. This project is a comprehensive medical informatics system designed to digitize patient records and integrate advanced AI diagnostics. It provides a platform for managing patient history, scheduling appointments, and digitizing prescriptions via OCR, while specifically focusing on the neurology department by utilizing CNN-based deep learning models to detect and classify brain tumors from X-ray images.

abstract: The Educational Platform for Students and Teachers is an advanced e-learning system designed to streamline online education by providing a structured and interactive learning environment. This platform enables students to purchase and access recorded courses, participate in both free and paid assessments, and track their progress through personalized dashboards. By incorporating a role-based management system, teachers, organizers, and administrators can efficiently oversee course content, manage tests, and handle user interactions. One of the key aspects of the platform is its secure payment integration, allowing students to enroll in paid courses with confidence while ensuring safe and seamless transactions. Additionally, the system features automated notifications for class schedules, assignment deadlines, and platform updates, enhancing user engagement and productivity.
description: ABSTHALK is a comprehensive, role-based e-learning platform designed to bridge the gap between traditional and digital education. abstract: In recent years, the rapid growth of urban populations and infrastructure in Egypt has highlighted the urgent need for more efficient, transparent, and scalable systems for monitoring and resolving public infrastructure issues. Traditional reporting mechanisms—such as phone hotlines, municipal visits, or informal complaints on social media—often suffer from fragmentation, delays, and a lack of accountability, which directly impact both citizen satisfaction and governmental efficiency. In response to these challenges, this project introduces CivicEye, a comprehensive, multi-platform infrastructure monitoring and civic engagement system designed specifically for the Egyptian public sector. CivicEye bridges the communication gap between citizens, municipal employees, and administrative authorities at various levels (city, governorate, and national) through an integrated digital platform. The system comprises three main interfaces: a citizen mobile application, an employee mobile application, and a web-based administrative dashboard. Each of these components is tailored to meet the distinct needs of its user base while ensuring synchronized, real-time interaction through WebSocket technology and structured workflows.
description: CivicEye is an intelligent, multi-layered infrastructure monitoring platform designed to modernize civic engagement in Egypt. It provides a unified ecosystem where citizens can report infrastructure issues (like potholes or broken lights) via a mobile app, field employees can manage and resolve these reports, and administrators can monitor performance and trends through a centralized web dashboard. The system leverages AI for automated report titling and identity verification, and uses real-time data synchronization to ensure transparency and accountability across all levels of government.
problem_statement: Current infrastructure reporting methods in Egypt are largely manual, fragmented, and bureaucratic. Citizens lack a unified, transparent channel to report issues, leading to delayed responses and lack of feedback. Simultaneously, government entities lack centralized tools for tracking patterns, analyzing complaints, or evaluating employee performance based on real-time operational data.
proposed_solution: The project proposes CivicEye, a comprehensive platform featuring a citizen mobile app for reporting, an employee mobile app for field management, and an administrative web dashboard for oversight. The solution incorporates AI-assisted features (OCR for ID verification, automated titling), real-time WebSocket communication for status updates, and a hierarchical administrative model (City, Governorate, National) to align with Egypt's existing governmental structure.
objectives: To digitize and streamline infrastructure reporting, improve transparency and accountability in public services, provide government administrators with data-driven insights for decision-making, and bridge the communication gap between citizens and municipal authorities.
ai_summary: CivicEye is a comprehensive smart city platform that digitizes infrastructure reporting and maintenance in Egypt. It connects citizens, field employees, and government administrators through a synchronized ecosystem of mobile apps and a web dashboard, utilizing AI and real-time data to improve service efficiency and transparency.

keywords: Dubbing, Arabic Localization, Educational Content, Lip-sync, Deep Learning, NLP, Accessibility
abstract: In today's globalized digital landscape, the demand for multilingual content is rapidly increasing. Our project addresses this by developing an advanced automated system for translating and dubbing videos into Arabic. The system follows a streamlined process: extracting audio from videos, converting it to text, translating the text into Arabic, and then converting the translated text back into audio synchronized with the original video. By using cutting-edge tools and models, we ensure high accuracy and quality in voiceover and dubbing, maintaining the content's essence. Additionally, this project aims to democratize knowledge access and create an inclusive learning environment for Arabic speakers by localizing educational videos, documentaries, and online resources into Arabic. This system empowers Arabic-speaking communities to access a wider range of educational content, enhancing educational opportunities, fostering cross-cultural understanding, and promoting linguistic diversity globally.
description: The project is a comprehensive web-based platform designed to automate the dubbing of English educational videos into Arabic. It focuses on bridging the language gap for students and learners in the Arab world by providing a seamless voice-over service that makes foreign educational resources accessible in their native language.
problem_statement: There is a significant scarcity of high-quality Arabic educational content, particularly in computer science. Existing materials are primarily in English or Hindi, creating a language barrier that limits learning opportunities. Furthermore, traditional manual dubbing is expensive, time-consuming, and faces technical challenges like lip-syncing, maintaining emotional tone, and ensuring high audio quality.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an automated, cost-effective electronic dubbing system that utilizes deep learning models and Natural Language Processing. The solution includes automated audio extraction, speech-to-text, machine translation, and text-to-speech synthesis. It incorporates the WAV2C library for lip synchronization and utilizes noise-reduction models like 'Splitter' by Deezer to ensure professional-grade audio output.
objectives: To democratize access to global educational knowledge for Arabic speakers, to create an inclusive learning environment, to provide a cost-effective alternative to manual dubbing, and to ensure high-quality, culturally relevant, and synchronized Arabic audio for educational video content.
ai_summary: This project is an automated web-based dubbing system that translates and dubs English educational videos into Arabic. By leveraging deep learning and NLP, it provides a cost-effective solution to bridge the language gap and improve accessibility to global educational resources for Arabic-speaking students.

abstract: JeeLMS is an educational platform designed to simplify classroom management and enhance learning experiences through virtual spaces. At its core, the system introduces a concept of digital "spaces" that serve as contained environments where educational activities take place. These spaces allow educators to manage classes, create assessments, and interact with students through a unified interface. The platform addresses common educational workflow challenges by providing integrated tools for attendance tracking, assignment management, quiz administration, and resource sharing. Built with both web and mobile interfaces, JEELMS ensures consistent access across different devices, accommodating the varied needs of users in educational settings. Our system architecture emphasizes modularity and scalability, implementing secure user authentication, role-based access control, and real-time data synchronization. The platform features a straightforward user interface that reduces technical barriers, making digital education tools accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise. By consolidating essential educational functions into a single platform, JEELMS aims to streamline administrative tasks and enhance communication between educators and students.

The project also incorporates advanced multimedia localization features, specifically focusing on video dubbing from English to Arabic to improve accessibility and cultural relevance for students.
