student_names: Ali Mostafa Ali Youssef, Amr Taha Hassan Mohamed, Abdallah Saad Abdallah Abu Saree, Alaa Ismail Yassin Mohamed, Karim Mohamed Gaber Mohamed, Ahmed Mohamed Ahmed Afifi
supervisor: Dr. Alaa Eldeen Abdallah Yassin, Eng. Shimaa Ismail
technologies: HTML5, CSS3, Sass, JavaScript, TypeScript, Bootstrap, Tailwind, Angular, PHP, SQL, Python, Flask, Firebase, Figma, Adobe XD, Lucidchart, Microsoft Visio

abstract: A neonatal intensive care unit (NICU), also known as an intensive nursery (ICN), is an intensive care unit specializing in the care of ill or premature newborn infants. The neonatal mortality rate is still dangerously high, especially in the poorest countries. While some children born in developed countries have the best chance of survival, those in less developed areas face serious risks due to the lack of specialized care. This project aims to bridge this gap by providing a digital management system for NICUs to improve tracking, monitoring, and medical intervention for newborns.
description: The Neonatal Intensive Care Unit Management System is a comprehensive platform designed to digitize the operations of a NICU. It features distinct interfaces for administrators (doctors, nurses, accountants) and parents. Nurses can register infants and update medical data, doctors can monitor patient conditions, and accountants manage billing. Parents are provided with a portal to monitor their child's condition, view updates, and handle financial transactions related to the care provided.
problem_statement: The current NICU environment suffers from reliance on paper-based records, difficulty in tracking patient data, lack of visibility into available resources (beds/devices), and limited communication between medical staff and parents, all of which contribute to suboptimal care and increased risks for premature infants.
proposed_solution: A centralized, digital management system that automates record-keeping, provides real-time monitoring of infant health data, tracks equipment and bed availability, and offers a secure portal for parents to stay informed about their child's progress and treatment costs.
objectives: To organize and record infant data with easy modification capabilities; to enable continuous medical monitoring and diagnosis by doctors; to provide parents with the ability to follow up on their child's case; and to maintain an accurate, real-time inventory of available NICU beds and medical devices.
ai_summary: This project is a web-based management system for Neonatal Intensive Care Units (NICU) that digitizes patient records, medical monitoring, and administrative tasks. It improves healthcare delivery by providing doctors and nurses with efficient data management tools while allowing parents to remotely monitor their child's status and manage treatment costs.

abstract: The realm of virtual communication is experiencing a revolution with the emergence of sophisticated virtual humans. NexTalk, our groundbreaking AI presenter, stands at the forefront of this transformation. By harnessing the power of advanced text-to-speech technology, NexTalk dynamically generates captivating spoken content from any textual input. NexTalk's magic lies in its masterful fusion of Natural Language Processing (NLP) and cutting-edge speech synthesis. This potent blend allows NexTalk to seamlessly transform written text into expressive and coherent spoken dialogue, imbued with natural cadence, intonation, and a range of emotions. Imagine a virtual presenter delivering your message with the perfect blend of authority, warmth, or excitement – NexTalk makes it possible.
description: NexTalk is an innovative AI-driven platform that transforms written text into dynamic, engaging video presentations featuring lifelike virtual avatars. By integrating advanced text-to-speech (TTS) models with real-time facial animation technology, the system synchronizes audio input with avatar expressions to create a realistic and immersive communication experience. The platform is designed for educators, businesses, and content creators to produce high-quality, personalized presentations that bridge language barriers and enhance audience engagement.
problem_statement: Traditional presentation methods are often static, text-heavy, and lack the emotional expressiveness required to maintain audience engagement. Furthermore, human presenters can be costly, and existing text-to-speech solutions often sound robotic and lack the visual synchronization necessary for a truly immersive experience.
proposed_solution: NexTalk provides a comprehensive AI-powered solution that maps text input to natural-sounding speech and synchronizes it with 3D facial animations. The system allows users to customize avatars, supports multiple languages, and provides a user-friendly web interface for creating, editing, and sharing presentations, effectively replacing the need for physical presence in various scenarios.
objectives: To develop a user-friendly web platform for AI-driven presentations, implement high-quality text-to-speech synthesis with emotional intonation, integrate 3D character animation for realistic lip-syncing, support multilingual content generation, and provide a scalable system for diverse user needs including subscription-based access.
ai_summary: NexTalk is an AI-powered platform that converts text into engaging video presentations featuring lifelike, animated virtual avatars. project_title: Artificial Intelligence Techniques in Brain Stroke Detection Using Medical Images
student_names: Osama Fayez Abdelkhalik, Amany Mohamed Saber, Enas Mohamed Askar, Mohamed Ramadan Abdelhakam, Nadiya Hosny Elsayed, Yasmeen Mohamed Awwad
supervisor: Prof. Elsayed Badr, Eng. Mohamed Alhakeem
technologies: Python, TensorFlow, Keras, ResNet152, CNN, Decision Tree, Random Forest, K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Web Frameworks
keywords: Brain Stroke, Medical Imaging, Deep Learning, Convolutional Neural Networks, Healthcare Informatics, Early Detection
abstract: Brain stroke, a leading cause of death and disability worldwide, necessitates early detection and timely intervention to improve patient outcomes. This project, "Artificial Intelligence Techniques in Brain Stroke Detection Using Medical Images," aims to leverage advanced machine learning and deep learning techniques to develop a robust system for the accurate identification of brain strokes from medical scans. The project integrates several key components, including extensive data preprocessing and the implementation of various models such as Decision Tree, Random Forest, KNN, and deep learning architectures like 3D CNN, 2D CNN, and ResNet152, with the latter achieving an accuracy of 95.22%. The system also incorporates a comprehensive user interface for stakeholders to manage appointments and diagnostic reports, aiming to reduce dependency on manual interpretation by radiologists.
description: The project is a comprehensive medical informatics system designed to automate the detection of brain strokes using AI. It combines deep learning-based image analysis (specifically ResNet152) with a management platform that handles patient appointments, diagnostic reports, and communication between healthcare providers and patients. The goal is to streamline the diagnostic workflow and provide timely care in resource-constrained settings.
problem_statement: In Egypt, the shortage of radiologists and limited availability of specialized diagnostic centers lead to significant delays in diagnosing and treating brain stroke patients, which is a time-critical medical emergency.
proposed_solution: The team developed an integrated system that uses deep learning models (ResNet152) to analyze medical scans for stroke detection, combined with a web-based management platform to facilitate appointment booking, report sharing, and efficient communication between doctors and patients.
objectives: To develop a robust and efficient system for the identification of brain strokes from medical scans using deep learning, to automate the diagnostic process, to reduce the burden on radiologists, and to provide a streamlined platform for patient management and timely intervention.
ai_summary: This project utilizes deep learning models, specifically ResNet152, to accurately detect brain strokes from medical imaging scans. It integrates this diagnostic capability into a comprehensive web platform that manages patient appointments and clinical reports to improve the speed and efficiency of stroke care.

project_title: I SEE: Smart Glasses for Blind
student_names: Ahmed Taha Mansour, Ahmed Ibrahim Abdelhafeez, Mahmoud El Sayed Shalaby, Esraa Basher Abdelgawad, Gehan Harby El Sayed, Salma Mohamed Fawzy
supervisor: Prof. Dr. El Sayed Badr, Eng. Mohamed Moustafa
technologies: Python, MTCNN, VGG-16, YOLO, Tesseract OCR, NLP, OpenCV
keywords: Smart Glasses, Blind Assistance, Face Recognition, Object Detection, OCR, Text-to-Speech, Computer Vision
abstract: The I SEE project aims to empower visually impaired individuals by providing a wearable smart glasses solution that enhances independence. The system integrates multiple computer vision and AI technologies to perform real-time tasks, including face recognition using MTCNN and VGG-16, object detection using the YOLO algorithm, and text reading via Tesseract OCR combined with NLP for text refinement. By converting visual information into auditory feedback, the device helps users navigate their environment, identify people, and read text, effectively acting as a digital guide to the world.
description: I SEE is an assistive technology project designed as a pair of smart glasses for the blind. It utilizes advanced AI models to interpret the user's surroundings. The system captures visual data and processes it to identify faces, detect common objects in daily life, and extract text from signs or documents. The processed information is then translated into audio, allowing the user to interact with their environment more confidently and independently.
problem_statement: Visually impaired individuals face significant challenges in daily life, including difficulties in recognizing people, navigating streets, identifying objects, and reading text, which often leads to a loss of independence and social interaction barriers.
proposed_solution: A wearable smart glasses system that leverages computer vision and deep learning to provide real-time environmental awareness. The solution uses face recognition to identify people, object detection to locate obstacles and items, and OCR to read text, all of which are communicated to the user through audio.
objectives: To develop a reliable assistive device for the blind, implement accurate face recognition, enable real-time object detection for navigation, provide text-to-speech capabilities for reading, and ultimately improve the quality of life and independence of visually impaired users.
ai_summary: I SEE is an AI-powered smart glasses system designed to assist the visually impaired by converting visual input into audio. It uses deep learning models like YOLO for object detection, MTCNN and VGG-16 for face recognition, and Tesseract for text reading to help users navigate their surroundings and interact with the world independently.

abstract: Diety aims to develop a comprehensive mobile application that empowers users to adopt and maintain healthy lifestyle habits. In today's fast-paced world, individuals often struggle to prioritize their health amidst busy schedules and numerous distractions. This project seeks to address this challenge by providing users with a convenient and user-friendly platform for tracking their fitness progress, accessing personalized workout routines, monitoring their nutrition intake, and connecting with a supportive community of like-minded individuals. The application uses Flutter and machine learning to generate personalized fitness and diet plans based on user physical characteristics and goals, while integrating Google Gemini for interactive health advice.

The app features calorie management, progress tracking, lifestyle guidance, and an AI-powered virtual assistant for real-time health advice.

By analyzing user data, the app offers tailored recommendations, tracks progress, and provides interactive support through a virtual assistant to help users achieve their fitness and health objectives effectively.

project_title: Connected Cars of Tomorrow: Investigating OBD-II and V2X Communication Protocols
student_names: Mohamed Ayman, Omar Mesbah, Mostafa Shrief, Shehab Rizk, Mohamed Mahdy, Salma Mohamed, Shahd Hamdy, Aya Ashraf, Shrouq Haney

keywords: Connected Cars, OBD-II, V2X, Intelligent Transportation Systems, Vehicle Diagnostics, Road Safety
abstract: The automotive landscape is witnessing a convergence of technologies aimed at enhancing safety, efficiency, and connectivity. On-board Diagnostics (OBD-II) and Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication stand as two key technologies shaping the future of smart cars. This project aims to help individuals diagnose their cars quickly without visiting a service center and provides a wide range of information about the vehicle's status. By applying V2X technologies, cars can send and receive messages to and from their surroundings, such as traffic lights, pedestrians, and other vehicles, allowing users to monitor and control their car's performance effectively.
description: This project explores the integration of OBD-II and V2X communication protocols to create a smarter, safer, and more efficient driving experience. It involves developing a mobile application and a web interface to provide real-time vehicle diagnostics and facilitate communication between vehicles and infrastructure to improve traffic flow and road safety.
problem_statement: Current transportation systems face critical challenges including traffic congestion, road safety risks, and inefficient traffic flow. Additionally, vehicle owners often lack immediate access to diagnostic information, leading to costly repairs and potential safety hazards.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated system using OBD-II for internal vehicle health monitoring and V2X communication for external connectivity. This allows for real-time diagnostic alerts, improved situational awareness, collision avoidance, and optimized traffic management through data exchange with infrastructure and other vehicles.
objectives: To develop a system that enhances road safety, reduces traffic congestion, improves transportation efficiency, and provides users with an easy-to-use platform for monitoring vehicle health and status.
ai_summary: This project develops a connected car platform that integrates OBD-II diagnostics with V2X communication technology. The system enables real-time vehicle health monitoring via a mobile app and improves road safety and traffic efficiency by allowing vehicles to communicate with their surroundings.

project_title: Vehicle Movement tracking system using IoT
student_names: Aya Moustafa Mohamed, Karima Refat Younis, Basma El-saeed Mohamed, Aya Mohamed Ashoor
technologies: IoT, GPS, ESP (Wi-Fi module), Arduino, HTML, Google Maps API, Smartphone Application
keywords: Vehicle Tracking, IoT, GPS, Real-time Monitoring, ESP, Google Maps API
abstract: A vehicle tracking system is one of the most important things in real life. A vehicle tracking system will design and implement for tracking the movement of any equipped vehicle from any location at any time. The system uses a popular technology that combines a Smartphone application with a microcontroller. This will be an inexpensive solution compared to others. The design of the system can be implemented using ESP technology that is one of the most common ways for vehicle tracking. The object is tracked in real-time. The vehicle tracking system uses the GPS module to get geographic coordinates (longitudes and latitudes) at regular time intervals. A Smartphone application is also developed for concurrent monitoring the vehicle location. The Google Maps API is used to display the vehicle using Smartphone application. Thus, users will be able to monitor a moving vehicle on demand using the Smartphone application and they determine the estimated distance and time for the vehicle to arrive at a given destination.
description: This project presents a low-cost, real-time vehicle tracking system designed to monitor the location of moving or stationary vehicles. By integrating GPS modules with ESP Wi-Fi microcontrollers, the system captures precise geographic coordinates and transmits them to a central server. Users can then view the vehicle's real-time position on a smartphone application integrated with Google Maps, providing enhanced security and logistical oversight.
problem_statement: The increasing number of road accidents, vehicle thefts, and the need for monitoring the safety of individuals (such as children in school buses) create a critical demand for reliable, real-time vehicle tracking solutions to ensure safety and rapid response.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an IoT-based tracking system that utilizes a GPS module for location acquisition and an ESP Wi-Fi module for data transmission. The system processes these coordinates and displays them on a user-friendly smartphone application using the Google Maps API, allowing for real-time monitoring of vehicle movement.
objectives: To design and implement a low-cost vehicle tracking system, enable real-time location monitoring of vehicles, provide an accessible smartphone interface for users, and improve safety and security for vehicle owners and passengers.
ai_summary: This project develops a low-cost IoT-based vehicle tracking system that uses GPS and ESP Wi-Fi modules to monitor vehicle locations in real-time. The collected data is transmitted to a smartphone application, which displays the vehicle's position on Google Maps for easy tracking and improved safety.

project_title: Interactive Sign Language Interpretation System: From sign language gestures to audible speech
student_names: Mahmoud Fahmy Omar, Omar Zakaria Salah, Abbas Saleem Hennidi, Mahmoud Kassem Mahmoud, Mahmoud El-Sayyad
technologies: Python, OpenCV, C#, .NET, EmguCV, Keras, Visual Studio 2017, PyCharm, Darknet, Adobe Premiere
keywords: Sign Language Recognition, Deep Neural Networks, YOLO, MobileNetV1, Computer Vision, Accessibility, Hand Tracking
abstract: The aim of this project is to implement an accessible, easy to use, inexpensive, and most importantly accurate sign language interpretation system that could be used by deaf/mute people to communicate with people who are not familiar with sign language, by converting the sign language gesture streams into either live text, or audible synthesized speech in real time. The project utilizes the state-of-the-art YOLO object detection algorithm, in combination with Google's MobileNetV1 to solve the two hardest challenges: hand detection/tracking and sign language recognition.
description: This project is an accessibility software solution designed to bridge the communication gap between deaf/mute individuals and the general public. By leveraging deep learning models, the system captures real-time video input of sign language gestures, processes them to identify specific hand postures, and translates them into readable text or synthesized speech, thereby facilitating seamless interaction in various environments like hospitals, schools, and public institutions.
problem_statement: Sign language relies on complex visual-manual articulations and specific hand postures that are difficult for automated systems to interpret accurately. Existing solutions often struggle with the challenges of real-time hand detection, tracking, and the high degree of similarity between different manual alphabet signs, which hinders effective communication for the deaf/mute community.
proposed_solution: The team proposed a deep learning-based approach using the YOLO algorithm for robust hand detection and tracking, combined with Google's MobileNetV1 for accurate sign language gesture recognition. The system uses custom-trained datasets and data augmentation techniques to ensure high accuracy in identifying various hand poses and translating them into text or speech.
objectives: To develop an accurate and real-time sign language interpretation system, to reduce the cost of hiring human sign language interpreters, to improve accessibility for deaf/mute individuals in public and private sectors, and to implement a user-friendly interface for seamless communication.
ai_summary: This project is an AI-powered accessibility tool that translates sign language gestures into real-time text or synthesized speech. By utilizing YOLO for hand tracking and MobileNetV1 for gesture recognition, it enables effective communication for deaf and mute individuals in professional and public settings.

project_title: Colon cancer detection using deep learning
student_names: Youmna Nabil Ahmed, Nour Hashem Ameen, Mohamed Mahmoud Ahmed
technologies: EfficientNetB2, Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), Python, Deep Learning, Web Technologies
keywords: Colon cancer, Deep Learning, EfficientNetB2, Medical Imaging, Wireless Capsule Endoscopy, Computer-Aided Diagnosis
abstract: Unprecedented breakthroughs in the development of graphical processing systems have led to great potential for deep learning (DL) algorithms in analyzing visual anatomy from high-resolution medical images. Recently, in digital pathology, the use of DL technologies has drawn a substantial amount of attention for use in the effective diagnosis of various cancer types, especially Colon cancer, which is regarded as one of the dominant causes of cancer-related deaths worldwide. Colon cancer is a type of cancer that begins in the large intestine (colon). The colon is the final part of the digestive tract. Colon cancer typically affects older adults, though it can happen at any age. It usually begins as small, noncancerous (benign) clumps of cells called polyps that form on the inside of the colon. Over time, some of these polyps can become colon cancers. If colon cancer develops, many treatments are available to help control it, including surgery, radiation therapy and drug treatments, such as chemotherapy, targeted therapy and immunotherapy. Colon cancer is sometimes called colorectal cancer, which is a term that combines colon cancer and rectal cancer, which begins in the rectum.
description: This project develops a web-based system that utilizes a deep learning model, specifically an EfficientNetB2 Convolutional Neural Network, to analyze endoscopic images for the detection of colon cancer. The system aims to assist medical professionals by providing an automated, accurate, and efficient diagnostic tool for identifying various gastrointestinal disorders, including polyps and cancerous growths, using data from wireless capsule endoscopy.
problem_statement: Colon cancer is a leading cause of cancer-related deaths worldwide. Traditional diagnostic methods like colonoscopy can be uncomfortable and invasive, and there is a clinical need for improved, less invasive methods for examining the small bowel and colon, especially for patients with recurrent gastrointestinal issues.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a deep learning-based diagnostic system using an EfficientNetB2 CNN architecture. The solution involves a web platform where wireless capsule endoscopy (WCE) images can be uploaded and analyzed by the model to classify the presence of colon cancer, providing a non-invasive and efficient diagnostic aid for clinicians.
objectives: To develop a robust deep learning model for the accurate detection of colon cancer from endoscopic images, to create a user-friendly web interface for medical professionals to upload and analyze images, to improve diagnostic performance compared to existing methods, and to provide interpretable results that assist in clinical decision-making.
ai_summary: This project implements a deep learning-based web application using an EfficientNetB2 model to detect colon cancer from endoscopic images. It aims to provide a non-invasive, efficient diagnostic tool to assist medical professionals in identifying gastrointestinal diseases early.

student_names: Mohamed Ayman Said Elshazly, Mohamed Abdallah Abdulghani Osman, Mohamed Mosad Fraouk zaki, Rahma Hussein Ghoneim, Sara Atef Fawzy, Omneya Ahmed Metwally Hassan
supervisor: Dr. Ahmed Taha, Eng. Ahmed Yousry
technologies: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Python, VirusTotal API, MITRE ATT&CK, Desktop Application, Web Development
keywords: Ransomware, Malware Detection, Machine Learning, Zero-day threats, Cybersecurity, Open Source
abstract: Ransomware is a type of sophisticated virus that uses encryption to prohibit users from accessing their data unless a ransom is paid to the attacker. The threat presented by ransomware is quite severe, with new varieties and families being discovered on the internet and dark web on a regular basis. Given the nature of the encryption algorithms utilized by ransomware, recovering from an infection is challenging. The rise in ransomware is also accompanied by an increase in the usage of artificial intelligence. Machine learning and deep learning techniques to detecting ransomware are attracting a lot of attention since machine learning and deep learning can identify zero-day threats. So in our project we use different machine learning algorithm to detect the zero day ransomware for the executable file depend on the features of the header of the file.
description: This project provides an open-source ransomware detection system consisting of a desktop application for offline scanning and a web-based platform for online analysis. The system utilizes machine learning models trained on file header features to identify zero-day ransomware threats. The web component integrates with the VirusTotal API and MITRE ATT&CK framework to provide comprehensive threat intelligence and file analysis history.
problem_statement: Ransomware attacks are becoming increasingly sophisticated and frequent, often bypassing traditional signature-based detection methods. These attacks deny users access to critical data, and current security solutions often struggle to identify new, zero-day ransomware variants effectively.
proposed_solution: The team developed a machine learning-based detection system that analyzes the header features of executable files to identify potential ransomware. By training models on specific file characteristics, the system can detect zero-day threats that lack known signatures. The solution is offered as an open-source tool, allowing for community contribution and transparency.
objectives: To develop an effective ransomware detection tool, implement machine learning models for zero-day threat identification, provide both offline (desktop) and online (web) scanning capabilities, integrate with existing threat intelligence databases like VirusTotal, and maintain an open-source platform for community-driven security improvements.
ai_summary: This project is an open-source ransomware detection system that uses machine learning to identify zero-day threats by analyzing file header features. It provides users with both a desktop application for offline scanning and a web interface that integrates with VirusTotal and the MITRE ATT&CK framework for enhanced security analysis.

full_content: AI-Based Ransomware Detection System. AI-Based Ransomware Detection System. Ransomware has become a significant cybersecurity threat in recent years, causing severe disruptions and financial losses for individuals and organizations. To combat this growing menace, this project focuses on developing an AI-based detection system that can identify and classify ransomware with a high level of accuracy. By leveraging deep learning, machine learning techniques, and advanced feature extraction, the project aims to provide an effective solution to mitigate the risks associated with ransomware attacks.. The project is a dual-interface system (GUI and Web) designed to detect ransomware. It utilizes an Ada-boost classifier trained on PE header features to identify malicious files with 99% accuracy. The web interface allows users to register and upload files, which are then hashed and checked against the VirusTotal API to provide detailed threat intelligence, including MITRE ATT&CK data.

student_names: Ahmed Magdy Ahmed Hassan Awad, Aly Alaa El-Din Aly Helal, Jaidaa Hosny Adly Ibrahim, Logine Hosny Adly Ibrahim
technologies: Python, Windows, GUI frameworks, Threat Intelligence feeds, Signature-based detection
keywords: NIDS, Intrusion Detection, Network Security, Cybersecurity, Threat Intelligence, Packet Sniffing, Python
abstract: The following documents the creation of a Network-based Intrusion Detection & (NIDS) system built on a python infrastructure on Windows, whereby network security enthusiasts as well as security practitioners can monitor a small-to-medium sized network and view alerts generated based on a wealth of databases. The databases will contain well-known malicious-activity digital signatures, IP addresses, DNSs, email addresses and other information extracted from continuously-updated. The administrators of this utility will have the ability to smoothly choose signature databases as well as real-time feeds with which to filter traffic, generate alerts to mitigate risk to the network. These rules and configurations will be customized through the interface. We intend to further provide this system with a Machine Learning integration that can help detect anomalies from expected normal traffic, mitigating the weakness of depending solely on signature-based detection, which is far from foolproof.
description: A GUI-based network security utility designed for Windows that monitors network traffic, analyzes packets, and generates alerts based on customizable signature databases and threat intelligence feeds to mitigate network risks.
problem_statement: The increasing sophistication of cyber threats, internet malware, and DDoS attacks poses a constant risk to network integrity, leading to potential financial loss, loss of trust, and data compromise for individuals and organizations.
proposed_solution: A user-friendly, Python-based Network Intrusion Detection System (NIDS) that provides real-time traffic monitoring, customizable rule management, and automated alert generation to help security practitioners identify and respond to malicious activity.
objectives: 1. Work as a basic network interface packet sniffer. 2. Import rulesets from various malicious-signature DBs. 3. Import IoCs from open-source threat intelligence DBs. 4. Use rulesets/IoCs to work as an Intrusion Detection System, generating alerts based on the chosen configurations and imported DBs. 5. Provide the means to generate your own customized rulesets. 6. Continuously save log files to a designated system folder. 7. Automatically save logs as backup to the file system in case of abrupt shutdown. 8. Provide a User-Friendly GUI interface for monitoring, management, and configuration.

It features a user-friendly GUI that allows users to manage custom rulesets, import threat intelligence feeds, and receive real-time alerts regarding potential malicious activity.

abstract: Our mobile application and website provide comprehensive support for three types of shelters: orphans, the elderly, and animals. To access the app, users need to create an account. Once logged in, users have access to a variety of valuable services designed to support the shelters. Users can search for individuals by uploading a photograph, with the app using face recognition to identify matches in our database. Additionally, users can adopt a person or an animal by submitting an adoption request for admin review, and make secure donations to shelters. Our goal is to use technology to make a positive impact on the lives of those in need, providing a seamless and secure experience for all users.
description: The Shelter's System is a dual-platform solution (mobile and web) designed to bridge the gap between shelters (for orphans, the elderly, and animals) and the community. It facilitates centralized data management for shelters, streamlines the adoption and donation processes, and provides a critical tool for locating missing persons through advanced image retrieval and face recognition technology.
problem_statement: Shelters struggle with organizing and managing resident data effectively, lack centralized systems for updates, and face difficulties in communicating with external stakeholders. Furthermore, there is a lack of visibility for those seeking to support shelters, inefficient donation management, and a need for faster, more effective methods for finding missing persons.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a centralized web and mobile platform that provides secure data management, location-based services to find nearby shelters, a streamlined adoption and donation portal, and an advanced image retrieval system for identifying missing persons by cross-referencing uploaded photos with a database of shelter residents.
objectives: To provide a centralized platform for shelter data management, improve transparency and accountability in donation processes, enhance the accessibility of adoption and sponsorship programs, and implement an effective, technology-driven solution for locating missing persons.

abstract: By using the IOT, We built a simulation model to operate the college building intelligently without resorting in most circumstances to the human factor. The project is divided into three part (Smart College Building, Parking Area, website). Smart College Building: Consists of smart gates, smart room, and lecture hall. Smart room: It is a room controlled by a smart virtual assistant called “Zima”, such as controlling the lighting system and electrical appliances in the room by using voice recognition. In the building there is a fingerprint attendance system that is controlled by the college directors so that they know the entry and exit dates for the employees. It also has the ability to record attendance for students through QR-Code and link it to the website so that the lecturer can view all attendance records for students in a daily divided manner in lectures without any human or paper intervention. Parking area: It is a self-managed garage. The Automatic Underground Parking system solves many of the traditional problems associated with urban parking; congestion, pollution, land space, security; through the installation of compact, circular, underground silos that optimize space, are easily installed, and are completely automatic. technologies: Python, Histogram Analysis, Random Forest, Cryptography libraries
keywords: Steganography, Steganalysis, Cryptography, Information Security, Digital Forensics, Data Hiding
abstract: In recent years, information security has become the most important thing in society, and information security concerns the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data. So our project will deal with the confidentiality and integrity of data using steganography in addition to cryptography. Steganography is a technique of covert communication that involves concealing information within public media (image, video, audio, text) to ensure confidentiality and integrity. By embedding messages within other non-secret carriers. Cryptography is the practice and study of techniques for secure communication and data protection in the presence of adversaries. It involves the use of mathematical algorithms to convert information into a form that is unintelligible without the appropriate key or password. The primary objective of cryptography is to ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and authenticity of data.
description: This project provides a comprehensive application for both steganography and steganalysis. It allows users to hide secret messages within various media types (images, text, audio, and video) while optionally applying encryption to the data. Additionally, it includes steganalysis tools, such as histogram analysis and machine learning-based detection (Random Forest), to identify the presence of hidden data in media files.
problem_statement: Organizations and individuals need to maintain the confidentiality of sensitive information during transmission. Conversely, malicious actors use steganography and cryptography to hide information regarding illegal operations. There is a lack of unified applications that provide both robust steganography/encryption tools and the corresponding detection (steganalysis) capabilities.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a unified software application that integrates multiple steganography algorithms for different media types, provides data encryption for added security, and implements steganalysis features to detect hidden data using techniques like histogram analysis and Random Forest classifiers.
objectives: To provide a secure method for covert communication, to implement encryption for data protection, to develop tools for detecting hidden information (steganalysis), and to create a user-friendly interface for managing these security tasks.
ai_summary: This project is a comprehensive cybersecurity tool that enables users to hide and encrypt sensitive information within various media formats like images, audio, video, and text. It also features advanced steganalysis capabilities, including histogram analysis and machine learning models, to detect and identify hidden data within files.

abstract: Our idea is to design and develop a virtual reality application that aims to refresh tourism around the world, particularly in Egypt, through interactive and collaborative gaming. The application takes users from the real world into a virtual simulation of historical places in Egypt. It is divided into two states: a downtown walk-through to find a virtual museum, and an interactive museum experience where users engage with historical pieces and games to learn about Egyptian history and unlock further touristic information.
description: Tourism Promotion is a mobile-based virtual reality application designed to boost tourism in Egypt by providing immersive, interactive, and collaborative experiences. Users explore virtual recreations of historical sites and museums, engaging in games that educate them about Egypt's cultural heritage. The project aims to attract international tourists by showcasing the beauty and history of Egypt through modern technology.
problem_statement: The tourism sector in Egypt has faced significant deterioration, negatively impacting the national economy. Many potential tourists are unable to visit Egypt due to health, financial, or geographical constraints, and many have never been exposed to the country's rich historical attractions.
proposed_solution: The team developed a VR mobile application that allows users to virtually visit and explore Egyptian historical sites. By combining 3D modeling, 360-degree imagery, and gamification, the app provides an engaging way for users to learn about history, which serves as a marketing tool to encourage future physical visits to Egypt.
objectives: To design and develop a VR application that refreshes tourism in Egypt, increases touristic income by attracting global interest, provides an interactive and collaborative gaming experience, and spreads cultural awareness of Egyptian history.
ai_summary: This project is a mobile-based Virtual Reality application designed to promote tourism in Egypt by offering immersive, gamified tours of historical sites. Through interactive challenges and virtual museum visits, the app educates users about Egyptian history and encourages them to visit these locations in real life.

project_title: Web Based System for Finding Missing People
student_names: Ahmed Mohamed Ahmed Soliman, Ziad Refaat Ahmed Abdelaty, Ahmed Mohamed Fawzi Mohamed, El-Shazly Mohamed Dahab Mohamed, Salah Kamal Ali Ashour
technologies: Face Recognition, Web Development, Mobile Application Development, Database Management
keywords: Missing persons, Face recognition, AI, Web system, Social safety, Child protection
abstract: A large number of people disappear each day due to countless reasons such as age, mental conditions, Alzheimer's disease, etc. Finding a missing person is a very difficult task, although we are all updated through social media, the traditional search journey requires much paperwork to be done and it is a process that takes a lot of time and effort. Therefore, this project presents a system to solve this big problem that threatens children, people with special needs, and the elderly, especially those with health problems. So that it helps the public or police departments by speeding up the search process using face recognition technology or searching using the basic data of the missing such as name, gender, age, etc. The way this system works is when a person goes missing, his family can search for him using his photo, which is stored in a database. If no match is found, they can upload the details to the database. The other case is if a match occurred between the previously stored data and the photo uploaded by the family, they can communicate with the finder of the missing person.
description: This project is a web and mobile-based system designed to facilitate the search for missing persons, including children, the elderly, and individuals with special needs. It leverages artificial intelligence and face recognition technology to match uploaded photos of missing individuals against a centralized database, providing a more efficient and accurate alternative to fragmented social media searches.
problem_statement: The problem of missing persons is a global issue with thousands disappearing annually in Egypt alone. Current search methods rely heavily on social media, which is often inaccurate, lacks centralized data, and fails to provide the necessary tools for effective identification and recovery, leading to emotional and financial distress for families.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a centralized web and mobile platform that integrates face recognition technology to automate the identification process. It allows families to report missing persons and search for them using specific criteria (name, age, gender, location) or by uploading photos, which are then compared against a secure database to facilitate quick reunions.
objectives: To provide a platform for reporting and searching for missing persons; enable search by personal details and face recognition; create a secure, reliable database accessible to the public and law enforcement; foster an online community for support; and raise awareness about the issue of missing persons.
ai_summary: This project is a web and mobile-based system designed to help locate missing persons, particularly children and the elderly, by utilizing artificial intelligence and face recognition technology. It provides a centralized platform for families and authorities to report and search for missing individuals, aiming to streamline the recovery process and improve upon the inaccuracies of traditional social media searches.

student_names: Mohamed Adel El-Sayed, Belal Ahmed Ali, Mohamed Adel Mohamed, Sayed Fotoh El-Sayed, Yousef Ali Ahmed, Mohamed Mortada Abdirashid, Mohamed Gamal El Sayed, Mostafa Ali Mostafa
technologies: Flutter, Dart, Firebase, React.js, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Node.js
keywords: University Companion, AI Chat Bot, Student Management System, Academic Platform, NLP, Higher Education Technology
abstract: In the contemporary landscape of higher education, students face numerous challenges in navigating their academic journey effectively. To address these challenges and enhance the student experience, we introduce "University Companion," an innovative application designed to support students in managing their academic endeavors seamlessly. University Companion offers a range of features aimed at streamlining the academic experience, including a comprehensive course catalog, GPA tracking functionality, personalized advice based on academic performance, and an integrated chat-bot for real-time assistance. Leveraging advanced algorithms and natural language processing (NLP) technology, the application provides students with actionable insights, empowering them to make informed decisions and maximize their academic potential. Moreover, University Companion fosters a sense of community and collaboration among students by providing various community groups tailored to each grade level and department. These groups serve as platforms for students to connect, share resources, seek help from peers, and engage in private chats, akin to popular messaging applications like WhatsApp or Messenger. Furthermore, University Companion integrates professors into the platform, allowing them to log in with their academic accounts to add courses, make announcements, and engage with students directly. Professors can seamlessly contribute to the academic ecosystem by uploading course materials, providing timely updates, and fostering communication between students and faculty members. Through its intuitive interface, user-centric design, commitment to fostering community engagement, and integration of professors, University Companion aims to revolutionize the way students engage with their studies. By facilitating efficient course selection, GPA monitoring, personalized advice, community collaboration, private chats, and direct interaction with professors, the application seeks to empower students, foster academic success, and promote a culture of lifelong learning within the university community.
description: University Companion is a centralized digital platform and application designed to streamline the academic experience for university students. It integrates course management, resource sharing, community collaboration, and an AI-powered chatbot to provide real-time academic assistance and personalized guidance.
problem_statement: University students face significant challenges in managing and accessing course materials, reference books, and academic resources spread across disparate platforms. Additionally, they often struggle with navigating academic requirements and obtaining instant clarification on course content, leading to delays in understanding and academic progress.
proposed_solution: The project provides a centralized hub called 'University Companion' that consolidates academic resources into a single, accessible interface. It features an AI-driven chatbot utilizing Natural Language Processing (NLP) to provide real-time support, alongside community features for student-to-student and student-to-professor interaction.
objectives: To develop a centralized platform for course materials; integrate an AI Chat Bot for real-time assistance; enhance the learning experience through collaboration tools; provide personalized student support; improve overall learning outcomes; and cultivate a dynamic, supportive academic environment.
ai_summary: University Companion is a comprehensive academic platform that centralizes course materials and resources for university students. It features an AI-powered chatbot for real-time academic support and provides tools for community collaboration and direct communication between students and faculty.
full_content: University Companion. University Companion. In the contemporary landscape of higher education, students face numerous challenges in navigating their academic journey effectively. To address these challenges and enhance the student experience, we introduce "University Companion," an innovative application designed to support students in managing their academic endeavors seamlessly. University Companion offers a range of features aimed at streamlining the academic experience, including a comprehensive course catalog, GPA tracking functionality, personalized advice based on academic performance, and an integrated chat-bot for real-time assistance. Leveraging advanced algorithms and natural language processing (NLP) technology, the application provides students with actionable insights, empowering them to make informed decisions and maximize their academic potential. Moreover, University Companion fosters a sense of community and collaboration among students by providing various community groups tailored to each grade level and department. These groups serve as platforms for students to connect, share resources, seek help from peers, and engage in private chats, akin to popular messaging applications like WhatsApp or Messenger. Furthermore, University Companion integrates professors into the platform, allowing them to log in with their academic accounts to add courses, make announcements, and engage with students directly. Professors can seamlessly contribute to the academic ecosystem by uploading course materials, providing timely updates, and fostering communication between students and faculty members. Through its intuitive interface, user-centric design, commitment to fostering community engagement, and integration of professors, University Companion aims to revolutionize the way students engage with their studies. By facilitating efficient course selection, GPA monitoring, personalized advice, community collaboration, private chats, and direct interaction with professors, the application seeks to empower students, foster academic success, and promote a culture of lifelong learning within the university community.. University Companion is a centralized digital platform and application designed to streamline the academic experience for university students. It integrates course management, resource sharing, community collaboration, and an AI-powered chatbot to provide real-time academic assistance and personalized guidance.

keywords: Student Management System, Web Application, Academic Workflow, Capstone Project, Role-Based Access, AI-Driven, Full-Stack Development
abstract: The Student Management System is a comprehensive web-based application developed to enhance the management of academic activities within educational institutions. This system addresses the needs of three main stakeholders: students, doctors (instructors), and administrators by offering tailored features for each role. For students, the system provides tools to register, log in, enroll in subjects, select departments, view lecture and exam schedules, and manage capstone project submissions including team formation, idea submission, and progress tracking. Doctors can upload lecture and exam schedules, define departments and subjects, schedule quizzes, and manage student grades. Administrators are granted full access to oversee, edit, and manage all data and users within the system. The primary goal of this system is to digitize and streamline academic workflows, reduce manual interventions, improve communication among stakeholders, and ensure accurate tracking of academic records and capstone project progress.
description: A modern, full-stack web application designed to digitize and streamline academic processes. The system features a 3-tier architecture separating the user interface, business logic, and data management layers. It includes AI-driven features such as facial expression and head pose data collection for monitoring student engagement. The platform supports three distinct user roles—students, instructors, and administrators—each with a dedicated dashboard to manage their respective academic responsibilities, from course enrollment and scheduling to capstone project tracking.
problem_statement: Educational institutions often rely on manual or fragmented systems for managing student activities, course enrollment, schedules, exams, and capstone projects. This leads to inefficient communication, manual data entry errors, lack of centralized control, difficulty in tracking project progress, and delays in administrative tasks, ultimately affecting the performance and satisfaction of both students and staff.
proposed_solution: A centralized, web-based Student Management System that automates academic operations. The solution provides role-specific dashboards for students, instructors, and administrators, ensuring secure, real-time access to information. It integrates modern web technologies to streamline workflows, improve communication, and provide a scalable, user-friendly platform for managing all academic data.
objectives: 1. Facilitate secure student registration and login. 2. Enable subject and department enrollment. 3. Provide real-time access to lecture, exam, and quiz schedules. 4. Support capstone project management including team formation and progress tracking. 5. Provide a doctor's panel for managing subjects, schedules, and grades. 6. Provide an administrator control panel for full system oversight. 7. Ensure centralized, synchronized data access. 8. Improve communication and administrative efficiency.
ai_summary: This project is a comprehensive, AI-integrated web-based Student Management System designed to digitize academic workflows for students, instructors, and administrators. It features role-based dashboards for managing course enrollment, schedules, and capstone projects, while utilizing AI for student engagement monitoring to improve the overall educational experience.

abstract: This documentation explains the basic principles of virtual reality technology and the best ways to apply it into different applications. We use the VR (Virtual Reality) system in our project to make dental treatment for children simpler and easier for all dentists, and reduce children's fears of dentists. We are creating a VR experience for children with dental phobia to help them overcome their fears. The experience is divided into two parts: a game the child plays in the waiting room to become familiar with dental tools, and a cartoon/video experience during the session to provide a mental distraction and help the child feel calm.
description: The Hero Dentist is a VR-based medicinal application designed to alleviate dental phobia in children. By utilizing immersion, imagination, and interaction, the system provides a gamified environment where children can learn about dental hygiene, interact with virtual tools, and watch calming content during dental procedures to reduce anxiety and pain perception.
problem_statement: Many children suffer from dental phobia, which makes routine dental visits difficult, stressful, and traumatic for both the child and the dentist.
proposed_solution: A virtual reality application that uses gamification and distraction techniques. It includes an interactive game to familiarize children with dental tools and a calming video environment to distract them during actual dental procedures.
objectives: To eliminate fear in children regarding dentists, to make dental visits more comfortable and fun, to educate children on proper dental hygiene, and to assist dentists by keeping patients calm during procedures.
ai_summary: The Hero Dentist is a VR application designed to help children overcome dental phobia by providing an immersive, gamified experience. It uses interactive games to familiarize children with dental tools and calming video content to reduce anxiety during dental visits.

abstract: This project presents a robust fingerprint recognition system designed for both verification and identification purposes. By leveraging FPGA technology, the system provides a high-performance, reconfigurable hardware solution for capturing, processing, and matching unique fingerprint patterns to ensure secure authentication.
description: The project implements a biometric security system that utilizes fingerprint scanning to verify or identify individuals. It operates in two primary modes: Verification, which performs a one-to-one comparison to confirm a claimed identity, and Identification, which performs a one-to-many comparison to determine an unknown user's identity against a stored database. The system is built on FPGA architecture to allow for efficient, hardware-level processing of biometric data.
problem_statement: Traditional security methods like passwords or ID cards can be lost, stolen, or forgotten. There is a need for a more reliable, unique, and non-transferable method of identity verification that is robust against unauthorized access.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a hardware-accelerated fingerprint recognition system implemented on an FPGA. This approach ensures high-speed feature extraction and matching, providing a secure and reliable biometric authentication mechanism that is difficult to circumvent.
objectives: To design and implement a fingerprint recognition system; to support both verification and identification modes; to utilize FPGA technology for efficient hardware-based biometric processing; and to ensure high accuracy and speed in user authentication.
ai_summary: This project develops a secure biometric authentication system using fingerprint recognition implemented on an FPGA. It supports both one-to-one verification and one-to-many identification to provide a reliable and high-performance security solution.

keywords: Missing persons, Facial recognition, Data scraping, Real-time notifications, Community-centric, Social impact, Information systems
abstract: Lost Trace is a cutting-edge platform designed to aid in locating missing persons by utilizing advanced technologies and a community-centric approach. The platform comprises both a web application and a mobile application, allowing users to report missing cases, search for missing individuals, view ongoing investigations, and collaborate with related organizations. It leverages TensorFlow for face recognition, Puppeteer for automated data scraping, and Socket.io for real-time communication. The system is built on a robust stack including Node.js, Express, React, React Native, and PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM, ensuring a secure, scalable, and efficient ecosystem for reuniting missing persons with their families.
description: Lost Trace is a comprehensive, AI-powered platform designed to modernize the search for missing persons. It moves beyond traditional, manual, and uncoordinated search methods by providing a centralized, intelligent, and collaborative ecosystem. The platform integrates facial recognition to match missing persons with data scraped from online sources, provides real-time alerts to stakeholders, and facilitates community engagement to improve the success rate of investigations while maintaining data privacy and security.
problem_statement: The current process for finding missing persons is largely manual, slow, and uncoordinated, relying on scattered efforts like social media posts, printed flyers, and police reports. There is a lack of centralized digital systems, limited use of intelligent tools like facial recognition, and no efficient way to alert families or coordinate community efforts, leading to delays and increased emotional distress for affected families.
proposed_solution: Lost Trace provides a unified, AI-powered platform that automates the search process. It uses TensorFlow for accurate facial recognition matching, Puppeteer for automated data collection from social media, and Socket.io for real-time notifications. The system offers a cross-platform experience (Web and Mobile) with structured case management via a PostgreSQL database, enabling families, communities, and organizations to collaborate effectively in real-time.
objectives: To create a centralized and intelligent system for missing persons, reduce the time and effort required for investigations, implement AI-driven facial recognition for accurate matching, foster community collaboration through real-time updates, and provide a secure, scalable platform that eases the burden on families and authorities.
ai_summary: Lost Trace is an AI-powered platform that streamlines the search for missing persons by integrating facial recognition, automated social media data scraping, and real-time communication. It provides a centralized, cross-platform solution that enables families, communities, and organizations to collaborate efficiently and increase the likelihood of reuniting missing individuals with their loved ones.

student_names: Yahia Mohammed Mansour Hassan Hamza, Mohammed Sabry Mahmoud Shehabeldin, Hadi Rabee Kamel Alam Heikal, Eslam Hany Elsayed Zoghla, Taha Ebrahim Taha Ebrahim, Gamal Adel Gamal Khalifa, Soliman Mahmoud Soliman Elsayed, Fatma Ebrahim Kamel Ebrahim, Marwa Sayed Farghaly Sayed Ahmed

technologies: HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Sass, Pugjs, Figma, C#, ASP.NET Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Entity Framework Core, Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Transformers, NumPy, pypdf, Pandas, Torchaudio, datasets, Soundfile, pydub, Spacy, NLTK
keywords: E-learning, Artificial Intelligence, Natural Language Processing, Interactive Learning, Automated Assessment, Question Generation, Speech Recognition, Text-to-Speech
abstract: Our project encompasses an advanced electronic learning platform meticulously designed to elevate the educational experience. Within this innovative ecosystem, a seamless registration system and an intuitive enrollment process give students access to a rich range of courses, all expertly led by certified teachers. Each course listing is akin to a treasure trove of knowledge, brimming with comprehensive instructor profiles, course lengths, and invaluable peer reviews. This educational haven focuses on interactive learning and fosters a dynamic and collaborative environment through its group chat function. It also facilitates course evaluations and provides a platform for constructive feedback. It's important to highlight that the project integrates advanced artificial intelligence models, including question generation and answering, thus enhancing the depth and quality of the learning experience. These artificial intelligence models also contribute to creating a safe and respectful online educational space through an AI model designed to prevent the use of inappropriate language. Furthermore, our project offers a unique dimension where educators play a pivotal role in enriching the learning journey. They supplement their courses with educational videos, enhancing comprehension of the content. Additionally, all essential PDF materials are thoughtfully provided for comprehensive study throughout the course's duration. The innovation continues with the integration of a chatbot, designed to assist and guide users through any ambiguities or complexities within the course materials. This interactive element extends to AI-powered Text-to-Speech (TTS) technology, which converts text into speech, raising the overall quality and accessibility of educational content with greater accuracy. Complementing TTS, our Speech Recognition model opens up new avenues of engagement for individuals who may struggle with writing.
description: Learnaira is an interactive, AI-powered e-learning platform designed to democratize education by making it accessible, engaging, and personalized. The platform features a comprehensive suite of tools including video instruction, AI-based support, text-to-speech, and speech recognition to cater to diverse learning styles and accessibility needs. It streamlines the educational process for both instructors and students by automating administrative tasks like exam generation and grading, while fostering a collaborative environment through group discussions and real-time feedback.
problem_statement: Traditional e-learning environments often lack sufficient interactivity, leading to lower student engagement and retention. Additionally, instructors face significant burdens in manually creating and grading exams, which can be time-consuming and prone to human bias or error. Furthermore, existing platforms often lack accessibility features for users with disabilities or those who prefer alternative communication methods.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a web-based, AI-driven e-learning platform that automates exam creation and grading using deep learning models (transformers) to interpret semantic meaning. It incorporates accessibility features like speech-to-text and text-to-speech, provides an AI chatbot for student support, and utilizes a secure, role-based architecture to ensure a safe and collaborative learning environment.

abstract: Recently, crime rates have increased in many regions and countries, which makes it difficult for police personnel to control the situation as soon as possible because of the lack of a good surveillance system that alerts to the sence ofa danger or armed robbery in a place and sends a signal to the concerned authorities to act and deal with the incident as soon as possible, but now the surveillance cameras are playing a big role in detecting crimes very easily than before, and this is why we have created a system that detects various criminal weapons of all kinds, where the system creates a square on the suspected weapon (knife or gun) to warn of the existence of an operation Robbery or terrorist act, and among the types of these weapons we have focused on certain weapons that are usually used in robbery operations, including (Pistols, Rifles, Handguns, Revolvers, Shotguns, Bolt-Action, knifes) and the model that helped us to make a detection on weapons is Faster R-CNN with Inception-V2, as it provides the best performance over the rest of the recognized models.
description: Our Solution We provide a software solution which plays a role in detection and surveillance of weapons using Faster R-CNN method and inception V2 architecture, this approach showed a good accuracy in its performance. It can detect weapons either guns or cold weapons then alarm is triggered so the security members can deal with the case before anything wrong happens. Also our system has the most used weapons in attacks and information about them like firing range, rate of fire and the damage of the weapon. These information help the police department and Forensic Medicine in their searches for criminals and used weapons in attacks.

abstract: As cities continue to grow and evolve, the demand for flexible and convenient housing solutions has never been greater. The project aims to meet this demand by offering a range of thoughtfully designed rental properties tailored to the needs of diverse lifestyles and demographics. Key features of the project include a diverse portfolio of rental units, ranging from compact studios to spacious family homes, catering to individuals, couples, and families alike. Each unit is meticulously designed to optimize space, functionality, and comfort, with moderm amenities and high-quality finishes to enhance the living experience. Furthermore, the project leverages technology to streamline the rental process, enhance security, and improve overall convenience for residents. such as online leasing and payment platforms, innovative technologies are employed to simplify and enhance the rental experience. Background
description: Our solution, a comprehensive application for renting apartments, addresses the inefficiencies and challenges in the current rental market by integrating advanced features and technologies into a single, user- friendly platform. Unlike traditional methods and existing digital solutions, our application offers a holistic approach that benefits both tets and landlords through enhanced accessibility, reliability, and convenience. For tets, our application provides a centralized platform with extensive listings that include detailed property descriptions, high- quality images, and virtual tours. Advanced search and filter options allow users to quickly find apartments that meet their specific criteria, such as location, price range, size, and amenities. Our platform also incorporates robust verification processes to ensure the legitimacy of listings and landlords, reducing the risk of scams. Additionally, a review system allows tets to share their rental experiences, promoting transparency and trust. Landlords benefit from tools designed to simplify property management and tet interactions. Our application enables landlords to manage multiple listings efficiently, respond to tet inquiries promptly, and schedule viewings seamlessly through an automated system. Background checks and digital lease management are integrated into the platform, streamlining the administrative process. Secure payment gateways facilitate rent collection and ficial transactions, ensuring both convenience

abstract: The health care scene is witnessing continuous development, with a focus on improving accessibility and increasing comfort for patients. Our innovative project stands out by offering a comprehensive platform that revolutionizes healthcare experiences. We provide a variety of services that override the traditional offline-healthcare process. Our platform facilitates access to vital medical facilities such as online pharmacy, and medical laboratories, and includes an Al-powered chatbot to identify several diseases as an initial diagnosis. In conclusion, our project highlights the potentials of technology to facilitate the healthcare journey, representing its role in revolutionizing the medical field for the better. The project consists of three parts: A website featuring functionalities for patients, medical lab operators, and pharmacy as a service; the mobile application serving patients, and nurses; and the chatbot that works on diagnosing a certain number of diseases and provides necessary analyses for the initial disease diagnosis, with patients being able to interact with it via the website and the mobile application.
description: This project aims to develop a user-friendly online platform that facilitates convenient access to medical services and medications. It caters to both users seeking personal healthcare solutions and medical professionals managing laboratories, system pharmacy, and medical consultation. 1.4 Objectives Below are the project objectives that solve the limitations of the current system. For Patients: Simplify access to medical services: Enable users to browse available laboratories, view their services and details, and request appointments online, also to buy medicine online. Enhance privacy and security: Provide a secure platform for users to register, store personal information, and receive medical test results privately. Improve convenience: Allow users to schedule appointments, pay for services online, saving time and effort. Empower informed decision-making: Equip users with search functions, medication availability checks, and chatbot consultations to make informed healthcare choices. For Medical Laboratories: • Expand reach and attract new clients: Offer services online to a wider audience and increase visibility. Streamline appointment management: Efficiently manage service requests, and assign tasks to nurses. appointments, Improve service delivery: Facilitate home visits, receive feedback, and ensure patient satisfaction. abstract: The main goal of our project is to make an android application to help pilgrims to perform Hajj more easy and comfortable. Pilgrim (Hajj) is one of the main pillars of Islam and the journey of a lifetime, which every adult Muslim man and woman desires to perform. Every year about three million pilgrims from all around the world visit Mecca. These people move between different religious sites during the annual pilgrimage, some of them did not know what they are. The aim of the project is to help the user (Pilgrim) to find interesting places surrounding the current whereabouts to help him at easily knowing the places surrounding him by using GPS. Also help reduce or avoid the congestion found in some places of pilgrimage, which does not know anything about the pilgrim's arrivals. It also helps to connect each other pilgrims, I avoid the loss of people in the middle of the crowds of pilgrims. It also allows the user (Pilgrim) to know the rituals of Haj and performed true way to know and not need to carry the books in order to help him to know and to do bored reading process. In addition to other services that help pilgrim such as emergency calls, embassies (their phone numbers and addresses) and Prayer Time. The mobile application is designed for normal users to help users to avoid crowded places and include a step-by-step mini guide to the Hajj rituals, so that you know what steps you should do each day, and what rite to perform. The OS uses touch inputs that loosely correspond to real-world actions, like swiping, tapping, pinching, and reverse pinching to manipulate on-screen objects, and a virtual keyboard. abstract: Many educational institutions face significant challenges in providing safe, modern, and fully equipped chemistry laboratories due to high operational costs, maintece requirements, space limitations, and safety concerns. These barriers often hinder students' opportunities to perform practical experiments, which are essential for understanding scientific concepts deeply and developing critical thin king skills. Moreover, schools in remote or low-resource areas are often the most affected, creating inequality in access to quality science education. To address these limitations, our graduation project introduces ScienceVerse, a virtual chemistry lab that leverages Augmented Reality (AR) and Virtual Reality (VR) technologies to simulate real- world laboratory experiences in an immersive, interactive, and safe digital environment. The system enables students to browse and select experiments, review the required tools and step-by-step procedures, and perform them using AR on mobile devices or through full immersion using VR headsets. It also allows students to rate experiments and track their performance. The platform provides both free and premium experiments, making it suitable for wide educational use while maintaining flexibility in access and features. ScienceVerse is developed using Unity 3D for creating realistic AR/VR environments, Flutter for building a cross-platform mobile application, and .NET Core with SsQL Server for backend services and secure data management. The sy
description: 1.1 Project Description: The Science Verse application is a VR (Virtual Realty)/AR (Augmented Realty)-based platform designed to revolutionize Science education by providing a safe, accessible, and interactive virtual lab experience. Users can practice experiments in training mode with guided instructions, additionally users can host and supervise experiment sessions, while other users can join using secure IDs in future updates. The app allows users to visualize and interact with chemical processes in a realistic VR/AR environment, fostering engagement, enhancing understanding, and ensuring safety without the need for physical lab equipment or exposure to hazardous materials. 1.2 Problem Definition: Traditional Science labs often face several challenges that limit accessi bility, safety, and learning efficiency. Many students lack access to well-equipped labs, particularly in schools with limited resources, restricting hands-on experience. Even in equipped labs, safety concerns, such as exposure to hazardous chemicals and the risk of accidents, hinder experimentation. Additionally, students often struggle to understand complex chemical reactions and procedures due to insufficient guidance during practical sessions. These issues result in a learning gap and reduced engagement with the subject matter. 2 | Page

abstract: Skin diseases are the fourth most prevalent cause of human illness, contributing significantly to non-fatal burdens on daily activities. These conditions result from exposure to chemical, physical, and biological factors. Traditionally, diagnosis relies on visual assessment combined with clinical information, but this approach is manual, time-consuming, and requires both expertise and keen visual perception. This study presents an automated system for diagnosing common skin diseases. In addition to diagnosis, the system offers skincare products and herbal cosmetics, which are supplied by pre-contracted pharmacies. To develop the system, clinical images were captured using various smartphone cameras, and patient data was gathered during the registration process. Several preprocessing and data augmentation techniques were applied to improve model performance prior to training. The system is available as both a smartphone app and a web application, making it a valuable decision support tool, especially in low resource settings where dermatological expertise and medical resources may be limited. Furthermore, the system provides personalized skincare tips and facilitates the delivery of skin care products through partnered pharmacies. Given the challenges of traditional skin disease diagnosis-such as time constraints, reliance on experience, and susceptibility to errors this automated solution aims to enhance the accuracy, accessibility, and efficiency of dermatological care
description: 1.2 PROBLEM SOLUTION The increasing prevalence of skin diseases, coupled with limited access to dermatologists and proper medical care, highlights the need for an efficient and accessible solution for carly detection and treatment. This project offers an innovative web-based system that integrates Al-driven skin disease detection, a built-in pharmacy, and an intelligent recommendation system for both pharmaceutical and herbal treatments. Utilizing advanced image processing and machine learning algorithms, the system allows users to upload images of affected skin areas for accurate diagnosis, eliminating the barriers of traditional medical consultations. Once a condition is identified, the system provides personalized recommendations for appropriate medications available in the integrated pharmacy, enabling users to purchase the required drugs instantly. Additionally, the platform suggests herbal remedies, catering to individuals who prefer natural treatment options or seek complementary therapies. By offering a seamless, all-in-one healthcare solution, the project improves accessibility to dermatological care, particularly for people in remote or underserved regions. It reduces the risks associated with self-diagnosis and improper medication use, ensuring users receive reliable medical guidance. Furthermore, the system promotes awareness and education about various skin conditions, empowering individuals to take proactive steps in managing their skin health. By combining Al-d
