abstract: Eve is known as mirror of the human body. In this project, we especially interested in retina of the eye by focusing on one of its diseases which is Diabetic Retinopathy. Retina is the layer of tissue found at the very back of the eye. When light enters your eye and hits the retina, the retina will process that light information and send signals to the brain through your optic nerve enabling you to see. Without the retina, your brain won't receive any signals about what you're seeing so we consider a healthy retina as a critical health issue for a good vision. Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a threatening retinal disease characterized by the presence of different types of lesions in the affected area, it occurs in people suffering from diabetes for a long period of time and exhibiting mild to severe symptoms. We can describe retinal lesions as Tumors appears in many different shapes on the eye. Detecting DR is a time-consuming and manual process involves right classification of lesions into their appropriate classes that can be an error-prone process, also limited number of eye care practitioners who are trained in interpreting retinal images and evaluate fundus photographs constitute a barrier to DR detection. To address these challenges, this project focuses on developing an automated DR detection system. The automated DR detection methods will speed up the detection and decision-making process and assist doctors diagnose and manage DR detection process. This project presents
description: The main objective of this project is to help the doctor discover lesions of retina and their impact more quickly than he does by looking at a regular medical examination to take the necessary measures for follow-up and treatment. Helping doctors by several methods helping in diagnosis process by allowing them to upload an image and take a right decision based on the result. Or by making segmentation for the image this process is similar to the scan process detect the border of the lesion and separate the lesion from the whole image this will help the doctor in deciding what to do. As the blood vessel behavior change due to the disease this segmentation process allows the doctor to detect the blood vessels and know the patient's disease We also aim to help the doctor by following up the patient case to determine if the case is getting better or not The doctor will upload old image and compare it with the new one the system will show what is the similarities and differences between the two images

abstract: The Integrated Healthcare Management System with AI-Driven Diagnostics and Patient Support signifies a groundbreaking evolution in healthcare delivery by amalgamating advanced technologies and seamlessly integrating laboratory and radiology services. This transformative system is aligned with the broader context of the digitalization of laboratories, where the shift from paper-based, analog recording to digital infrastructure fosters efficiency, collaboration, and transparency. the digitalization of laboratories encompasses the adoption of automated systems, robotics, and artificial intelligence. Within this context, the Integrated Healthcare Management System emerges as a comprehensive solution, prioritizing accessibility and accuracy. Users navigate a user-friendly interface to create accounts and explore laboratory sites, streamlining the search for nearby, cost-effective, and high- quality testing facilities. Through the system's intuitive interface, users gain access to a detailed catalog of tests and radiological services, complete with information on requirements and transparent cost breakdowns. Artificial intelligence analyzes test results meticulously, identifying health indicators and generating comprehensive reports. An interactive chatbot engages users in meaningful dialogues, offering diagnostic recommendations and suggesting specialized medical professionals based on Al-driven analyses. Moreover, the system facilitates the seamless upload of X-ray images, subjec

project_title: Eye and mouth movement controlled robot arm
technologies: numPy opencv servo.h
keywords: medical, assessment, development
abstract: This research presents an innovative assistive robotic system designed to aid individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis by harnessing the power of multimodal human- robot interaction. The system integrates eye-tracking technology to enable precise control of a robotic arm through intuitive eye movements, catering to the specific needs of users facing upper limb mobility challenges. Additionally, the gripping functionality of the robotic hand is seamlessly regulated through mouth gestures, providing a hands-free approach for users with limited or no arm functionality. The primary objective of this research is to enhance the independence and daily living capabilities of individuals with upper limb impairments by offering an intuitive and efficient control mechanism. By focusing on the unique needs of this user group, the project aims to contribute to the development of assistive technologies that empower users to perform a variety of tasks with greater ease and autonomy. ABSTRACT The evaluation of the proposed multimodal assistive robotic system will involve user trials and assessments, with a particular emphasis on user satisfaction, system responsiveness, and the practicality of the designed interface for individuals facing upper limb mobility challenges. The research aspires to make significant strides in the field of assistive robotics, offering a promising avenue for improved human-robot interaction tailored to the specific needs of users with upper limb amputat

keywords: clinical, health, management, learning, assessment, regulation
abstract: Recent technological advancements have paved the way for innovative approaches in uroscience and cognitive analysis, particularly in stress detection and mental health assessment. This study proposes a Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) utilizing Electroencephalography (EEG) and machine learning algorithms to classify stress levels in real-time. The research focuses on analyzing EEG signals from the prefrontal cortex (PFC), a key region involved in emotional regulation and cognitive processing. Stress is induced using a controlled experiment based on the Montreal Imaging Stress Task (MIST), incorporating time pressure and negative feedback. EEG data is recorded using the Emotive EpocX headset, capturing key frequency bands (Alpha, Beta, and Theta waves) that indicate stresS responses. This system enables real-time monitoring of cognitive and emotional states, facilitating early detection of stress, which is crucial for individuals experiencing high cognitive loads. Moreover, the integration of AI-driven EEG analysis in stress research opens new avenues for developing personalized mental health solutions, neuroadaptive interfaces, and continuous stress monitoring systems. By leveraging EEG and machine learning, this research contributes to the advancement of neurotechnology applications in mental well- being, workplace productivity, and clinical stress management

technologies: JavaScript typescript node.js python postgreSQL express.js flask Tensorflow keras react.js unity deepmotion c# github

abstract: In today's digital age, communication platforms play a pivotal role in connecting individuals worldwide. This project is oriented towards the development ofa pioneering application for the deaf community, with a main focus on enhancing communication strength. The application is specifically designed to prioritize accessibility, incorporating features finely attuned to the distinct requirements of deaf users. These encompass crucial elements such as captions for audio and video content, coupled with robust support for sign language, thereby fostering an environment that promotes inclusive communication. Beyond these foundational features, the application integrates advanced functionalities, including interactive avatar for the deaf community, recognized speech captions, schedules, and notifications, augmenting the overall communicative experience. A notable innovation within the application is the incorporation of an avatar system, strategically engineered to proficiently transform vocal sentences into signs. This distinctive feature not only aligns with the application's inclusive design aspects but also significantly amplifies its communicative competence, facilitating seamless interactions among members of the deaf community. This unique augmentation distinguishes the application by transcending conventional boundaries, rendering communication more fluid and accessible. The primary objective of this project resides in the development of a user-friendly video conferencing pl
description: Key Features of the Solution: 1. Video Conferencing with Sign Language Interpreters Integration: Our website offers a user- friendly video conferencing interface where deaf and non-deaf individuals can engage in real-time communication. Through the integration of artificial intelligence (AI), specifically machine learning and deep learning models, the platform automatically detects and translates sign language gestures into written text. 2. Real-time Speech-to-Text Conversion: In addition to converting sign language gestures, our platform utilizes AI to convert spoken speech from non-deaf individuals into written text in real-time. This ensures that all verbal communication is accurately transcribed, providing deat individuals with access to spoken conversations. 3. Avatar-based Sign Language Interpretation: To further enhance communication accessibility, our platform employs avatar technology to transform written text into sign language animations, These avatars dynamically interpret the transcribed text into sign language gestures, allowing deat individuals to visually understand the conversation during video chats. 4. Accessibility and Inclusivity: By integrating advanced Al technologies and customizable Teatures, our platform prioritizes accessibility and inclusivity in communication. Dear indviduals can participate fully in video chats with non-deaf individuals, fostering meaningful interactions and breaking down communication barriers.

Real-time Speech-to-Text Conversion: In addition to converting sign language gestures, our platform utilizes AI to convert spoken speech from non-deaf individuals into written text in real-time. This ensures that all verbal communication is accurately transcribed, providing deat individuals with access to spoken conversations. 3. Avatar-based Sign Language Interpretation: To further enhance communication accessibility, our platform employs avatar technology to transform written text into sign language animations, These avatars dynamically interpret the transcribed text into sign language gestures, allowing deat individuals to visually understand the conversation during video chats. 4. Accessibility and Inclusivity: By integrating advanced Al technologies and customizable Teatures, our platform prioritizes accessibility and inclusivity in communication. Dear indviduals can participate fully in video chats with non-deaf individuals, fostering meaningful interactions and breaking down communication barriers.

abstract: This project aims to explore the effectiveness of utilizing virtual reality (VR) technology in the treatment of children with cerebral palsy (CP). Specifically, we developed two mini-sport games within 3D Unity environment and computer vision: football and squash. The football game targets various physical aspects including balance, hip flexors, knee extensors, ankle dorsiflexors, as well as addressing symptoms such as ataxia and polyneuropathy commonly associated with CP. On the other hand, Tennise focuses on enhancing fine motor skills and occupational therapy for these children. Through immersive VR experiences tailored to the needs of children with CP, we seek to provide an engaging and effective therapeutic approach to improve their physical and cognitive abilities. This study highlights the potential of VR-based interventions in pediatric rehabilitation, offering a promising avenue for enhancing the quality of life and functional independence of children with CP
description: In our project we focus on using virtual reality (VR) gaming system to address the specific needs of children who are suffering from Cerebral Palsy. Cerebral Palsy is a neurological disorder that affects a person's ability to control their muscles and movements. In this case, the children experience weakness in all four limbs and have difficulty maintaining balance. General Objective : 1. Enhance motor skills: Utilize VR gaming system to provide interactive activities targeting specific muscle groups, encouraging repetitive movements, and improving motor control, coordination, and limb strength in children with CP. 2. Improve balance: Create VR environments that simulate challenging scenarios to address balance and stability issues. Engage children in balance-oriented activities and exercises within the virtual world to enhance core strength and stability. 3. Boost overall physical abilities: Offer a comprehensive intervention through the VR gaming system, incorporating activities that promote cardiovascular fitness, flexibility, and overall physical well-being in children with CP. 4. Enhance quality of life: By improving motor skills, balance, and physical abilities, enable children with CP to experience greater independence and participation in daily activities. These foster increased self-esteem, social interaction, and overall well-being, ultimately enhancing their quality of life. In addition to these objectives, it would be important to consider

abstract: The medical community is one of the most important parts in our daily life. Every day, our needs from that field increasing in addition the doctors find new ways and solutions for every disease in the planet. From this evolution in the medical field, a big problem arises. This problem is dealing with the paperwork in the hospital, which cause a bad experience for the patients and the doctors. Nowadays, the medical community is being computerized. Therefore, we need to simplify the access of the patients to have the needed information about doctors, nurses, and workers of each hospital. We are aiming to make the whole process much easier starting from the patient booking his appointment to doctors, till attending the appointment. In addition, we aim to help the doctors to write their prescriptions online and upload them to the patients. The best part is to help doctors with their diagnoses by using some Machine Learning Models to detect some disease based on the patient analysis. Background
description: Our project objective, as we mentioned above is to make the whole processes easier for all the community including patients, doctors, and the administration. We aim to enable the ability of the patient to view information about the whole hospital from the website and book appointment with a specific doctor from home and see the diagnoses and the prescriptions from home. Also, we aim to help doctors to make their schedule and help them diagnose the patients with using some Machine Learning Models. Another objective of our website is to make the process of storing information much easier with the administration of the hospital to avoid any problems in our community.

abstract: The project revolves around the development of an Information System tailored for managing daycare services for children. This system streamlines the application process, initial acceptance procedures, interview scheduling, child evaluation, administrative tasks, supervision, and stakeholder communication. The application process involves parents completing a form containing personal details about the child. Subsequently, an evaluator reviews the submitted data and grants initial acceptance if the criteria are met. Parents receive email notifications regarding interview scheduling with an assigned interviewer, responsible for evaluating the child's suitability . Administrators play a crucial role in staff selection, group formation, and event planning within the daycare center. Supervisors oversee attendance, issue notifications, compile weekly reports, and manage meal arrangements. Additionally, they ensure effective communication with parents through designated notification schedules and report mechan isms. Social specialists are tasked with monitoring student behavior, providing guidance, and reporting behavioral concerns to parents. They aim to foster a positive and conducive learning environment for all children.ca eiie Bus supervisors oversee transportation logistics, including student distribution and coordination with bus monitors. They ensure timely and efficient transportation services, minim izing disruptions for both students and parents. Paren

full_content: Daycare Management System. Daycare Management System. The project revolves around the development of an Information System tailored for managing daycare services for children. This system streamlines the application process, initial acceptance procedures, interview scheduling, child evaluation, administrative tasks, supervision, and stakeholder communication. The application process involves parents completing a form containing personal details about the child. Subsequently, an evaluator reviews the submitted data and grants initial acceptance if the criteria are met. Parents receive email notifications regarding interview scheduling with an assigned interviewer, responsible for evaluating the child's suitability . Administrators play a crucial role in staff selection, group formation, and event planning within the daycare center. Supervisors oversee attendance, issue notifications, compile weekly reports, and manage meal arrangements. Additionally, they ensure effective communication with parents through designated notification schedules and report mechan isms. Social specialists are tasked with monitoring student behavior, providing guidance, and reporting behavioral concerns to parents. They aim to foster a positive and conducive learning environment for all children.ca eiie Bus supervisors oversee transportation logistics, including student distribution and coordination with bus monitors. They ensure timely and efficient transportation services, minim izing disruptions for both students and parents. Paren. In a bustling world where parents juggle professional responsibilities and family life, finding reliable and nurturing childcare solutions becomes paramount. Our project aims to revolutionize the daycare experience by introducing an innovative Information Systerm tailored specifically for managing childcare services. Imagine a seamless process where parents can effortlessly navigate through applications. administrators can efficiently coordinate staffing and activities, supervisors can ensure the well-being of each child, and social specialists can foster a positive learning environment. Our system revolution izes every facet of daycare management, seamlessly integrating everything from the initial application process to daily operations and fostering parental engagement. By harmessing the power of technology, we aspire to elevate communication, efficiency, and the overall quality of childcare services. • Beyond mere operational streamlining, our system aims to cultivate a nurturing environment where children flourish, and families discover peace of mind. Through innovative technological solutions, we are reshaping the daycare landscape, ensuring accessibility, eficiency, and enrichment for all stakeholders involved. Th sin • Join us as we embark on this journey to redefine childcare, one innovative solution at a time.

abstract: Railway Reservation System is a conmplex online distributed transaction application based on client server architecture. The salient features of the software include allowing user from anywhere to do a booking for a journey in any train in any class from anywhere to anywhere; handling reservation, modification cancellation/refunds. This system is basically concerned with the reservation and cancellation of railway tickets to the passenger. The need of this system arouse because as is the known fact that India has the largest railway network in the whole world and it is not possible to handle such a large system manually. By computerizing it, it become possible to overcome the limitations and make the system operations more efficient. The complexity in handling data and records of such a vast system got reduced and became easier by computerizing the system. Also to reduce the time and take advantage of the lack of contention of passengers at the station occurs tracking of trains so that the passenger arrives at the time of arrival of the train and no need to wait. To avoid accidents between the trains, the system will control the communication between the train drives to give the train signals and stops between the station and the other

abstract: Online shopping or Ecommerce became yery common matter nowadays. And with tremendous increase in mobiles and tablets, shopping on mobile is getting more popular each day. Customers have started expecting their retailers to have a mobile presence. From this point, our team developed an ecommerce mobile application for which this document has been prepared. The proposed system is an android application that acts as an intermediary between cUstomer and vendor. The vendors add the products to the system freely, then customer purchase these added products with cache on delivery payment. The prop0sed system satisfies basic functions of an ecommerce application such as registration, shopping cart, product management, order management and other functions can be explored during reading this document. But ecommerce applications have increased dramatically every day so competition among them has increased too, so basic functions of an ecommerce application are not enough. So improving services provided to application users is a must. To achieve that, we followed two approaches which are optimizing customer services approach and vendor services approach. Customer provided services improved by using different Data Mining algorithms. By using data mining, various recommendation algorithms are developed upon customer behavior and customers' orders. Not only that, but a dynamic shipment cost algorithm is developed to calculate cost of shipment dynamically. Vendor provided services improved b

abstract: Driver behaviours have a lot of effects in many fields. The bad driver has a negative impact on safety for the human soul if this person was another drive or a passer. Also, in the economy. The bad driver damages cars or buses. And he reduces its life span Which means a lot of cost for the Maintece and the replacement. And for the environment, destroyed cars and its parts are a big problem for its recycling or at least Get rid of it. Our idea aims to measure driver behaviour based on artificial intelligence (AI), to provide a fair rating for companies to track drivers' behaviours to save human souls and preserve the life of their cars. This leads to preserving the environment
description: A driver behavior is the set of actions performs to ensure both the safety of people and compliance to the driving regulations obviously, safety and compliance imply speed limits being respected. Driver behavior is one of the most important aspects in the design, development, and application of Advanced Driving Assistance Systems and Intelligent Transportation Systems, and is an aspect you need to monitor as part of risk assessment and in an attempt to cut costs. If you are able to measure the driving style of your staf, there is a lot of actions you can take in order to improve fleet safety, global road safety as well as fuel efficiency and emissions. Driver behavior strongly impacts traffic security and causes the vast majority of motor vehicle accidents. Driver behavior adaptations might increase overall security and lessen vehicle fuel and gas emissions. In this context, driver behavior profiling tries to better understand and potentially improve driver behavior, leveraging a safer and more energy aware driving. Driver monitoring and analysis or driver behavior profiling is the process of automatically collecting driving data (e.g., speed, acceleration, breaking, steering, location) and applying a computational model to them in order to generate a safety score for the driver. Driving data collection may be achieved by several kinds of sensors. Evaluating and following up the driver will reduce the number of accidents and traffic crises

The application also provides us with setting alarms to follow up on taking medications and this helps in treating chronic conditions such as diabetes, heart disease, etc. We can also know the nearest hospital to us and locate it, application enables us to follow up on close people with irregular cases (Oxygen ratio - heart rate - temperature) through a device placed on their hands connected to the application. We used the Internet of Things (10T) technology, which is a system of interrelated computing devices, machines or objects with unique identifiers and the ability to communicate the data over a network or Internet without requiring human intervention.

project_title: Find Missing people using Face Recognition
technologies: kotlin, python flask
keywords: artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, computer vision
abstract: Our project "Find Missed People Using Face Recognition" is a Android application that aims to help users find missing individuals by utilizing advanced facial recognition technology. With this application, users can upload an image of the missing person, along with other relevant details, such as their name, age, and last known location. The uploaded image will then be compared with the images in the system's database using state-of-the-art facial recognition algorithms, which will allow the application to identify and match the missing person's face with a high level of accuracy. The primary objective of this application is to help people locate missing individuals more efficiently and effectively. In cases where a person has gone missing, time is of the essence, and the faster they can be found, the better. The application's innovative facial recognition technology will significantly enhance the search process by providing a more accurate and efficient means of identification. And to ensure that the application is user-friendly and easy to navigate, it will feature a simple and intuitíve interface. Users will be able to upload the necessary details and images quickly and effortlessly. The application's advanced facial recognition technology will be seamlessly integrated into this interface, making it easy for users to access and use.
description: The problem of missing persons and children is a global issue that affects many countries, including Egypt. According to the Missing Persons' Families Association in Egypt, there were 3,000 reported cases of missing persons in Egypt in 2020, including both adults and children. This number is likely to be an underestimate as many cases go unreported or unsolved. In addition, the Association estimates that there are currently around 5,500 missing persons in Egypt, with many of them being children. Globally, the problem ofmissing persons and children is also significant. The International Commission on Missing Persons estimates that there are currently over a milion people missing worldwide, with many cases going unreported or unsolved. This includes individuals who have been abducted, run away from home, or are missing due to natural disasters, conflicts, or other reasons. One potential solution to the problem of missing persons and children is the development of reliable, fast, and secure methods ofreporting and identifying missing individuals. With the widespread use of smartphones and other mobile devices, there is an opportunity to create a product that everyone can use to report and track missing persons. Such a product could be an app or platform that enables individuals to report a missing person using just a picture of their face. The app could use facial recognition technology to match the reported person with other reports in the database, increasing the chances of lo

project_title: Remember Me Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease and a patient follow-up system
technologies: dart, flutter, HTML, css, js, php, mvc approach, mvc, mysql, sqlite, laravel, keras, tensorflow, python

abstract: According to the WHO, around 50 million people suffer from dementia, and nearly 10 million new cases of AD are reported every year. And that number is expected to increase drastically in the coming years. But no real progress has been made in the fight against the disease since its classification was more than 100 years ago. Alzheimer's disease (AD) is the most common type of dementia. It is a progressive disease beginning with mild memory loss and possibly leading to loss of the ability to carry on a conversation and respond to the environment. AD involves parts of the brain that control thought, memory, and language. It can seriously affect a person's ability to carry out daily activities. There is currently no known cure for the disease and age is the best-known risk factor for Alzheimer's disease. The major problem with this disease is that it cannot be recognized except by the appearance of its symptoms, and once the symptoms appear and the beginning of the disease, it cannot be stopped, like the sign of smoke appearing after the outbreak of fire, and it cannot be extinguished.[1 ] Here comes the most prominent role for early diagnosis of the disease, as scientists believe that once the early stage of the disease is identified, it can be a major factor in the actual control of the disease. Areas of neuronal synapses in the brain. In this project, we are working on trying to early diagnose the disease based on the patient's MRI images and trying to create a complete syste
description: In this project, we aimed to collect all the things which the patients and their caregivers need in one system. So on the web application, we aimed to put all the information the patient needs, what should he do at the different levels of the disease, what should he eat, and how to act with the disease. In addition, creating a memory test to find out the percentage of memory loss and a prediction test using MRI to diagnose the disease. As said previously, brain training is essential to prevent and delay Alzheimer's symptoms, because the more the brain is stimulated the more it is going to be reactive and retain information. So the mobile application will be an application to help the patient train his brain with a lot of tests and puzzles, in addition, to have all the patient's needs in one place. And the desktop application we will help the patient to test his memory and diagnosis the disease all the time The new in our project is that we aimed to collect all the patient needs in one complete whole system and we also aim to greatly increase awareness about the disease and improve the living conditions of patients by helping caregivers take care of patients

project_title: Mobile Based System for Traffic Monitoring and Guidance
technologies: Android
keywords: general, software system, graduation project, Benha University
abstract: The theme of the system/application is the usage of a combination of Mobile and Traffic Guidance Technologies to organize the world's information and to make it universally accessible and useful to a wider and better extent. We tried as information systems specialists to define, analyze, generate and implement an application with high degree of quality and simplicity. The proposed system is a mobile application that allowS online guidance and routing of user based on his current location, User's current location together with his destination is collected dynamically and completely independent of internet service. The system maintains road status to avoid crowded roads and provides user fully functional and active map that allows him to search fora particular place like some mall, or some spot for tourist interest by simply writing its name. System then automaticaly extracis destination's coordinates and processes user query. The results represents mainly the shortest route to destination taking into consideration the over crowdedness of the road. System as well shows real-time location-based alternatives that can be suitable to user search and current location.
description: No one can ignore the fact that traffic problem is not a newly born issue here in Egypt, but it is known for nearly thirty years ago, in the early eighties of the last century with the beginning of the rule of President Mubarak, who called at the time also to form a higher committee in 1982 to study the problem of traffic in the capital and overcome before they escalate, as is the case now, One of the main recommendations of this Committee is not to approve the construction of any major governmental or non- governnmental organizations in the city center. The traffic problem in Egypt has caused us a lot of trouble on a personal level and community level, we find difficult always because of the problems of overcrowding and the difficulty of transportation and the large number of fatal accidents, this problem is large and deep and has dimensions of economic, societal, environmental and psychological that had to be to us as part of the IT world that we are trying to start in finding solutions to this problem for our beloved country Egypt

description: Many pcople find difficult to search for doctors' clinics that are not far away from them, also some people cannot determine which doctors specializes in their health conditions. So, in this Project, we offer an application for customers to book an appointment in a clinic with doctor easily and can ask chatbot about which doctor can treat him. Application contain a chatbot that has information about diseases and the specialist doctor for each disease. User of application can enter symptoms of the disease that he feels then chatbot take these symptoms and analyze based on dataset, then it displays disease and specialist of doctor which should user visit. After user had knowledge of which doctor should visit, he now wants to book an appointment with a good doctor. Our project contains a list of containing a group of specialties. Each specialty contains a group of most skilled doctors(clinic) in country. Each doctor has a profile user can visit and could book an appointment with any doctor he wants. Application contain location that user can book an appointment with doctor based on nearest location.

Application contain a chatbot that has information about diseases and the specialist doctor for each disease. User of application can enter symptoms of the disease that he feels then chatbot take these symptoms and analyze based on dataset, then it displays disease and specialist of doctor which should user visit. After user had knowledge of which doctor should visit, he now wants to book an appointment with a good doctor. Our project contains a list of containing a group of specialties. Each specialty contains a group of most skilled doctors(clinic) in country. Each doctor has a profile user can visit and could book an appointment with any doctor he wants. Application contain location that user can book an appointment with doctor based on nearest location.
